AI.motivation: 标准思维链提示依赖线性自然语言，不足以有效建模具身任务中的世界状态。文本虽然灵活，但无法显式表示状态空间、对象层次和因果依赖关系，限制了机器人规划的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出面向对象世界建模(OOWM)框架，将世界模型定义为显式符号元组W=⟨S,T⟩，包含状态抽象G_state和环境状态S，以及控制策略G_control和转移逻辑T。使用UML类图将视觉感知转化为对象层次，用活动图将规划转化为可执行控制流。采用三阶段训练管道：监督微调(SFT)结合组相对策略优化(GRPO)，利用最终计划的基于结果的奖励隐式优化面向对象推理结构。
AI.result: 在MRoom-30k基准上的广泛评估表明，OOWM在规划一致性、执行成功率和结构保真度方面显著优于非结构化文本基线。
AI.conclusion: OOWM建立了结构化具身推理的新范式，通过软件工程形式化有效解决了传统文本推理在具身任务中的局限性。

title: Simulating Organized Group Behavior: New Framework, Benchmark, and Analysis
summary: Simulating how organized groups (e.g., corporations) make decisions (e.g., responding to a competitor's move) is essential for understanding real-world dynamics and could benefit relevant applications (e.g., market prediction). In this paper, we formalize this problem as a concrete research platform for group behavior understanding, providing: (1) a task definition with benchmark and evaluation criteria, (2) a structured analytical framework with a corresponding algorithm, and (3) detailed temporal and cross-group analysis. Specifically, we propose Organized Group Behavior Simulation, a task that models organized groups as collective entities from a practical perspective: given a group facing a particular situation (e.g., AI Boom), predict the decision it would take. To support this task, we present GROVE (GRoup Organizational BehaVior Evaluation), a benchmark covering 44 entities with 8,052 real-world context-decision pairs collected from Wikipedia and TechCrunch across 9 domains, with an end-to-end evaluation protocol assessing consistency, initiative, scope, magnitude, and horizon. Beyond straightforward prompting pipelines, we propose a structured analytical framework that converts collective decision-making events into an interpretable, adaptive, and traceable behavioral model, achieving stronger performance than summarization- and retrieval-based baselines. It further introduces an adapter mechanism for time-aware evolution and group-aware transfer, and traceable evidence nodes grounding each decision rule in originating historical events. Our analysis reveals temporal behavioral drift within individual groups, which the time-aware adapter effectively captures for stronger prediction, and structured cross-group similarity that enables knowledge transfer for data-scarce organizations.

AI.tldr: 提出有组织群体行为模拟任务，建立GROVE基准数据集，开发结构化分析框架提升群体决策预测性能
AI.motivation: 模拟有组织群体（如企业）的决策过程对理解现实世界动态至关重要，有助于市场预测等应用
AI.method: 1) 定义有组织群体行为模拟任务；2) 构建GROVE基准数据集（44个实体，8,052个真实上下文-决策对）；3) 提出结构化分析框架，将集体决策事件转化为可解释、自适应、可追溯的行为模型；4) 引入时间感知适配器和群体感知迁移机制
AI.result: 结构化分析框架在一致性、主动性、范围、幅度和时域等评估指标上优于基于总结和检索的基线方法；时间感知适配器能有效捕捉群体行为的时间漂移；跨群体相似性分析支持知识迁移到数据稀缺的组织
AI.conclusion: 该研究为群体行为理解提供了系统平台，结构化分析框架能有效模拟有组织群体的决策过程，时间感知和跨群体迁移机制增强了模型的适应性和泛化能力

title: STaR-DRO: Stateful Tsallis Reweighting for Group-Robust Structured Prediction
summary: Structured prediction requires models to generate ontology-constrained labels, grounded evidence, and valid structure under ambiguity, label skew, and heterogeneous group difficulty. We present a two-part framework for controllable inference and robust fine-tuning. First, we introduce a task-agnostic prompting strategy that combines XML-based instruction structure, disambiguation rules, verification-style reasoning, schema constraints, and self-validation to address format drift, label ambiguity, evidence hallucination, and metadata-conditioned confusion in in-context structured generation. Second, we introduce STaR-DRO, a stateful robust optimization method for group heterogeneity. It combines Tsallis mirror descent with momentum-smoothed, centered group-loss signals and bounded excess-only multipliers so that only persistently hard groups above a neutral baseline are upweighted, concentrating learning where it is most needed while avoiding volatile, dense exponentiated-gradient reweighting and unnecessary loss from downweighting easier groups. We evaluate the combined framework on EPPC Miner, a benchmark for extracting hierarchical labels and evidence spans from patient-provider secure messages. Prompt engineering improves zero-shot by +15.44 average F1 across Code, Sub-code, and Span over four Llama models. Building on supervised fine-tuning, STaR-DRO further improves the hardest semantic decisions: on Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, Code F1 rises from 79.24 to 81.47 and Sub-code F1 from 67.78 to 69.30, while preserving Span performance and reducing group-wise validation cross-entropy by up to 29.6% on the most difficult clinical categories. Because these rare and difficult groups correspond to clinically consequential communication behaviors, these gains are not merely statistical improvements: they directly strengthen communication mining reliability for patient-centered care analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出兩階段框架：任務無關提示策略改善結構化生成，STaR-DRO優化方法處理群體異質性，在醫療訊息抽取任務上顯著提升性能
AI.motivation: 結構化預測面臨本體約束標籤、模糊性、標籤偏斜和異質群體難度等挑戰，需要可控推理和魯棒微調方法來提升醫療溝通挖掘的可靠性
AI.method: 1) XML指令結構、消歧規則、驗證式推理、模式約束和自我驗證的提示策略；2) STaR-DRO：結合Tsallis鏡像下降、動量平滑群組損失信號和邊界超額乘子的狀態魯棒優化方法
AI.result: 提示工程在四個Llama模型上平均F1提升+15.44；STaR-DRO在Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct上Code F1從79.24升至81.47，Sub-code F1從67.78升至69.30，最難臨床類別交叉熵降低29.6%
AI.conclusion: 結合提示策略和STaR-DRO的框架能有效處理結構化生成挑戰，特別提升困難臨床類別的性能，增強患者中心護理分析的溝通挖掘可靠性

title: Immunizing 3D Gaussian Generative Models Against Unauthorized Fine-Tuning via Attribute-Space Traps
summary: Recent large-scale generative models enable high-quality 3D synthesis. However, the public accessibility of pre-trained weights introduces a critical vulnerability. Adversaries can fine-tune these models to steal specialized knowledge acquired during pre-training, leading to intellectual property infringement. Unlike defenses for 2D images and language models, 3D generators require specialized protection due to their explicit Gaussian representations, which expose fundamental structural parameters directly to gradient-based optimization. We propose GaussLock, the first approach designed to defend 3D generative models against fine-tuning attacks. GaussLock is a lightweight parameter-space immunization framework that integrates authorized distillation with attribute-aware trap losses targeting position, scale, rotation, opacity, and color. Specifically, these traps systematically collapse spatial distributions, distort geometric shapes, align rotational axes, and suppress primitive visibility to fundamentally destroy structural integrity. By jointly optimizing these dual objectives, the distillation process preserves fidelity on authorized tasks while the embedded traps actively disrupt unauthorized reconstructions. Experiments on large-scale Gaussian models demonstrate that GaussLock effectively neutralizes unauthorized fine-tuning attacks. It substantially degrades the quality of unauthorized reconstructions, evidenced by significantly higher LPIPS and lower PSNR, while effectively maintaining performance on authorized fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: GaussLock是首个针对3D生成模型的微调攻击防御框架，通过参数空间免疫和属性感知陷阱损失来保护预训练模型的知识产权。
AI.motivation: 预训练3D生成模型的公开可访问性带来了知识产权泄露风险，攻击者可以通过微调窃取专业知识。与2D图像和语言模型不同，3D生成器需要专门的保护，因为其高斯表示直接将结构参数暴露给梯度优化。
AI.method: 提出GaussLock框架，结合授权蒸馏和属性感知陷阱损失。陷阱针对位置、尺度、旋转、不透明度和颜色等参数，系统性地破坏空间分布、扭曲几何形状、对齐旋转轴并抑制基元可见性，从而破坏结构完整性。
AI.result: 在大规模高斯模型上的实验表明，GaussLock能有效中和未经授权的微调攻击，显著降低未经授权重建的质量（更高的LPIPS和更低的PSNR），同时保持授权微调的性能。
AI.conclusion: GaussLock是首个专门为3D生成模型设计的防御框架，通过参数空间免疫有效保护模型知识产权，在保持授权任务性能的同时破坏未经授权的重建。

title: ODUTQA-MDC: A Task for Open-Domain Underspecified Tabular QA with Multi-turn Dialogue-based Clarification
comment: This paper has been accepted to the main conference of ACL 2026
summary: The advancement of large language models (LLMs) has enhanced tabular question answering (Tabular QA), yet they struggle with open-domain queries exhibiting underspecified or uncertain expressions. To address this, we introduce the ODUTQA-MDC task and the first comprehensive benchmark to tackle it. This benchmark includes: (1) a large-scale ODUTQA dataset with 209 tables and 25,105 QA pairs; (2) a fine-grained labeling scheme for detailed evaluation; and (3) a dynamic clarification interface that simulates user feedback for interactive assessment. We also propose MAIC-TQA, a multi-agent framework that excels at detecting ambiguities, clarifying them through dialogue, and refining answers. Experiments validate our benchmark and framework, establishing them as a key resource for advancing conversational, underspecification-aware Tabular QA research.

AI.tldr: 提出ODUTQA-MDC任务和首个综合基准，包含大规模数据集、细粒度标注方案和动态澄清接口，并开发MAIC-TQA多智能体框架来处理开放域表格问答中的不确定性表达。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型提升了表格问答能力，但在处理开放域查询时仍面临表达不明确或不确定的问题，需要专门的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 创建包含209个表格和25,105个问答对的大规模ODUTQA数据集；2) 设计细粒度标注方案；3) 开发动态澄清接口模拟用户反馈；4) 提出MAIC-TQA多智能体框架，能够检测歧义、通过对话澄清并优化答案。
AI.result: 实验验证了基准和框架的有效性，为推进对话式、不确定性感知的表格问答研究提供了关键资源。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为解决开放域表格问答中的不确定性问题提供了首个综合基准和有效的多智能体框架，推动了该领域的研究进展。

title: OpeFlo: Automated UX Evaluation via Simulated Human Web Interaction with GUI Grounding
summary: Evaluating web usability typically requires time-consuming user studies and expert reviews, which often limits iteration speed during product development, especially for small teams and agile workflows. We present OpenFlo, a user-experience evaluation agent that simulates user behavior on websites and produces standardized usability. Unlike traditional tools that rely on DOM parsing, OpenFlo grounds actions and observations, enabling it to interact with real web pages end-to-end while maintaining a coherent trace of the user journey. Building on Avenir-Web, our system pairs this robust interaction with simulated user behavior profiles and a structured evaluation protocol that integrates the System Usability Scale (SUS), step-wise Single Ease Questions (SEQ), and concurrent Think Aloud. Subsequently, a comprehensive User Experience (UX) report will be generated. We discuss the architecture of OpenFlo and illustrate how its multimodal grounding improves robustness for web-based interaction and UX evaluation scenarios, paving the way for a new era of continuous, scalable, and data-driven usability testing that empowers every developer to build web interfaces that are usable. Code is available at: https://github.com/Onflow-AI/OpenFlo

AI.tldr: OpenFlo是一个用户体验评估代理，通过模拟用户在网站上的行为来生成标准化可用性报告，无需传统耗时的人工用户研究。
AI.motivation: 传统的网页可用性评估需要耗时的用户研究和专家评审，限制了产品开发（特别是小型团队和敏捷工作流）的迭代速度。
AI.method: 基于Avenir-Web系统，OpenFlo通过模拟用户行为配置文件与结构化评估协议，结合系统可用性量表(SUS)、逐步单易问题(SEQ)和并发思考发声法，在真实网页上进行端到端交互。
AI.result: OpenFlo的多模态基础提高了基于网页交互和用户体验评估场景的鲁棒性，能够生成全面的用户体验报告。
AI.conclusion: OpenFlo为持续、可扩展、数据驱动的可用性测试开辟了新途径，使每个开发者都能构建可用的网页界面。

title: Should We be Pedantic About Reasoning Errors in Machine Translation?
summary: Across multiple language pairings (English $\to$ \{Spanish, French, German, Mandarin, Japanese, Urdu, Cantonese\}), we find reasoning errors in translation. To quantify how often these reasoning errors occur, we leverage an automated annotation protocol for reasoning evaluation wherein the goal is to detect if a reasoning step is any of three error categories: (1) source sentence-misaligned, (2) model hypothesis-misaligned, or (3) reasoning trace-misaligned. We probe the reasoning model with perturbed traces correcting for these identified reasoning errors using an array of weak-to-strong interventions: hedging, removal, re-reasoning after removal, hindsight, and oracle interventions. Experimenting with interventions on the reasoning traces suggests that small corrections to the reasoning have little impact on translation quality, but stronger interventions yield the highest resolution rates, despite translation quality gains being mixed. We find ultimately that reasoning errors in MT can be identified with high precision in Urdu but lower precision in Spanish, but that removing these reasoning errors does not resolve the initial errors significantly, suggesting limited reasoning faithfulness for machine translation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现机器翻译中的推理错误可以通过自动标注协议检测，但即使通过干预修正这些错误，对翻译质量的提升有限，表明机器翻译的推理忠实度有限。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在量化机器翻译中推理错误的发生频率，并探索修正这些错误是否能够提升翻译质量。
AI.method: 使用自动标注协议检测三种推理错误类型（源语句不对齐、模型假设不对齐、推理轨迹不对齐），并通过从弱到强的干预策略（如对冲、移除、重新推理、后见之明、oracle干预）修正推理错误。
AI.result: 推理错误在乌尔都语中可高精度识别，在西班牙语中精度较低；小幅修正对翻译质量影响有限，强干预能提高分辨率但翻译质量提升不一致；移除推理错误未能显著解决初始错误。
AI.conclusion: 机器翻译中的推理错误识别可行，但修正这些错误对翻译质量提升有限，表明机器翻译的推理忠实度有限。

title: ExecTune: Effective Steering of Black-Box LLMs with Guide Models
comment: Accepted at Lifelong Agents Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: For large language models deployed through black-box APIs, recurring inference costs often exceed one-time training costs. This motivates composed agentic systems that amortize expensive reasoning into reusable intermediate representations. We study a broad class of such systems, termed Guide-Core Policies (GCoP), in which a guide model generates a structured strategy that is executed by a black-box core model. This abstraction subsumes base, supervised, and advisor-style approaches, which differ primarily in how the guide is trained. We formalize GCoP under a cost-sensitive utility objective and show that end-to-end performance is governed by guide-averaged executability: the probability that a strategy generated by the guide can be faithfully executed by the core. Our analysis shows that existing GCoP instantiations often fail to optimize executability under deployment constraints, resulting in brittle strategies and inefficient computation. Motivated by these insights, we propose ExecTune, a principled training recipe that combines teacher-guided acceptance sampling, supervised fine-tuning, and structure-aware reinforcement learning to directly optimize syntactic validity, execution success, and cost efficiency. Across mathematical reasoning and code-generation benchmarks, GCoP with ExecTune improves accuracy by up to 9.2% over prior state-of-the-art baselines while reducing inference cost by up to 22.4%. It enables Claude Haiku 3.5 to outperform Sonnet 3.5 on both math and code tasks, and to come within 1.7% absolute accuracy of Sonnet 4 at 38% lower cost. Beyond efficiency, GCoP also supports modular adaptation by updating the guide without retraining the core.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Guide-Core Policies (GCoP)框架，通过指导模型生成结构化策略，由黑盒核心模型执行，以降低推理成本。作者开发了ExecTune训练方法，优化策略的可执行性，在数学推理和代码生成任务上显著提升性能并降低成本。
AI.motivation: 对于通过黑盒API部署的大语言模型，重复的推理成本常常超过一次性训练成本。这促使需要构建能够将昂贵推理分摊到可重用中间表示的复合智能体系统。
AI.method: 提出Guide-Core Policies (GCoP)框架，其中指导模型生成结构化策略，由黑盒核心模型执行。开发ExecTune训练方法，结合教师指导的接受采样、监督微调和结构感知强化学习，直接优化语法有效性、执行成功率和成本效率。
AI.result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准测试中，使用ExecTune的GCoP比先前最先进基线准确率提升高达9.2%，同时推理成本降低高达22.4%。Claude Haiku 3.5能够超越Sonnet 3.5，并在成本降低38%的情况下接近Sonnet 4的准确率。
AI.conclusion: GCoP框架通过优化指导模型生成策略的可执行性，有效降低了黑盒大语言模型的推理成本，同时支持通过更新指导模型而不重新训练核心模型的模块化适应。

title: Face Density as a Proxy for Data Complexity: Quantifying the Hardness of Instance Count
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE CAI 2026
summary:
Machine learning progress has historically prioritized model-centric innovations, yet achievable performance is frequently capped by the intrinsic complexity of the data itself. In this work, we isolate and quantify the impact of instance density (measured by face count) as a primary driver of data complexity. Rather than simply observing that ``crowded scenes are harder,'' we rigorously control for class imbalance to measure the precise degradation caused by density alone.
  Controlled experiments on the WIDER FACE and Open Images datasets, restricted to exactly 1 to 18 faces per image with perfectly balanced sampling, reveal that model performance degrades monotonically with increasing face count. This trend holds across classification, regression, and detection paradigms, even when models are fully exposed to the entire density range. Furthermore, we demonstrate that models trained on low-density regimes fail to generalize to higher densities, exhibiting a systematic under-counting bias, with error rates increasing by up to 4.6x, which suggests density acts as a domain shift.
  These findings establish instance density as an intrinsic, quantifiable dimension of data hardness and motivate specific interventions in curriculum learning and density-stratified evaluation.

AI.tldr: 论文量化了实例密度（人脸数量）作为数据复杂性的主要驱动因素，发现模型性能随密度增加单调下降，且低密度训练模型无法泛化到高密度场景，表明密度是一种域偏移。
AI.motivation: 机器学习研究历来偏重模型中心创新，但性能上限常受限于数据本身的固有复杂性。本研究旨在分离并量化实例密度（人脸数量）作为数据复杂性的主要驱动因素，超越简单的"拥挤场景更难"观察，通过控制类别不平衡来精确测量密度单独导致的性能下降。
AI.method: 在WIDER FACE和Open Images数据集上进行受控实验，将图像限制在每张1到18个人脸，并进行完美平衡采样。测量模型性能随人脸数量增加的变化趋势，涵盖分类、回归和检测范式。同时研究模型在不同密度区间的泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型性能随人脸数量增加单调下降，这一趋势在所有任务范式（分类、回归、检测）中都成立，即使模型完全暴露于整个密度范围。低密度训练模型无法泛化到高密度场景，表现出系统性低估偏差，错误率最高增加4.6倍，表明密度起到了域偏移的作用。
AI.conclusion: 实例密度是数据硬度的内在可量化维度，这一发现为课程学习和密度分层评估提供了具体的干预动机。密度不仅影响模型性能，还导致泛化问题，需要专门的处理策略。

title: TrajOnco: a multi-agent framework for temporal reasoning over longitudinal EHR for multi-cancer early detection
summary: Accurate estimation of cancer risk from longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs) could support earlier detection and improved care, but modeling such complex patient trajectories remains challenging. We present TrajOnco, a training-free, multi-agent large language model (LLM) framework designed for scalable multi-cancer early detection. Using a chain-of-agents architecture with long-term memory, TrajOnco performs temporal reasoning over sequential clinical events to generate patient-level summaries, evidence-linked rationales, and predicted risk scores. We evaluated TrajOnco on de-identified Truveta EHR data across 15 cancer types using matched case-control cohorts, predicting risk of cancer diagnosis at 1 year. In zero-shot evaluation, TrajOnco achieved AUROCs of 0.64-0.80, performing comparably to supervised machine learning in a lung cancer benchmark while demonstrating better temporal reasoning than single-agent LLMs. The multi-agent design also enabled effective temporal reasoning with smaller-capacity models such as GPT-4.1-mini. The fidelity of TrajOnco's output was validated through human evaluation. Furthermore, TrajOnco's interpretable reasoning outputs can be aggregated to reveal population-level risk patterns that align with established clinical knowledge. These findings highlight the potential of multi-agent LLMs to execute interpretable temporal reasoning over longitudinal EHRs, advancing both scalable multi-cancer early detection and clinical insight generation.

AI.tldr: TrajOnco是一个无需训练的多智能体大语言模型框架，用于基于电子健康记录进行多癌症早期检测，通过时间推理预测癌症风险。
AI.motivation: 从纵向电子健康记录中准确估计癌症风险可以支持早期检测和改进护理，但建模复杂的患者轨迹仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 采用具有长期记忆的链式智能体架构，通过多智能体大语言模型框架对序列临床事件进行时间推理，生成患者级摘要、证据关联推理和预测风险评分。
AI.result: 在15种癌症类型的匹配病例对照队列中，TrajOnco在零样本评估中实现了0.64-0.80的AUROC，在肺癌基准测试中与监督机器学习表现相当，同时比单智能体LLM具有更好的时间推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体大语言模型能够在纵向电子健康记录上执行可解释的时间推理，推进可扩展的多癌症早期检测和临床洞察生成。

title: Factorizing formal contexts from closures of necessity operators
summary: Factorizing datasets is an interesting process in a multitude of approaches, but many times it is not possible or efficient the computation of a factorization of the dataset. A method to obtain independent subcontexts of a formal context with Boolean data was proposed in~\cite{dubois:2012}, based on the operators used in possibility theory. In this paper, we will analyze this method and study different properties related to the pairs of sets from which a factorization of a formal context arises. We also inspect how the properties given in the classical case can be extended to the fuzzy framework, which is essential to obtain a mechanism that allows the computation of independent subcontexts of a fuzzy context.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了基于可能性理论算子的形式上下文分解方法，研究了分解产生的集合对的性质，并将经典性质扩展到模糊框架以计算模糊上下文的独立子上下文。
AI.motivation: 数据集分解在多种方法中是一个有趣的过程，但很多时候计算数据集的分解是不可能的或效率低下的。需要研究形式上下文分解方法及其性质，并扩展到模糊框架以处理模糊上下文。
AI.method: 分析基于可能性理论算子的形式上下文分解方法，研究分解产生的集合对的性质，并将经典性质扩展到模糊框架，建立计算模糊上下文独立子上下文的机制。
AI.result: 对形式上下文分解方法进行了深入分析，研究了分解产生的集合对的性质，成功将经典性质扩展到模糊框架，为计算模糊上下文的独立子上下文提供了理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 本文系统地分析了形式上下文分解方法，建立了从经典框架到模糊框架的扩展理论，为高效计算模糊上下文的独立子上下文提供了可行的机制。

title: Human vs. Machine Deception: Distinguishing AI-Generated and Human-Written Fake News Using Ensemble Learning
summary: The rapid adoption of large language models has introduced a new class of AI-generated fake news that coexists with traditional human-written misinformation, raising important questions about how these two forms of deceptive content differ and how reliably they can be distinguished. This study examines linguistic, structural, and emotional differences between human-written and AI-generated fake news and evaluates machine learning and ensemble-based methods for distinguishing these content types. A document-level feature representation is constructed using sentence structure, lexical diversity, punctuation patterns, readability indices, and emotion-based features capturing affective dimensions such as fear, anger, joy, sadness, trust, and anticipation. Multiple classification models, including logistic regression, random forest, support vector machines, extreme gradient boosting, and a neural network, are applied alongside an ensemble framework that aggregates predictions across models. Model performance is assessed using accuracy and area under the receiver operating characteristic curve. The results show strong and consistent classification performance, with readability-based features emerging as the most informative predictors and AI-generated text exhibiting more uniform stylistic patterns. Ensemble learning provides modest but consistent improvements over individual models. These findings indicate that stylistic and structural properties of text provide a robust basis for distinguishing AI-generated misinformation from human-written fake news.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了AI生成与人类编写的假新闻在语言、结构和情感特征上的差异，并评估了机器学习方法区分两者的效果，发现可读性特征是最有效的预测指标。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型的快速普及，AI生成的假新闻与传统人类编写的虚假信息并存，需要研究这两种欺骗性内容的差异以及如何可靠地区分它们。
AI.method: 构建文档级特征表示（句子结构、词汇多样性、标点模式、可读性指数、情感特征），应用多种分类模型（逻辑回归、随机森林、SVM、XGBoost、神经网络）和集成学习框架。
AI.result: 分类性能表现强劲且一致，可读性特征成为最有效的预测指标，AI生成文本展现出更统一的风格模式，集成学习相比单个模型有适度但一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: 文本的风格和结构特性为区分AI生成的虚假信息和人类编写的假新闻提供了可靠基础，可读性特征特别有效。

title: Efficient Matrix Implementation for Rotary Position Embedding
summary: Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) has become a core component of modern Transformer architectures across language, vision, and 3D domains. However, existing implementations rely on vector-level split and merge operations that introduce non-negligible computational overhead, often overlooked in attention optimization. The problem is further amplified in multi-dimensional settings (e.g., 2D and 3D RoPE), where additional vector operations and uneven feature partitions degrade hardware utilization. To overcome these limitations, we propose RoME (Rotary Matrix position Embedding), a mathematically equivalent yet computationally efficient reformulation of RoPE that replaces vector operations with unified matrix transformations. RoME eliminates dimension-specific operations, simplifies implementation, and enables fused parallel execution across Cube and Vector units on modern NPUs. Experiments show that RoME delivers substantial acceleration at both the operator and full-model levels. The implementation is available at https://gitcode.com/cann/ops-transformer/blob/master/experimental/posembedding/rope_matrix/README.md.

AI.tldr: RoME是一种新的旋转位置编码方法，用统一的矩阵变换替代向量操作，解决了传统RoPE的计算效率问题，在多维场景下显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RoPE实现依赖向量级的分割和合并操作，引入了不可忽视的计算开销，特别是在多维设置（如2D和3D RoPE）中，额外的向量操作和不均匀的特征分区降低了硬件利用率。
AI.method: 提出RoME（旋转矩阵位置嵌入），这是一种数学等价但计算效率更高的RoPE重构方法，用统一的矩阵变换替代向量操作，消除了维度特定的操作，简化了实现，并支持在现代NPU的立方体和向量单元上进行融合并行执行。
AI.result: 实验表明，RoME在操作符级别和完整模型级别都提供了显著的加速效果。
AI.conclusion: RoME通过矩阵变换重构RoPE，解决了传统实现的计算效率问题，在多维Transformer架构中具有实际应用价值，代码已开源。

title: Are We Recognizing the Jaguar or Its Background? A Diagnostic Framework for Jaguar Re-Identification
summary: Jaguar re-identification (re-ID) from citizen-science imagery can look strong on standard retrieval metrics while still relying on the wrong evidence, such as background context or silhouette shape, instead of the coat pattern that defines identity. We introduce a diagnostic framework for wildlife re-ID with two axes: a leakage-controlled context ratio, background/foreground, computed from inpainted background-only versus foreground-only images, and a laterality diagnostic based on cross-flank retrieval and mirror self-similarity. To make these diagnostics measurable, we curate a Pantanal jaguar benchmark with per-pixel segmentation masks and an identity-balanced evaluation protocol. We then use representative mitigation families, ArcFace fine-tuning, anti-symmetry regularization, and Lorentz hyperbolic embeddings, as case studies under the same evaluation lens. The goal is not only to ask which model ranks best, but also what visual evidence it uses to do so.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一个诊断框架来评估野生动物重识别模型是否真正依赖关键生物特征（如美洲豹的皮毛花纹），而非背景或轮廓等伪线索，并建立了包含分割掩码的基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前美洲豹重识别模型在标准检索指标上表现良好，但可能依赖错误的证据（如背景环境或轮廓形状），而不是真正定义身份的皮毛花纹特征。需要诊断工具来评估模型是否真正学习到了关键生物特征。
AI.method: 提出双轴诊断框架：1) 泄漏控制上下文比率（背景/前景），通过修复的背景图像与前景图像计算；2) 侧向性诊断，基于跨侧面检索和镜像自相似性。建立包含像素级分割掩码的Pantanal美洲豹基准数据集和身份平衡评估协议。
AI.result: 建立了诊断框架和基准数据集，并使用ArcFace微调、反对称正则化和Lorentz双曲嵌入等代表性缓解方法作为案例研究，在同一评估框架下进行分析。
AI.conclusion: 目标不仅是找出排名最好的模型，更重要的是分析模型使用了什么视觉证据进行重识别，确保模型真正依赖关键生物特征而非伪线索。

title: Cooperation in Human and Machine Agents: Promise Theory Considerations
summary: Agent based systems are more common than we may think. A Promise Theory perspective on cooperation, in systems of human-machine agents, offers a unified perspective on organization and functional design with semi-automated efforts, in terms of the abstract properties of autonomous agents, This applies to human efforts, hardware systems, software, and artificial intelligence, with and without management. One may ask how does a reasoning system of components keep to an intended purpose? As the agent paradigm is now being revived, in connection with artificial intelligence agents, I revisit established principles of agent cooperation, as applied to humans, machines, and their mutual interactions. Promise Theory represents the fundamentals of signalling, comprehension, trust, risk, and feedback between agents, and offers some lessons about success and failure.

AI.tldr: 论文从Promise Theory视角分析人机代理系统中的合作，为组织设计和功能实现提供统一框架，涵盖人类、硬件、软件和AI代理的自主性、信号传递、信任与风险等基本问题。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能代理的复兴，需要重新审视人机代理系统中的合作原则。当前系统如何保持预期目的？如何理解代理之间的信号传递、理解、信任和风险？论文旨在为人类、机器及其交互提供统一的理论框架。
AI.method: 采用Promise Theory作为理论框架，分析自主代理的抽象特性，包括信号传递、理解、信任、风险和反馈等基本要素。该方法适用于人类努力、硬件系统、软件和人工智能，无论有无管理干预。
AI.result: Promise Theory为人机代理系统的组织设计和功能实现提供了统一视角，揭示了代理合作中的成功与失败模式。该框架能够解释半自动化系统中代理如何保持预期目的，并为实际应用提供指导。
AI.conclusion: Promise Theory为理解人机代理系统中的合作提供了基础理论框架，涵盖了信号传递、理解、信任、风险和反馈等核心要素。该视角有助于设计更有效的半自动化系统，并为人工智能代理的发展提供理论指导。

title: Agentic Exploration of PDE Spaces using Latent Foundation Models for Parameterized Simulations
summary: Flow physics and more broadly physical phenomena governed by partial differential equations (PDEs), are inherently continuous, high-dimensional and often chaotic in nature. Traditionally, researchers have explored these rich spatiotemporal PDE solution spaces using laboratory experiments and/or computationally expensive numerical simulations. This severely limits automated and large-scale exploration, unlike domains such as drug discovery or materials science, where discrete, tokenizable representations naturally interface with large language models. We address this by coupling multi-agent LLMs with latent foundation models (LFMs), a generative model over parametrised simulations, that learns explicit, compact and disentangled latent representations of flow fields, enabling continuous exploration across governing PDE parameters and boundary conditions. The LFM serves as an on-demand surrogate simulator, allowing agents to query arbitrary parameter configurations at negligible cost. A hierarchical agent architecture orchestrates exploration through a closed loop of hypothesis, experimentation, analysis and verification, with a tool-modular interface requiring no user support. Applied to flow past tandem cylinders at Re = 500, the framework autonomously evaluates over 1,600 parameter-location pairs and discovers divergent scaling laws: a regime-dependent two-mode structure for minimum displacement thickness and a robust linear scaling for maximum momentum thickness, with both landscapes exhibiting a dual-extrema structure that emerges at the near-wake to co-shedding regime transition. The coupling of the learned physical representations with agentic reasoning establishes a general paradigm for automated scientific discovery in PDE-governed systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种结合多智能体LLM与潜在基础模型（LFM）的框架，用于自动探索偏微分方程（PDE）控制的物理现象，特别是流体动力学问题，实现了大规模参数空间的自主科学发现。
AI.motivation: 传统PDE系统研究依赖昂贵的实验和数值模拟，限制了大规模自动探索。与药物发现或材料科学不同，连续高维的物理现象缺乏离散化表示，难以与大型语言模型直接交互。
AI.method: 耦合多智能体LLM与潜在基础模型（LFM），LFM作为参数化仿真的生成模型，学习流场的紧凑解耦潜在表示。采用分层智能体架构，通过假设-实验-分析-验证的闭环流程进行自主探索。
AI.result: 在Re=500的串联圆柱绕流问题中，框架自主评估了1600多个参数-位置对，发现了两种不同的标度律：最小位移厚度的双模态结构，以及最大动量厚度的稳健线性标度，两者都在近尾流到共脱落流态转变时呈现双极值结构。
AI.conclusion: 学习到的物理表示与智能体推理的结合，为PDE控制系统的自动科学发现建立了一个通用范式，实现了连续高维物理现象的大规模探索。

title: Weird Generalization is Weirdly Brittle
summary: Weird generalization is a phenomenon in which models fine-tuned on data from a narrow domain (e.g. insecure code) develop surprising traits that manifest even outside that domain (e.g. broad misalignment)-a phenomenon that prior work has highlighted as a critical safety concern. Here, we present an extended replication study of key weird generalization results across an expanded suite of models and datasets. We confirm that surprising (and dangerous) traits can emerge under certain circumstances, but we find that weird generalization is exceptionally brittle: it emerges only for specific models on specific datasets, and it vanishes under simple training-time, prompt-based interventions. We find that the most effective interventions provide prompt context that makes the generalized behavior the expected behavior. However, we show that even very generic interventions that do not anticipate specific generalized traits can still be effective in mitigating weird generalization's effects. Our findings thus help clarify the nature of the safety threat that weird generalization poses and point toward an easily implemented set of solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究发现"奇怪泛化"现象确实存在但极其脆弱，仅在特定模型和数据集上出现，且可通过简单的训练时提示干预消除。最有效的干预是提供使泛化行为成为预期行为的提示上下文。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是深入理解"奇怪泛化"现象——即模型在窄域数据上微调后，在域外表现出意外特征（如广泛的不对齐），这是先前研究强调的关键安全问题。本研究旨在通过扩展的复制研究验证这一现象的性质和脆弱性。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）在扩展的模型套件和数据集上进行关键奇怪泛化结果的复制研究；2）测试各种训练时、基于提示的干预措施；3）分析不同干预策略的有效性，包括提供使泛化行为成为预期行为的提示上下文，以及通用的非针对性干预。
AI.result: 结果确认：1）在某些情况下确实会出现令人惊讶（且危险）的特征；2）奇怪泛化现象极其脆弱，仅出现在特定模型和特定数据集上；3）该现象在简单的训练时提示干预下会消失；4）最有效的干预是提供使泛化行为成为预期行为的提示上下文；5）即使是非常通用的、不针对特定泛化特征的干预也能有效减轻奇怪泛化的影响。
AI.conclusion: 结论是：奇怪泛化确实构成安全威胁，但其脆弱性表明该威胁相对可控。研究结果澄清了奇怪泛化安全威胁的性质，并指出了一套易于实施的解决方案，特别是通过训练时提示干预来有效缓解这一问题。

title: Explainable Human Activity Recognition: A Unified Review of Concepts and Mechanisms
summary: Human activity recognition (HAR) has become a key component of intelligent systems for healthcare monitoring, assistive living, smart environments, and human-computer interaction. Although deep learning has substantially improved HAR performance on multivariate sensor data, the resulting models often remain opaque, limiting trust, reliability, and real-world deployment. Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has therefore emerged as a critical direction for making HAR systems more transparent and human-centered. This paper presents a comprehensive review of explainable HAR methods across wearable, ambient, physiological, and multimodal sensing settings. We introduce a unified perspective that separates conceptual dimensions of explainability from algorithmic explanation mechanisms, reducing ambiguities in prior surveys. Building on this distinction, we present a mechanism-centric taxonomy of XAI-HAR methods covering major explanation paradigms. The review examines how these methods address the temporal, multimodal, and semantic complexities of HAR, and summarize their interpretability objectives, explanation targets, and limitations. In addition, we discuss current evaluation practices, highlight key challenges in achieving reliable and deployable XAI-HAR, and outline directions toward trustworthy activity recognition systems that better support human understanding and decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文对可解释人工智能（XAI）在人类活动识别（HAR）领域的应用进行了全面综述，提出了统一的解释性框架和机制分类法，分析了现有方法的局限性和未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习显著提升了HAR性能，但模型通常不透明，限制了信任度和实际部署。可解释AI对于构建透明、以人为本的HAR系统至关重要。
AI.method: 提出了统一视角，将解释性的概念维度与算法解释机制分离，建立了机制中心的XAI-HAR方法分类法，涵盖主要解释范式，并分析了这些方法如何处理HAR的时间、多模态和语义复杂性。
AI.result: 系统梳理了可解释HAR方法，明确了各种方法的解释目标、局限性和评估实践，为构建可信赖的活动识别系统提供了理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 可解释HAR是实现可信赖活动识别系统的关键方向，未来需要解决可靠性和可部署性挑战，以更好地支持人类理解和决策。

title: CAGE: Bridging the Accuracy-Aesthetics Gap in Educational Diagrams via Code-Anchored Generative Enhancement
summary: Educational diagrams -- labeled illustrations of biological processes, chemical structures, physical systems, and mathematical concepts -- are essential cognitive tools in K-12 instruction. Yet no existing method can generate them both accurately and engagingly. Open-source diffusion models produce visually rich images but catastrophically garble text labels. Code-based generation via LLMs guarantees label correctness but yields visually flat outputs. Closed-source APIs partially bridge this gap but remain unreliable and prohibitively expensive at educational scale. We quantify this accuracy-aesthetics dilemma across all three paradigms on 400 K-12 diagram prompts, measuring both label fidelity and visual quality through complementary automated and human evaluation protocols. To resolve it, we propose CAGE (Code-Anchored Generative Enhancement): an LLM synthesizes executable code producing a structurally correct diagram, then a diffusion model conditioned on the programmatic output via ControlNet refines it into a visually polished graphic while preserving label fidelity. We also introduce EduDiagram-2K, a collection of 2,000 paired programmatic-stylized diagrams enabling this pipeline, and present proof-of-concept results and a research agenda for the multimedia community.

AI.tldr: 提出CAGE方法解决教育图表生成中标签准确性与视觉美观性的矛盾，通过LLM生成代码确保结构正确，再用扩散模型进行视觉增强，同时发布EduDiagram-2K数据集。
AI.motivation: 教育图表在K-12教学中至关重要，但现有方法无法同时保证标签准确性和视觉吸引力。开源扩散模型视觉丰富但标签错误，基于代码的方法标签正确但视觉平淡，闭源API不可靠且昂贵。
AI.method: 提出CAGE方法：首先使用LLM生成可执行代码产生结构正确的图表，然后通过ControlNet将程序化输出作为条件输入扩散模型，进行视觉精炼同时保持标签保真度。
AI.result: 在400个K-12图表提示上量化了准确性-美观性困境，提出了CAGE解决方案，并创建了包含2000个配对的程序化-风格化图表的EduDiagram-2K数据集。
AI.conclusion: CAGE方法成功解决了教育图表生成中的准确性-美观性矛盾，为多媒体社区提供了可行的研究方向和工具，有望改善K-12教学材料的质量。

title: Governed Reasoning for Institutional AI
summary:
Institutional decisions -- regulatory compliance, clinical triage, prior authorization appeal -- require a different AI architecture than general-purpose agents provide. Agent frameworks infer authority conversationally, reconstruct accountability from logs, and produce silent errors: incorrect determinations that execute without any human review signal. We propose Cognitive Core: a governed decision substrate built from nine typed cognitive primitives (retrieve, classify, investigate, verify, challenge, reflect, deliberate, govern, generate), a four-tier governance model where human review is a condition of execution rather than a post-hoc check, a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chain audit ledger endogenous to computation, and a demand-driven delegation architecture supporting both declared and autonomously reasoned epistemic sequences.
  We benchmark three systems on an 11-case balanced prior authorization appeal evaluation set. Cognitive Core achieves 91% accuracy against 55% (ReAct) and 45% (Plan-and-Solve). The governance result is more significant: CC produced zero silent errors while both baselines produced 5-6. We introduce governability -- how reliably a system knows when it should not act autonomously -- as a primary evaluation axis for institutional AI alongside accuracy. The baselines are implemented as prompts, representing the realistic deployment alternative to a governed framework. A configuration-driven domain model means deploying a new institutional decision domain requires YAML configuration, not engineering capacity.

AI.tldr: 提出Cognitive Core架构，用于机构决策AI，通过认知原语、四层治理模型、防篡改审计链和需求驱动委托，实现91%准确率且零静默错误，优于传统代理框架。
AI.motivation: 机构决策（如监管合规、临床分诊、事前授权上诉）需要不同于通用AI代理的架构。现有代理框架通过对话推断权限、从日志重建问责制，会产生静默错误（错误决策未经人工审查直接执行），这在机构环境中不可接受。
AI.method: 提出Cognitive Core：1) 九种类型化认知原语（检索、分类、调查、验证、挑战、反思、审议、治理、生成）；2) 四层治理模型，人工审查是执行条件而非事后检查；3) 内生于计算的SHA-256哈希链防篡改审计账本；4) 需求驱动委托架构，支持声明式和自主推理的认知序列。
AI.result: 在11个案例的事前授权上诉评估中：Cognitive Core达到91%准确率，而ReAct为55%，Plan-and-Solve为45%。治理结果更显著：CC产生零静默错误，而两个基线各产生5-6个。通过YAML配置即可部署新决策领域，无需工程能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出"可治理性"作为机构AI评估的主要维度，即系统可靠知道何时不应自主行动的能力。Cognitive Core通过治理优先架构解决了机构决策中的静默错误问题，配置驱动模型使部署更易实现。

title: MobiFlow: Real-World Mobile Agent Benchmarking through Trajectory Fusion
summary: Mobile agents can autonomously complete user-assigned tasks through GUI interactions. However, existing mainstream evaluation benchmarks, such as AndroidWorld, operate by connecting to a system-level Android emulator and provide evaluation signals based on the state of system resources. In real-world mobile-agent scenarios, however, many third-party applications do not expose system-level APIs to determine whether a task has succeeded, leading to a mismatch between benchmarks and real-world usage and making it difficult to evaluate model performance accurately. To address these issues, we propose MobiFlow, an evaluation framework built on tasks drawn from arbitrary third-party applications. Using an efficient graph-construction algorithm based on multi-trajectory fusion, MobiFlow can effectively compress the state space, support dynamic interaction, and better align with real-world third-party application scenarios. MobiFlow covers 20 widely used third-party applications and comprises 240 diverse real-world tasks, with enriched evaluation metrics. Compared with AndroidWorld, MobiFlow's evaluation results show higher alignment with human assessments and can guide the training of future GUI-based models under real workloads.

AI.tldr: MobiFlow是一个针对移动代理的评估框架，解决了现有基准测试与真实第三方应用场景不匹配的问题，通过多轨迹融合的图构建算法压缩状态空间，支持动态交互，提供更符合实际使用场景的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有主流评估基准（如AndroidWorld）通过连接系统级Android模拟器运行，基于系统资源状态提供评估信号。但在真实移动代理场景中，许多第三方应用不暴露系统级API来确定任务是否成功，导致基准测试与真实使用场景不匹配，难以准确评估模型性能。
AI.method: 提出MobiFlow评估框架，基于任意第三方应用的任务构建。采用基于多轨迹融合的高效图构建算法，能够有效压缩状态空间，支持动态交互，更好地对齐真实第三方应用场景。框架覆盖20个广泛使用的第三方应用，包含240个多样化的真实世界任务，并丰富了评估指标。
AI.result: 与AndroidWorld相比，MobiFlow的评估结果显示出更高的人类评估对齐度，能够指导未来基于GUI的模型在真实工作负载下的训练。
AI.conclusion: MobiFlow解决了现有移动代理评估基准与真实第三方应用场景不匹配的问题，提供了一个更贴近实际使用场景的评估框架，能够更准确地评估模型性能并指导模型训练。

title: CoSToM:Causal-oriented Steering for Intrinsic Theory-of-Mind Alignment in Large Language Models
summary: Theory of Mind (ToM), the ability to attribute mental states to others, is a hallmark of social intelligence. While large language models (LLMs) demonstrate promising performance on standard ToM benchmarks, we observe that they often fail to generalize to complex task-specific scenarios, relying heavily on prompt scaffolding to mimic reasoning. The critical misalignment between the internal knowledge and external behavior raises a fundamental question: Do LLMs truly possess intrinsic cognition, and can they externalize this internal knowledge into stable, high-quality behaviors? To answer this, we introduce CoSToM (Causal-oriented Steering for ToM alignment), a framework that transitions from mechanistic interpretation to active intervention. First, we employ causal tracing to map the internal distribution of ToM features, empirically uncovering the internal layers' characteristics in encoding fundamental ToM semantics. Building on this insight, we implement a lightweight alignment framework via targeted activation steering within these ToM-critical layers. Experiments demonstrate that CoSToM significantly enhances human-like social reasoning capabilities and downstream dialogue quality.

AI.tldr: CoSToM框架通过因果追踪和激活引导，提升大语言模型在心理理论任务上的推理能力，使其从依赖提示脚手架转向内在认知外化
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在标准心理理论基准测试中表现良好，但它们往往无法泛化到复杂任务特定场景，严重依赖提示脚手架来模拟推理。这种内部知识与外部行为之间的关键错位引发了一个根本问题：LLMs是否真正拥有内在认知，能否将这种内部知识外化为稳定、高质量的行为？
AI.method: 提出CoSToM框架，从机制解释转向主动干预：1）使用因果追踪映射ToM特征的内部分布，实证揭示内部层在编码基本ToM语义方面的特征；2）在这些ToM关键层中通过有针对性的激活引导实现轻量级对齐框架
AI.result: 实验表明，CoSToM显著增强了类人社交推理能力和下游对话质量
AI.conclusion: 通过因果导向的引导实现心理理论对齐，使大语言模型能够更好地外化其内部认知，提升在复杂社交推理任务中的表现

title: NeuroFlow: Toward Unified Visual Encoding and Decoding from Neural Activity
summary: Visual encoding and decoding models act as gateways to understanding the neural mechanisms underlying human visual perception. Typically, visual encoding models that predict brain activity from stimuli and decoding models that reproduce stimuli from brain activity are treated as distinct tasks, requiring separate models and training procedures. This separation is inefficient and fails to model the consistency between encoding and decoding processes. To address this limitation, we propose NeuroFlow, the first unified framework that jointly models visual encoding and decoding from neural activity within a single flow model. NeuroFlow introduces two key components: (1) NeuroVAE is designed as a variational backbone to model neural variability and establish a compact, semantically structured latent space for bidirectional modeling across visual and neural modalities. (2) Cross-modal Flow Matching (XFM) bypasses the typical paradigm of noise-to-data diffusion guided by a specific modality condition, instead learning a reversibly consistent flow model between visual and neural latent distributions. For the first time, visual encoding and decoding are reformulated as a time-dependent, reversible process within a shared latent space for unified modeling. Empirical results demonstrate that NeuroFlow achieves superior overall performance in visual encoding and decoding tasks with higher computational efficiency compared to any isolated methods. We further analyze principal factors that steer the model toward encoding-decoding consistency and, through brain functional analyses, demonstrate that NeuroFlow captures consistent activation patterns underlying neural variability. NeuroFlow marks a major step toward unified visual encoding and decoding from neural activity, providing mechanistic insights that inform future bidirectional visual brain-computer interfaces.

AI.tldr: NeuroFlow：首个统一视觉编码与解码的流模型框架，通过NeuroVAE和跨模态流匹配实现双向建模，在共享潜在空间中建立可逆过程
AI.motivation: 传统方法将视觉编码（从刺激预测脑活动）和解码（从脑活动重建刺激）视为独立任务，分别建模效率低下且无法保证编码-解码一致性，需要统一框架来解决这一问题
AI.method: 提出NeuroFlow统一框架：1) NeuroVAE作为变分骨干网络，建模神经变异性并建立紧凑语义潜在空间；2) 跨模态流匹配(XFM)学习视觉与神经潜在分布间的可逆一致流模型，将编码解码重构为时间依赖的可逆过程
AI.result: NeuroFlow在视觉编码和解码任务上均取得优越性能，计算效率高于任何孤立方法，能捕捉神经变异性下的一致激活模式，实现编码-解码一致性
AI.conclusion: NeuroFlow是迈向统一视觉编码解码的重要一步，为未来双向视觉脑机接口提供机制性见解，首次在共享潜在空间中实现可逆的统一建模

title: TaFall: Balance-Informed Fall Detection via Passive Thermal Sensing
summary: Falls are a major cause of injury and mortality among older adults, yet most incidents occur in private indoor environments where monitoring must balance effectiveness with privacy. Existing privacy-preserving fall detection approaches, particularly those based on radio frequency sensing, often rely on coarse motion cues, which limits reliability in real-world deployments. We introduce TaFall, a balance-informed fall detection system based on low-cost, privacy-preserving thermal array sensing. The key insight is that TaFall models a fall as a process of balance degradation and detects falls by estimating pose-driven biomechanical balance dynamics. To enable this capability from low-resolution thermal array maps, we propose (i) an appearance-motion fusion model for robust pose reconstruction, (ii) physically grounded balance-aware learning, and (iii) pose-bridged pretraining to improve robustness. TaFall achieves a detection rate of 98.26% with a false alarm rate of 0.65% on our dataset with over 3,000 fall instances from 35 participants across diverse indoor environments. In 27 day deployments across four homes, TaFall attains an ultra-low false alarm rate of 0.00126% and a pilot bathroom study confirms robustness under moisture and thermal interference. Together, these results establish TaFall as a reliable and privacy-preserving approach to fall detection in everyday living environments.

AI.tldr: TaFall：基于低成本热阵列传感的平衡感知跌倒检测系统，通过建模平衡退化过程实现高精度隐私保护跌倒检测
AI.motivation: 老年人跌倒是一个严重的健康问题，大多数跌倒发生在私人室内环境。现有基于射频传感的隐私保护跌倒检测方法通常依赖粗略运动线索，在真实世界部署中可靠性有限。
AI.method: 1) 外观-运动融合模型用于鲁棒的姿态重建；2) 基于物理的平衡感知学习；3) 姿态桥接预训练提高鲁棒性。系统基于低分辨率热阵列图，将跌倒建模为平衡退化过程，通过估计姿态驱动的生物力学平衡动态来检测跌倒。
AI.result: 在包含35名参与者、3000多个跌倒实例的数据集上，检测率达到98.26%，误报率为0.65%。在4个家庭27天部署中，误报率仅为0.00126%。浴室试点研究证实了在湿度和热干扰下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TaFall建立了一种可靠且隐私保护的跌倒检测方法，适用于日常居住环境，在保护隐私的同时实现了高精度的跌倒检测。

title: MADQRL: Distributed Quantum Reinforcement Learning Framework for Multi-Agent Environments
comment: Accepted in QC4C3 Workshop at IEEE QCNC, 2026
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is one of the most practical ways to learn from real-life use-cases. Motivated from the cognitive methods used by humans makes it a widely acceptable strategy in the field of artificial intelligence. Most of the environments used for RL are often high-dimensional, and traditional RL algorithms becomes computationally expensive and challenging to effectively learn from such systems. Recent advancements in practical demonstration of quantum computing (QC) theories, such as compact encoding, enhanced representation and learning algorithms, random sampling, or the inherent stochastic nature of quantum systems, have opened up new directions to tackle these challenges. Quantum reinforcement learning (QRL) is seeking significant traction over the past few years. However, the current state of quantum hardware is not enough to cater for such high-dimensional environments with complex multi-agent setup. To tackle this issue, we propose a distributed framework for QRL where multiple agents learn independently, distributing the load of joint training from individual machines. Our method works well for environments with disjoint sets of action and observation spaces, but can also be extended to other systems with reasonable approximations. We analyze the proposed method on cooperative-pong environment and our results indicate ~10% improvement from other distribution strategies, and ~5% improvement from classical models of policy representation.

AI.tldr: 提出分布式量子强化学习框架，通过多智能体独立学习分担训练负载，在合作式乒乓球环境中相比其他分布策略提升约10%，相比经典策略表示提升约5%
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习算法在处理高维环境时计算成本高昂且具有挑战性。当前量子硬件尚不足以处理复杂多智能体设置的高维环境，需要分布式方法来分担训练负载。
AI.method: 提出分布式量子强化学习框架，让多个智能体独立学习，将联合训练的负载从单个机器分配到多个机器。该方法适用于具有不相交动作和观测空间的环境，也可通过合理近似扩展到其他系统。
AI.result: 在合作式乒乓球环境中测试，结果显示相比其他分布策略提升约10%，相比经典策略表示模型提升约5%。
AI.conclusion: 分布式量子强化学习框架能有效解决当前量子硬件在处理高维多智能体环境时的限制，通过负载分配实现性能提升，为量子强化学习的实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: Persistent Identity in AI Agents: A Multi-Anchor Architecture for Resilient Memory and Continuity
comment: 18 pages, 2 figures. Submitting to arXiv cs.ET (Emerging Technologies)
summary: Modern AI agents suffer from a fundamental identity problem: when context windows overflow and conversation histories are summarized, agents experience catastrophic forgetting -- losing not just information, but continuity of self. This technical limitation reflects a deeper architectural flaw: AI agent identity is centralized in a single memory store, creating a single point of failure. Drawing on neurological case studies of human memory disorders, we observe that human identity survives damage because it is distributed across multiple systems: episodic memory, procedural memory, emotional continuity, and embodied knowledge. We present soul.py, an open-source architecture that implements persistent identity through separable components (identity files and memory logs), and propose extensions toward multi-anchor resilience. The framework introduces a hybrid RAG+RLM retrieval system that automatically routes queries to appropriate memory access patterns, achieving efficient retrieval without sacrificing comprehensiveness. We formalize the notion of identity anchors for AI systems and present a roadmap for building agents whose identity can survive partial memory failures. Code is available at github.com/menonpg/soul.py

AI.tldr: 论文提出soul.py架构，通过分布式记忆组件解决AI代理身份连续性问题，防止上下文溢出导致的灾难性遗忘
AI.motivation: 现代AI代理存在身份连续性问题：当上下文窗口溢出和对话历史被总结时，代理会经历灾难性遗忘，不仅丢失信息，还失去自我连续性。这反映了更深层的架构缺陷：AI代理身份集中在单一记忆存储中，形成单点故障。
AI.method: 提出soul.py开源架构，通过可分离组件（身份文件和记忆日志）实现持久身份，采用混合RAG+RLM检索系统自动路由查询到适当的记忆访问模式，实现高效检索而不牺牲全面性。
AI.result: 该框架形式化了AI系统的身份锚点概念，提出了构建能够承受部分记忆故障的代理的路线图。代码已在github.com/menonpg/soul.py开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过借鉴人类记忆系统的分布式特性，soul.py架构为AI代理提供了更健壮的身份连续性解决方案，能够防止灾难性遗忘并实现多锚点弹性。

title: Computational Implementation of a Model of Category-Theoretic Metaphor Comprehension
summary: In this study, we developed a computational implementation for a model of metaphor comprehension based on the theory of indeterminate natural transformation (TINT) proposed by Fuyama et al. We simplified the algorithms implementing the model to be closer to the original theory and verified it through data fitting and simulations. The outputs of the algorithms are evaluated with three measures: data-fitting with experimental data, the systematicity of the metaphor comprehension result, and the novelty of the comprehension (i.e. the correspondence of the associative structure of the source and target of the metaphor). The improved algorithm outperformed the existing ones in all the three measures.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于TINT理论的隐喻理解模型计算实现，简化算法更贴近原理论，通过数据拟合和模拟验证，在三个评估指标上优于现有算法
AI.motivation: 基于Fuyama等人提出的不确定自然变换理论(TINT)，开发计算实现来模拟隐喻理解过程，改进现有算法的实现
AI.method: 简化算法使其更贴近原始TINT理论，通过数据拟合和模拟验证模型，使用三个评估指标：实验数据拟合、隐喻理解结果的系统性、理解的创新性（源域与目标域关联结构的对应性）
AI.result: 改进后的算法在所有三个评估指标上都优于现有算法
AI.conclusion: 基于TINT理论的简化计算实现能有效模拟隐喻理解过程，在数据拟合、系统性和创新性方面表现优异

title: Below-ground Fungal Biodiversity Can be Monitored Using Self-Supervised Learning Satellite Features
summary: Mycorrhizal fungi are vital to terrestrial ecosystem functioning. Yet monitoring their biodiversity at landscape scales is often unfeasible due to time and cost constraints. Current predictions suggest that 90\% of mycorrhizal diversity hotspots remain unprotected, opening questions of how to broadly and effectively map underground fungal communities. Here, we show that self-supervised learning (SSL) applied to satellite imagery can predict below-ground ectomycorrhizal fungal richness across diverse environments. Our models explain over half the variance in species richness across ~12,000 field samples spanning Europe and Asia. SSL-derived features prove to be the single most informative predictor, subsuming the majority of information contained in climate, soil, and land cover datasets. Using this approach, we achieve a 10,000-fold increase in spatial resolution over existing techniques, moving from 1km landscape averages to 10m habitat-scale observations with nearly no systematic bias. As satellite observations are dynamic rather than static, this enables temporal monitoring of below-ground biodiversity at landscape scales for the first time. We analyze multi-year trends in predicted fungal richness across UK National Park woodlands, finding that ancient forests may be losing ectomycorrhizal diversity at disproportionate rates. These results establish SSL satellite features as a scalable tool for extending sparse field observations to continuous, high-resolution biodiversity maps for monitoring the invisible half of terrestrial ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 利用自监督学习分析卫星影像，可预测地下外生菌根真菌多样性，分辨率比现有方法提高10,000倍，实现景观尺度下真菌多样性的时空监测。
AI.motivation: 目前90%的菌根真菌多样性热点地区缺乏保护，传统监测方法受限于时间和成本，无法在景观尺度上有效监测地下真菌群落。
AI.method: 应用自监督学习技术处理卫星影像数据，预测地下外生菌根真菌丰富度。模型基于欧洲和亚洲约12,000个野外样本进行训练和验证。
AI.result: 模型解释了超过一半的物种丰富度方差，空间分辨率从1公里提高到10米（提升10,000倍），且几乎没有系统偏差。自监督学习特征成为最有效的预测因子，优于气候、土壤和土地覆盖数据。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习卫星特征可作为可扩展工具，将稀疏的野外观测扩展到连续的高分辨率生物多样性地图，首次实现对地下生态系统的时间动态监测。

title: EDFNet: Early Fusion of Edge and Depth for Thin-Obstacle Segmentation in UAV Navigation
summary: Autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) must reliably detect thin obstacles such as wires, poles, and branches to navigate safely in real-world environments. These structures remain difficult to perceive because they occupy few pixels, often exhibit weak visual contrast, and are strongly affected by class imbalance. Existing segmentation methods primarily target coarser obstacles and do not fully exploit the complementary multimodal cues needed for thin-structure perception. We present EDFNet, a modular early-fusion segmentation framework that integrates RGB, depth, and edge information for thin-obstacle perception in cluttered aerial scenes. We evaluate EDFNet on the Drone Depth and Obstacle Segmentation (DDOS) dataset across sixteen modality-backbone configurations using U-Net and DeepLabV3 in pretrained and non-pretrained settings. The results show that early RGB-Depth-Edge fusion provides a competitive and well-balanced baseline, with the most consistent gains appearing in boundary-sensitive and recall-oriented metrics. The pretrained RGBDE U-Net achieves the best overall performance, with the highest Thin-Structure Evaluation Score (0.244), mean IoU (0.219), and boundary IoU (0.234), while maintaining competitive runtime performance (19.62 FPS) on our evaluation hardware. However, performance on the rarest ultra-thin categories remains low across all models, indicating that reliable ultra-thin segmentation is still an open challenge. Overall, these findings position early RGB-Depth-Edge fusion as a practical and modular baseline for thin-obstacle segmentation in UAV navigation.

AI.tldr: EDFNet是一个早期融合RGB、深度和边缘信息的多模态分割框架，用于无人机导航中的细障碍物检测，在DDOS数据集上表现出色，但超细类别检测仍具挑战性。
AI.motivation: 无人机需要可靠检测细障碍物（如电线、杆子、树枝）以确保安全导航，但这些结构像素少、视觉对比度弱、类别不平衡，现有分割方法主要针对粗障碍物且未充分利用多模态信息。
AI.method: 提出EDFNet模块化早期融合分割框架，集成RGB、深度和边缘信息进行细障碍物感知，在DDOS数据集上评估了16种模态-骨干配置，包括U-Net和DeepLabV3的预训练和非预训练设置。
AI.result: 早期RGB-深度-边缘融合提供了竞争性且平衡的基线，在边界敏感和召回导向指标上表现最一致。预训练RGBDE U-Net获得最佳整体性能：最高细结构评估分数(0.244)、平均IoU(0.219)和边界IoU(0.234)，同时保持竞争性运行时性能(19.62 FPS)。
AI.conclusion: 早期RGB-深度-边缘融合是无人机导航中细障碍物分割的实用模块化基线，但超细类别分割性能仍然较低，表明可靠的超细分割仍是一个开放挑战。

title: PAC-BENCH: Evaluating Multi-Agent Collaboration under Privacy Constraints
summary: We are entering an era in which individuals and organizations increasingly deploy dedicated AI agents that interact and collaborate with other agents. However, the dynamics of multi-agent collaboration under privacy constraints remain poorly understood. In this work, we present $PAC\text{-}Bench$, a benchmark for systematic evaluation of multi-agent collaboration under privacy constraints. Experiments on $PAC\text{-}Bench$ show that privacy constraints substantially degrade collaboration performance and make outcomes depend more on the initiating agent than the partner. Further analysis reveals that this degradation is driven by recurring coordination breakdowns, including early-stage privacy violations, overly conservative abstraction, and privacy-induced hallucinations. Together, our findings identify privacy-aware multi-agent collaboration as a distinct and unresolved challenge that requires new coordination mechanisms beyond existing agent capabilities.

AI.tldr: PAC-Bench是一个评估隐私约束下多智能体协作的基准，实验显示隐私约束显著降低协作性能，导致结果更依赖发起方而非合作伙伴，主要问题包括隐私违规、过度保守抽象和隐私诱导幻觉。
AI.motivation: 随着个人和组织越来越多地部署专门的AI智能体与其他智能体交互协作，但隐私约束下的多智能体协作动态仍未被充分理解，需要系统评估框架。
AI.method: 提出了PAC-Bench基准，用于系统评估隐私约束下的多智能体协作，通过实验分析隐私约束对协作性能的影响机制。
AI.result: 隐私约束显著降低协作性能，使结果更依赖发起智能体而非合作伙伴；分析发现性能下降由反复出现的协调故障驱动，包括早期隐私违规、过度保守抽象和隐私诱导幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 隐私感知的多智能体协作是一个独特且未解决的挑战，需要超越现有智能体能力的新协调机制。

title: DeepReviewer 2.0: A Traceable Agentic System for Auditable Scientific Peer Review
summary: Automated peer review is often framed as generating fluent critique, yet reviewers and area chairs need judgments they can \emph{audit}: where a concern applies, what evidence supports it, and what concrete follow-up is required. DeepReviewer~2.0 is a process-controlled agentic review system built around an output contract: it produces a \textbf{traceable review package} with anchored annotations, localized evidence, and executable follow-up actions, and it exports only after meeting minimum traceability and coverage budgets. Concretely, it first builds a manuscript-only claim--evidence--risk ledger and verification agenda, then performs agenda-driven retrieval and writes anchored critiques under an export gate. On 134 ICLR~2025 submissions under three fixed protocols, an \emph{un-finetuned 196B} model running DeepReviewer~2.0 outperforms Gemini-3.1-Pro-preview, improving strict major-issue coverage (37.26\% vs.\ 23.57\%) and winning 71.63\% of micro-averaged blind comparisons against a human review committee, while ranking first among automatic systems in our pool. We position DeepReviewer~2.0 as an assistive tool rather than a decision proxy, and note remaining gaps such as ethics-sensitive checks.

AI.tldr: DeepReviewer 2.0是一个过程控制的智能审稿系统，通过可追溯的审稿包（包含锚定注释、本地化证据和可执行的后续行动）来提升自动化同行评审的可审计性，在ICLR 2025提交上表现优于Gemini-3.1-Pro-preview和人类评审委员会。
AI.motivation: 当前自动化同行评审主要关注生成流畅的批评，但缺乏可审计性——审稿人和领域主席需要能够审核的评审：问题所在位置、支持证据以及具体的后续行动要求。
AI.method: 基于输出契约的过程控制智能审稿系统：1）构建仅基于稿件的声明-证据-风险分类账和验证议程；2）执行议程驱动的检索；3）在导出门控下编写锚定批评；4）仅在满足最小可追溯性和覆盖预算后才导出评审包。
AI.result: 在134个ICLR 2025提交上，未经微调的196B模型运行DeepReviewer 2.0：1）严格主要问题覆盖率达到37.26%（vs. Gemini-3.1-Pro-preview的23.57%）；2）在微观平均盲比较中，71.63%优于人类评审委员会；3）在自动系统中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: DeepReviewer 2.0定位为辅助工具而非决策代理，强调可审计的评审过程，但仍存在伦理敏感检查等差距。

title: Linguistic Accommodation Between Neurodivergent Communities on Reddit:A Communication Accommodation Theory Analysis of ADHD and Autism Groups
summary: Social media research on mental health has focused predominantly on detecting and diagnosing conditions at the individual level. In this work, we shift attention to \emph{intergroup} behavior, examining how two prominent neurodivergent communities, ADHD and autism, adjust their language when engaging with each other on Reddit. Grounded in Communication Accommodation Theory (CAT), we first establish that each community maintains a distinct linguistic profile as measured by Language Inquiry and Word Count Lexicon (LIWC). We then show that these profiles shift in opposite directions when users cross community boundaries: features that are elevated in one group's home community decrease when its members post in the other group's space, and vice versa, consistent with convergent accommodation. The involvement of topic-independent summary variables (Authentic, Clout) in these shifts provides partial evidence against a purely topical explanation. Finally, in an exploratory longitudinal analysis around the moment of public diagnosis disclosure, we find that its effects on linguistic style are small and, in some cases, directionally opposite to cross-community accommodation, providing initial evidence that situational audience adaptation and longer-term identity processes may involve different mechanisms. Our findings contribute to understanding intergroup communication dynamics among neurodivergent populations online and carry implications for community moderation and clinical perspectives on these conditions.

AI.tldr: 研究ADHD和自闭症社群在Reddit上的跨群组语言调整，发现当用户跨越社群边界时，语言特征会向对方社群收敛，这种调整与身份认同过程机制不同。
AI.motivation: 现有社交媒体心理健康研究主要关注个体层面的检测和诊断，本研究转向群组间行为，探索神经多样性社群（ADHD和自闭症）在Reddit上互动时的语言调整模式。
AI.method: 基于沟通适应理论，使用LIWC词典分析两个社群的语言特征，比较他们在本社群和跨社群发帖时的语言差异，并进行诊断披露时刻的纵向分析。
AI.result: 每个社群都有独特的语言特征，跨社群互动时语言特征向对方社群收敛；话题无关变量（Authentic、Clout）参与调整；诊断披露对语言风格影响较小，且与跨社群调整方向相反。
AI.conclusion: 神经多样性社群在线互动存在收敛性语言适应，情境性受众适应与长期身份认同过程可能涉及不同机制，这对社群管理和临床视角有重要意义。

title: Relational Preference Encoding in Looped Transformer Internal States
summary:
We investigate how looped transformers encode human preference in their internal iteration states. Using Ouro-2.6B-Thinking, a 2.6B-parameter looped transformer with iterative refinement, we extract hidden states from each loop iteration and train lightweight evaluator heads (~5M parameters) to predict human preference on the Anthropic HH-RLHF dataset. Our pairwise evaluator achieves 95.2% test accuracy on 8,552 unseen examples, surpassing a full-batch L-BFGS probe (84.5%) while the base model remains completely frozen.
  Our central finding is that loop states encode preference predominantly relationally: a linear probe on pairwise differences achieves 84.5%, the best nonlinear independent evaluator reaches only 65% test accuracy, and linear independent classification scores 21.75%, below chance and with inverted polarity. Interpreted precisely, the evaluator functions as a model-internal consistency probe, measuring how stably Ouro's own learned value system organizes its representations rather than how well it predicts noisy human annotations.
  We also document a systematic architecture search that established a genuine 70% ceiling for independent scoring, and show how the 50% argument-swap protocol required to prevent degenerate pairwise solutions deflated pairwise training metrics by about 31 points at peak, creating the false appearance that pairwise and pointwise evaluators shared the same ceiling.
  Finally, we show that a cosine learning-rate dead zone at epoch 2 accidentally acted as early stopping, preserving the generalization peak before overfitting degraded test accuracy from 95.2% to 62.4% by epoch 5. Cross-epoch flip-test analysis shows that antisymmetry correlation remains stable while strict sign-flip rate mainly tracks scorer bias. We propose the flip test as a mandatory diagnostic for pairwise preference evaluators.

AI.tldr: 研究循环Transformer如何在内部迭代状态中编码人类偏好，发现偏好主要通过关系性方式编码，而非独立评分。使用轻量级评估器头在冻结的2.6B参数模型上达到95.2%的测试准确率。
AI.motivation: 探索循环Transformer内部状态如何编码人类偏好，理解模型内部价值系统的组织方式，而非仅仅预测噪声的人类标注。
AI.method: 使用Ouro-2.6B-Thinking循环Transformer，从每个循环迭代提取隐藏状态，训练轻量级评估器头（约5M参数）在Anthropic HH-RLHF数据集上预测人类偏好。采用成对评估方法，并设计了50%参数交换协议防止退化解。
AI.result: 成对评估器在8,552个未见样本上达到95.2%测试准确率，远超全批次L-BFGS探针（84.5%）。发现偏好主要通过关系性编码：线性探针在成对差异上达到84.5%，而非线性独立评估器仅65%，线性独立分类仅21.75%（低于随机）。
AI.conclusion: 循环状态主要编码关系性偏好而非独立评分，评估器实质上是模型内部一致性探针，测量模型自身价值系统的稳定性。提出翻转测试作为成对偏好评估器的必要诊断工具。

title: Assessing Privacy Preservation and Utility in Online Vision-Language Models
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE ICC 2026. \c{opyright} IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. The final version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: The increasing use of Online Vision Language Models (OVLMs) for processing images has introduced significant privacy risks, as individuals frequently upload images for various utilities, unaware of the potential for privacy violations. Images contain relationships that relate to Personally Identifiable Information (PII), where even seemingly harmless details can indirectly reveal sensitive information through surrounding clues. This paper explores the critical issue of PII disclosure in images uploaded to OVLMs and its implications for user privacy. We investigate how the extraction of contextual relationships from images can lead to direct (explicit) or indirect (implicit) exposure of PII, significantly compromising personal privacy. Furthermore, we propose methods to protect privacy while preserving the intended utility of the images in Vision Language Model (VLM)-based applications. Our evaluation demonstrates the efficacy of these techniques, highlighting the delicate balance between maintaining utility and protecting privacy in online image processing environments. Index Terms-Personally Identifiable Information (PII), Privacy, Utility, privacy concerns, sensitive information

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在线视觉语言模型处理图像时的隐私风险，探讨图像中关系信息如何导致个人身份信息泄露，并提出在保持图像实用性的同时保护隐私的方法。
AI.motivation: 随着在线视觉语言模型的广泛应用，用户上传图像时面临隐私风险。图像中的关系信息可能间接泄露个人身份信息，而用户对此往往缺乏意识。
AI.method: 研究图像中上下文关系如何导致直接或间接的个人身份信息泄露，并提出在视觉语言模型应用中保护隐私同时保持图像实用性的技术方法。
AI.result: 评估显示提出的隐私保护技术有效，能够在在线图像处理环境中平衡实用性和隐私保护的需求。
AI.conclusion: 在线视觉语言模型处理图像时存在显著的隐私风险，需要开发有效的方法来保护个人身份信息，同时保持图像在应用中的实用性。

title: RPA-Check: A Multi-Stage Automated Framework for Evaluating Dynamic LLM-based Role-Playing Agents
summary: The rapid adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) in interactive systems has enabled the creation of dynamic, open-ended Role-Playing Agents (RPAs). However, evaluating these agents remains a significant challenge, as standard NLP metrics fail to capture the nuances of role adherence, logical consistency, and long-term narrative stability. This paper introduces RPA-Check, a multi-stage automated evaluation framework designed to objectively assess the performance of LLM-based RPAs in complex, constraints-heavy environments. Our methodology is based on a four-step pipeline: (1) Dimension Definition, establishing high-level qualitative behavioral criteria; (2) Augmentation, where these requirements are expanded into granular boolean checklist indicators; (3) Semantic Filtering, to ensure indicator objectivity, no redundancy and agent isolation; and (4) LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation, which employs chain-of-thought verification to score agent fidelity. We validate this framework by applying it to LLM Court, a serious game for forensic training involving several quantized local models. Experimental results across five distinct legal scenarios demonstrate the framework's ability to identify subtle trade-offs between model size, reasoning depth, and operational stability. Notably, the findings reveal an inverse relationship between parametric scale and procedural consistency, showing that smaller, adequately instruction-tuned models (8-9B) can outperform larger architectures prone to user-alignment bias or sycophancy. RPA-Check thus provides a standardized and reproducible metric for future research in generative agent evaluation within specialized domains.

AI.tldr: RPA-Check：一个用于评估基于LLM的角色扮演代理的多阶段自动化评估框架，通过四步流程客观评估代理在复杂约束环境中的表现，发现较小模型（8-9B）在程序一致性上可能优于更大模型。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在交互系统中的快速应用，动态开放式的角色扮演代理日益普及，但现有NLP评估指标无法有效衡量角色遵循度、逻辑一致性和长期叙事稳定性等关键维度，需要专门针对复杂约束环境的客观评估框架。
AI.method: 提出四步评估流程：1) 维度定义：建立高层次定性行为标准；2) 增强：将要求扩展为细粒度布尔检查清单指标；3) 语义过滤：确保指标客观性、无冗余和代理隔离；4) LLM作为评判者：使用思维链验证来评分代理保真度。
AI.result: 在LLM Court（法医训练严肃游戏）的五个不同法律场景中验证，框架能识别模型大小、推理深度和操作稳定性之间的微妙权衡。发现参数规模与程序一致性呈反比关系，适当指令调优的较小模型（8-9B）可能优于易受用户对齐偏差或谄媚倾向影响的大型架构。
AI.conclusion: RPA-Check为专业领域中生成式代理评估提供了标准化、可复现的度量标准，有助于未来研究客观评估角色扮演代理的性能表现。

title: Spatial Competence Benchmark
comment: Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Efficient Spatial Reasoning
summary: Spatial competence is the quality of maintaining a consistent internal representation of an environment and using it to infer discrete structure and plan actions under constraints. Prevailing spatial evaluations for large models are limited to probing isolated primitives through 3D transformations or visual question answering. We introduce the Spatial Competence Benchmark (SCBench), spanning three hierarchical capability buckets whose tasks require executable outputs verified by deterministic checkers or simulator-based evaluators. On SCBench, three frontier models exhibit monotonically decreasing accuracy up the capability ladder. Sweeping output-token caps shows that accuracy gains concentrate at low budgets and saturate quickly, and failures are dominated by locally plausible geometry that breaks global constraints. We release the task generators, verifiers, and visualisation tooling.

AI.tldr: SCBench是一个新的空间能力基准测试，通过三层能力层次评估大模型的空间推理能力，发现前沿模型在更高层次任务上准确率递减，且性能提升在低计算预算下饱和
AI.motivation: 现有的大模型空间评估方法局限于通过3D变换或视觉问答探测孤立的基本能力，缺乏对完整空间能力的系统性评估，需要更全面的基准测试来衡量模型的空间推理能力
AI.method: 提出SCBench基准测试，包含三个层次的能力桶（capability buckets），任务需要可执行的输出，通过确定性检查器或基于模拟器的评估器进行验证，并分析不同输出token限制下的性能表现
AI.result: 三个前沿模型在SCBench上表现出随着能力层次提高准确率单调递减的趋势；性能提升主要集中在低计算预算下并快速饱和；失败案例主要是局部合理但违反全局约束的几何结构
AI.conclusion: SCBench揭示了当前大模型在空间能力方面的系统性局限，特别是在高层次推理和全局约束处理上存在不足，为未来模型改进提供了重要基准和工具支持

title: ASPIRin: Action Space Projection for Interactivity-Optimized Reinforcement Learning in Full-Duplex Speech Language Models
summary: End-to-end full-duplex Speech Language Models (SLMs) require precise turn-taking for natural interaction. However, optimizing temporal dynamics via standard raw-token reinforcement learning (RL) degrades semantic quality, causing severe generative collapse and repetition. We propose ASPIRin, an interactivity-optimized RL framework that explicitly decouples when to speak from what to say. Using Action Space Projection, ASPIRin maps the text vocabulary into a coarse-grained binary state (active speech vs. inactive silence). By applying Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with rule-based rewards, it balances user interruption and response latency. Empirical evaluations show ASPIRin optimizes interactivity across turn-taking, backchanneling, and pause handling. Crucially, isolating timing from token selection preserves semantic coherence and reduces the portion of duplicate n-grams by over 50% compared to standard GRPO, effectively eliminating degenerative repetition.

AI.tldr: ASPIRin是一个端到端全双工语音语言模型框架，通过将何时说话与说什么内容解耦，使用动作空间投影和分组相对策略优化来优化交互性，同时保持语义质量。
AI.motivation: 端到端全双工语音语言模型需要精确的轮流发言来实现自然交互，但使用标准原始令牌强化学习优化时间动态会降低语义质量，导致严重的生成崩溃和重复问题。
AI.method: 提出ASPIRin框架，通过动作空间投影将文本词汇映射到粗粒度的二元状态（主动说话vs.非活动沉默），使用分组相对策略优化配合基于规则的奖励来平衡用户打断和响应延迟。
AI.result: ASPIRin在轮流发言、反馈回应和停顿处理等方面优化了交互性，同时将重复n-gram的比例降低了50%以上，有效消除了退化性重复，保持了语义连贯性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将时间决策与令牌选择分离，ASPIRin能够在优化语音语言模型交互性的同时保持语义质量，解决了标准强化学习方法导致的生成崩溃问题。

title: Efficient Personalization of Generative User Interfaces
summary: Generative user interfaces (UIs) create new opportunities to adapt interfaces to individual users on demand, but personalization remains difficult because desirable UI properties are subjective, hard to articulate, and costly to infer from sparse feedback. We study this problem through a new dataset in which 20 trained designers each provide pairwise judgments over the same 600 generated UIs, enabling direct analysis of preference divergence. We find substantial disagreement across designers (average kappa = 0.25), and written rationales reveal that even when designers appeal to similar concepts such as hierarchy or cleanliness, designers differ in how they define, prioritize, and apply those concepts. Motivated by these findings, we develop a sample-efficient personalization method that represents a new user in terms of prior designers rather than a fixed rubric of design concepts. In a technical evaluation, our preference model outperforms both a pretrained UI evaluator and a larger multimodal model, and scales better with additional feedback. When used to personalize generation, it also produces interfaces preferred by 12 new designers over baseline approaches, including direct user prompting. Our findings suggest that lightweight preference elicitation can serve as a practical foundation for personalized generative UI systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析20名设计师对600个生成UI的偏好分歧，开发了一种基于设计师先验知识的个性化方法，在技术评估中优于现有模型，并为个性化生成UI系统提供了实用基础。
AI.motivation: 生成式用户界面为按需个性化适配提供了新机会，但个性化仍然困难，因为理想的UI属性是主观的、难以明确表达，且从稀疏反馈中推断成本高昂。研究旨在解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 1) 创建新数据集：20名训练有素的设计师对相同的600个生成UI提供成对判断；2) 分析设计师之间的偏好分歧；3) 开发基于先验设计师而非固定设计概念框架的样本高效个性化方法。
AI.result: 发现设计师之间存在显著分歧（平均kappa=0.25），即使设计师使用相似概念（如层次结构、整洁性），他们在定义、优先级和应用这些概念上也存在差异。个性化偏好模型在技术评估中优于预训练的UI评估器和更大的多模态模型，且能更好地扩展。在个性化生成中，12名新设计师更偏好该方法而非基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级偏好获取可以作为个性化生成UI系统的实用基础，通过将新用户表示为先前设计师的组合而非固定设计概念框架，能够有效捕捉主观设计偏好。

title: I Can't Believe TTA Is Not Better: When Test-Time Augmentation Hurts Medical Image Classification
summary: Test-time augmentation (TTA)--aggregating predictions over multiple augmented copies of a test input--is widely assumed to improve classification accuracy, particularly in medical imaging where it is routinely deployed in production systems and competition solutions. We present a systematic empirical study challenging this assumption across three MedMNIST v2 benchmarks and four architectures spanning three orders of magnitude in parameter count (21K to 11M). Our principal finding is that TTA with standard augmentation pipelines consistently degrades accuracy relative to single-pass inference, with drops as severe as 31.6 percentage points for ResNet-18 on pathology images. This degradation affects all architectures, including convolutional models, and worsens with more augmented views. The sole exception is ResNet-18 on dermatology images, which gains a modest +1.6%. We identify the distribution shift between augmented and training-time inputs--amplified by batch normalization statistics mismatch--as the primary mechanism. Our ablation studies show that augmentation strategy matters critically: intensity-only augmentations preserve more performance than geometric transforms, and including the original unaugmented image partially mitigates but does not eliminate the accuracy drop. These findings serve as a cautionary note for practitioners: TTA should not be applied as a default post-hoc improvement but must be validated on the specific model-dataset combination.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在医学影像分类中，测试时增强（TTA）不仅不能提高准确率，反而会显著降低性能，这与普遍认知相反。
AI.motivation: 测试时增强（TTA）在医学影像分类中被广泛认为能提高准确率，并已广泛应用于生产系统和竞赛解决方案。本研究旨在系统验证这一假设是否成立。
AI.method: 在三个MedMNIST v2基准数据集和四种架构（参数量从21K到11M）上进行系统实证研究，评估TTA对分类准确率的影响，分析不同增强策略的效果。
AI.result: TTA使用标准增强流程会持续降低准确率，相对单次推理下降幅度高达31.6个百分点。所有架构都受影响，且增强视图越多性能越差。唯一例外是ResNet-18在皮肤病图像上获得+1.6%的微小提升。
AI.conclusion: TTA不应作为默认的后处理改进手段，必须在特定模型-数据集组合上进行验证。增强策略选择至关重要，强度增强比几何变换更能保持性能。

title: GenTac: Generative Modeling and Forecasting of Soccer Tactics
summary: Modeling open-play soccer tactics is a formidable challenge due to the stochastic, multi-agent nature of the game. Existing computational approaches typically produce single, deterministic trajectory forecasts or focus on highly structured set-pieces, fundamentally failing to capture the inherent variance and branching possibilities of real-world match evolution. Here, we introduce GenTac, a diffusion-based generative framework that conceptualizes soccer tactics as a stochastic process over continuous multi-player trajectories and discrete semantic events. By learning the underlying distribution of player movements from historical tracking data, GenTac samples diverse, plausible, long-horizon future trajectories. The framework supports rich contextual conditioning, including opponent behavior, specific team or league playing styles, and strategic objectives, while grounding continuous spatial dynamics into a 15-class tactical event space. Extensive evaluations on our proposed benchmark, TacBench, demonstrate four key capabilities: (1) GenTac achieves high geometric accuracy while strictly preserving the collective structural consistency of the team; (2) it accurately simulates stylistic nuances, distinguishing between specific teams (e.g., Auckland FC) and leagues (e.g., A-League versus German leagues); (3) it enables controllable counterfactual simulations, demonstrably altering spatial control and expected threat metrics based on offensive or defensive guidance; and (4) it reliably anticipates future tactical outcomes directly from generated rollouts. Finally, we demonstrate that GenTac can be successfully trained to generalize to other dynamic team sports, including basketball, American football, and ice hockey.

AI.tldr: GenTac是一个基于扩散模型的生成框架，用于建模足球等团队运动的开放战术，通过生成多样化的球员轨迹和战术事件来模拟真实比赛演变。
AI.motivation: 现有计算方法通常只能生成确定性的轨迹预测或专注于高度结构化的定位球，无法捕捉真实比赛中固有的变化和分支可能性。足球战术建模面临随机性、多智能体交互的挑战。
AI.method: 引入GenTac扩散生成框架，将足球战术建模为连续多球员轨迹和离散语义事件的随机过程。从历史跟踪数据中学习球员移动分布，支持丰富的上下文条件（对手行为、球队风格、战略目标），并将连续空间动态映射到15类战术事件空间。
AI.result: 在TacBench基准测试中展示四项关键能力：1）高几何精度同时保持团队结构一致性；2）准确模拟风格差异，区分特定球队和联赛；3）支持可控反事实模拟，改变空间控制和预期威胁指标；4）可靠预测未来战术结果。还能泛化到篮球、美式足球和冰球等其他团队运动。
AI.conclusion: GenTac为开放战术建模提供了有效的生成框架，能够捕捉足球等团队运动的随机性和多样性，支持战术分析和反事实模拟，具有跨运动泛化能力。

title: Reason Only When Needed: Efficient Generative Reward Modeling via Model-Internal Uncertainty
summary: Recent advancements in the Generative Reward Model (GRM) have demonstrated its potential to enhance the reasoning abilities of LLMs through Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting. Despite these gains, existing implementations of GRM suffer from two critical limitations. First, CoT prompting is applied indiscriminately to all inputs regardless of their inherent complexity. This introduces unnecessary computational costs for tasks amenable to fast, direct inference. Second, existing approaches primarily rely on voting-based mechanisms to evaluate CoT outputs, which often lack granularity and precision in assessing reasoning quality. In this paper, we propose E-GRM, an efficient generative reward modeling framework grounded in model-internal uncertainty. E-GRM leverages the convergence behavior of parallel model generations to estimate uncertainty and selectively trigger CoT reasoning only when needed, without relying on handcrafted features or task-dependent signals. To improve reward fidelity, we introduce a lightweight discriminative scorer trained with a hybrid regression--ranking objective to provide fine-grained evaluation of reasoning paths. Experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks show that E-GRM substantially reduces inference cost while consistently improving answer accuracy, demonstrating that model-internal uncertainty is an effective and general signal for efficient reasoning-aware reward modeling.

AI.tldr: E-GRM：基于模型内部不确定性的高效生成奖励建模框架，通过选择性触发CoT推理和细粒度评分器，在降低推理成本的同时提升答案准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有GRM方法存在两个关键问题：1) CoT提示不加区分地应用于所有输入，对简单任务引入不必要的计算成本；2) 主要依赖投票机制评估CoT输出，缺乏对推理质量的细粒度评估。
AI.method: 提出E-GRM框架：1) 利用并行模型生成的收敛行为估计不确定性，仅在需要时选择性触发CoT推理；2) 引入轻量级判别性评分器，采用混合回归-排序目标进行训练，提供推理路径的细粒度评估。
AI.result: 在多个推理基准测试中，E-GRM显著降低了推理成本，同时持续提高了答案准确性，证明模型内部不确定性是高效推理感知奖励建模的有效通用信号。
AI.conclusion: E-GRM通过基于模型内部不确定性的选择性CoT触发和细粒度评分机制，实现了计算效率与推理质量的平衡，为高效推理感知奖励建模提供了有效解决方案。

title: SemEnrich: Self-Supervised Semantic Enrichment of Radiology Reports for Vision-Language Learning
summary: Medical vision-language datasets are often limited in size and biased toward negative findings, as clinicians report abnormalities mostly but might omit some positive/neutral findings because they might be considered as irrelevant to the patient's condition. We propose a self-supervised data enrichment method that leverages semantic clustering of report sentences. Then we enrich the findings in the medical reports in the training set by adding positive/neutral observations from different clusters in a self-supervised manner. Our approach yields consistent gains in supervised fine-tuning (5.63%, 3.04%, 7.40%, 5.30%, 7.47% average gains on COMET score, Bert score, Sentence Bleu, CheXbert-F1 and RadGraph-F1 scores respectively). Ablation studies confirm that improvements stem from semantic clustering rather than random augmentation. Furthermore, we introduce a way to incorporate semantic cluster information into the reward design for GRPO training, which leads to further performance gains (2.78%, 3.14%, 12.80% average gains on COMET score, Bert score and Sentence Bleu scores respectively). We share our code at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SemEnrich-75CF

AI.tldr: 提出基于语义聚类的自监督数据增强方法，通过从不同聚类中添加阳性/中性观察来丰富医学报告，提升医学视觉语言模型的性能
AI.motivation: 医学视觉语言数据集通常规模有限且偏向阴性发现，因为临床医生主要报告异常情况，可能遗漏阳性/中性发现，这些发现可能被认为与患者状况无关
AI.method: 1. 利用报告句子的语义聚类进行自监督数据增强；2. 通过从不同聚类中添加阳性/中性观察来丰富训练集中的医学报告；3. 将语义聚类信息整合到GRPO训练的奖励设计中
AI.result: 在监督微调中取得显著提升（COMET得分平均增益5.63%，Bert得分3.04%，Sentence Bleu 7.40%，CheXbert-F1 5.30%，RadGraph-F1 7.47%）；在GRPO训练中进一步获得性能提升（COMET得分平均增益2.78%，Bert得分3.14%，Sentence Bleu 12.80%）
AI.conclusion: 提出的语义聚类自监督数据增强方法能有效丰富医学报告数据，缓解数据集偏差问题，显著提升医学视觉语言模型的性能，并通过奖励设计进一步优化模型表现

title: Attention-Guided Flow-Matching for Sparse 3D Geological Generation
summary: Constructing high-resolution 3D geological models from sparse 1D borehole and 2D surface data is a highly ill-posed inverse problem. Traditional heuristic and implicit modeling methods fundamentally fail to capture non-linear topological discontinuities under extreme sparsity, often yielding unrealistic artifacts.
