We propose MuPPet, a novel multi-person 2D-to-3D pose lifting framework that explicitly models inter-person correlations. To leverage these inter-person dependencies, our approach introduces Person Encoding to structure individual representations, Permutation Augmentation to enhance training diversity, and Dynamic Multi-Person Attention to adaptively model correlations between individuals. Extensive experiments on group interaction datasets demonstrate MuPPet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art single- and multi-person 2D-to-3D pose lifting methods, and improves robustness in occlusion scenarios. Our findings highlight the importance of modeling inter-person correlations, paving the way for accurate and socially-aware 3D pose estimation. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Thomas-Markhorst/MuPPet

AI.tldr: MuPPet是一个新颖的多人物2D到3D姿态提升框架，通过显式建模人物间相关性来提升多人社交互动场景下的3D姿态估计性能。
AI.motivation: 多人社交互动建立在群体内个体间的连贯性和关系之上，现有的2D到3D姿态提升方法往往忽略人物间关系或无法处理变化的群体规模，限制了在多人场景中的有效性。
AI.method: 提出MuPPet框架，包含三个核心组件：人物编码（Person Encoding）来结构化个体表示，排列增强（Permutation Augmentation）来增强训练多样性，动态多人注意力（Dynamic Multi-Person Attention）来自适应建模个体间相关性。
AI.result: 在群体互动数据集上的广泛实验表明，MuPPet显著优于现有的单人和多人2D到3D姿态提升方法，并在遮挡场景中提高了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 建模人物间相关性对于准确且具有社交意识的3D姿态估计至关重要，MuPPet为这一方向铺平了道路。

title: Competing with AI Scientists: Agent-Driven Approach to Astrophysics Research
summary: We present an agent-driven approach to the construction of parameter inference pipelines for scientific data analysis. Our method leverages a multi-agent system, Cmbagent (the analysis system of the AI scientist Denario), in which specialized agents collaborate to generate research ideas, write and execute code, evaluate results, and iteratively refine the overall pipeline. As a case study, we apply this approach to the FAIR Universe Weak Lensing Uncertainty Challenge, a competition under time constraints focused on robust cosmological parameter inference with realistic observational uncertainties. While the fully autonomous exploration initially did not reach expert-level performance, the integration of human intervention enabled our agent-driven workflow to achieve a first-place result in the challenge. This demonstrates that semi-autonomous agentic systems can compete with, and in some cases surpass, expert solutions. We describe our workflow in detail, including both the autonomous and semi-autonomous exploration by Cmbagent. Our final inference pipeline utilizes parameter-efficient convolutional neural networks, likelihood calibration over a known parameter grid, and multiple regularization techniques. Our results suggest that agent-driven research workflows can provide a scalable framework to rapidly explore and construct pipelines for inference problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于智能体的参数推断流水线构建方法，通过多智能体系统Cmbagent实现研究想法生成、代码编写执行、结果评估和流水线迭代优化，在FAIR宇宙弱透镜不确定性挑战赛中通过人机协同获得第一名。
AI.motivation: 科学数据分析中参数推断流水线的构建通常需要大量专家知识和时间，特别是在时间受限的竞赛环境中。本文旨在探索智能体驱动的自动化工作流是否能够快速构建有效的推断流水线，并与专家解决方案竞争。
AI.method: 采用多智能体系统Cmbagent，其中专门化的智能体协作完成研究想法生成、代码编写与执行、结果评估和流水线迭代优化。在FAIR宇宙弱透镜不确定性挑战赛中，先进行全自主探索，然后引入人工干预实现半自主工作流。最终推断流水线结合了参数高效卷积神经网络、已知参数网格上的似然校准以及多种正则化技术。
AI.result: 全自主探索未能达到专家水平，但引入人工干预的半自主智能体工作流在FAIR宇宙弱透镜不确定性挑战赛中获得第一名。最终流水线表现优异，证明了半自主智能体系统能够与专家解决方案竞争甚至超越。
AI.conclusion: 智能体驱动的研究工作流为快速探索和构建推断问题流水线提供了可扩展框架，半自主智能体系统在科学数据分析中具有与专家解决方案竞争的潜力，特别是在时间受限的竞赛环境中。

title: CodeComp: Structural KV Cache Compression for Agentic Coding
summary: Agentic code tasks such as fault localization and patch generation require processing long codebases under tight memory constraints, where the Key-Value (KV) cache becomes the primary inference bottleneck. Existing compression methods rely exclusively on attention signals to estimate token importance, systematically discarding structurally critical tokens such as call sites, branch conditions, and assignments that are essential for code understanding. We present CodeComp, a training-free KV cache compression framework that incorporates static program analysis into LLM inference via Code Property Graph priors extracted by Joern. Across bug localization and code generation benchmarks, CodeComp consistently outperforms attention-only compression baselines under equal memory budgets, recovering the majority of full-context accuracy under aggressive KV cache compression, while matching the patch generation quality of uncompressed full-context inference and integrating seamlessly into SGLang-based agentic coding pipelines without model modification.

AI.tldr: CodeComp：一种无需训练的KV缓存压缩框架，通过静态程序分析（Code Property Graph）提升代码任务中的缓存效率，在相同内存预算下优于仅基于注意力的压缩方法
AI.motivation: 代码代理任务（如故障定位和补丁生成）需要处理长代码库，KV缓存成为主要推理瓶颈。现有压缩方法仅依赖注意力信号估计token重要性，会系统性地丢弃对代码理解至关重要的结构关键token（如调用点、分支条件、赋值语句）
AI.method: CodeComp框架将静态程序分析（通过Joern提取的Code Property Graph先验）集成到LLM推理中，无需训练，可无缝集成到基于SGLang的代理编码管道中，无需修改模型
AI.result: 在故障定位和代码生成基准测试中，CodeComp在相同内存预算下始终优于仅基于注意力的压缩基线，在激进的KV缓存压缩下恢复大部分完整上下文准确率，同时匹配未压缩完整上下文推理的补丁生成质量
AI.conclusion: 通过将静态程序分析集成到LLM推理中，CodeComp有效解决了代码任务中的KV缓存瓶颈问题，在保持代码理解质量的同时显著提升内存效率

title: LoDAdaC: a unified local training-based decentralized framework with adaptive gradients and compressed communication
summary: In the decentralized distributed learning, achieving fast convergence and low communication cost is essential for scalability and high efficiency. Adaptive gradient methods, such as Adam, have demonstrated strong practical performance in deep learning and centralized distributed settings. However, their convergence properties remain largely unexplored in decentralized settings involving multiple local training steps, such as federated learning. To address this limitation, we propose LoDAdaC, a unified multiple Local Training (MLT) Decentralized framework with Adam-type updates and Compressed communication (CC). LoDAdaC accommodates a broad class of optimizers for its local adaptive updates, including AMSGrad, Adam, and AdaGrad; it is compatible with standard (possibly biased) compressors such as low-bit quantization and sparsification. MLT and CC enable LoDAdaC to achieve multiplied reduction of communication cost, while the technique of adaptive updates enables fast convergence. We rigorously prove the combined advantage through complexity analysis. In addition, experiments on image classification and GPT-style language model training validate our theoretical findings and show that LoDAdaC significantly outperforms existing decentralized algorithms in terms of convergence speed and communication efficiency.

AI.tldr: LoDAdaC是一个统一的多本地训练去中心化框架，结合Adam型自适应更新和压缩通信，在保持快速收敛的同时大幅降低通信成本。
AI.motivation: 在去中心化分布式学习中，需要同时实现快速收敛和低通信成本以提高可扩展性和效率。虽然Adam等自适应梯度方法在深度学习和集中式分布式设置中表现出色，但它们在涉及多本地训练步骤的去中心化设置（如联邦学习）中的收敛特性尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 提出LoDAdaC框架，包含三个核心组件：1）多本地训练（MLT）允许每个节点进行多次本地更新；2）Adam型自适应更新支持AMSGrad、Adam、AdaGrad等多种优化器；3）压缩通信（CC）兼容标准压缩器如低比特量化和稀疏化。这些技术共同实现了通信成本的多重降低。
AI.result: 通过复杂度分析严格证明了LoDAdaC的理论优势。在图像分类和GPT风格语言模型训练的实验验证中，LoDAdaC在收敛速度和通信效率方面显著优于现有去中心化算法。
AI.conclusion: LoDAdaC成功解决了去中心化分布式学习中快速收敛与低通信成本之间的权衡问题，为大规模分布式深度学习提供了一个高效实用的解决方案。

title: Training Deep Visual Networks Beyond Loss and Accuracy Through a Dynamical Systems Approach
summary: Deep visual recognition models are usually trained and evaluated using metrics such as loss and accuracy. While these measures show whether a model is improving, they reveal very little about how its internal representations change during training. This paper introduces a complementary way to study that process by examining training through the lens of dynamical systems. Drawing on ideas from signal analysis originally used to study biological neural activity, we define three measures from layer activations collected across training epochs: an integration score that reflects long-range coordination across layers, a metastability score that captures how flexibly the network shifts between more and less synchronised states, and a combined dynamical stability index. We apply this framework to nine combinations of model architecture and dataset, including several ResNet variants, DenseNet-121, MobileNetV2, VGG-16, and a pretrained Vision Transformer on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100. The results suggest three main patterns. First, the integration measure consistently distinguishes the easier CIFAR-10 setting from the more difficult CIFAR-100 setting. Second, changes in the volatility of the stability index may provide an early sign of convergence before accuracy fully plateaus. Third, the relationship between integration and metastability appears to reflect different styles of training behaviour. Overall, this study offers an exploratory but promising new way to understand deep visual training beyond loss and accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过动力学系统视角分析深度视觉模型训练过程的新方法，定义了三个基于层激活的指标来研究网络内部表征的动态变化。
AI.motivation: 传统的损失和准确率指标只能显示模型是否在改进，但无法揭示训练过程中内部表征如何变化。需要一种补充方法来研究深度视觉模型训练的动态过程。
AI.method: 借鉴用于研究生物神经活动的信号分析思想，从训练过程中收集的层激活定义了三个指标：反映跨层长程协调的整合分数、捕捉网络在同步状态间灵活转换的亚稳定性分数，以及结合两者的动力学稳定性指数。
AI.result: 在9种模型架构和数据集组合上的应用显示：1）整合指标能一致区分较简单的CIFAR-10和较难的CIFAR-100；2）稳定性指数的波动变化可能在准确率完全稳定前提供收敛的早期信号；3）整合与亚稳定性的关系反映了不同的训练行为风格。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究为理解深度视觉训练提供了超越损失和准确率的探索性但前景广阔的新视角，通过动力学系统框架揭示了训练过程中内部表征的动态变化模式。

title: How LLMs Might Think
summary: Do large language models (LLMs) think? Daniel Stoljar and Zhihe Vincent Zhang have recently developed an argument from rationality for the claim that LLMs do not think. We contend, however, that the argument from rationality not only falters, but leaves open an intriguing possibility: that LLMs engage only in arational, associative forms of thinking, and have purely associative minds. Our positive claim is that if LLMs think at all, they likely think precisely in this manner.

AI.tldr: 论文反驳了Stoljar和Zhang关于LLM不思考的论证，提出LLM可能进行非理性、联想式的思考，具有纯联想思维
AI.motivation: 针对Stoljar和Zhang提出的"理性论证"（认为LLM不思考）进行反驳，探讨LLM是否可能以不同方式思考
AI.method: 通过哲学分析和论证批判，指出理性论证的缺陷，并提出替代性解释框架
AI.result: 理性论证站不住脚，LLM可能进行非理性、联想式的思考，具有纯联想思维
AI.conclusion: 如果LLM确实思考，它们很可能以非理性、联想的方式进行思考，具有纯联想思维

title: Comparative Analysis of Large Language Models in Healthcare
summary: Background: Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming artificial intelligence applications in healthcare due to their ability to understand, generate, and summarize complex medical text. They offer valuable support to clinicians, researchers, and patients, yet their deployment in high-stakes clinical environments raises critical concerns regarding accuracy, reliability, and patient safety. Despite substantial attention in recent years, standardized benchmarking of LLMs for medical applications has been limited. Objective: This study addresses the need for a standardized comparative evaluation of LLMs in medical settings. Method: We evaluate multiple models, including ChatGPT, LLaMA, Grok, Gemini, and ChatDoctor, on core medical tasks such as patient note summarization and medical question answering, using the open-access datasets, MedMCQA, PubMedQA, and Asclepius, and assess performance through a combination of linguistic and task-specific metrics. Results: The results indicate that domain-specific models, such as ChatDoctor, excel in contextual reliability, producing medically accurate and semantically aligned text, whereas general-purpose models like Grok and LLaMA perform better in structured question-answering tasks, demonstrating higher quantitative accuracy. This highlights the complementary strengths of domain-specific and general-purpose LLMs depending on the medical task. Conclusion: Our findings suggest that LLMs can meaningfully support medical professionals and enhance clinical decision-making; however, their safe and effective deployment requires adherence to ethical standards, contextual accuracy, and human oversight in relevant cases. These results underscore the importance of task-specific evaluation and cautious integration of LLMs into healthcare workflows.

AI.tldr: 该研究对多种大语言模型（ChatGPT、LLaMA、Grok、Gemini、ChatDoctor）在医疗任务（患者笔记总结、医学问答）上进行标准化评估，发现领域特定模型在上下文可靠性方面表现更好，而通用模型在结构化问答任务中准确性更高。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在医疗应用中展现出潜力，但在高风险临床环境中的部署存在准确性、可靠性和患者安全方面的担忧。目前缺乏对医疗应用LLM的标准化基准测试，需要建立系统的评估框架。
AI.method: 使用MedMCQA、PubMedQA和Asclepius等开放数据集，评估多个模型在患者笔记总结和医学问答等核心医疗任务上的表现，结合语言学和任务特定指标进行综合评估。
AI.result: 领域特定模型（如ChatDoctor）在上下文可靠性方面表现优异，能生成医学准确且语义对齐的文本；通用模型（如Grok和LLaMA）在结构化问答任务中定量准确性更高。不同模型在不同医疗任务中具有互补优势。
AI.conclusion: LLM能有效支持医疗专业人员和增强临床决策，但安全有效的部署需要遵守伦理标准、确保上下文准确性，并在相关情况下保持人类监督。研究强调了任务特定评估和谨慎整合LLM到医疗工作流程的重要性。

title: Towards Multi-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging with Noisy Labels
comment: The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git
summary: Automatic sleep staging is a multimodal learning problem involving heterogeneous physiological signals such as EEG and EOG, which often suffer from domain shifts across institutions, devices, and populations. In practice, these data are also affected by noisy annotations, yet label-noise-robust multi-source domain generalization remains underexplored. We present the first benchmark for Noisy Labels in Multi-Source Domain-Generalized Sleep Staging (NL-DGSS) and show that existing noisy-label learning methods degrade substantially when domain shifts and label noise coexist. To address this challenge, we propose FF-TRUST, a domain-invariant multimodal sleep staging framework with Joint Time-Frequency Early Learning Regularization (JTF-ELR). By jointly exploiting temporal and spectral consistency together with confidence-diversity regularization, FF-TRUST improves robustness under noisy supervision. Experiments on five public datasets demonstrate consistent state-of-the-art performance under diverse symmetric and asymmetric noise settings. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git.

AI.tldr: FF-TRUST：首个针对多源域泛化睡眠分期中标签噪声问题的基准与框架，通过联合时频早期学习正则化提升噪声监督下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 自动睡眠分期面临多模态生理信号的域偏移问题，同时实际数据常受噪声标注影响。现有噪声标签学习方法在域偏移和标签噪声共存时性能显著下降，而这一领域尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 提出FF-TRUST框架，采用联合时频早期学习正则化（JTF-ELR），通过同时利用时域和频域一致性以及置信度多样性正则化，增强对噪声监督的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上的实验表明，FF-TRUST在对称和非对称噪声设置下均取得一致的先进性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了多源域泛化睡眠分期中标签噪声鲁棒性研究的空白，提出的FF-TRUST框架和NL-DGSS基准为后续研究提供了重要基础。

title: Multi-Head Attention based interaction-aware architecture for Bangla Handwritten Character Recognition: Introducing a Primary Dataset
summary: Character recognition is the fundamental part of an optical character recognition (OCR) system. Word recognition, sentence transcription, document digitization, and language processing are some of the higher-order activities that can be done accurately through character recognition. Nonetheless, recognizing handwritten Bangla characters is not an easy task because they are written in different styles with inconsistent stroke patterns and a high degree of visual character resemblance. The datasets available are usually limited in intra-class and inequitable in class distribution. We have constructed a new balanced dataset of Bangla written characters to overcome those problems. This consists of 78 classes and each class has approximately 650 samples. It contains the basic characters, composite (Juktobarno) characters and numerals. The samples were a diverse group comprising a large age range and socioeconomic groups. Elementary and high school students, university students, and professionals are the contributing factors. The sample also has right and left-handed writers. We have further proposed an interaction-aware hybrid deep learning architecture that integrates EfficientNetB3, Vision Transformer, and Conformer modules in parallel. A multi-head cross-attention fusion mechanism enables effective feature interaction across these components. The proposed model achieves 98.84% accuracy on the constructed dataset and 96.49% on the external CHBCR benchmark, demonstrating strong generalization capability. Grad-CAM visualizations further provide interpretability by highlighting discriminative regions. The dataset and source code of this research is publicly available at: https://huggingface.co/MIRZARAQUIB/Bangla_Handwritten_Character_Recognition.

AI.tldr: 提出一个新的平衡的孟加拉手写字符数据集，并设计了一个结合EfficientNetB3、Vision Transformer和Conformer的混合深度学习架构，在自建数据集上达到98.84%准确率，在外部基准上达到96.49%。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉手写字符识别面临挑战：字符书写风格多样、笔画模式不一致、视觉相似度高，且现有数据集通常类内样本有限、类别分布不均衡。
AI.method: 1) 构建包含78个类别、每类约650个样本的平衡数据集，涵盖基本字符、复合字符和数字；2) 提出交互感知的混合深度学习架构，并行集成EfficientNetB3、Vision Transformer和Conformer模块，通过多头交叉注意力融合机制实现特征交互。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上达到98.84%准确率，在外部CHBCR基准上达到96.49%准确率，展示了强大的泛化能力。Grad-CAM可视化提供了可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的平衡数据集和混合架构有效解决了孟加拉手写字符识别的挑战，模型表现出优异的性能和泛化能力，数据集和代码已公开。

title: Belief-Aware VLM Model for Human-like Reasoning
summary: Traditional neural network models for intent inference rely heavily on observable states and struggle to generalize across diverse tasks and dynamic environments. Recent advances in Vision Language Models (VLMs) and Vision Language Action (VLA) models introduce common-sense reasoning through large-scale multimodal pretraining, enabling zero-shot performance across tasks. However, these models still lack explicit mechanisms to represent and update belief, limiting their ability to reason like humans or capture the evolving human intent over long-horizon. To address this, we propose a belief-aware VLM framework that integrates retrieval-based memory and reinforcement learning. Instead of learning an explicit belief model, we approximate belief using a vector-based memory that retrieves relevant multimodal context, which is incorporated into the VLM for reasoning. We further refine decision-making using a reinforcement learning policy over the VLM latent space. We evaluate our approach on publicly available VQA datasets such as HD-EPIC and demonstrate consistent improvements over zero-shot baselines, highlighting the importance of belief-aware reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合检索记忆和强化学习的信念感知视觉语言模型框架，用于改进意图推理
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络意图推理模型依赖可观测状态，难以泛化到多样化任务和动态环境。现有的视觉语言模型虽然通过大规模多模态预训练引入了常识推理，但仍缺乏明确的信念表示和更新机制，限制了其类似人类的推理能力和对长期演化的人类意图的捕捉。
AI.method: 提出信念感知VLM框架，整合检索式记忆和强化学习。不学习显式信念模型，而是使用基于向量的记忆来检索相关多模态上下文，将其融入VLM进行推理。进一步在VLM潜在空间上使用强化学习策略来优化决策。
AI.result: 在HD-EPIC等公开VQA数据集上评估，相比零样本基线获得了一致的性能提升，证明了信念感知推理的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 信念感知推理对于改进视觉语言模型在意图推理任务中的性能至关重要，提出的框架通过整合记忆和强化学习有效提升了模型能力。

title: Adaptive Multi-Expert Reasoning via Difficulty-Aware Routing and Uncertainty-Guided Aggregation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong performance in math reasoning benchmarks, but their performance varies inconsistently across problems with varying levels of difficulty. This paper describes Adaptive Multi-Expert Reasoning (AMR), a framework that focuses on problem complexity by reasoning with dynamically adapted strategies. An agile routing system that focuses on problem text predicts problems' difficulty and uncertainty and guides a reconfigurable sampling mechanism to manage the breadth of generation. Three specialized experts create candidate responses, which are modified during multiple correction and finalization phases. A neural verifier assesses the correctness of responses, while a clustering-based aggregation technique identifies the final candidate answer based on a combination of consensus and answer quality. When evaluated on the GSM8K dataset, AMR achieved 75.28% accuracy while only using the original training data. This result outperformed the majority of comparable 7B models that were trained on synthetic data. This showcases that models using difficulty-based routing and uncertainty-driven aggregation are efficient and effective in improving math reasoning models' robustness.

AI.tldr: AMR框架通过动态适应策略解决数学推理问题，使用难度路由和不确定性驱动聚合，在GSM8K数据集上达到75.28%准确率，优于多数使用合成数据训练的7B模型。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在数学推理基准测试中表现良好，但在不同难度问题上的表现不一致。需要一种能够根据问题复杂度动态调整推理策略的框架来提高模型的鲁棒性。
AI.method: AMR框架包含：1）敏捷路由系统预测问题难度和不确定性，指导可重构采样机制；2）三个专业专家生成候选响应；3）多个校正和最终化阶段修改响应；4）神经验证器评估响应正确性；5）基于聚类的聚合技术结合共识和答案质量确定最终答案。
AI.result: 在GSM8K数据集上，AMR仅使用原始训练数据就达到了75.28%的准确率，优于大多数使用合成数据训练的可比7B模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于难度路由和不确定性驱动聚合的模型能够有效提高数学推理模型的鲁棒性，展示了动态适应策略在复杂问题推理中的效率和效果。

title: Closed-Form Concept Erasure via Double Projections
summary: While modern generative models such as diffusion-based architectures have enabled impressive creative capabilities, they also raise important safety and ethical risks. These concerns have led to growing interest in concept erasure, the process of removing unwanted concepts from model representations. Existing approaches often achieve strong erasure performance but rely on iterative optimization and may inadvertently distort unrelated concepts. In this work, we present a simple yet principled alternative: a linear transformation framework that achieves concept erasure analytically, without any training. Our method adapts a pretrained model through two sequential, closed-form steps: first, computing a proxy projection of the target concept, and second, applying a constrained transformation within the left null space of known concept directions. This design yields a deterministic and geometrically interpretable procedure for safe, efficient, and theory-grounded concept removal. Across a wide range of experiments, including object and style erasure on multiple Stable Diffusion variants and the flow-matching model (FLUX), our approach matches or surpasses the performance of state-of-the-art methods while preserving non-target concepts more faithfully. Requiring only a few seconds to apply, it offers a lightweight and drop-in tool for controlled model editing, advancing the goal of safer and more responsible generative models.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的线性变换框架，通过解析方法实现概念擦除，避免迭代优化并减少对无关概念的扭曲。
AI.motivation: 现代生成模型（如扩散模型）虽然具有强大的创意能力，但也带来了安全和伦理风险。现有概念擦除方法通常依赖迭代优化，可能无意中扭曲无关概念。
AI.method: 采用线性变换框架，通过两个顺序的闭式步骤实现概念擦除：1) 计算目标概念的代理投影；2) 在已知概念方向的左零空间内应用约束变换。
AI.result: 在多种Stable Diffusion变体和FLUX模型上的广泛实验中，该方法在物体和风格擦除任务上达到或超越了最先进方法的性能，同时更忠实地保留了非目标概念。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一个轻量级、即插即用的模型编辑工具，只需几秒即可应用，为实现更安全、更负责任的生成模型目标提供了理论支撑。

title: Data-Driven Automated Identification of Optimal Feature-Representative Images in Infrared Thermography Using Statistical and Morphological Metrics
summary: Infrared thermography (IRT) is a widely used non-destructive testing technique for detecting structural features such as subsurface defects. However, most IRT post-processing methods generate image sequences in which defect visibility varies strongly across time, frequency, or coefficient/index domains, making the identification of defect-representative images a critical challenge. Conventional evaluation metrics, such as the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) or the Tanimoto criterion, often require prior knowledge of defect locations or defect-free reference regions, limiting their suitability for automated and unsupervised analysis. In this work, a data-driven methodology is proposed to identify images within IRT datasets that are most likely to contain and represent structural features, particularly anomalies and defects, without requiring prior spatial information. The approach is based on three complementary metrics: the Homogeneity Index of Mixture (HI), which quantifies statistical heterogeneity via deviations of local intensity distributions from a global reference distribution; a Representative Elementary Area (REA), derived from a Minkowski-functional adaptation of the Representative Elementary Volume concept to two-dimensional images; and a geometrical-topological Total Variation Energy (TVE) index, also based on two-dimensional Minkowski functionals, designed to improve sensitivity to localized anomalies. The framework is validated experimentally using pulse-heated IRT data from a carbon fiber-reinforced polymer (CFRP) plate containing six artificial defects at depths between 0.135 mm and 0.810 mm, and is further supported by one-dimensional N-layer thermal model simulations. The results demonstrate robust and unbiased ranking of image sequences and provide a reliable basis for automated defect-oriented image selection in IRT.

AI.tldr: 提出基于三个互补指标的数据驱动方法，用于在红外热成像序列中自动识别最可能包含结构特征（特别是缺陷）的图像，无需先验空间信息。
AI.motivation: 红外热成像后处理生成的图像序列中缺陷可见性随时间、频率或系数域变化很大，传统评估指标（如SNR或Tanimoto准则）通常需要缺陷位置或无缺陷参考区域的先验知识，限制了自动化无监督分析的适用性。
AI.method: 提出基于三个互补指标的数据驱动框架：1) 混合均匀性指数(HI)，通过局部强度分布与全局参考分布的偏差量化统计异质性；2) 代表性基本面积(REA)，基于Minkowski泛函将代表性基本体积概念适应到二维图像；3) 几何拓扑总变分能量(TVE)指数，同样基于二维Minkowski泛函，提高对局部异常的敏感性。
AI.result: 使用含6个人工缺陷（深度0.135-0.810 mm）的碳纤维增强聚合物板的脉冲加热红外热成像数据进行实验验证，并辅以一维N层热模型模拟支持。结果表明该方法能对图像序列进行稳健无偏的排序，为红外热成像中的自动化缺陷导向图像选择提供可靠基础。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动方法能够在无需先验空间信息的情况下，有效识别红外热成像序列中最能代表结构特征（特别是缺陷）的图像，为自动化无监督分析提供了实用框架。

title: Tipiano: Cascaded Piano Hand Motion Synthesis via Fingertip Priors
summary: Synthesizing realistic piano hand motions requires both precision and naturalness. Physics-based methods achieve precision but produce stiff motions; data-driven models learn natural dynamics but struggle with positional accuracy. Piano motion exhibits a natural hierarchy: fingertip positions are nearly deterministic given piano geometry and fingering, while wrist and intermediate joints offer stylistic freedom. We present [OURS], a four-stage framework exploiting this hierarchy: (1) statistics-based fingertip positioning, (2) FiLM-conditioned trajectory refinement, (3) wrist estimation, and (4) STGCN-based pose synthesis. We contribute expert-annotated fingerings for the FürElise dataset (153 pieces, ~10 hours). Experiments demonstrate F1 = 0.910, substantially outperforming diffusion baselines (F1 = 0.121), with user study (N=41) confirming quality approaching motion capture. Expert evaluation by professional pianists (N=5) identified anticipatory motion as the key remaining gap, providing concrete directions for future improvement.

AI.tldr: 提出分层四阶段框架[OURS]合成钢琴手部动作：基于统计的指尖定位、FiLM条件轨迹优化、手腕估计和STGCN姿态合成，在FürElise数据集上表现优于扩散模型，接近动作捕捉质量。
AI.motivation: 钢琴手部动作合成需要同时满足精确性和自然性。基于物理的方法能保证精确但动作僵硬，数据驱动模型能学习自然动态但位置精度不足。钢琴动作具有自然层次结构：指尖位置由钢琴几何和指法基本确定，而手腕和中间关节提供风格自由度。
AI.method: 提出四阶段分层框架：1) 基于统计的指尖定位，2) FiLM条件轨迹优化，3) 手腕估计，4) STGCN姿态合成。贡献了FürElise数据集（153首曲目，约10小时）的专家标注指法。
AI.result: 实验显示F1=0.910，显著优于扩散基线（F1=0.121）。用户研究（N=41）确认质量接近动作捕捉。专业钢琴家评估（N=5）指出预期性动作是主要差距，为未来改进提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用钢琴动作的层次结构，提出的分层框架在精确性和自然性之间取得了良好平衡，显著优于现有方法，接近专业动作捕捉质量，为钢琴手部动作合成提供了有效解决方案。

title: A Structured Clustering Approach for Inducing Media Narratives
comment: Accepted to the Proceedings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Media narratives wield tremendous power in shaping public opinion, yet computational approaches struggle to capture the nuanced storytelling structures that communication theory emphasizes as central to how meaning is constructed. Existing approaches either miss subtle narrative patterns through coarse-grained analysis or require domain-specific taxonomies that limit scalability. To bridge this gap, we present a framework for inducing rich narrative schemas by jointly modeling events and characters via structured clustering. Our approach produces explainable narrative schemas that align with established framing theory while scaling to large corpora without exhaustive manual annotation.

AI.tldr: 提出一个通过联合建模事件和角色来诱导丰富叙事模式的框架，解决现有方法无法捕捉细微叙事结构的问题
AI.motivation: 媒体叙事对塑造公众舆论有巨大影响力，但现有计算方法难以捕捉传播理论强调的微妙叙事结构。现有方法要么通过粗粒度分析错过细微叙事模式，要么需要领域特定分类法限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: 通过结构化聚类联合建模事件和角色，诱导丰富的叙事模式框架
AI.result: 产生可解释的叙事模式，与既有的框架理论一致，同时能够扩展到大型语料库而无需大量人工标注
AI.conclusion: 该框架填补了现有方法的空白，能够捕捉媒体叙事中的微妙结构，同时保持可扩展性和可解释性

title: Cross-Validated Cross-Channel Self-Attention and Denoising for Automatic Modulation Classification
summary: This study addresses a key limitation in deep learning Automatic Modulation Classification (AMC) models, which perform well at high signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs) but degrade under noisy conditions due to conventional feature extraction suppressing both discriminative structure and interference. The goal was to develop a feature-preserving denoising method that mitigates the loss of modulation class separation. A deep learning AMC model was proposed, incorporating a cross-channel self-attention block to capture dependencies between in-phase and quadrature components, along with dual-path deep residual shrinkage denoising blocks to suppress noise. Experiments using the RML2018.01a dataset employed stratified sampling across 24 modulation types and 26 SNR levels. Results showed that denoising depth strongly influences robustness at low and moderate SNRs. Compared to benchmark models PET-CGDNN, MCLDNN, and DAE, the proposed model achieved notable accuracy improvements across -8 dB to +2 dB SNR, with increases of 3%, 2.3%, and 14%, respectively. Cross-validation confirmed the model's robustness, yielding a mean accuracy of 62.6%, macro precision of 65.8%, macro-recall of 62.6%, and macro-F1 score of 62.9%. The architecture advances interference-aware AMC by formalizing baseband modeling as orthogonal subproblems and introducing cross-channel attention as a generalized complex interaction operator, with ablations confirming the critical role of feature-preserving denoising for robustness at low-to-medium SNR.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合跨通道自注意力与双路径深度残差收缩去噪的深度学习AMC模型，在低信噪比下显著提升调制分类准确率
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习自动调制分类模型在高信噪比下表现良好，但在噪声条件下性能下降，因为常规特征提取同时抑制了判别性结构和干扰
AI.method: 提出深度学习AMC模型，包含跨通道自注意力块捕获同相和正交分量间的依赖关系，以及双路径深度残差收缩去噪块抑制噪声
AI.result: 在RML2018.01a数据集上，相比PET-CGDNN、MCLDNN和DAE基准模型，在-8dB至+2dB信噪比范围内分别提升3%、2.3%和14%的准确率
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过将基带建模形式化为正交子问题并引入跨通道注意力作为广义复数交互算子，推进了干扰感知AMC，特征保留去噪对低至中SNR的鲁棒性至关重要

title: LOLGORITHM: Funny Comment Generation Agent For Short Videos
summary: Short-form video platforms have become central to multimedia information dissemination, where comments play a critical role in driving engagement, propagation, and algorithmic feedback. However, existing approaches -- including video summarization and live-streaming danmaku generation -- fail to produce authentic comments that conform to platform-specific cultural and linguistic norms. In this paper, we present LOLGORITHM, a novel modular multi-agent framework for stylized short-form video comment generation. LOLGORITHM supports six controllable comment styles and comprises three core modules: video content summarization, video classification, and comment generation with semantic retrieval and hot meme augmentation. We further construct a bilingual dataset of 3,267 videos and 16,335 comments spanning five high-engagement categories across YouTube and Douyin. Evaluation combining automatic scoring and large-scale human preference analysis demonstrates that LOLGORITHM consistently outperforms baseline methods, achieving human preference selection rates of 80.46\% on YouTube and 84.29\% on Douyin across 107 respondents. Ablation studies confirm that these gains are attributable to the framework architecture rather than the choice of backbone LLM, underscoring the robustness and generalizability of our approach.

AI.tldr: LOLGORITHM是一个模块化多智能体框架，专门用于生成符合平台文化规范的短视频评论，支持六种可控风格，在YouTube和抖音上分别达到80.46%和84.29%的人类偏好选择率。
AI.motivation: 短视频平台已成为多媒体信息传播的核心，评论在推动参与度、传播和算法反馈中起关键作用。现有方法（如视频摘要和直播弹幕生成）无法生成符合平台特定文化和语言规范的真实评论。
AI.method: 提出LOLGORITHM模块化多智能体框架，支持六种可控评论风格，包含三个核心模块：视频内容摘要、视频分类、以及结合语义检索和热门梗增强的评论生成。构建了包含3,267个视频和16,335条评论的双语数据集，涵盖YouTube和抖音五个高参与度类别。
AI.result: 结合自动评分和大规模人类偏好分析，LOLGORITHM始终优于基线方法，在107名受访者中，YouTube上达到80.46%的人类偏好选择率，抖音上达到84.29%。消融研究证实这些收益归因于框架架构而非骨干LLM的选择。
AI.conclusion: LOLGORITHM框架能够生成符合平台文化规范的短视频评论，其模块化架构具有鲁棒性和泛化能力，为短视频评论生成提供了有效解决方案。

title: The Myth of Expert Specialization in MoEs: Why Routing Reflects Geometry, Not Necessarily Domain Expertise
summary: Mixture of Experts (MoEs) are now ubiquitous in large language models, yet the mechanisms behind their "expert specialization" remain poorly understood. We show that, since MoE routers are linear maps, hidden state similarity is both necessary and sufficient to explain expert usage similarity, and specialization is therefore an emergent property of the representation space, not of the routing architecture itself. We confirm this at both token and sequence level across five pre-trained models. We additionally prove that load-balancing loss suppresses shared hidden state directions to maintain routing diversity, which might provide a theoretical explanation for specialization collapse under less diverse data, e.g. small batch. Despite this clean mechanistic account, we find that specialization patterns in pre-trained MoEs resist human interpretation: expert overlap between different models answering the same question is no higher than between entirely different questions ($\sim$60\%); prompt-level routing does not predict rollout-level routing; and deeper layers exhibit near-identical expert activation across semantically unrelated inputs, especially in reasoning models. We conclude that, while the efficiency perspective of MoEs is well understood, understanding expert specialization is at least as hard as understanding LLM hidden state geometry, a long-standing open problem in the literature.

AI.tldr: MoE专家专业化源于表示空间相似性而非路由架构本身，但预训练MoE的专业化模式难以解释，理解专家专业化与理解LLM隐藏状态几何同样困难。
AI.motivation: 尽管混合专家模型在大语言模型中普遍应用，但其"专家专业化"机制仍不明确。本文旨在揭示MoE专家专业化的本质机制，并探讨预训练MoE中专业化模式的可解释性问题。
AI.method: 通过分析MoE路由器的线性映射特性，证明隐藏状态相似性足以解释专家使用相似性。在五个预训练模型上进行标记和序列级别的验证，并证明负载均衡损失如何抑制共享隐藏状态方向以维持路由多样性。
AI.result: 专家专业化是表示空间的涌现属性，而非路由架构本身。负载均衡损失抑制共享隐藏状态方向，这解释了在数据多样性不足时（如小批量）专业化崩溃的原因。然而，预训练MoE的专业化模式难以解释：不同模型回答相同问题时专家重叠度不高；提示级路由无法预测展开级路由；深层在语义无关输入上表现出近乎相同的专家激活。
AI.conclusion: 虽然MoE的效率视角已得到很好理解，但理解专家专业化至少与理解LLM隐藏状态几何同样困难，这是文献中长期存在的开放问题。专家专业化源于表示空间相似性，但预训练MoE中的具体模式抵抗人类解释。

title: BLUEmed: Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Agent Debate for Clinical Error Detection
comment: Accepted to the IEEE International Conference on Healthcare Informatics (ICHI) 2026
summary: Terminology substitution errors in clinical notes, where one medical term is replaced by a linguistically valid but clinically different term, pose a persistent challenge for automated error detection in healthcare. We introduce BLUEmed, a multi-agent debate framework augmented with hybrid Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that combines evidence-grounded reasoning with multi-perspective verification for clinical error detection. BLUEmed decomposes each clinical note into focused sub-queries, retrieves source-partitioned evidence through dense, sparse, and online retrieval, and assigns two domain expert agents distinct knowledge bases to produce independent analyses; when the experts disagree, a structured counter-argumentation round and cross-source adjudication resolve the conflict, followed by a cascading safety layer that filters common false-positive patterns. We evaluate BLUEmed on a clinical terminology substitution detection benchmark under both zero-shot and few-shot prompting with multiple backbone models spanning proprietary and open-source families. Experimental results show that BLUEmed achieves the best accuracy (69.13%), ROC-AUC (74.45%), and PR-AUC (72.44%) under few-shot prompting, outperforming both single-agent RAG and debate-only baselines. Further analyses across six backbone models and two prompting strategies confirm that retrieval augmentation and structured debate are complementary, and that the framework benefits most from models with sufficient instruction-following and clinical language understanding.

AI.tldr: BLUEmed：一个用于临床术语替换错误检测的多智能体辩论框架，结合混合RAG和结构化辩论，在few-shot提示下达到最佳性能
AI.motivation: 临床笔记中的术语替换错误（一个医学术语被替换为语言上有效但临床意义不同的术语）对医疗保健中的自动错误检测构成持续挑战，需要更有效的检测方法
AI.method: 引入BLUEmed框架：1) 将临床笔记分解为聚焦子查询；2) 通过密集、稀疏和在线检索获取源分区证据；3) 分配两个领域专家智能体使用不同知识库进行独立分析；4) 当专家意见不一致时，进行结构化反驳轮次和跨源裁决；5) 添加级联安全层过滤常见假阳性模式
AI.result: 在临床术语替换检测基准上，BLUEmed在few-shot提示下达到最佳性能：准确率69.13%，ROC-AUC 74.45%，PR-AUC 72.44%，优于单智能体RAG和纯辩论基线。跨六个骨干模型和两种提示策略的分析确认检索增强和结构化辩论是互补的
AI.conclusion: BLUEmed框架通过结合证据基础推理和多视角验证，有效检测临床术语替换错误。检索增强和结构化辩论具有互补性，框架最受益于具有足够指令遵循和临床语言理解能力的模型

title: When Can You Poison Rewards? A Tight Characterization of Reward Poisoning in Linear MDPs
summary: We study reward poisoning attacks in reinforcement learning (RL), where an adversary manipulates rewards within constrained budgets to force the target RL agent to adopt a policy that aligns with the attacker's objectives. Prior works on reward poisoning mainly focused on sufficient conditions to design a successful attacker, while only a few studies discussed the infeasibility of targeted attacks. This paper provides the first precise necessity and sufficiency characterization of the attackability of a linear MDP under reward poisoning attacks. Our characterization draws a bright line between the vulnerable RL instances, and the intrinsically robust ones which cannot be attacked without large costs even running vanilla non-robust RL algorithms. Our theory extends beyond linear MDPs -- by approximating deep RL environments as linear MDPs, we show that our theoretical framework effectively distinguishes the attackability and efficiently attacks the vulnerable ones, demonstrating both the theoretical and practical significance of our characterization.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次精确刻画了线性MDP在奖励投毒攻击下的可攻击性充要条件，区分了易受攻击和本质鲁棒的RL实例，并将理论扩展到深度RL环境。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注设计成功攻击者的充分条件，很少讨论目标攻击的不可行性。需要建立精确的充要条件来区分哪些RL实例易受攻击，哪些具有内在鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立线性MDP在奖励投毒攻击下的可攻击性充要条件，然后将深度RL环境近似为线性MDP，应用该理论框架来区分攻击性并进行高效攻击。
AI.result: 理论框架有效区分了RL实例的可攻击性，能够高效攻击易受攻击的实例，同时证明即使运行标准的非鲁棒RL算法，本质鲁棒的实例也需要很大成本才能攻击。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次提供了线性MDP奖励投毒攻击的精确充要条件刻画，建立了区分易受攻击和本质鲁棒RL实例的理论框架，对理论和实践都具有重要意义。

title: Multi-Frequency Local Plasticity for Visual Representation Learning
summary:
We study how far structured architectural bias can compensate for the absence of end-to-end gradient-based representation learning in visual recognition. Building on the VisNet tradition, we introduce a modular hierarchical framework combining: (i) fixed multi-frequency Gabor decomposition into F=7 parallel streams; (ii) within-stream competitive learning with Hebbian and Oja updates and anti-Hebbian decorrelation; (iii) an associative memory module inspired by modern Hopfield retrieval; and (iv) iterative top-down modulation using local prediction and reconstruction signals.
  Representational layers are trained without end-to-end backpropagation through the full hierarchy; only the final linear readout and top-down projection matrices are optimized by gradient descent. We therefore interpret the model as a hybrid system that is predominantly locally trained but includes a small number of gradient-trained parameters.
  On CIFAR-10, the full model reaches 80.1% +/- 0.3% top-1 accuracy, linear probe), compared with 71.0% for a Hebbian-only baseline and 83.4% for a gradient-trained model on the same fixed Gabor basis. On CIFAR-100, performance is 54.8%. Factorial analysis indicates that multi-frequency streams, associative memory, and top-down feedback contribute largely additively, with a significant Streams x TopDown interaction (p=0.02).
  These results suggest that carefully chosen architectural priors can recover a substantial fraction of the performance typically associated with global gradient training, while leaving a measurable residual gap. Experiments are limited to CIFAR-10/100.

AI.tldr: 研究结构化架构偏置能否补偿端到端梯度学习的缺失，提出混合视觉识别框架，在CIFAR-10上达到80.1%准确率，接近梯度训练模型的83.4%
AI.motivation: 探索在没有端到端梯度学习的情况下，结构化架构偏置能在多大程度上补偿视觉识别任务中的性能损失，挑战传统深度学习中梯度反向传播的必要性
AI.method: 提出模块化分层框架：1) 固定多频Gabor分解为7个并行流；2) 流内竞争学习（Hebbian/Oja更新和反Hebbian去相关）；3) 现代Hopfield检索启发的联想记忆模块；4) 使用局部预测和重建信号的迭代自上而下调制。只有最后的线性读出和自上而下投影矩阵通过梯度下降优化
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上达到80.1%准确率（线性探测），相比纯Hebbian基线71.0%和相同Gabor基上的梯度训练模型83.4%；CIFAR-100上为54.8%。多频流、联想记忆和自上而下反馈贡献基本可加，流与自上而下交互显著
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的架构先验可以恢复梯度训练性能的相当大部分，但仍存在可测量的性能差距。这为减少对端到端梯度学习的依赖提供了可能性

title: NameBERT: Scaling Name-Based Nationality Classification with LLM-Augmented Open Academic Data
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures, 8 tables; accepted at the 39th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence (Canadian AI 2026)
summary: Inferring nationality from personal names is a critical capability for equity and bias monitoring, personalization, and a valuable tool in biomedical and sociological research. However, existing name-based nationality classifiers are typically trained on relatively small or source-specific labeled datasets, which can introduce coverage gaps and limit performance for underrepresented countries. While large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong zero-shot performance for name-based nationality prediction, their computational cost and latency make them impractical for real-time, large-scale deployment. In this work, we created a large-scale name-nationality dataset from the Open Academic Graph (OAG) and introduce a framework that leverages LLMs as dataset enrichers rather than inference engines. We augment low-resource countries with LLM-generated names and evaluate on real and synthetic-tail test sets. We find that augmentation produces large gains when evaluation includes synthetic tail names and still offers a modest lift on tail-country metrics otherwise. Overall, NameBERT models achieve significantly higher accuracy than state-of-the-art baselines across both in- and out-of-domain tasks, while remaining efficient for large-scale inference compared to LLMs.

AI.tldr: 利用LLM生成数据增强训练NameBERT模型，显著提升姓名国籍分类性能，比现有方法更准确且计算效率更高
AI.motivation: 现有姓名国籍分类器训练数据有限，覆盖不足；LLM零样本性能好但计算成本高，不适合大规模实时部署
AI.method: 从Open Academic Graph创建大规模姓名国籍数据集，使用LLM作为数据增强器生成低资源国家姓名，训练NameBERT模型
AI.result: 数据增强在合成尾部姓名评估中提升显著，在真实尾部国家指标上也有适度提升；NameBERT模型在域内和域外任务上均优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 利用LLM进行数据增强训练轻量级模型是有效的解决方案，既保持了LLM的高性能又降低了计算成本，适合大规模部署

title: Graph-RHO: Critical-path-aware Heterogeneous Graph Network for Long-Horizon Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling
summary: Long-horizon Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling~(FJSP) presents a formidable combinatorial challenge due to complex, interdependent decisions spanning extended time horizons. While learning-based Rolling Horizon Optimization~(RHO) has emerged as a promising paradigm to accelerate solving by identifying and fixing invariant operations, its effectiveness is hindered by the structural complexity of FJSP. Existing methods often fail to capture intricate graph-structured dependencies and ignore the asymmetric costs of prediction errors, in which misclassifying critical-path operations is significantly more detrimental than misclassifying non-critical ones. Furthermore, dynamic shifts in predictive confidence during the rolling process make static pruning thresholds inadequate. To address these limitations, we propose Graph-RHO, a novel critical-path-aware graph-based RHO framework. First, we introduce a topology-aware heterogeneous graph network that encodes subproblems as operation-machine graphs with multi-relational edges, leveraging edge-feature-aware message passing to predict operation stability. Second, we incorporate a critical-path-aware mechanism that injects inductive biases during training to distinguish highly sensitive bottleneck operations from robust ones. Third, we devise an adaptive thresholding strategy that dynamically calibrates decision boundaries based on online uncertainty estimation to align model predictions with the solver's search space. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that \mbox{Graph-RHO} establishes a new state of the art in solution quality and computational efficiency. Remarkably, it exhibits exceptional zero-shot generalization, reducing solve time by over 30\% on large-scale instances (2000 operations) while achieving superior solution quality. Our code is available \href{https://github.com/IntelliSensing/Graph-RHO}{here}.

AI.tldr: Graph-RHO：基于图神经网络的滚动时域优化框架，通过拓扑感知异构图网络、关键路径感知机制和自适应阈值策略，显著提升柔性作业车间调度问题的求解质量和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的滚动时域优化方法在处理柔性作业车间调度时存在三个主要问题：1）难以捕捉复杂的图结构依赖关系；2）忽略预测误差的不对称成本（关键路径操作误分类代价更高）；3）滚动过程中预测置信度的动态变化使得静态剪枝阈值失效。
AI.method: 提出Graph-RHO框架：1）使用拓扑感知异构图网络将子问题编码为操作-机器图，通过边特征感知的消息传递预测操作稳定性；2）引入关键路径感知机制，在训练中注入归纳偏置以区分瓶颈操作；3）设计自适应阈值策略，基于在线不确定性估计动态校准决策边界。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，Graph-RHO在求解质量和计算效率上达到新的最优水平。在大规模实例（2000个操作）上，求解时间减少超过30%，同时获得更优的解决方案质量，并展现出卓越的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Graph-RHO通过结合图神经网络、关键路径感知和自适应阈值策略，有效解决了柔性作业车间调度中滚动时域优化的结构复杂性和动态性问题，为长时域组合优化问题提供了高效解决方案。

title: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that are absent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding is disproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We observe that this inequity in attention allocation is a root cause of object hallucination: when rare, small, or contextually peripheral objects receive insufficient attention, the model fails to ground its generation in the full visual scene. We argue that every object in an image, regardless of its size, frequency or visual salience, deserves equal representational opportunity during decoding. To this end, we propose DOP-OBC, a training-free and architecture-agnostic decoding strategy built on the principle of equitable attention. Two complementary object-aware signals work in tandem: a Dominant Object Penalty (DOP) that softly suppresses attention over-concentration on visually dominant regions, and an Outlier Boost Coefficient (OBC) that amplifies attention toward rare yet confidently detected objects. These signals are injected as per-row logit modulations within the causal attention mask, requiring no weight updates and preserving autoregressive decoding properties. Extensive experiments across image and video MLLMs demonstrate consistent reductions in object hallucination on CHAIR and POPE benchmarks, alongside improvements in GPT-4o assessed captioning quality across correctness, consistency, detail, context and temporal dimensions. DOP-OBC establishes that fairness in attention allocation is not merely a design principle but a practical and effective path toward more faithful multimodal generation.

AI.tldr: 提出DOP-OBC解码策略，通过公平注意力分配减少MLLMs中的物体幻觉问题
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型经常幻觉出视觉输入中不存在的物体，主要原因是解码时注意力过度集中在视觉主导或频繁出现的内容上，导致罕见、小型或上下文边缘物体得不到足够关注
AI.method: 提出DOP-OBC训练免费、架构无关的解码策略：1) 主导物体惩罚(DOP)软抑制对视觉主导区域的过度关注；2) 异常提升系数(OBC)增强对罕见但高置信度检测物体的注意力。通过因果注意力掩码中的逐行logit调制实现
AI.result: 在图像和视频MLLMs上的广泛实验显示，在CHAIR和POPE基准上持续减少物体幻觉，同时在GPT-4o评估的captioning质量（正确性、一致性、细节、上下文和时间维度）上有所提升
AI.conclusion: 注意力分配的公平性不仅是设计原则，而且是实现更忠实多模态生成的实际有效途径

title: Controllable and Verifiable Tool-Use Data Synthesis for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Existing synthetic tool-use corpora are primarily designed for offline supervised fine-tuning, yet reinforcement learning (RL) requires executable environments that support reward-checkable online rollouts. We propose COVERT, a two-stage pipeline that first generates reliable base tool-use trajectories through self-evolving synthesis with multi-level validation, and then applies oracle-preserving augmentations that systematically increase environmental complexity. These augmentations introduce distractor tools, indirect or ambiguous user queries, and noisy, multi-format, or erroneous tool outputs, while strictly preserving oracle tool calls and final answers as ground truth. This design enables automatic reward computation via reference matching for standard cases and lightweight judge-assisted verification for special behaviors such as error detection, supporting RL optimization of tool-calling policies. On Qwen2.5-Instruct-14B, COVERT-RL improves overall accuracy on BFCL v3 from 56.5 to 59.9 and on ACEBench from 53.0 to 59.3, with minimal regressions on general-ability benchmarks; when stacked on SFT, it further reaches 62.1 and 61.8, confirming additive gains. These results suggest that oracle-preserving synthetic environments offer a practical RL refinement stage, complementary to SFT, for improving tool-use robustness under ambiguity and unreliable tool feedback.

AI.tldr: COVERT是一个两阶段工具使用合成环境生成管道，通过自演化合成和多级验证生成可靠的基础轨迹，然后应用保持oracle的增强来增加环境复杂性，支持RL优化工具调用策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的合成工具使用语料库主要用于离线监督微调，但强化学习需要可执行环境来支持可奖励检查的在线rollout。需要一种方法能够生成既保持oracle工具调用和最终答案作为ground truth，又能增加环境复杂性的合成环境。
AI.method: COVERT采用两阶段管道：1）通过自演化合成和多级验证生成可靠的基础工具使用轨迹；2）应用oracle-preserving增强，系统性地增加环境复杂性，包括引入干扰工具、间接或模糊的用户查询，以及噪声、多格式或错误的工具输出，同时严格保持oracle工具调用和最终答案作为ground truth。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Instruct-14B上，COVERT-RL将BFCL v3的总体准确率从56.5提高到59.9，ACEBench从53.0提高到59.3，在通用能力基准测试中回归最小；当叠加在SFT之上时，进一步达到62.1和61.8，确认了增量增益。
AI.conclusion: oracle-preserving合成环境提供了一个实用的RL精炼阶段，与SFT互补，用于提高在模糊性和不可靠工具反馈下的工具使用鲁棒性。

title: LASQ: A Low-resource Aspect-based Sentiment Quadruple Extraction Dataset
summary: In recent years, aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) has made rapid progress and shown strong practical value. However, existing research and benchmarks are largely concentrated on high-resource languages, leaving fine-grained sentiment extraction in low-resource languages under-explored. To address this gap, we constructed the first Low-resource languages Aspect-based Sentiment Quadruple dataset, named LASQ, which includes two low-resource languages: Uzbek and Uyghur. Secondly, it includes a fine-grained target-aspect-opinion-sentiment quadruple extraction task. To facilitate future research, we designed a grid-tagging model that integrates syntactic knowledge. This model incorporates part-of-speech (POS) and dependency knowledge into the model through our designed Syntax Knowledge Embedding Module (SKEM), thereby alleviating the lexical sparsity problem caused by agglutinative languages. Experiments on LASQ demonstrate consistent gains over competitive baselines, validating both the dataset's utility and the effectiveness of the proposed modeling approach.

AI.tldr: 构建首个低资源语言方面情感四元组数据集LASQ（乌兹别克语和维吾尔语），并提出集成句法知识的网格标注模型以缓解黏着语的词汇稀疏问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方面情感分析研究和基准主要集中在高资源语言，低资源语言的细粒度情感提取研究不足，特别是乌兹别克语和维吾尔语等黏着性语言面临词汇稀疏问题。
AI.method: 构建LASQ数据集包含乌兹别克语和维吾尔语；设计网格标注模型，通过句法知识嵌入模块（SKEM）将词性标注和依存关系知识集成到模型中。
AI.result: 在LASQ数据集上的实验表明，提出的模型相比竞争基线取得一致性能提升，验证了数据集的有效性和建模方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: LASQ数据集填补了低资源语言方面情感分析研究的空白，提出的句法知识增强模型能有效缓解黏着语的词汇稀疏问题，为低资源语言情感分析提供了新基准。

title: Transformers Learn the Optimal DDPM Denoiser for Multi-Token GMMs
summary: Transformer-based diffusion models have demonstrated remarkable performance at generating high-quality samples. However, our theoretical understanding of the reasons for this success remains limited. For instance, existing models are typically trained by minimizing a denoising objective, which is equivalent to fitting the score function of the training data. However, we do not know why transformer-based models can match the score function for denoising, or why gradient-based methods converge to the optimal denoising model despite the non-convex loss landscape. To the best of our knowledge, this paper provides the first convergence analysis for training transformer-based diffusion models. More specifically, we consider the population Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) objective for denoising data that follow a multi-token Gaussian mixture distribution. We theoretically quantify the required number of tokens per data point and training iterations for the global convergence towards the Bayes optimal risk of the denoising objective, thereby achieving a desired score matching error. A deeper investigation reveals that the self-attention module of the trained transformer implements a mean denoising mechanism that enables the trained model to approximate the oracle Minimum Mean Squared Error (MMSE) estimator of the injected noise in the diffusion steps. Numerical experiments validate these findings.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对基于Transformer的扩散模型训练提供了收敛性分析，证明了在特定条件下（多token高斯混合分布数据）能够实现全局收敛到贝叶斯最优风险，并揭示了自注意力模块实现了均值去噪机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于Transformer的扩散模型在生成高质量样本方面表现出色，但对其成功原因的理论理解仍然有限。现有模型通常通过最小化去噪目标来训练，这相当于拟合训练数据的得分函数，但我们不知道Transformer模型为何能够匹配去噪的得分函数，也不知道为什么基于梯度的方法能够在非凸损失景观下收敛到最优去噪模型。
AI.method: 本文分析了基于Transformer的扩散模型训练收敛性，具体考虑了多token高斯混合分布数据的总体DDPM目标。理论量化了每个数据点所需的token数量和训练迭代次数，以实现对去噪目标贝叶斯最优风险的全局收敛。研究发现训练后的Transformer自注意力模块实现了均值去噪机制。
AI.result: 本文首次提供了基于Transformer扩散模型训练的收敛性分析，证明了在特定条件下能够实现全局收敛到贝叶斯最优风险，从而达到期望的得分匹配误差。研究发现训练后的自注意力模块实现了均值去噪机制，使模型能够近似扩散步骤中注入噪声的oracle MMSE估计器。数值实验验证了这些发现。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了基于Transformer扩散模型理论理解的空白，首次提供了训练收敛性分析，揭示了自注意力模块的均值去噪机制，为理解这些模型为何能够有效匹配得分函数提供了理论依据。

title: MedLVR: Latent Visual Reasoning for Reliable Medical Visual Question Answering
summary: Medical vision--language models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for medical visual question answering (VQA), yet their reasoning remains largely text-centric: images are encoded once as static context, and subsequent inference is dominated by language. This paradigm is fundamentally limited in clinical scenarios, where accurate answers often depend on subtle, localized visual evidence that cannot be reliably preserved in static embeddings. We propose \textsc{MedLVR}, a latent visual reasoning framework that introduces an explicit visual evidence state into autoregressive decoding. Instead of relying solely on text-based intermediate reasoning, \textsc{MedLVR} interleaves a short latent reasoning segment within the decoder by reusing hidden states as continuous latent steps, enabling iterative preservation and refinement of query-relevant visual evidence before answer generation. To support effective visual supervision, we adopt a two-stage training strategy: region of interest (ROI)-supervised fine-tuning aligns latent states with clinically relevant image evidence, and Visual-Latent Policy Optimization (VLPO) further optimizes latent reasoning and answer generation under outcome-level rewards. Experiments on OmniMedVQA and five external medical VQA benchmarks show that \textsc{MedLVR} consistently outperforms recent reasoning baselines and improves the average score over the Qwen2.5-VL-7B backbone from 48.3\% to 53.4\%. These results show that latent visual reasoning provides an effective mechanism for preserving diagnostically relevant visual evidence and improving the reliability of medical VQA.

AI.tldr: MedLVR提出了一种潜在视觉推理框架，通过在自回归解码中引入显式视觉证据状态，实现迭代的视觉信息保留和精炼，显著提升医学视觉问答性能。
AI.motivation: 当前医学视觉语言模型在视觉问答中主要依赖文本中心推理，图像仅作为静态上下文编码一次，无法可靠保留临床场景中关键的局部视觉证据，限制了诊断准确性。
AI.method: MedLVR框架在解码器中插入短潜伏推理段，重用隐藏状态作为连续潜在步骤，实现查询相关视觉证据的迭代保留和精炼。采用两阶段训练策略：ROI监督微调对齐潜在状态与临床相关图像证据，VLPO在结果级奖励下优化潜在推理和答案生成。
AI.result: 在OmniMedVQA和五个外部医学VQA基准测试中，MedLVR持续优于最近的推理基线，将Qwen2.5-VL-7B骨干模型的平均得分从48.3%提升到53.4%。
AI.conclusion: 潜在视觉推理为保留诊断相关视觉证据提供了有效机制，显著提高了医学视觉问答的可靠性，解决了当前文本中心推理范式在临床场景中的根本限制。

title: EE-MCP: Self-Evolving MCP-GUI Agents via Automated Environment Generation and Experience Learning
summary: Computer-use agents that combine GUI interaction with structured API calls via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) show promise for automating software tasks. However, existing approaches lack a principled understanding of how agents should balance these two modalities and how to enable iterative self-improvement across diverse applications. We formulate MCP-GUI interplay as a unified hybrid policy learning problem where the agent learns when each modality provides complementary advantages, and show that distillation and experience augmentation target fundamentally different failure modes - requiring application-aware mechanism selection. Built on this formulation, we propose a self-evolving framework with a fully automatic pipeline that orchestrates automatic environment generation and validation, trajectory collection, gap-driven task synthesis, and quality-filtered training - all without manual intervention. A key innovation is our experience bank, which accumulates LLM-learned rules from trajectory comparison, enabling inference-time improvement without fine-tuning. Systematic \textbf{cross-application analysis} across three desktop applications reveals that the optimal strategy depends on MCP-GUI composition: distillation achieves 77.8\% pass rate on MCP-dominant tasks (+17.8pp), while the experience bank excels on GUI-intensive tasks (+10.0pp).

AI.tldr: 提出一个自我演进的框架，通过自动环境生成、轨迹收集、任务合成和质量过滤训练，解决MCP-GUI混合策略学习问题，实现无需人工干预的计算机使用代理自动化。
AI.motivation: 现有结合GUI交互和结构化API调用的计算机使用代理缺乏对两种模态平衡原则的理解，以及跨应用迭代自我改进的能力。需要解决MCP-GUI交互的统一混合策略学习问题。
AI.method: 提出自我演进框架，包含自动环境生成与验证、轨迹收集、基于差距的任务合成、质量过滤训练的全自动流程。创新性地引入经验库，通过轨迹比较积累LLM学习规则，实现无需微调的推理时改进。
AI.result: 在三个桌面应用的跨应用分析中，蒸馏方法在MCP主导任务上达到77.8%通过率（提升17.8个百分点），经验库在GUI密集型任务上表现优异（提升10.0个百分点）。
AI.conclusion: MCP-GUI交互需要应用感知的机制选择，最优策略取决于MCP-GUI组成。提出的自我演进框架能够自动适应不同应用需求，实现计算机使用代理的持续改进。

title: Turing or Cantor: That is the Question
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.15969
summary: Alan Turing is considered as a founder of current computer science together with Kurt Godel, Alonzo Church and John von Neumann. In this paper multiple new research results are presented. It is demonstrated that there would not be Alan Turing's achievements without earlier seminal contributions by Georg Cantor in the set theory and foundations of mathematics. It is proposed to introduce the measure of undecidability of problems unsolvable by Turing machines based on probability distribution of its input data, i.e., to provide the degree of unsolvabilty based on the number of undecidable instances of input data versus decidable ones. It is proposed as well to extend the Turing's work on infinite logics and Oracle machines to a whole class of super-Turing models of computation. Next, the three new complexity classes for TM undecidable problems have been defined: U-complete (Universal complete), D-complete (Diagonalization complete) and H-complete (Hypercomputation complete) classes. The above has never been defined explicitly before by other scientists, and has been inspired by Cook/Levin NP-complete class for intractable problems. Finally, an equivalent to famous P is not equal to NP unanswered question for NP-complete class, has been answered negatively for U-complete class of complexity for undecidable problems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出多个新研究结果：1) 证明图灵成就依赖于康托尔早期集合论贡献；2) 提出基于输入数据概率分布的不可判定性度量；3) 扩展超图灵计算模型；4) 定义三个新的不可判定问题复杂度类；5) 证明U-完全类不存在类似P≠NP的开放问题。
AI.motivation: 论文旨在扩展图灵机理论，为不可判定问题建立更精细的复杂度分类体系，并探索超图灵计算的可能性，从而深化对计算理论边界的理解。
AI.method: 通过分析图灵工作与康托尔集合论的历史联系，提出基于概率的不可判定性度量方法，扩展图灵机模型到超图灵计算，并借鉴NP-完全类的概念定义新的复杂度类。
AI.result: 1) 建立了图灵成就与康托尔工作的历史联系；2) 提出了不可判定性的概率度量方法；3) 定义了U-完全、D-完全、H-完全三个新的复杂度类；4) 证明了U-完全类不存在类似P≠NP的开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 该研究扩展了图灵机理论框架，为不可判定问题提供了新的分类和度量方法，并表明某些不可判定问题类已经解决了类似P≠NP的基础性问题，为计算理论的发展提供了新方向。

title: Attention Sink in Transformers: A Survey on Utilization, Interpretation, and Mitigation
summary: As the foundational architecture of modern machine learning, Transformers have driven remarkable progress across diverse AI domains. Despite their transformative impact, a persistent challenge across various Transformers is Attention Sink (AS), in which a disproportionate amount of attention is focused on a small subset of specific yet uninformative tokens. AS complicates interpretability, significantly affecting the training and inference dynamics, and exacerbates issues such as hallucinations. In recent years, substantial research has been dedicated to understanding and harnessing AS. However, a comprehensive survey that systematically consolidates AS-related research and offers guidance for future advancements remains lacking. To address this gap, we present the first survey on AS, structured around three key dimensions that define the current research landscape: Fundamental Utilization, Mechanistic Interpretation, and Strategic Mitigation. Our work provides a pivotal contribution by clarifying key concepts and guiding researchers through the evolution and trends of the field. We envision this survey as a definitive resource, empowering researchers and practitioners to effectively manage AS within the current Transformer paradigm, while simultaneously inspiring innovative advancements for the next generation of Transformers. The paper list of this work is available at https://github.com/ZunhaiSu/Awesome-Attention-Sink.

AI.tldr: 这是第一篇关于注意力下沉（Attention Sink）的综述论文，系统性地梳理了该领域的研究现状，涵盖基础利用、机制解释和策略缓解三个维度，旨在为研究人员提供全面指导。
AI.motivation: Transformer作为现代机器学习的基础架构，尽管取得了显著进展，但注意力下沉问题普遍存在，即注意力过度集中在少量无信息量的特定token上。这一问题影响模型可解释性、训练推理动态，并加剧幻觉等问题。目前缺乏系统性梳理该领域研究的综述，因此需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 论文采用综述研究方法，围绕三个关键维度构建分析框架：1）基础利用（Fundamental Utilization）- 如何利用注意力下沉现象；2）机制解释（Mechanistic Interpretation）- 理解注意力下沉的机制原理；3）策略缓解（Strategic Mitigation）- 缓解注意力下沉的策略方法。
AI.result: 提供了首个关于注意力下沉的全面综述，澄清了关键概念，梳理了该领域的发展脉络和趋势，创建了相关论文列表（GitHub仓库），为研究人员和从业者提供了重要参考资源。
AI.conclusion: 该综述是注意力下沉领域的权威资源，帮助研究者在当前Transformer范式中有效管理注意力下沉问题，同时为下一代Transformer的创新进步提供启发。

title: Text-Guided 6D Object Pose Rearrangement via Closed-Loop VLM Agents
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit strong visual reasoning capabilities, yet they still struggle with 3D understanding. In particular, VLMs often fail to infer a text-consistent goal 6D pose of a target object in a 3D scene. However, we find that with some inference-time techniques and iterative reasoning, VLMs can achieve dramatic performance gains. Concretely, given a 3D scene represented by an RGB-D image (or a compositional scene of 3D meshes) and a text instruction specifying a desired state change, we repeat the following loop: observe the current scene; evaluate whether it is faithful to the instruction; propose a pose update for the target object; apply the update; and render the updated scene. Through this closed-loop interaction, the VLM effectively acts as an agent. We further introduce three inference-time techniques that are essential to this closed-loop process: (i) multi-view reasoning with supporting view selection, (ii) object-centered coordinate system visualization, and (iii) single-axis rotation prediction. Without any additional fine-tuning or new modules, our approach surpasses prior methods at predicting the text-guided goal 6D pose of the target object. It works consistently across both closed-source and open-source VLMs. Moreover, when combining our 6D pose prediction with simple robot motion planning, it enables more successful robot manipulation than existing methods. Finally, we conduct an ablation study to demonstrate the necessity of each proposed technique.

AI.tldr: 通过推理时技术和迭代推理，让视觉语言模型在3D场景中预测文本指导的目标物体6D姿态，无需微调即可超越现有方法
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在视觉推理方面表现出色，但在3D理解方面仍有不足，特别是在推断文本一致的目标物体6D姿态方面经常失败
AI.method: 采用闭环交互循环：观察当前场景→评估是否忠实于指令→提出目标物体的姿态更新→应用更新→渲染更新后的场景。引入三个关键技术：(1)多视角推理与支持视角选择，(2)物体中心坐标系可视化，(3)单轴旋转预测
AI.result: 无需额外微调或新模块，该方法在预测文本指导的目标物体6D姿态方面超越了先前方法，在闭源和开源VLM上表现一致。结合机器人运动规划可实现更成功的机器人操作
AI.conclusion: 通过推理时技术和迭代推理，视觉语言模型能够有效提升3D理解能力，特别是在6D姿态预测任务上，为机器人操作等应用提供了新思路

title: COMPOSITE-Stem
summary: AI agents hold growing promise for accelerating scientific discovery; yet, a lack of frontier evaluations hinders adoption into real workflows. Expert-written benchmarks have proven effective at measuring AI reasoning, but most at this stage have become saturated and only measure performance on constrained outputs. To help address this gap, we introduce COMPOSITE-STEM, a benchmark of 70 expert-written tasks in physics, biology, chemistry, and mathematics, curated by doctoral-level researchers. Our benchmark combines exact-match grading and criterion-based rubrics with an LLM-as-a-jury grading protocol, allowing more flexible assessment of scientifically meaningful outputs. Using an adapted multimodal Terminus-2 agent harness within the Harbor agentic evaluation framework, we evaluate four frontier models. The top-performing model achieves 21%, demonstrating that COMPOSITE-STEM captures capabilities beyond current agent reach. All tasks are open-sourced with contributor permission to support reproducibility and to promote additional research towards AI's acceleration of scientific progress in these domains.

AI.tldr: COMPOSITE-STEM是一个由博士级研究人员创建的70个专家编写任务的基准测试，涵盖物理、生物、化学和数学领域，用于评估AI代理在科学发现中的能力，目前最佳模型仅达到21%的准确率。
AI.motivation: AI代理在加速科学发现方面具有巨大潜力，但缺乏前沿评估阻碍了其在真实工作流程中的应用。现有的专家编写基准测试大多已经饱和，且仅能评估受限输出的性能，需要更灵活的评估方法来衡量AI在科学领域的实际能力。
AI.method: 创建了包含70个专家编写任务的COMPOSITE-STEM基准测试，涵盖物理、生物、化学和数学领域。采用精确匹配评分和基于标准的评分准则，结合LLM作为评审团的评分协议，允许对科学上有意义的输出进行更灵活的评估。使用Harbor代理评估框架中的多模态Terminus-2代理来评估四个前沿模型。
AI.result: 最佳表现模型仅达到21%的准确率，表明COMPOSITE-STEM基准测试捕捉到了超出当前AI代理能力范围的能力。所有任务都已开源，以支持可重复性和促进AI在这些领域加速科学进展的进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: COMPOSITE-STEM基准测试填补了AI科学发现评估的空白，通过专家编写的任务和灵活的评估方法，能够更准确地衡量AI在科学领域的推理能力，为AI加速科学进步提供了重要的评估工具。

title: CodaRAG: Connecting the Dots with Associativity Inspired by Complementary Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle with knowledge-intensive tasks due to hallucinations and fragmented reasoning over dispersed information. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds generation in external sources, existing methods often treat evidence as isolated units, failing to reconstruct the logical chains that connect these dots. Inspired by Complementary Learning Systems (CLS), we propose CodaRAG, a framework that evolves retrieval from passive lookup into active associative discovery. CodaRAG operates via a three-stage pipeline: (1) Knowledge Consolidation to unify fragmented extractions into a stable memory substrate; (2) Associative Navigation to traverse the graph via multi-dimensional pathways-semantic, contextualized, and functional-explicitly recovering dispersed evidence chains; and (3) Interference Elimination to prune hyper-associative noise, ensuring a coherent, high-precision reasoning context. On GraphRAG-Bench, CodaRAG achieves absolute gains of 7-10% in retrieval recall and 3-11% in generation accuracy. These results demonstrate CodaRAG's superior ability to systematically robustify associative evidence retrieval for factual, reasoning, and creative tasks.

AI.tldr: CodaRAG 是一个基于互补学习系统启发的检索增强生成框架，通过知识整合、关联导航和干扰消除三阶段流程，将被动检索转变为主动关联发现，显著提升了检索召回率和生成准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法将证据视为孤立单元，无法重建连接这些证据的逻辑链，导致LLMs在处理知识密集型任务时出现幻觉和碎片化推理问题。
AI.method: CodaRAG采用三阶段流程：1) 知识整合：将碎片化提取统一为稳定记忆基质；2) 关联导航：通过语义、情境化和功能等多维路径遍历图结构，显式恢复分散的证据链；3) 干扰消除：修剪超关联噪声，确保连贯高精度的推理上下文。
AI.result: 在GraphRAG-Bench上，CodaRAG在检索召回率上获得7-10%的绝对提升，在生成准确性上获得3-11%的绝对提升。
AI.conclusion: CodaRAG能够系统性地增强关联证据检索能力，在事实性、推理性和创造性任务中表现出色，证明了将被动检索转变为主动关联发现的有效性。

title: End-to-end Automated Deep Neural Network Optimization for PPG-based Blood Pressure Estimation on Wearables
summary: Photoplethysmography (PPG)-based blood pressure (BP) estimation is a challenging task, particularly on resource-constrained wearable devices. However, fully on-board processing is desirable to ensure user data confidentiality. Recent deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved high BP estimation accuracy by reconstructing BP waveforms or directly regressing BP values, but their large memory, computation, and energy requirements hinder deployment on wearables. This work introduces a fully automated DNN design pipeline that combines hardware-aware neural architecture search (NAS), pruning, and mixed-precision search (MPS) to generate accurate yet compact BP prediction models optimized for ultra-low-power multicore systems-on-chip (SoCs). Starting from state-of-the-art baseline models on four public datasets, our optimized networks achieve up to 7.99% lower error with a 7.5x parameter reduction, or up to 83x fewer parameters with negligible accuracy loss. All models fit within 512 kB of memory on our target SoC (GreenWaves' GAP8), requiring less than 55 kB and achieving an average inference latency of 142 ms and energy consumption of 7.25 mJ. Patient-specific fine-tuning further improves accuracy by up to 64%, enabling fully autonomous, low-cost BP monitoring on wearables.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合硬件感知NAS、剪枝和混合精度搜索的自动化DNN设计流程，为可穿戴设备生成紧凑高效的血压预测模型，在保持精度的同时大幅减少参数和能耗。
AI.motivation: 基于PPG的血压估计在资源受限的可穿戴设备上具有挑战性，现有DNN模型虽然精度高但计算和内存需求大，难以在可穿戴设备上部署，且需要保护用户数据隐私。
AI.method: 采用完全自动化的DNN设计流程，结合硬件感知神经架构搜索(NAS)、剪枝和混合精度搜索(MPS)，针对超低功耗多核SoC(GAP8)优化模型，并进行患者特定微调。
AI.result: 优化后的模型在四个公共数据集上实现：误差降低7.99%且参数减少7.5倍，或参数减少83倍而精度损失可忽略。所有模型内存<512kB，平均推理延迟142ms，能耗7.25mJ。患者特定微调进一步提升精度达64%。
AI.conclusion: 该自动化设计流程能生成适合可穿戴设备的紧凑高效血压预测模型，实现完全自主、低成本的血压监测，保护用户数据隐私。

title: Biomarker-Based Pretraining for Chagas Disease Screening in Electrocardiograms
summary: Chagas disease screening via ECGs is limited by scarce and noisy labels in existing datasets. We propose a biomarker-based pretraining approach, where an ECG feature extractor is first trained to predict percentile-binned blood biomarkers from the MIMIC-IV-ECG dataset. The pretrained model is then fine-tuned on Brazilian datasets for Chagas detection. Our 5-model ensemble, developed by the Ahus AIM team, achieved a challenge score of 0.269 on the hidden test set, ranking 5th in Detection of Chagas Disease from the ECG: The George B. Moody PhysioNet Challenge 2025. Source code and the model are shared on GitHub: github.com/Ahus-AIM/physionet-challenge-2025

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生物标志物的ECG预训练方法，通过预测血液生物标志物来预训练ECG特征提取器，然后在巴西数据集上微调用于恰加斯病检测，在PhysioNet挑战赛中排名第5。
AI.motivation: 恰加斯病筛查面临现有数据集标签稀缺且噪声大的问题，需要开发更有效的ECG分析方法。
AI.method: 采用生物标志物预训练方法：首先在MIMIC-IV-ECG数据集上训练ECG特征提取器预测百分位分箱的血液生物标志物，然后在巴西数据集上微调用于恰加斯病检测，使用5模型集成。
AI.result: 在PhysioNet挑战赛隐藏测试集上获得0.269的挑战分数，排名第5位，模型和源代码已在GitHub开源。
AI.conclusion: 生物标志物预训练方法能有效提升ECG在恰加斯病检测中的性能，特别是在标签稀缺的情况下，为临床筛查提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Steered LLM Activations are Non-Surjective
comment: 10 pages main text. ICLR 2026 Workshops (Sci4DL, Re-Align)
summary: Activation steering is a popular white-box control technique that modifies model activations to elicit an abstract change in output behavior. It has also become a standard tool in interpretability (e.g., probing truthfulness, or translating activations into human-readable explanations and safety research (e.g., studying jailbreakability). However, it is unclear whether steered activation states are realizable by any textual prompt. In this work, we cast this question as a surjectivity problem: for a fixed model, does every steered activation admit a pre-image under the model's natural forward pass? Under practical assumptions, we prove that activation steering pushes the residual stream off the manifold of states reachable from discrete prompts. Almost surely, no prompt can reproduce the same internal behavior induced by steering. We also illustrate this finding empirically across three widely used LLMs. Our results establish a formal separation between white-box steerability and black-box prompting. We therefore caution against interpreting the ease and success of activation steering as evidence of prompt-based interpretability or vulnerability, and argue for evaluation protocols that explicitly decouple white-box and black-box interventions.

AI.tldr: 激活导向技术创建的激活状态无法通过任何文本提示实现，存在白盒导向与黑盒提示之间的形式化分离
AI.motivation: 激活导向是流行的白盒控制技术，用于修改模型激活以改变输出行为，但尚不清楚导向后的激活状态是否可以通过任何文本提示实现
AI.method: 将问题形式化为满射性问题：在固定模型下，每个导向激活是否在模型自然前向传递下存在原像？在实践假设下证明激活导向将残差流推离离散提示可达的状态流形
AI.result: 理论上证明导向激活状态几乎肯定无法通过任何提示复制相同内部行为，并在三个广泛使用的LLM上实证验证了这一发现
AI.conclusion: 建立了白盒可导向性与黑盒提示之间的形式化分离，警告不要将激活导向的简易性和成功解释为基于提示的可解释性或脆弱性证据，主张明确分离白盒和黑盒干预的评估协议

title: Instruction Data Selection via Answer Divergence
summary: Instruction tuning relies on large instruction-response corpora whose quality and composition strongly affect downstream performance. We propose Answer Divergence-Guided Selection (ADG), which selects instruction data based on the geometric structure of multi-sample outputs. ADG draws several high-temperature generations per instruction, maps responses into an embedding space, and computes an output divergence score that jointly encodes dispersion magnitude and shape anisotropy. High scores correspond to instructions whose answers are both far apart and multi-modal, rather than clustered paraphrases along a single direction. Across two backbones and three public instruction pools, fine-tuning on only 10K ADG-selected examples consistently outperforms strong selectors on six benchmarks spanning reasoning, knowledge, and coding. Analyses further show that both dispersion magnitude and shape anisotropy are necessary, supporting answer divergence as a practical signal for instruction data selection. Code and appendix are included in the supplementary materials.

AI.tldr: ADG提出基于答案发散度的指令数据选择方法，通过分析多样本输出的几何结构来选择高质量指令数据，仅用10K样本就能在多个基准上超越现有选择器。
AI.motivation: 指令调优依赖于大规模指令-响应语料库，其质量和组成强烈影响下游性能。现有方法缺乏对指令数据质量的系统评估标准，特别是对答案多样性和多模态性的考量。
AI.method: ADG（答案发散度引导选择）方法：1）对每个指令进行多次高温采样生成多个响应；2）将响应映射到嵌入空间；3）计算输出发散度得分，该得分联合编码了分散幅度和形状各向异性；4）选择得分高的指令（答案既分散又多模态）。
AI.result: 在两个骨干模型和三个公共指令池上，仅使用10K个ADG选择的样本进行微调，在涵盖推理、知识和编码的六个基准测试中始终优于强基线选择器。分析表明分散幅度和形状各向异性都是必要的。
AI.conclusion: 答案发散度是指令数据选择的有效信号，ADG方法能够选择出高质量、多样化的指令数据，显著提升指令调优的性能。

title: Consensus-based Recursive Multi-Output Gaussian Process
comment: Submitted to International Workshop on Signal Processing and Artificial Intelligence in Wireless Communications (IEEE SPAWC 2026)
summary: Multi-output Gaussian Processes provide principled uncertainty-aware learning of vector-valued fields but are difficult to deploy in large-scale, distributed, and streaming settings due to their computational and centralized nature. This paper proposes a Consensus-based Recursive Multi-Output Gaussian Process (CRMGP) framework that combines recursive inference on shared basis vectors with neighbour-to-neighbour information-consensus updates. The resulting method supports parallel, fully distributed learning with bounded per-step computation while preserving inter-output correlations and calibrated uncertainty. Experiments on synthetic wind fields and real LiDAR data demonstrate that CRMGP achieves competitive predictive performance and reliable uncertainty calibration, offering a scalable alternative to centralized Gaussian process models for multi-agent sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于共识的递归多输出高斯过程框架，支持并行分布式学习，保持输出间相关性，适用于大规模多智能体传感应用。
AI.motivation: 传统多输出高斯过程在大规模、分布式和流式场景中难以部署，因为其计算复杂且需要集中式处理。需要一种能够在分布式环境中保持输出相关性和不确定性校准的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合共享基向量上的递归推断与邻居间的信息共识更新，支持并行、完全分布式学习，每步计算有界，同时保持输出间相关性。
AI.result: 在合成风场和真实LiDAR数据上的实验表明，该方法取得了有竞争力的预测性能和可靠的不确定性校准，为多智能体传感应用提供了可扩展的替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的CRMGP框架为大规模分布式多输出高斯过程学习提供了有效解决方案，在保持传统方法优点的同时实现了可扩展性。

title: RobustMedSAM: Degradation-Resilient Medical Image Segmentation via Robust Foundation Model Adaptation
summary: Medical image segmentation models built on Segment Anything Model (SAM) achieve strong performance on clean benchmarks, yet their reliability often degrades under realistic image corruptions such as noise, blur, motion artifacts, and modality-specific distortions. Existing approaches address either medical-domain adaptation or corruption robustness, but not both jointly. In SAM, we find that these capabilities are concentrated in complementary modules: the image encoder preserves medical priors, while the mask decoder governs corruption robustness. Motivated by this observation, we propose RobustMedSAM, which adopts module-wise checkpoint fusion by initializing the image encoder from MedSAM and the mask decoder from RobustSAM under a shared ViT-B architecture. We then fine-tune only the mask decoder on 35 medical datasets from MedSegBench, spanning six imaging modalities and 12 corruption types, while freezing the remaining components to preserve pretrained medical representations. We additionally investigate an SVD-based parameter-efficient variant for limited encoder adaptation. Experiments on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution benchmarks show that RobustMedSAM improves degraded-image Dice from 0.613 to 0.719 (+0.106) over SAM, demonstrating that structured fusion of complementary pretrained models is an effective and practical approach for robust medical image segmentation.

AI.tldr: RobustMedSAM通过融合MedSAM的图像编码器和RobustSAM的掩码解码器，并微调掩码解码器，显著提升了医学图像分割在多种图像损坏情况下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割模型在干净数据集上表现良好，但在实际应用中面对噪声、模糊、运动伪影等图像损坏时性能下降。现有方法要么关注医学领域适应，要么关注损坏鲁棒性，但未能同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 提出RobustMedSAM，采用模块化检查点融合策略：从MedSAM初始化图像编码器以保留医学先验知识，从RobustSAM初始化掩码解码器以获得损坏鲁棒性。在共享ViT-B架构下，仅微调掩码解码器（在35个医学数据集上训练），冻结其他组件以保留预训练的医学表示。还研究了基于SVD的参数高效变体用于有限的编码器适应。
AI.result: 在分布内和分布外基准测试中，RobustMedSAM将损坏图像的Dice分数从SAM的0.613提升到0.719（+0.106），显著提高了医学图像分割在12种损坏类型下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化融合互补的预训练模型是提高医学图像分割鲁棒性的有效实用方法，通过分离图像编码器（保留医学先验）和掩码解码器（控制损坏鲁棒性）的功能，实现了更好的性能。

title: MEMENTO: Teaching LLMs to Manage Their Own Context
summary: Reasoning models think in long, unstructured streams with no mechanism for compressing or organizing their own intermediate state. We introduce MEMENTO: a method that teaches models to segment reasoning into blocks, compress each block into a memento, i.e., a dense state summary, and reason forward by attending only to mementos, reducing context, KV cache, and compute. To train MEMENTO models, we release OpenMementos, a public dataset of 228K reasoning traces derived from OpenThoughts-v3, segmented and annotated with intermediate summaries. We show that a two-stage SFT recipe on OpenMementos is effective across different model families (Qwen3, Phi-4, Olmo 3) and scales (8B--32B parameters). Trained models maintain strong accuracy on math, science, and coding benchmarks while achieving ${\sim}2.5\times$ peak KV cache reduction. We extend vLLM to support our inference method, achieving ${\sim}1.75\times$ throughput improvement while also enabling us to perform RL and further improve accuracy. Finally, we identify a dual information stream: information from each reasoning block is carried both by the memento text and by the corresponding KV states, which retain implicit information from the original block. Removing this channel drops accuracy by 15\,pp on AIME24.

AI.tldr: MEMENTO是一种让推理模型将推理过程分段、压缩为记忆状态，并仅基于这些记忆状态进行后续推理的方法，可显著减少KV缓存和计算开销。
AI.motivation: 当前推理模型以长而无结构的方式思考，缺乏压缩或组织中间状态的机制，导致上下文、KV缓存和计算资源消耗大。
AI.method: 1) 将推理过程分段为块；2) 将每个块压缩为记忆状态（memento）；3) 仅基于记忆状态进行后续推理；4) 使用OpenMementos数据集进行两阶段监督微调训练。
AI.result: 在多个模型家族（Qwen3、Phi-4、Olmo 3）和规模（8B-32B参数）上有效，保持数学、科学和编程基准的准确率，同时实现约2.5倍的峰值KV缓存减少和约1.75倍的吞吐量提升。
AI.conclusion: MEMENTO方法能有效压缩推理状态，减少计算资源消耗，同时发现推理块信息通过记忆文本和相应KV状态双重信息流传递，移除任一通道会显著降低准确率。

title: NOSE: Neural Olfactory-Semantic Embedding with Tri-Modal Orthogonal Contrastive Learning
comment: Accepted to the ACL 2026 Main Conference
summary: Olfaction lies at the intersection of chemical structure, neural encoding, and linguistic perception, yet existing representation methods fail to fully capture this pathway. Current approaches typically model only isolated segments of the olfactory pathway, overlooking the complete chain from molecule to receptors to linguistic descriptions. Such fragmentation yields learned embeddings that lack both biological grounding and semantic interpretability. We propose NOSE (Neural Olfactory-Semantic Embedding), a representation learning framework that aligns three modalities along the olfactory pathway: molecular structure, receptor sequence, and natural language description. Rather than simply fusing these signals, we decouple their contributions via orthogonal constraints, preserving the unique encoded information of each modality. To address the sparsity of olfactory language, we introduce a weak positive sample strategy to calibrate semantic similarity, preventing erroneous repulsion of similar odors in the feature space. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NOSE achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance and excellent zero-shot generalization, confirming the strong alignment between its representation space and human olfactory intuition.

AI.tldr: NOSE是一个多模态表示学习框架，通过正交约束对齐分子结构、受体序列和自然语言描述，解决现有嗅觉表示方法碎片化的问题，实现了SOTA性能和零样本泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有嗅觉表示方法通常只建模嗅觉通路的孤立片段（分子、受体或语言描述），忽略了从分子到受体再到语言描述的完整链条。这种碎片化导致学习的嵌入缺乏生物学基础和语义可解释性。
AI.method: 提出NOSE框架，对齐嗅觉通路上的三个模态：分子结构、受体序列和自然语言描述。通过正交约束解耦各模态的贡献，保留每个模态的独特编码信息。针对嗅觉语言稀疏性问题，引入弱正样本策略来校准语义相似性，防止特征空间中相似气味被错误排斥。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，NOSE实现了最先进的性能（SOTA）和优秀的零样本泛化能力，证实了其表示空间与人类嗅觉直觉之间的强对齐。
AI.conclusion: NOSE通过多模态对齐和正交约束，成功捕捉了嗅觉通路从化学结构到神经编码再到语言感知的完整链条，为嗅觉表示学习提供了生物学基础扎实且语义可解释的解决方案。

title: A Temporally Augmented Graph Attention Network for Affordance Classification
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at 3rd IEEE Guwahati Subsection Conference (GCON 2026)
summary: Graph attention networks (GATs) provide one of the best frameworks for learning node representations in relational data; but, existing variants such as Graph Attention Network (GAT) mainly operate on static graphs and rely on implicit temporal aggregation when applied to sequential data.
