In this paper, we introduce Electroencephalography-temporal Graph Attention Network (EEG-tGAT), a temporally augmented formulation of GATv2 that is tailored for affordance classification from interaction sequences. The proposed model incorporates temporal attention to modulate the contribution of different time segments and temporal dropout to regularize learning across temporally correlated observations. The design reflects the assumption that temporal dimensions in affordance data are not semantically uniform and that discriminative information may be unevenly distributed across time. Experimental results on affordance datasets show that EEG-tGAT achieves improved classification performance compared to GATv2. The observed gains helps to conclude that explicitly encoding temporal importance and enforcing temporal robustness introduce inductive biases that are much better aligned with the structure of affordance-driven interaction data. These findings show us that modest architectural changes to graph attention models can help one obtain consistent benefits when temporal relationships play a nontrivial role in the task.

AI.tldr: EEG-tGAT：针对脑电图时序数据的图注意力网络改进，通过时间注意力机制和时间dropout提升交互序列中affordance分类性能
AI.motivation: 现有图注意力网络（如GAT）主要处理静态图，在处理时序数据时依赖隐式时间聚合。affordance数据的时间维度语义不均匀，判别信息在时间上分布不均，需要显式的时间建模
AI.method: 基于GATv2提出EEG-tGAT，引入时间注意力机制调节不同时间段的贡献，使用时间dropout正则化处理时间相关观测，专门针对交互序列的affordance分类任务
AI.result: 在affordance数据集上，EEG-tGAT相比GATv2获得了更好的分类性能，验证了显式编码时间重要性和增强时间鲁棒性的有效性
AI.conclusion: 适度的架构改进（显式时间建模）能为图注意力模型带来一致性的性能提升，特别是在时间关系起重要作用的任务中。这些归纳偏置与affordance驱动交互数据的结构更加匹配

title: ACCIDENT: A Benchmark Dataset for Vehicle Accident Detection from Traffic Surveillance Videos
summary: We introduce ACCIDENT, a benchmark dataset for traffic accident detection in CCTV footage, designed to evaluate models in supervised (IID and OOD) and zero-shot settings, reflecting both data-rich and data-scarce scenarios. The benchmark consists of a curated set of 2,027 real and 2,211 synthetic clips annotated with the accident time, spatial location, and high-level collision type. We define three core tasks: (i) temporal localization of the accident, (ii) its spatial localization, and (iii) collision type classification. Each task is evaluated using custom metrics that account for the uncertainty and ambiguity inherent in CCTV footage. In addition to the benchmark, we provide a diverse set of baselines, including heuristic, motion-aware, and vision-language approaches, and show that ACCIDENT is challenging. You can access the ACCIDENT at: https://accidentbench.github.io

AI.tldr: ACCIDENT是一个用于CCTV视频中交通事故检测的基准数据集，包含真实和合成视频片段，支持监督学习和零样本学习，包含时间定位、空间定位和碰撞类型分类三个任务。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏一个全面的基准来评估模型在CCTV视频中检测交通事故的能力，特别是在数据丰富和数据稀缺的场景下。需要解决时间定位、空间定位和碰撞类型分类的挑战，同时考虑CCTV视频固有的不确定性和模糊性。
AI.method: 创建了一个包含2,027个真实视频和2,211个合成视频的数据集，标注了事故时间、空间位置和碰撞类型。定义了三个核心任务，并为每个任务设计了考虑不确定性的定制评估指标。提供了多种基线方法，包括启发式、运动感知和视觉语言方法。
AI.result: ACCIDENT基准数据集被证明具有挑战性，现有的基线方法在三个核心任务上都面临困难。数据集支持监督学习（包括IID和OOD）和零样本设置，能够全面评估模型在不同数据场景下的性能。
AI.conclusion: ACCIDENT为交通事故检测研究提供了一个全面的基准，能够评估模型在现实世界CCTV视频中的性能，特别是在处理不确定性和模糊性方面的能力。该基准将推动更鲁棒和实用的交通事故检测系统的发展。

title: Instructing LLMs to Negotiate using Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
summary: The recent advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has established their potential as autonomous interactive agents. However, they often struggle in strategic games of incomplete information, such as bilateral price negotiation. In this paper, we investigate if Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) can effectively teach LLMs to negotiate. Specifically, we explore the strategic behaviors that emerge during the learning process. We introduce a framework that trains a mid-sized buyer agent against a regulated LLM seller across a wide distribution of real-world products. By grounding reward signals directly in the maximization of economic surplus and strict adherence to private budget constraints, we reveal a novel four-phase strategic evolution. The agent progresses from naive bargaining to using aggressive starting prices, moves through a phase of deadlock, and ultimately develops sophisticated persuasive skills. Our results demonstrate that this verifiable training allows a 30B agent to significantly outperform frontier models over ten times its size in extracting surplus. Furthermore, the trained agent generalizes robustly to stronger counterparties unseen during training and remains effective even when facing hostile, adversarial seller personas.

AI.tldr: 使用可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）训练LLM在价格谈判中表现出色，30B参数模型超越十倍规模的前沿模型，展现出四阶段战略演化
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型作为自主交互代理在信息不完全的战略游戏（如双边价格谈判）中表现不佳，需要探索如何有效训练LLM进行谈判
AI.method: 引入RLVR框架，训练中型买家代理对抗受监管的LLM卖家，基于真实产品分布，奖励信号直接基于经济剩余最大化和严格预算约束
AI.result: 30B参数代理在提取剩余价值方面显著优于十倍规模的前沿模型，展现出四阶段战略演化：从天真议价到激进起始价格，经历僵局阶段，最终发展出复杂说服技能
AI.conclusion: 可验证奖励训练使LLM在谈判中表现出色，能泛化到未见过的更强对手，即使在面对敌对卖家角色时仍保持有效

title: EviCare: Enhancing Diagnosis Prediction with Deep Model-Guided Evidence for In-Context Reasoning
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled promising progress in diagnosis prediction from electronic health records (EHRs). However, existing LLM-based approaches tend to overfit to historically observed diagnoses, often overlooking novel yet clinically important conditions that are critical for early intervention. To address this, we propose EviCare, an in-context reasoning framework that integrates deep model guidance into LLM-based diagnosis prediction. Rather than prompting LLMs directly with raw EHR inputs, EviCare performs (1) deep model inference for candidate selection, (2) evidential prioritization for set-based EHRs, and (3) relational evidence construction for novel diagnosis prediction. These signals are then composed into an adaptive in-context prompt to guide LLM reasoning in an accurate and interpretable manner. Extensive experiments on two real-world EHR benchmarks (MIMIC-III and MIMIC-IV) demonstrate that EviCare achieves significant performance gains, which consistently outperforms both LLM-only and deep model-only baselines by an average of 20.65\% across precision and accuracy metrics. The improvements are particularly notable in challenging novel diagnosis prediction, yielding average improvements of 30.97\%.

AI.tldr: EviCare：一个集成深度模型指导的上下文推理框架，用于从电子健康记录中预测诊断，特别关注新颖但临床重要的疾病，在预测精度和准确性上平均提升20.65%，在新颖诊断预测上提升30.97%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的诊断预测方法容易过拟合到历史观察到的诊断，忽略了对于早期干预至关重要的新颖但临床重要的疾病。
AI.method: EviCare框架包含三个步骤：(1) 深度模型推理进行候选选择，(2) 基于集合的电子健康记录的证据优先级排序，(3) 新颖诊断预测的关系证据构建，然后将这些信号组合成自适应上下文提示来指导大语言模型推理。
AI.result: 在两个真实世界电子健康记录基准（MIMIC-III和MIMIC-IV）上的实验表明，EviCare在精度和准确性指标上平均优于纯大语言模型和纯深度模型基线20.65%，在新颖诊断预测方面的改进尤为显著，平均提升30.97%。
AI.conclusion: EviCare通过集成深度模型指导和大语言模型推理，有效解决了现有方法在新颖诊断预测上的局限性，实现了更准确和可解释的诊断预测。

title: Tracing the Thought of a Grandmaster-level Chess-Playing Transformer
summary: While modern transformer neural networks achieve grandmaster-level performance in chess and other reasoning tasks, their internal computation process remains largely opaque. Focusing on Leela Chess Zero (LC0), we introduce a sparse decomposition framework to interpret its internal computation by decomposing its MLP and attention modules with sparse replacement layers, which capture the primary computation process of LC0. We conduct a detailed case study showing that these pathways expose rich, interpretable tactical considerations that are empirically verifiable. We further introduce three quantitative metrics and show that LC0 exhibits parallel reasoning behavior consistent with the inductive bias of its policy head architecture. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to decompose the internal computation of a transformer on both MLP and attention modules for interpretability. Combining sparse replacement layers and causal interventions in LC0 provides a comprehensive understanding of advanced tactical reasoning, offering critical insights into the underlying mechanisms of superhuman systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/JacklE0niden/Leela-SAEs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种稀疏分解框架来解释Leela Chess Zero（LC0）的内部计算过程，通过稀疏替换层分解其MLP和注意力模块，揭示了丰富的可解释战术考量。
AI.motivation: 尽管现代Transformer神经网络在象棋等推理任务中达到了大师级水平，但其内部计算过程仍然不透明。作者希望通过解释LC0的内部计算机制，理解超人类系统的底层工作原理。
AI.method: 引入稀疏分解框架，通过稀疏替换层分解LC0的MLP和注意力模块。结合稀疏替换层和因果干预，提供对高级战术推理的全面理解。
AI.result: 稀疏通路暴露了丰富、可解释的战术考量，这些考量可以通过实证验证。LC0表现出与其策略头架构归纳偏置一致的并行推理行为。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个在MLP和注意力模块上分解Transformer内部计算以进行可解释性分析的工作，为理解超人类系统的底层机制提供了关键见解。

title: F3G-Avatar : Face Focused Full-body Gaussian Avatar
summary: Existing full-body Gaussian avatar methods primarily optimize global reconstruction quality and often fail to preserve fine-grained facial geometry and expression details. This challenge arises from limited facial representational capacity that causes difficulties in modeling high-frequency pose-dependent deformations. To address this, we propose F3G-Avatar, a full-body, face-aware avatar synthesis method that reconstructs animatable human representations from multi-view RGB video and regressed pose/shape parameters. Starting from a clothed Momentum Human Rig (MHR) template, front/back positional maps are rendered and decoded into 3D Gaussians through a two-branch architecture: a body branch that captures pose-dependent non-rigid deformations and a face-focused deformation branch that refines head geometry and appearance. The predicted Gaussians are fused, posed with linear blend skinning (LBS), and rendered with differentiable Gaussian splatting. Training combines reconstruction and perceptual objectives with a face-specific adversarial loss to enhance realism in close-up views. Experiments demonstrate strong rendering quality, with face-view performance reaching PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS of 26.243/0.964/0.084 on the AvatarReX dataset. Ablations further highlight contributions of the MHR template and the face-focused deformation. F3G-Avatar provides a practical, high-quality pipeline for realistic, animatable full-body avatar synthesis.

AI.tldr: F3G-Avatar：一种全身体、面部感知的虚拟人合成方法，通过双分支架构（身体分支+面部变形分支）从多视角RGB视频重建可动画的人体表示，显著提升了面部几何和表情细节的保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于高斯分布的全身虚拟人方法主要优化全局重建质量，但往往无法保留细粒度的面部几何和表情细节。这源于有限的面部表示能力，难以建模高频的姿势依赖变形。
AI.method: 从穿衣服的Momentum Human Rig模板开始，渲染前后位置图，通过双分支架构解码为3D高斯：身体分支捕捉姿势依赖的非刚性变形，面部变形分支细化头部几何和外观。预测的高斯通过线性混合蒙皮进行姿势调整，并用可微分高斯溅射渲染。训练结合重建和感知目标，加入面部特定的对抗损失以增强特写视图的真实感。
AI.result: 在AvatarReX数据集上，面部视图性能达到PSNR 26.243/SSIM 0.964/LPIPS 0.084。消融实验进一步突出了MHR模板和面部变形分支的贡献。
AI.conclusion: F3G-Avatar为真实、可动画的全身虚拟人合成提供了一个实用、高质量的流程，显著改善了面部细节的保真度。

title: Evolutionary Token-Level Prompt Optimization for Diffusion Models
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models exhibit strong generative performance but remain highly sensitive to prompt formulation, often requiring extensive manual trial and error to obtain satisfactory results. This motivates the development of automated, model-agnostic prompt optimization methods that can systematically explore the conditioning space beyond conventional text rewriting. This work investigates the use of a Genetic Algorithm (GA) for prompt optimization by directly evolving the token vectors employed by CLIP-based diffusion models. The GA optimizes a fitness function that combines aesthetic quality, measured by the LAION Aesthetic Predictor V2, with prompt-image alignment, assessed via CLIPScore. Experiments on 36 prompts from the Parti Prompts (P2) dataset show that the proposed approach outperforms the baseline methods, including Promptist and random search, achieving up to a 23.93% improvement in fitness. Overall, the method is adaptable to image generation models with tokenized text encoders and provides a modular framework for future extensions, the limitations and prospects of which are discussed.

AI.tldr: 使用遗传算法直接优化CLIP扩散模型的token向量，结合美学质量和提示对齐度进行自动提示优化
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型对提示词表述高度敏感，需要大量手动试错才能获得满意结果，需要开发自动、模型无关的提示优化方法
AI.method: 采用遗传算法直接演化CLIP扩散模型使用的token向量，优化结合LAION美学预测器V2评估的美学质量和CLIPScore评估的提示-图像对齐度的适应度函数
AI.result: 在Parti Prompts数据集36个提示上的实验显示，该方法优于Promptist和随机搜索基线，适应度提升最高达23.93%
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于具有token化文本编码器的图像生成模型，提供了可扩展的模块化框架，讨论了局限性和未来前景

title: Dynamic Adaptive Attention and Supervised Contrastive Learning: A Novel Hybrid Framework for Text Sentiment Classification
summary: The exponential growth of user-generated movie reviews on digital platforms has made accurate text sentiment classification a cornerstone task in natural language processing. Traditional models, including standard BERT and recurrent architectures, frequently struggle to capture long-distance semantic dependencies and resolve ambiguous emotional expressions in lengthy review texts. This paper proposes a novel hybrid framework that seamlessly integrates dynamic adaptive multi-head attention with supervised contrastive learning into a BERT-based Transformer encoder. The dynamic adaptive attention module employs a global context pooling vector to dynamically regulate the contribution of each attention head, thereby focusing on critical sentiment-bearing tokens while suppressing noise. Simultaneously, the supervised contrastive learning branch enforces tighter intra-class compactness and larger inter-class separation in the embedding space. Extensive experiments on the IMDB dataset demonstrate that the proposed model achieves competitive performance with an accuracy of 94.67\%, outperforming strong baselines by 1.5--2.5 percentage points. The framework is lightweight, efficient, and readily extensible to other text classification tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合动态自适应多头注意力和监督对比学习的BERT混合框架，用于提升电影评论情感分类性能，在IMDB数据集上达到94.67%准确率。
AI.motivation: 数字平台上用户生成的电影评论呈指数增长，准确的情感分类成为NLP核心任务。传统模型如标准BERT和循环架构难以捕捉长距离语义依赖和解决长文本中的模糊情感表达。
AI.method: 提出新颖的混合框架，将动态自适应多头注意力与监督对比学习集成到基于BERT的Transformer编码器中。动态注意力模块使用全局上下文池化向量动态调节每个注意力头的贡献，聚焦关键情感标记并抑制噪声。监督对比学习分支则增强嵌入空间中的类内紧凑性和类间分离度。
AI.result: 在IMDB数据集上的广泛实验表明，该模型达到94.67%的准确率，比强基线高出1.5-2.5个百分点。框架轻量高效，易于扩展到其他文本分类任务。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合框架有效解决了长文本情感分类中的语义依赖和模糊表达问题，在IMDB数据集上取得了竞争性性能，且具有轻量高效、易于扩展的优点。

title: Virtual Smart Metering in District Heating Networks via Heterogeneous Spatial-Temporal Graph Neural Networks
summary: Intelligent operation of thermal energy networks aims to improve energy efficiency, reliability, and operational flexibility through data-driven control, predictive optimization, and early fault detection. Achieving these goals relies on sufficient observability, requiring continuous and well-distributed monitoring of thermal and hydraulic states. However, district heating systems are typically sparsely instrumented and frequently affected by sensor faults, limiting monitoring. Virtual sensing offers a cost-effective means to enhance observability, yet its development and validation remain limited in practice. Existing data-driven methods generally assume dense synchronized data, while analytical models rely on simplified hydraulic and thermal assumptions that may not adequately capture the behavior of heterogeneous network topologies. Consequently, modeling the coupled nonlinear dependencies between pressure, flow, and temperature under realistic operating conditions remains challenging. In addition, the lack of publicly available benchmark datasets hinders systematic comparison of virtual sensing approaches. To address these challenges, we propose a heterogeneous spatial-temporal graph neural network (HSTGNN) for constructing virtual smart heat meters. The model incorporates the functional relationships inherent in district heating networks and employs dedicated branches to learn graph structures and temporal dynamics for flow, temperature, and pressure measurements, thereby enabling the joint modeling of cross-variable and spatial correlations. To support further research, we introduce a controlled laboratory dataset collected at the Aalborg Smart Water Infrastructure Laboratory, providing synchronized high-resolution measurements representative of real operating conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly outperforms existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种异构时空图神经网络(HSTGNN)用于构建虚拟智能热量表，解决区域供热系统传感器稀疏和故障问题，并发布了一个实验室数据集用于研究验证。
AI.motivation: 区域供热系统通常传感器稀疏且易受故障影响，限制了监控能力。现有数据驱动方法需要密集同步数据，而分析模型基于简化的热力水力假设，难以准确捕捉异质网络拓扑行为。缺乏公开基准数据集也阻碍了虚拟传感方法的系统比较。
AI.method: 提出异构时空图神经网络(HSTGNN)，该模型结合区域供热网络的功能关系，采用专用分支分别学习流量、温度和压力测量的图结构和时间动态，实现跨变量和空间相关性的联合建模。
AI.result: 广泛的实验表明，所提出的方法显著优于现有基线模型。同时发布了在奥尔堡智能水基础设施实验室收集的受控实验室数据集，提供代表真实运行条件的同步高分辨率测量数据。
AI.conclusion: HSTGNN方法能够有效解决区域供热系统虚拟传感中的挑战，通过联合建模跨变量和空间相关性，显著提升了虚拟智能热量表的性能。发布的基准数据集将支持该领域的进一步研究。

title: Vector Field Synthesis with Sparse Streamlines Using Diffusion Model
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures; published at IEEE VIS 2025
summary: We present a novel diffusion-based framework for synthesizing 2D vector fields from sparse, coherent inputs (i.e., streamlines) while maintaining physical plausibility. Our method employs a conditional denoising diffusion probabilistic model with classifier-free guidance, enabling progressive reconstruction that preserves both geometric and physical constraints. Experimental results demonstrate our method's ability to synthesize plausible vector fields that adhere to physical laws while maintaining fidelity to sparse input observations, outperforming traditional optimization-based approaches in terms of flexibility and physical consistency.

AI.tldr: 提出基于扩散模型的2D矢量场合成框架，从稀疏流线输入生成物理合理的矢量场
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法在从稀疏流线输入合成矢量场时，难以同时保持几何约束和物理合理性，需要更灵活且物理一致的方法
AI.method: 使用条件去噪扩散概率模型，结合无分类器引导，实现渐进式重建，同时保持几何和物理约束
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能合成符合物理定律的合理矢量场，同时保持对稀疏输入的保真度，在灵活性和物理一致性方面优于传统优化方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的扩散框架为从稀疏流线输入合成物理合理的矢量场提供了有效解决方案，在保持物理一致性和输入保真度方面具有优势

title: What do your logits know? (The answer may surprise you!)
summary: Recent work has shown that probing model internals can reveal a wealth of information not apparent from the model generations. This poses the risk of unintentional or malicious information leakage, where model users are able to learn information that the model owner assumed was inaccessible. Using vision-language models as a testbed, we present the first systematic comparison of information retained at different "representational levels'' as it is compressed from the rich information encoded in the residual stream through two natural bottlenecks: low-dimensional projections of the residual stream obtained using tuned lens, and the final top-k logits most likely to impact model's answer. We show that even easily accessible bottlenecks defined by the model's top logit values can leak task-irrelevant information present in an image-based query, in some cases revealing as much information as direct projections of the full residual stream.

AI.tldr: 研究发现视觉语言模型即使通过top-k logits等压缩瓶颈也能泄露与任务无关的图像信息，风险与直接投影完整残差流相当
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明探测模型内部能揭示大量非表面信息，存在模型用户可能获取模型所有者认为不可访问信息的风险，需要系统比较不同表示层级的信息保留情况
AI.method: 以视觉语言模型为测试平台，系统比较信息在不同"表示层级"的保留情况：从残差流的丰富信息，通过两个自然瓶颈（使用tuned lens获得的低维残差流投影，以及最可能影响模型答案的top-k logits）进行压缩
AI.result: 即使通过模型top logit值定义的易访问瓶颈也能泄露图像查询中与任务无关的信息，在某些情况下揭示的信息量与直接投影完整残差流相当
AI.conclusion: 模型压缩瓶颈仍存在信息泄露风险，即使是看似受限的top-k logits也可能泄露大量敏感信息，这对模型隐私保护提出了新的挑战

title: From Query to Counsel: Structured Reasoning with a Multi-Agent Framework and Dataset for Legal Consultation
summary: Legal consultation question answering (Legal CQA) presents unique challenges compared to traditional legal QA tasks, including the scarcity of high-quality training data, complex task composition, and strong contextual dependencies. To address these, we construct JurisCQAD, a large-scale dataset of over 43,000 real-world Chinese legal queries annotated with expert-validated positive and negative responses, and design a structured task decomposition that converts each query into a legal element graph integrating entities, events, intents, and legal issues. We further propose JurisMA, a modular multi-agent framework supporting dynamic routing, statutory grounding, and stylistic optimization. Combined with the element graph, the framework enables strong context-aware reasoning, effectively capturing dependencies across legal facts, norms, and procedural logic. Trained on JurisCQAD and evaluated on a refined LawBench, our system significantly outperforms both general-purpose and legal-domain LLMs across multiple lexical and semantic metrics, demonstrating the benefits of interpretable decomposition and modular collaboration in Legal CQA.

AI.tldr: 本文针对法律咨询问答任务构建了JurisCQAD数据集和JurisMA多智能体框架，通过结构化任务分解和法律元素图显著提升了法律问答性能
AI.motivation: 法律咨询问答面临高质量训练数据稀缺、任务组合复杂、上下文依赖性强等独特挑战，现有方法难以有效处理这些问题
AI.method: 构建JurisCQAD数据集（43,000+中文法律查询），设计结构化任务分解将查询转换为法律元素图，提出JurisMA模块化多智能体框架支持动态路由、法规基础和风格优化
AI.result: 在精炼的LawBench评估中，系统在多个词汇和语义指标上显著优于通用和特定领域LLM，证明了可解释分解和模块化协作的有效性
AI.conclusion: 结构化任务分解和法律元素图结合模块化多智能体框架能够有效解决法律咨询问答的复杂性和上下文依赖性，为法律AI应用提供了新思路

title: Wolkowicz-Styan Upper Bound on the Hessian Eigenspectrum for Cross-Entropy Loss in Nonlinear Smooth Neural Networks
summary: Neural networks (NNs) are central to modern machine learning and achieve state-of-the-art results in many applications. However, the relationship between loss geometry and generalization is still not well understood. The local geometry of the loss function near a critical point is well-approximated by its quadratic form, obtained through a second-order Taylor expansion. The coefficients of the quadratic term correspond to the Hessian matrix, whose eigenspectrum allows us to evaluate the sharpness of the loss at the critical point. Extensive research suggests flat critical points generalize better, while sharp ones lead to higher generalization error. However, sharpness requires the Hessian eigenspectrum, but general matrix characteristic equations have no closed-form solution. Therefore, most existing studies on evaluating loss sharpness rely on numerical approximation methods. Existing closed-form analyses of the eigenspectrum are primarily limited to simplified architectures, such as linear or ReLU-activated networks; consequently, theoretical analysis of smooth nonlinear multilayer neural networks remains limited. Against this background, this study focuses on nonlinear, smooth multilayer neural networks and derives a closed-form upper bound for the maximum eigenvalue of the Hessian with respect to the cross-entropy loss by leveraging the Wolkowicz-Styan bound. Specifically, the derived upper bound is expressed as a function of the affine transformation parameters, hidden layer dimensions, and the degree of orthogonality among the training samples. The primary contribution of this paper is an analytical characterization of loss sharpness in smooth nonlinear multilayer neural networks via a closed-form expression, avoiding explicit numerical eigenspectrum computation. We hope that this work provides a small yet meaningful step toward unraveling the mysteries of deep learning.

AI.tldr: 本文针对光滑非线性多层神经网络，推导了交叉熵损失函数Hessian矩阵最大特征值的闭形式上界，避免了数值特征谱计算，为理解损失函数几何与泛化关系提供了理论分析工具。
AI.motivation: 神经网络损失函数的几何特性（特别是平坦性）与泛化能力密切相关，但现有研究主要依赖数值近似方法或局限于简化架构（如线性或ReLU网络），缺乏对光滑非线性多层神经网络的理论分析。
AI.method: 针对非线性、光滑的多层神经网络，利用Wolkowicz-Styan界推导交叉熵损失函数Hessian矩阵最大特征值的闭形式上界，该上界表示为仿射变换参数、隐藏层维度和训练样本正交性程度的函数。
AI.result: 获得了光滑非线性多层神经网络中损失函数尖锐度的解析特征化，通过闭式表达式避免了显式的数值特征谱计算，为理解深度学习中损失几何与泛化的关系提供了理论工具。
AI.conclusion: 本文为光滑非线性多层神经网络提供了损失函数尖锐度的闭式分析特征，是理解深度学习神秘性的一小步但有意义的进展，有望促进对损失几何与泛化关系的更深入理解。

title: Is There Knowledge Left to Extract? Evidence of Fragility in Medically Fine-Tuned Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly adapted through domain-specific fine-tuning, yet it remains unclear whether this improves reasoning beyond superficial visual cues, particularly in high-stakes domains like medicine. We evaluate four paired open-source VLMs (LLaVA vs. LLaVA-Med; Gemma vs. MedGemma) across four medical imaging tasks of increasing difficulty: brain tumor, pneumonia, skin cancer, and histopathology classification. We find that performance degrades toward near-random levels as task difficulty increases, indicating limited clinical reasoning. Medical fine-tuning provides no consistent advantage, and models are highly sensitive to prompt formulation, with minor changes causing large swings in accuracy and refusal rates. To test whether closed-form VQA suppresses latent knowledge, we introduce a description-based pipeline where models generate image descriptions that a text-only model (GPT-5.1) uses for diagnosis. This recovers a limited additional signal but remains bounded by task difficulty. Analysis of vision encoder embeddings further shows that failures stem from both weak visual representations and downstream reasoning. Overall, medical VLM performance is fragile, prompt-dependent, and not reliably improved by domain-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 医学视觉语言模型在复杂医疗任务中表现脆弱，性能随难度增加而下降，领域特定微调无持续优势，对提示词高度敏感
AI.motivation: 评估视觉语言模型在医疗领域的真实推理能力，特别是领域特定微调是否真正提升了临床推理能力，而非仅依赖表面视觉线索
AI.method: 评估四对开源VLM（LLaVA vs. LLaVA-Med; Gemma vs. MedGemma）在四个难度递增的医疗影像任务（脑肿瘤、肺炎、皮肤癌、组织病理学分类）；引入基于描述的诊断流程，让模型生成图像描述，再由纯文本模型（GPT-5.1）进行诊断；分析视觉编码器嵌入
AI.result: 随着任务难度增加，性能下降至接近随机水平；医疗微调无持续优势；模型对提示词高度敏感，微小变化导致准确率和拒绝率大幅波动；基于描述的流程仅恢复有限额外信号但仍受限于任务难度；失败源于弱视觉表示和下游推理问题
AI.conclusion: 医学VLM性能脆弱、提示词依赖性强，领域特定微调未能可靠提升性能，模型在复杂医疗任务中的临床推理能力有限

title: In-situ process monitoring for defect detection in wire-arc additive manufacturing: an agentic AI approach
summary: AI agents are being increasingly deployed across a wide range of real-world applications. In this paper, we propose an agentic AI framework for in-situ process monitoring for defect detection in wire-arc additive manufacturing (WAAM). The autonomous agent leverages a WAAM process monitoring dataset and a trained classification tool to build AI agents and uses a large language model (LLM) for in-situ process monitoring decision-making for defect detection. A processing agent is developed based on welder process signals, such as current and voltage, and a monitoring agent is developed based on acoustic data collected during the process. Both agents are tasked with identifying porosity defects from processing and monitoring signals, respectively. Ground truth X-ray computed tomography (XCT) data are used to develop classification tools for both the processing and monitoring agents. Furthermore, a multi-agent framework is demonstrated in which the processing and monitoring agents are orchestrated together for parallel decision-making on the given task of defect classification. Evaluation metrics are proposed to determine the efficacy of both individual agents, the combined single-agent, and the coordinated multi-agent system. The multi-agent configuration outperforms all individual-agent counterparts, achieving a decision accuracy of 91.6% and an F1 score of 0.821 on decided runs, across 15 independent runs, and a reasoning quality score of 3.74 out of 5. These in-situ process monitoring agents hold significant potential for autonomous real-time process monitoring and control toward building qualified parts for WAAM and other additive manufacturing processes.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于多智能体的AI框架，用于线弧增材制造过程中的原位缺陷检测，通过处理信号和声学监测两个智能体协同工作，实现91.6%的决策准确率。
AI.motivation: 随着AI智能体在现实应用中的广泛部署，需要开发能够进行原位过程监测的智能系统。线弧增材制造过程中存在孔隙缺陷问题，传统检测方法难以实现实时监测，需要开发自主的AI智能体框架来提升缺陷检测的准确性和实时性。
AI.method: 开发了一个多智能体AI框架，包含两个智能体：基于焊接过程信号（电流、电压）的处理智能体，和基于声学数据的监测智能体。两者分别从不同信号源识别孔隙缺陷，并使用X射线计算机断层扫描数据作为地面真值来开发分类工具。通过大语言模型进行原位过程监测决策，并展示了多智能体协同工作的并行决策框架。
AI.result: 多智能体配置在所有个体智能体对比中表现最佳，在15次独立运行中，决策准确率达到91.6%，F1分数为0.821，推理质量得分为3.74/5。多智能体系统显著优于单一智能体配置。
AI.conclusion: 该原位过程监测智能体框架在线弧增材制造和其他增材制造过程中具有显著潜力，能够实现自主实时过程监测和控制，有助于生产合格零件。多智能体协同工作能够提升缺陷检测的准确性和可靠性。

title: Why Don't You Know? Evaluating the Impact of Uncertainty Sources on Uncertainty Quantification in LLMs
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, reliable uncertainty quantification (UQ) becomes critical for safe and effective use. Most existing UQ approaches for language models aim to produce a single confidence score -- for example, estimating the probability that a model's answer is correct. However, uncertainty in natural language tasks arises from multiple distinct sources, including model knowledge gaps, output variability, and input ambiguity, which have different implications for system behavior and user interaction. In this work, we study how the source of uncertainty impacts the behavior and effectiveness of existing UQ methods. To enable controlled analysis, we introduce a new dataset that explicitly categorizes uncertainty sources, allowing systematic evaluation of UQ performance under each condition. Our experiments reveal that while many UQ methods perform well when uncertainty stems solely from model knowledge limitations, their performance degrades or becomes misleading when other sources are introduced. These findings highlight the need for uncertainty-aware methods that explicitly account for the source of uncertainty in large language models.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了大型语言模型中不确定性来源对不确定性量化方法性能的影响，发现现有方法在模型知识局限时表现良好，但在其他不确定性来源下性能下降，强调了考虑不确定性来源的重要性。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型在实际应用中的部署，可靠的不确定性量化变得至关重要。现有UQ方法通常只产生单一置信度分数，但自然语言任务中的不确定性来自多个不同来源（模型知识差距、输出可变性、输入模糊性），这些来源对系统行为和用户交互有不同的影响。
AI.method: 引入了一个新的数据集，明确分类不确定性来源，允许在不同条件下系统评估UQ性能。通过控制分析，研究了不确定性来源如何影响现有UQ方法的行为和有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，当不确定性仅来自模型知识局限时，许多UQ方法表现良好；但当引入其他不确定性来源时，它们的性能会下降甚至变得误导。不同不确定性来源对UQ方法的有效性有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了需要开发能够明确考虑不确定性来源的不确定性感知方法，以更好地支持大型语言模型的安全有效使用。

title: Mild Over-Parameterization Benefits Asymmetric Tensor PCA
summary: Asymmetric Tensor PCA (ATPCA) is a prototypical model for studying the trade-offs between sample complexity, computation, and memory. Existing algorithms for this problem typically require at least $d^{\left\lceil\overline{k}/2\right\rceil}$ state memory cost to recover the signal, where $d$ is the vector dimension and $\overline{k}$ is the tensor order. We focus on the setting where $\overline{k} \geq 4$ is even and consider (stochastic) gradient descent-based algorithms under a limited memory budget, which permits only mild over-parameterization of the model. We propose a matrix-parameterized method (in $d^{2}$ state memory cost) using a novel three-phase alternating-update algorithm to address the problem and demonstrate how mild over-parameterization facilitates learning in two key aspects: (i) it improves sample efficiency, allowing our method to achieve \emph{near-optimal} $d^{\overline{k}-2}$ sample complexity in our limited memory setting; and (ii) it enhances adaptivity to problem structure, a previously unrecognized phenomenon, where the required sample size naturally decreases as consecutive vectors become more aligned, and in the symmetric limit attains $d^{\overline{k}/2}$, matching the \emph{best} known polynomial-time complexity. To our knowledge, this is the \emph{first} tractable algorithm for ATPCA with $d^{\overline{k}}$-independent memory costs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于矩阵参数化的三阶段交替更新算法，用于解决非对称张量主成分分析问题，在有限内存预算下实现了接近最优的样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有ATPCA算法通常需要至少d^{⌈k̄/2⌉}的内存成本来恢复信号，这在内存受限场景下不可行。本文旨在开发一种内存成本与d^{k̄}无关的可行算法。
AI.method: 提出矩阵参数化方法（d²内存成本），采用新颖的三阶段交替更新算法，在有限内存预算下利用适度过参数化来促进学习。
AI.result: 该方法在有限内存设置下实现了接近最优的d^{k̄-2}样本复杂度，并且在对称极限情况下达到d^{k̄/2}样本复杂度，匹配已知最佳多项式时间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 这是第一个具有d^{k̄}无关内存成本的ATPCA可行算法，展示了适度过参数化在提高样本效率和适应问题结构方面的双重优势。

title: Training-Free Object-Background Compositional T2I via Dynamic Spatial Guidance and Multi-Path Pruning
summary: Existing text-to-image diffusion models, while excelling at subject synthesis, exhibit a persistent foreground bias that treats the background as a passive and under-optimized byproduct. This imbalance compromises global scene coherence and constrains compositional control. To address the limitation, we propose a training-free framework that restructures diffusion sampling to explicitly account for foreground-background interactions. Our approach consists of two key components. First, Dynamic Spatial Guidance introduces a soft, time step dependent gating mechanism that modulates foreground and background attention during the diffusion process, enabling spatially balanced generation. Second, Multi-Path Pruning performs multi-path latent exploration and dynamically filters candidate trajectories using both internal attention statistics and external semantic alignment signals, retaining trajectories that better satisfy object-background constraints. We further develop a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate object-background compositionality. Extensive evaluations across multiple diffusion backbones demonstrate consistent improvements in background coherence and object-background compositional alignment.

AI.tldr: 提出训练免费框架，通过动态空间引导和多路径剪枝来改善扩散模型中前景-背景的平衡与交互，提升场景连贯性和构图控制。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型存在持续的前景偏见，将背景视为被动和未优化的副产品，这种不平衡损害了全局场景连贯性并限制了构图控制。
AI.method: 包含两个关键组件：1) 动态空间引导 - 引入软性的时间步依赖门控机制，在扩散过程中调节前景和背景注意力，实现空间平衡生成；2) 多路径剪枝 - 执行多路径潜在探索，使用内部注意力统计和外部语义对齐信号动态筛选候选轨迹，保留更好满足对象-背景约束的轨迹。
AI.result: 在多个扩散骨干模型上进行广泛评估，证明在背景连贯性和对象-背景构图对齐方面取得一致改进。还开发了专门评估对象-背景构图性的基准。
AI.conclusion: 提出的训练免费框架通过显式考虑前景-背景交互来重构扩散采样，有效解决了扩散模型中的前景偏见问题，提升了场景生成的质量和构图控制能力。

title: GLEaN: A Text-to-image Bias Detection Approach for Public Comprehension
summary: Text-to-image (T2I) models, and their encoded biases, increasingly shape the visual media the public encounters. While researchers have produced a rich body of work on bias measurement, auditing, and mitigation in T2I systems, those methods largely target technical stakeholders, leaving a gap in public legibility. We introduce GLEaN (Generative Likeness Evaluation at N-Scale), a portrait-based explainability pipeline designed to make T2I model biases visually understandable to a broad audience. GLEaN comprises three stages: automated large-scale image generation from identity prompts, facial landmark-based filtering and spatial alignment, and median-pixel composition that distills a model's central tendency into a single representative portrait. The resulting composites require no statistical background to interpret; a viewer can see, at a glance, who a model 'imagines' when prompted with 'a doctor' versus a 'felon.' We demonstrate GLEaN on Stable Diffusion XL across 40 social and occupational identity prompts, producing composites that reproduce documented biases and surface new associations between skin tone and predicted emotion. We find in a between-subjects user study (N = 291) that GLEaN portraits communicate biases as effectively as conventional data tables, but require significantly less viewing time. Because the method relies solely on generated outputs, it can also be replicated on any black-box and closed-weight systems without access to model internals. GLEaN offers a scalable, model-agnostic approach to bias explainability, purpose-built for public comprehension, and is publicly available at https://github.com/cultureiolab/GLEaN.

AI.tldr: GLEaN是一个面向公众的可解释性工具，通过生成代表性肖像来可视化文本到图像模型的偏见，无需统计背景即可理解。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I模型偏见测量、审计和缓解方法主要面向技术专家，缺乏公众可理解性，需要一种能让大众直观理解模型偏见的工具。
AI.method: GLEaN包含三阶段：1) 从身份提示自动大规模生成图像；2) 基于面部关键点过滤和空间对齐；3) 中值像素合成，将模型中心趋势提炼为单一代表性肖像。
AI.result: 在Stable Diffusion XL上测试40个社会职业身份提示，复现已知偏见并发现肤色与预测情绪的新关联。用户研究(N=291)显示GLEaN肖像与传统数据表传达偏见效果相当，但观看时间显著减少。
AI.conclusion: GLEaN提供了一种可扩展、模型无关的偏见可解释性方法，专为公众理解设计，适用于黑盒和闭源系统，无需访问模型内部。

title: Structure-Grounded Knowledge Retrieval via Code Dependencies for Multi-Step Data Reasoning
summary: Selecting the right knowledge is critical when using large language models (LLMs) to solve domain-specific data analysis tasks. However, most retrieval-augmented approaches rely primarily on lexical or embedding similarity, which is often a weak proxy for the task-critical knowledge needed for multi-step reasoning. In many such tasks, the relevant knowledge is not merely textually related to the query, but is instead grounded in executable code and the dependency structure through which computations are carried out. To address this mismatch, we propose SGKR (Structure-Grounded Knowledge Retrieval), a retrieval framework that organizes domain knowledge with a graph induced by function-call dependencies. Given a question, SGKR extracts semantic input and output tags, identifies dependency paths connecting them, and constructs a task-relevant subgraph. The associated knowledge and corresponding function implementations are then assembled as a structured context for LLM-based code generation. Experiments on multi-step data analysis benchmarks show that SGKR consistently improves solution correctness over no-retrieval and similarity-based retrieval baselines for both vanilla LLMs and coding agents.

AI.tldr: SGKR：基于结构的知识检索框架，通过函数调用依赖图组织领域知识，提升LLM在数据分析任务中的代码生成能力
AI.motivation: 现有检索增强方法主要依赖词法或嵌入相似性，但这在多步推理任务中往往不是任务关键知识的最佳代理。相关知识通常基于可执行代码和计算依赖结构，而非仅与查询文本相关。
AI.method: 提出SGKR（Structure-Grounded Knowledge Retrieval）框架：1）用函数调用依赖图组织领域知识；2）给定问题，提取语义输入输出标签；3）识别连接这些标签的依赖路径；4）构建任务相关子图；5）将关联知识和函数实现组装为结构化上下文供LLM代码生成。
AI.result: 在多步数据分析基准测试中，SGKR相比无检索和基于相似性的检索基线，在普通LLM和编码代理上都持续提高了解决方案的正确性。
AI.conclusion: 基于结构的知识检索比传统相似性检索更有效，能够为LLM提供任务相关的结构化上下文，显著提升多步数据分析任务的代码生成质量。

title: Exploring the impact of fairness-aware criteria in AutoML
summary: Machine Learning (ML) systems are increasingly used to support decision-making processes that affect individuals. However, these systems often rely on biased data, which can lead to unfair outcomes against specific groups. With the growing adoption of Automated Machine Learning (AutoML), the risk of intensifying discriminatory behaviours increases, as most frameworks primarily focus on model selection to maximise predictive performance. Previous research on fairness in AutoML had largely followed this trend, integrating fairness awareness only in the model selection or hyperparameter tuning, while neglecting other critical stages of the ML pipeline. This paper aims to study the impact of integrating fairness directly into the optimisation component of an AutoML framework that constructs complete ML pipelines, from data selection and transformations to model selection and tuning. As selecting appropriate fairness metrics remains a key challenge, our work incorporates complementary fairness metrics to capture different dimensions of fairness during the optimisation. Their integration within AutoML resulted in measurable differences compared to a baseline focused solely on predictive performance. Despite a 9.4% decrease in predictive power, the average fairness improved by 14.5%, accompanied by a 35.7% reduction in data usage. Furthermore, fairness integration produced complete yet simpler final solutions, suggesting that model complexity is not always required to achieve balanced and fair ML solutions.

AI.tldr: 该研究将公平性指标整合到AutoML框架的优化组件中，通过构建完整的ML流水线（从数据选择到模型调优），在保持预测性能的同时显著提升公平性，并减少数据使用和模型复杂度。
AI.motivation: 随着AutoML的广泛应用，现有框架主要关注最大化预测性能而忽视公平性，可能导致歧视性结果加剧。先前研究仅将公平性整合到模型选择或超参数调优阶段，忽略了ML流水线的其他关键环节。
AI.method: 将公平性直接整合到AutoML框架的优化组件中，构建完整的ML流水线（包括数据选择、数据转换、模型选择和调优）。采用互补的公平性指标来捕捉公平性的不同维度，并在优化过程中综合考虑这些指标。
AI.result: 与仅关注预测性能的基线相比，公平性整合导致预测性能下降9.4%，但平均公平性提升14.5%，数据使用减少35.7%。同时产生了更简单但完整的最终解决方案，表明实现平衡和公平的ML解决方案不一定需要复杂的模型。
AI.conclusion: 将公平性整合到AutoML的优化过程中可以有效改善ML系统的公平性，同时减少数据使用和模型复杂度。这为开发更公平、更高效的AutoML系统提供了新方向，表明模型复杂度并非实现公平ML解决方案的必要条件。

title: Do vision models perceive illusory motion in static images like humans?
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Workshops (Findings). * Equal contribution
summary: Understanding human motion processing is essential for building reliable, human-centered computer vision systems. Although deep neural networks (DNNs) achieve strong performance in optical flow estimation, they remain less robust than humans and rely on fundamentally different computational strategies. Visual motion illusions provide a powerful probe into these mechanisms, revealing how human and machine vision align or diverge. While recent DNN-based motion models can reproduce dynamic illusions such as reverse-phi, it remains unclear whether they can perceive illusory motion in static images, exemplified by the Rotating Snakes illusion. We evaluate several representative optical flow models on Rotating Snakes and show that most fail to generate flow fields consistent with human perception. Under simulated conditions mimicking saccadic eye movements, only the human-inspired Dual-Channel model exhibits the expected rotational motion, with the closest correspondence emerging during the saccade simulation. Ablation analyses further reveal that both luminance-based and higher-order color--feature--based motion signals contribute to this behavior and that a recurrent attention mechanism is critical for integrating local cues. Our results highlight a substantial gap between current optical-flow models and human visual motion processing, and offer insights for developing future motion-estimation systems with improved correspondence to human perception and human-centric AI.

AI.tldr: 论文评估了当前光流模型在感知静态图像中的运动错觉（如旋转蛇错觉）方面的能力，发现大多数模型与人类感知不一致，只有受人类启发的双通道模型在模拟眼动条件下表现出预期的旋转运动。
AI.motivation: 理解人类运动处理对于构建可靠、以人为中心的计算机视觉系统至关重要。尽管深度神经网络在光流估计方面表现出色，但它们仍不如人类稳健，且依赖不同的计算策略。视觉运动错觉是探究这些机制的强大工具，能揭示人类与机器视觉的异同。
AI.method: 评估了几种代表性光流模型在旋转蛇错觉上的表现，在模拟眼动条件下测试模型，进行了消融分析以确定关键组件（如亮度信号、高阶颜色特征信号和循环注意力机制）的作用。
AI.result: 大多数光流模型无法生成与人类感知一致的流场。只有在模拟眼动条件下，受人类启发的双通道模型表现出预期的旋转运动，且最接近人类感知的情况出现在模拟扫视期间。消融分析显示亮度信号和高阶颜色特征信号都对此行为有贡献，循环注意力机制对整合局部线索至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 当前光流模型与人类视觉运动处理之间存在显著差距。研究结果为开发更符合人类感知和以人为中心AI的未来运动估计系统提供了见解，强调了整合人类视觉机制（如双通道处理和注意力机制）的重要性。

title: HealthAdminBench: Evaluating Computer-Use Agents on Healthcare Administration Tasks
comment: 24 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Benchmark paper introducing 4 simulated environments, 135 tasks, and 1,698 evaluation points for healthcare administrative computer-use agents
summary: Healthcare administration accounts for over $1 trillion in annual spending, making it a promising target for LLM-based computer-use agents (CUAs). While clinical applications of LLMs have received significant attention, no benchmark exists for evaluating CUAs on end-to-end administrative workflows. To address this gap, we introduce HealthAdminBench, a benchmark comprising four realistic GUI environments: an EHR, two payer portals, and a fax system, and 135 expert-defined tasks spanning three administrative task types: Prior Authorization, Appeals and Denials Management, and Durable Medical Equipment (DME) Order Processing. Each task is decomposed into fine-grained, verifiable subtasks, yielding 1,698 evaluation points. We evaluate seven agent configurations under multiple prompting and observation settings and find that, despite strong subtask performance, end-to-end reliability remains low: the best-performing agent (Claude Opus 4.6 CUA) achieves only 36.3 percent task success, while GPT-5.4 CUA attains the highest subtask success rate (82.8 percent). These results reveal a substantial gap between current agent capabilities and the demands of real-world administrative workflows. HealthAdminBench provides a rigorous foundation for evaluating progress toward safe and reliable automation of healthcare administrative workflows.

AI.tldr: HealthAdminBench：首个用于评估LLM医疗管理代理的基准，包含4个GUI环境和135个专家定义任务，测试显示当前代理在端到端工作流中成功率仅36.3%，存在显著能力差距。
AI.motivation: 医疗管理每年支出超1万亿美元，是LLM计算机使用代理的潜在应用领域。虽然LLM在临床应用受到关注，但缺乏评估端到端管理工作流的基准。
AI.method: 创建HealthAdminBench基准，包含4个真实GUI环境（EHR、两个支付方门户、传真系统）和135个专家定义任务，涵盖三大管理任务类型。每个任务分解为可验证的细粒度子任务，共1698个评估点。评估了7种代理配置在多种提示和观察设置下的表现。
AI.result: 尽管子任务表现良好，但端到端可靠性仍然很低：最佳代理（Claude Opus 4.6 CUA）仅达到36.3%的任务成功率，而GPT-5.4 CUA获得最高子任务成功率（82.8%）。
AI.conclusion: 当前代理能力与真实世界医疗管理工作流需求之间存在显著差距。HealthAdminBench为评估医疗管理工作流自动化进展提供了严谨基础。

title: ReFEree: Reference-Free and Fine-Grained Method for Evaluating Factual Consistency in Real-World Code Summarization
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) have become capable of generating long and descriptive code summaries, accurate and reliable evaluation of factual consistency has become a critical challenge. However, previous evaluation methods are primarily designed for short summaries of isolated code snippets. Consequently, they struggle to provide fine-grained evaluation of multi-sentence functionalities and fail to accurately assess dependency context commonly found in real-world code summaries. To address this, we propose ReFEree, a reference-free and fine-grained method for evaluating factual consistency in real-world code summaries. We define factual inconsistency criteria specific to code summaries and evaluate them at the segment level using these criteria along with dependency information. These segment-level results are then aggregated into a fine-grained score. We construct a code summarization benchmark with human-annotated factual consistency labels. The evaluation results demonstrate that ReFEree achieves the highest correlation with human judgment among 13 baselines, improving 15-18% over the previous state-of-the-art. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/bsy99615/ReFEree.git.

AI.tldr: ReFEree：一种无需参考、细粒度的代码摘要事实一致性评估方法，针对真实世界代码摘要中的多句子功能和依赖上下文进行评估，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型能够生成长而详细的代码摘要，准确可靠的事实一致性评估变得至关重要。现有方法主要针对孤立代码片段的简短摘要，难以评估多句子功能，也无法准确评估真实世界代码摘要中常见的依赖上下文。
AI.method: 提出ReFEree方法：1) 定义代码摘要特有的不一致性标准；2) 使用这些标准和依赖信息在片段级别进行评估；3) 将片段级结果聚合为细粒度分数。构建了带有人工标注事实一致性标签的代码摘要基准数据集。
AI.result: 在13个基线方法中，ReFEree与人类判断的相关性最高，比之前最先进方法提高了15-18%。构建的基准数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ReFEree有效解决了真实世界代码摘要的事实一致性评估问题，通过细粒度的片段级评估和依赖上下文考虑，显著提升了评估准确性，为代码摘要质量评估提供了可靠工具。

title: A Multi-head Attention Fusion Network for Industrial Prognostics under Discrete Operational Conditions
summary: Complex systems such as aircraft engines, turbines, and industrial machinery often operate under dynamically changing conditions. These varying operating conditions can substantially influence degradation behavior and make prognostic modeling more challenging, as accurate prediction requires explicit consideration of operational effects. To address this issue, this paper proposes a novel multi-head attention-based fusion neural network. The proposed framework explicitly models and integrates three signal components: (1) the monotonic degradation trend, which reflects the underlying deterioration of the system; (2) discrete operating states, identified through clustering and encoded into dense embeddings; and (3) residual random noise, which captures unexplained variation in sensor measurements. The core strength of the framework lies in its architecture, which combines BiLSTM networks with attention mechanisms to better capture complex temporal dependencies. The attention mechanism allows the model to adaptively weight different time steps and sensor signals, improving its ability to extract prognostically relevant information. In addition, a fusion module is designed to integrate the outputs from the degradation-trend branch and the operating-state embeddings, enabling the model to capture their interactions more effectively. The proposed method is validated using a dataset from the NASA repository, and the results demonstrate its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于多头注意力的融合神经网络，用于动态工况下的设备退化预测，通过建模退化趋势、工况状态和随机噪声三个信号分量，提高预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统（如航空发动机、涡轮机等）在动态变化的工况下运行，这些变化的工况会显著影响退化行为，使预测建模更具挑战性，因为准确的预测需要明确考虑工况影响。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的多头注意力融合神经网络框架，明确建模并整合三个信号分量：1）单调退化趋势（反映系统基础退化）；2）离散工况状态（通过聚类识别并编码为密集嵌入）；3）残差随机噪声（捕捉传感器测量中的未解释变异）。核心架构结合BiLSTM网络和注意力机制，以更好地捕捉复杂的时间依赖性。注意力机制使模型能够自适应地加权不同时间步长和传感器信号，提高提取预测相关信息的能力。此外，设计了一个融合模块来整合退化趋势分支和工况状态嵌入的输出，使模型能更有效地捕捉它们的交互作用。
AI.result: 使用NASA数据集验证了所提出的方法，结果证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过明确建模退化趋势、工况状态和随机噪声，并利用注意力机制和融合模块有效整合这些信息，能够提高动态工况下复杂系统退化预测的准确性。

title: FF3R: Feedforward Feature 3D Reconstruction from Unconstrained views
summary: Recent advances in vision foundation models have revolutionized geometry reconstruction and semantic understanding. Yet, most of the existing approaches treat these capabilities in isolation, leading to redundant pipelines and compounded errors. This paper introduces FF3R, a fully annotation-free feed-forward framework that unifies geometric and semantic reasoning from unconstrained multi-view image sequences. Unlike previous methods, FF3R does not require camera poses, depth maps, or semantic labels, relying solely on rendering supervision for RGB and feature maps, establishing a scalable paradigm for unified 3D reasoning. In addition, we address two critical challenges in feedforward feature reconstruction pipelines, namely global semantic inconsistency and local structural inconsistency, through two key innovations: (i) a Token-wise Fusion Module that enriches geometry tokens with semantic context via cross-attention, and (ii) a Semantic-Geometry Mutual Boosting mechanism combining geometry-guided feature warping for global consistency with semantic-aware voxelization for local coherence. Extensive experiments on ScanNet and DL3DV-10K demonstrate FF3R's superior performance in novel-view synthesis, open-vocabulary semantic segmentation, and depth estimation, with strong generalization to in-the-wild scenarios, paving the way for embodied intelligence systems that demand both spatial and semantic understanding.

AI.tldr: FF3R是一个无需标注的前馈框架，统一了从多视角图像序列进行几何和语义推理，无需相机位姿、深度图或语义标签，通过渲染监督实现可扩展的3D推理。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉基础模型通常将几何重建和语义理解分开处理，导致冗余的流程和累积误差。需要一种统一的方法来同时处理几何和语义推理，以支持需要空间和语义理解的具身智能系统。
AI.method: FF3R采用完全无标注的前馈框架，仅依赖RGB和特征图的渲染监督。通过两个关键创新解决前馈特征重建中的挑战：1) Token-wise Fusion Module通过交叉注意力用语义上下文丰富几何token；2) Semantic-Geometry Mutual Boosting机制结合几何引导的特征扭曲实现全局一致性，以及语义感知的体素化实现局部一致性。
AI.result: 在ScanNet和DL3DV-10K数据集上的大量实验表明，FF3R在新视角合成、开放词汇语义分割和深度估计方面表现出优越性能，并且对野外场景具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: FF3R为统一的3D推理建立了可扩展的范式，为需要同时具备空间和语义理解的具身智能系统铺平了道路。

title: New Hybrid Fine-Tuning Paradigm for LLMs: Algorithm Design and Convergence Analysis Framework
summary: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) typically involves either full fine-tuning, which updates all model parameters, or Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT), which adjusts a small subset of parameters. However, both approaches have inherent limitations: full fine-tuning is computationally expensive, while PEFT often struggles to learn new knowledge and exhibits suboptimal performance. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel hybrid fine-tuning approach that jointly updates both LLMs and PEFT modules using a combination of zeroth-order and first-order optimization methods. To analyze our new algorithm, we develop a theoretical framework centered on the concept of hybrid smoothness condition, which accounts for the heterogeneous nature of the optimization landscape in joint LLM and PEFT training. We derive a rigorous convergence analysis for the convergence of reshuffling-type SGD algorithm under multiple learning rates and demonstrate its effectiveness through extensive empirical studies across various downstream tasks and model architectures. On the practical side, our results demonstrate consistent performance improvement, making the approach a viable solution for large-scale language model fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合零阶和一阶优化的混合微调方法，联合更新LLM和PEFT模块，解决全微调计算成本高和PEFT学习新知识能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM微调方法存在局限性：全微调计算成本高，而参数高效微调(PEFT)在学习新知识和性能表现上存在不足。需要一种既能保持计算效率又能提升性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出混合微调方法，使用零阶和一阶优化方法联合更新LLM和PEFT模块。建立基于混合平滑条件的理论框架，分析多学习率下重排型SGD算法的收敛性。
AI.result: 理论分析证明了算法收敛性，实证研究在各种下游任务和模型架构上显示出一致的性能提升，成为大规模语言模型微调的可行解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合微调方法有效解决了传统微调方法的局限性，在理论和实践层面都表现出优越性，为大规模语言模型微调提供了高效且性能优异的替代方案。

title: Lost in Diffusion: Uncovering Hallucination Patterns and Failure Modes in Diffusion Large Language Models
summary: While Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) have emerged as a promising non-autoregressive paradigm comparable to autoregressive (AR) models, their faithfulness, specifically regarding hallucination, remains largely underexplored. To bridge this gap, we present the first controlled comparative study to evaluate hallucination patterns in dLLMs. Our results demonstrate that current dLLMs exhibit a higher propensity for hallucination than AR counterparts controlled for architecture, scale, and pre-training weights. Furthermore, an analysis of inference-time compute reveals divergent dynamics: while quasi-autoregressive generation suffers from early saturation, non-sequential decoding unlocks potential for continuous refinement. Finally, we identify distinct failure modes unique to the diffusion process, including premature termination, incomplete denoising, and context intrusion. Our findings underscore that although dLLMs have narrowed the performance gap on general tasks, their distinct hallucination mechanisms pose a critical challenge to model reliability. Our code is available at https://github.com/ZeroLoss-Lab/Lost-in-Diffusion

AI.tldr: dLLMs比AR模型更容易产生幻觉，其独特的扩散过程导致不同的失败模式，对模型可靠性构成挑战
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型(dLLMs)作为非自回归范式展现出潜力，但其幻觉问题尚未得到充分研究，需要与自回归模型进行对比分析
AI.method: 进行首个受控比较研究，评估dLLMs的幻觉模式，分析推理计算动态，识别扩散过程特有的失败模式
AI.result: 当前dLLMs比AR模型更容易产生幻觉；准自回归生成早期饱和，非顺序解码有持续优化潜力；发现扩散过程特有的失败模式：提前终止、不完全去噪和上下文侵入
AI.conclusion: 虽然dLLMs在一般任务上缩小了性能差距，但其独特的幻觉机制对模型可靠性构成关键挑战

title: The Phase Is the Gradient: Equilibrium Propagation for Frequency Learning in Kuramoto Networks
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, 8 tables. Code and data at https://github.com/caliburlabs/phasegrad
summary: We prove that in a coupled Kuramoto oscillator network at stable equilibrium, the physical phase displacement under weak output nudging is the gradient of the loss with respect to natural frequencies, with equality as the nudging strength beta tends to zero. Prior oscillator equilibrium propagation work explicitly set aside natural frequency as a learnable parameter; we show that on sparse layered architectures, frequency learning outperforms coupling-weight learning among converged seeds (96.0% vs. 83.3% at matched parameter counts, p = 1.8e-12). The approximately 50% convergence failure rate under random initialization is a loss-landscape property, not a gradient error; topology-aware spectral seeding eliminates it in all settings tested (46/100 to 100/100 seeds on the primary task; 50/50 on a second task, K-only training, and a larger architecture).

AI.tldr: 在耦合Kuramoto振荡器网络中，物理相位位移在弱输出引导下是损失函数关于自然频率的梯度，当引导强度趋于零时相等。在稀疏分层架构中，频率学习优于耦合权重学习。
AI.motivation: 先前的研究将自然频率排除在可学习参数之外，本文旨在探索自然频率作为可学习参数在振荡器网络中的潜力，并解决随机初始化下的收敛失败问题。
AI.method: 通过理论证明在稳定平衡点下，弱输出引导时的物理相位位移是损失函数关于自然频率的梯度。在稀疏分层架构中比较频率学习和耦合权重学习，并采用拓扑感知的谱初始化方法解决收敛问题。
AI.result: 频率学习在匹配参数数量下显著优于耦合权重学习（96.0% vs 83.3%，p=1.8e-12）。拓扑感知谱初始化将收敛失败率从约50%降至0%，在主要任务中从46/100提升到100/100，在其他设置中也达到完美收敛。
AI.conclusion: 自然频率是有效的可学习参数，在振荡器网络中优于耦合权重学习。收敛失败是损失景观特性而非梯度误差，拓扑感知谱初始化能有效解决此问题。

title: PAS: Estimating the target accuracy before domain adaptation
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026
summary: The goal of domain adaptation is to make predictions for unlabeled samples from a target domain with the help of labeled samples from a different but related source domain. The performance of domain adaptation methods is highly influenced by the choice of source domain and pre-trained feature extractor. However, the selection of source data and pre-trained model is not trivial due to the absence of a labeled validation set for the target domain and the large number of available pre-trained models. In this work, we propose PAS, a novel score designed to estimate the transferability of a source domain set and a pre-trained feature extractor to a target classification task before actually performing domain adaptation. PAS leverages the generalization power of pre-trained models and assesses source-target compatibility based on the pre-trained feature embeddings. We integrate PAS into a framework that indicates the most relevant pre-trained model and source domain among multiple candidates, thus improving target accuracy while reducing the computational overhead. Extensive experiments on image classification benchmarks demonstrate that PAS correlates strongly with actual target accuracy and consistently guides the selection of the best-performing pre-trained model and source domain for adaptation.

AI.tldr: PAS是一种评估源域数据和预训练特征提取器到目标分类任务可迁移性的新评分方法，无需实际执行域适应即可选择最佳源域和预训练模型。
AI.motivation: 域适应方法的性能高度依赖于源域选择和预训练特征提取器，但由于目标域缺乏标注验证集且可用预训练模型众多，选择过程非常困难。
AI.method: 提出PAS评分方法，利用预训练模型的泛化能力，基于预训练特征嵌入评估源域与目标域的兼容性，并将其集成到框架中从多个候选中选择最相关的预训练模型和源域。
AI.result: 在图像分类基准上的大量实验表明，PAS与实际目标准确率强相关，能一致地指导选择性能最佳的预训练模型和源域进行适应。
AI.conclusion: PAS提供了一种有效评估源域和预训练模型可迁移性的方法，能在减少计算开销的同时提高目标准确率，解决了域适应中源域和模型选择的难题。

title: FinTrace: Holistic Trajectory-Level Evaluation of LLM Tool Calling for Long-Horizon Financial Tasks
summary: Recent studies demonstrate that tool-calling capability enables large language models (LLMs) to interact with external environments for long-horizon financial tasks. While existing benchmarks have begun evaluating financial tool calling, they focus on limited scenarios and rely on call-level metrics that fail to capture trajectory-level reasoning quality. To address this gap, we introduce FinTrace, a benchmark comprising 800 expert-annotated trajectories spanning 34 real-world financial task categories across multiple difficulty levels. FinTrace employs a rubric-based evaluation protocol with nine metrics organized along four axes -- action correctness, execution efficiency, process quality, and output quality -- enabling fine-grained assessment of LLM tool-calling behavior. Our evaluation of 13 LLMs reveals that while frontier models achieve strong tool selection, all models struggle with information utilization and final answer quality, exposing a critical gap between invoking the right tools and reasoning effectively over their outputs. To move beyond diagnosis, we construct FinTrace-Training, the first trajectory-level preference dataset for financial tool-calling, containing 8,196 curated trajectories with tool-augmented contexts and preference pairs. We fine-tune Qwen-3.5-9B using supervised fine-tuning followed by direct preference optimization (DPO) and show that training on FinTrace-Training consistently improves intermediate reasoning metrics, with DPO more effectively suppressing failure modes. However, end-to-end answer quality remains a bottleneck, indicating that trajectory-level improvements do not yet fully propagate to final output quality.

AI.tldr: FinTrace：首个轨迹级金融工具调用基准，包含800条专家标注轨迹，评估13个LLM发现模型在信息利用和最终答案质量上存在显著差距，并构建了首个轨迹级偏好数据集FinTrace-Training用于模型优化。
AI.motivation: 现有金融工具调用基准局限于有限场景，依赖调用级指标，无法捕捉轨迹级推理质量。需要更全面的评估框架来诊断LLM在金融工具调用中的真实能力差距。
AI.method: 1) 构建FinTrace基准：800条专家标注轨迹，涵盖34个真实世界金融任务类别和多个难度级别；2) 设计基于量规的评估协议：9个指标沿4个维度（动作正确性、执行效率、过程质量、输出质量）；3) 构建FinTrace-Training数据集：8,196条精选轨迹，包含工具增强上下文和偏好对；4) 使用监督微调(SFT)和直接偏好优化(DPO)微调Qwen-3.5-9B模型。
AI.result: 评估13个LLM显示：前沿模型在工具选择上表现良好，但所有模型在信息利用和最终答案质量上均存在困难；使用FinTrace-Training训练能持续改善中间推理指标，DPO能更有效抑制失败模式；但端到端答案质量仍是瓶颈，轨迹级改进尚未完全转化为最终输出质量提升。
AI.conclusion: FinTrace揭示了LLM金融工具调用中工具选择与有效推理之间的关键差距；轨迹级偏好训练能改善中间推理，但最终答案质量仍需突破；需要更先进的训练方法来弥合轨迹级改进与最终输出质量之间的差距。

title: LLMs Should Incorporate Explicit Mechanisms for Human Empathy
summary: This paper argues that Large Language Models (LLMs) should incorporate explicit mechanisms for human empathy. As LLMs become increasingly deployed in high-stakes human-centered settings, their success depends not only on correctness or fluency but on faithful preservation of human perspectives. Yet, current LLMs systematically fail at this requirement: even when well-aligned and policy-compliant, they often attenuate affect, misrepresent contextual salience, and rigidify relational stance in ways that distort meaning. We formalize empathy as an observable behavioral property: the capacity to model and respond to human perspectives while preserving intention, affect, and context. Under this framing, we identify four recurring mechanisms of empathic failure in contemporary LLMs--sentiment attenuation, empathic granularity mismatch, conflict avoidance, and linguistic distancing--arising as structural consequences of prevailing training and alignment practices. We further organize these failures along three dimensions: cognitive, cultural, and relational empathy, to explain their manifestation across tasks. Empirical analyses show that strong benchmark performance can mask systematic empathic distortions, motivating empathy-aware objectives, benchmarks, and training signals as first-class components of LLM development.

AI.tldr: 论文主张大语言模型应加入显式的人类共情机制，因为当前模型在保留人类视角方面存在系统性失败，即使表现良好也会扭曲意义。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型越来越多地部署在高风险的人类中心场景中，其成功不仅取决于正确性或流畅性，更在于忠实保留人类视角。然而当前模型在这方面存在系统性失败，即使对齐良好且符合政策，也会衰减情感、误判情境显著性、僵化关系立场，从而扭曲意义。
AI.method: 将共情形式化为可观察的行为属性：建模和回应人类视角同时保留意图、情感和情境的能力。识别了当代大语言模型中四种共情失败机制：情感衰减、共情粒度不匹配、冲突回避和语言疏离，并将其组织到认知、文化和关系共情三个维度进行分析。
AI.result: 实证分析表明，强大的基准性能可能掩盖系统性的共情扭曲，这促使需要将共情感知的目标、基准和训练信号作为大语言模型开发的一等组件。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型需要显式的共情机制，当前训练和对齐实践存在结构性缺陷导致共情失败，需要将共情感知作为模型开发的核心组成部分。

title: A Diffusion-Contrastive Graph Neural Network with Virtual Nodes for Wind Nowcasting in Unobserved Regions
summary: Accurate weather nowcasting remains one of the central challenges in atmospheric science, with critical implications for climate resilience, energy security, and disaster preparedness. Since it is not feasible to deploy observation stations everywhere, some regions lack dense observational networks, resulting in unreliable short-term wind predictions across those unobserved areas. Here we present a deep graph self-supervised framework that extends nowcasting capability into such unobserved regions without requiring new sensors. Our approach introduces "virtual nodes" into a diffusion and contrastive-based graph neural network, enabling the model to learn wind condition (i.e., speed, direction and gusts) in places with no direct measurements. Using high-temporal resolution weather station data across the Netherlands, we demonstrate that this approach reduces nowcast mean absolute error (MAE) of wind speed, gusts, and direction in unobserved regions by more than 30% - 46% compared with interpolation and regression methods. By enabling localized nowcasts where no measurements exist, this method opens new pathways for renewable energy integration, agricultural planning, and early-warning systems in data-sparse regions.

AI.tldr: 提出基于图神经网络的自监督框架，通过虚拟节点在无观测区域实现风速、阵风和风向的准确临近预报，相比传统方法误差降低30-46%
AI.motivation: 由于无法在所有地区部署观测站，一些区域缺乏密集的观测网络，导致这些无观测区域的短期风预测不可靠，影响了气候韧性、能源安全和灾害准备
AI.method: 提出深度图自监督框架，在基于扩散和对比学习的图神经网络中引入"虚拟节点"，使模型能够在没有直接测量的地方学习风况（速度、方向和阵风）
AI.result: 使用荷兰高时间分辨率气象站数据，该方法将无观测区域的风速、阵风和风向临近预报的平均绝对误差（MAE）相比插值和回归方法降低了30-46%
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够在没有测量的地方实现本地化临近预报，为数据稀疏地区的可再生能源整合、农业规划和预警系统开辟了新途径

title: DINO_4D: Semantic-Aware 4D Reconstruction
summary: In the intersection of computer vision and robotic perception, 4D reconstruction of dynamic scenes serve as the critical bridge connecting low-level geometric sensing with high-level semantic understanding. We present DINO\_4D, introducing frozen DINOv3 features as structural priors, injecting semantic awareness into the reconstruction process to effectively suppress semantic drift during dynamic tracking. Experiments on the Point Odyssey and TUM-Dynamics benchmarks demonstrate that our method maintains the linear time complexity $O(T)$ of its predecessors while significantly improving Tracking Accuracy (APD) and Reconstruction Completeness. DINO\_4D establishes a new paradigm for constructing 4D World Models that possess both geometric precision and semantic understanding.

AI.tldr: DINO_4D利用冻结的DINOv3特征作为结构先验，将语义感知注入动态场景的4D重建过程，有效抑制语义漂移，在保持线性时间复杂度的同时显著提升跟踪精度和重建完整性。
AI.motivation: 在计算机视觉和机器人感知的交叉领域，动态场景的4D重建是连接低层几何感知与高层语义理解的关键桥梁。现有方法在动态跟踪过程中容易出现语义漂移问题，需要将语义感知注入重建过程。
AI.method: 提出DINO_4D方法，引入冻结的DINOv3特征作为结构先验，将语义感知注入动态场景的4D重建过程。该方法保持了前驱方法的线性时间复杂度O(T)，同时有效抑制语义漂移。
AI.result: 在Point Odyssey和TUM-Dynamics基准测试上的实验表明，DINO_4D在保持线性时间复杂度的同时，显著提高了跟踪精度(APD)和重建完整性，建立了新的性能标准。
AI.conclusion: DINO_4D为构建既具有几何精度又具备语义理解的4D世界模型建立了新范式，通过语义先验有效解决了动态场景重建中的语义漂移问题。

title: AI Achieves a Perfect LSAT Score
summary: This paper reports the first documented instance of a language model achieving a perfect score on an officially disclosed Law School Admission Test (LSAT). Controlled experiments on eight reasoning models show that varying the prompt, shuffling answer choices, and sampling multiple responses have no meaningful effect as drivers of performance. Ablating the thinking phase that models generate before answering, however, lowers frontier accuracy by up to 8 percentage points, predominantly in logical reasoning. Distilled models produce full thinking traces in the same format yet plateau far below frontier performance. A pilot process reward model fine-tuned via QLoRA on official LSAT explanations narrows this gap through Best-of-5 selection, with gains again predominantly in logical reasoning. The gatekeeper of elite legal education since 1948, the LSAT has not merely been passed but answered without a single error by models that reason. The upper bound of the cognitive capacities it has tested is no longer exclusive to human cognition.

AI.tldr: 语言模型首次在官方披露的LSAT考试中获得满分，通过思维链提升推理能力，蒸馏模型表现较差，但通过奖励模型微调可缩小差距。
AI.motivation: 研究语言模型在法律推理考试（LSAT）中的表现极限，探索模型是否能够达到甚至超越人类在法律推理方面的认知能力。
AI.method: 在8个推理模型上进行控制实验，测试不同提示、答案顺序和多次采样的影响；通过消融思维链阶段分析其重要性；使用蒸馏模型比较性能；通过QLoRA微调的奖励模型进行最佳选择。
AI.result: 语言模型首次在LSAT中获得完美分数；思维链消融使准确率下降8个百分点（主要在逻辑推理）；蒸馏模型表现远低于前沿模型；奖励模型微调通过Best-of-5选择缩小了性能差距。
AI.conclusion: LSAT所测试的认知能力上限不再仅限于人类认知，语言模型能够达到完美推理水平，思维链对逻辑推理至关重要，奖励模型微调可进一步提升性能。

title: Early Decisions Matter: Proximity Bias and Initial Trajectory Shaping in Non-Autoregressive Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion-based language models (dLLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive language models, offering the potential for parallel token generation and bidirectional context modeling. However, harnessing this flexibility for fully non-autoregressive decoding remains an open question, particularly for reasoning and planning tasks. In this work, we investigate non-autoregressive decoding in dLLMs by systematically analyzing its inference dynamics along the temporal axis. Specifically, we uncover an inherent failure mode in confidence-based non-autoregressive generation stemming from a strong proximity bias-the tendency for the denoising order to concentrate on spatially adjacent tokens. This local dependency leads to spatial error propagation, rendering the entire trajectory critically contingent on the initial unmasking position. Leveraging this insight, we present a minimal-intervention approach that guides early token selection, employing a lightweight planner and end-of-sequence temperature annealing. We thoroughly evaluate our method on various reasoning and planning tasks and observe substantial overall improvement over existing heuristic baselines without significant computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扩散语言模型的非自回归解码，发现了置信度生成中的邻近偏差问题，并提出了一种轻量级规划器引导的早期token选择方法，在推理和规划任务上取得了显著改进。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型作为自回归模型的替代方案，具有并行token生成和双向上下文建模的潜力，但如何利用这种灵活性进行完全非自回归解码仍是一个开放问题，特别是在推理和规划任务中。
AI.method: 通过系统分析扩散语言模型在时间轴上的推理动态，发现了置信度非自回归生成中的固有失败模式（邻近偏差），并提出了一个最小干预方法：使用轻量级规划器引导早期token选择，结合序列结束温度退火策略。
AI.result: 在各种推理和规划任务上进行了全面评估，观察到相比现有启发式基线有显著的整体改进，且没有显著增加计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析扩散语言模型的推理动态，揭示了非自回归解码中的邻近偏差问题，提出的轻量级规划器方法有效解决了空间错误传播问题，为扩散语言模型在推理任务中的应用提供了新思路。

title: Integrating SAINT with Tree-Based Models: A Case Study in Employee Attrition Prediction
summary:
Employee attrition presents a major challenge for organizations, increasing costs and reducing productivity. Predicting attrition accurately enables proactive retention strategies, but existing machine learning models often struggle to capture complex feature interactions in tabular HR datasets. While tree-based models such as XGBoost and LightGBM perform well on structured data, traditional encoding techniques like one-hot encoding can introduce sparsity and fail to preserve semantic relationships between categorical features.
  This study explores a hybrid approach by integrating SAINT (Self-Attention and Intersample Attention Transformer)-generated embeddings with tree-based models to enhance employee attrition prediction. SAINT leverages self-attention mechanisms to model intricate feature interactions. In this study, we explore SAINT both as a standalone classifier and as a feature extractor for tree-based models. We evaluate the performance, generalizability, and interpretability of standalone models (SAINT, XGBoost, LightGBM) and hybrid models that combine SAINT embeddings with tree-based classifiers.
  Experimental results show that standalone tree-based models outperform both the standalone SAINT model and the hybrid approaches in predictive accuracy and generalization. Contrary to expectations, the hybrid models did not improve performance. One possible explanation is that tree-based models struggle to utilize dense, high-dimensional embeddings effectively. Additionally, the hybrid approach significantly reduced interpretability, making model decisions harder to explain. These findings suggest that transformer-based embeddings, while capturing feature relationships, do not necessarily enhance tree-based classifiers. Future research should explore alternative fusion strategies for integrating deep learning with structured data.

AI.tldr: 研究探索将SAINT生成的嵌入与树模型结合预测员工流失，但实验发现单独树模型表现最佳，混合方法未提升性能且降低可解释性。
AI.motivation: 员工流失给组织带来重大挑战，现有机器学习模型难以捕捉表格HR数据中的复杂特征交互。虽然树模型在结构化数据上表现良好，但传统编码技术会引入稀疏性且无法保留分类特征间的语义关系。
AI.method: 采用混合方法，将SAINT（自注意力和样本间注意力Transformer）生成的嵌入与树模型（XGBoost、LightGBM）结合。评估了独立模型（SAINT、XGBoost、LightGBM）以及将SAINT嵌入与树分类器结合的混合模型。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，独立的树模型在预测准确性和泛化能力上优于独立的SAINT模型和混合方法。与预期相反，混合模型未能提升性能，可能因为树模型难以有效利用密集的高维嵌入。此外，混合方法显著降低了模型的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的嵌入虽然能捕捉特征关系，但未必能增强树基分类器。未来研究应探索深度学习与结构化数据融合的替代策略。

title: Topo-ADV: Generating Topology-Driven Imperceptible Adversarial Point Clouds
summary: Deep neural networks for 3D point cloud understanding have achieved remarkable success in object classification and recognition, yet recent work shows that these models remain highly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. Existing 3D attacks predominantly manipulate geometric properties such as point locations, curvature, or surface structure, implicitly assuming that preserving global shape fidelity preserves semantic content. In this work, we challenge this assumption and introduce the first topology-driven adversarial attack for point cloud deep learning. Our key insight is that the homological structure of a 3D object constitutes a previously unexplored vulnerability surface. We propose Topo-ADV, an end-to-end differentiable framework that incorporates persistent homology as an explicit optimization objective, enabling gradient-based manipulation of topological features during adversarial example generation. By embedding persistence diagrams through differentiable topological representations, our method jointly optimizes (i) a topology divergence loss that alters persistence, (ii) a misclassification objective, and (iii) geometric imperceptibility constraints that preserve visual plausibility. Experiments demonstrate that subtle topology-driven perturbations consistently achieve up to 100% attack success rates on benchmark datasets such as ModelNet40, ShapeNet Part, and ScanObjectNN using PointNet and DGCNN classifiers, while remaining geometrically indistinguishable from the original point clouds, beating state-of-the-art methods on various perceptibility metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个基于拓扑的3D点云对抗攻击方法Topo-ADV，通过操纵持久同调特征来攻击点云深度学习模型，在保持几何不可察觉的同时达到高攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有3D对抗攻击主要操纵几何属性（点位置、曲率等），隐含假设保持全局形状保真度就能保持语义内容。本文挑战这一假设，发现3D对象的同调结构是一个未被探索的脆弱性表面。
AI.method: 提出Topo-ADV端到端可微分框架，将持久同调作为显式优化目标，通过可微分拓扑表示嵌入持久图，联合优化：1)改变持久性的拓扑发散损失；2)误分类目标；3)保持视觉合理性的几何不可察觉约束。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40、ShapeNet Part和ScanObjectNN基准数据集上，使用PointNet和DGCNN分类器，细微的拓扑驱动扰动能持续达到100%攻击成功率，同时在几何上与原有点云无法区分，在各种可感知性指标上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑特征构成了3D点云深度学习的全新脆弱性维度，Topo-ADV证明了通过操纵同调结构可以有效攻击点云模型，同时保持几何不可察觉性，为3D对抗鲁棒性研究开辟了新方向。

title: LoopGuard: Breaking Self-Reinforcing Attention Loops via Dynamic KV Cache Intervention
summary: Through systematic experiments on long-context generation, we observe a damaging failure mode in which decoding can collapse into persistent repetition loops. We find that this degeneration is driven by collapsed attention patterns, where a subset of heads locks onto a narrow suffix of the history, and is further stabilized by inference-time KV cache reuse. Crucially, since many existing KV cache policies rely on attention-based importance, this collapse can produce spuriously high scores for repetitive tokens, causing cache management to inadvertently amplify repetition. To study this phenomenon in a controlled and reproducible manner, we introduce LoopBench, a benchmark with explicit loop-inducing conditions and loop-oriented metrics that quantify repetition severity and generation instability beyond downstream task scores. Building on these insights, we propose LoopGuard, a lightweight, plug-in KV cache guard that detects loop onset online and disrupts the feedback cycle by pruning repetitive tail spans under a fixed cache budget. Experiments on LoopBench show that LoopGuard reduces loop incidence by over 90 percentage points, while restoring output diversity and reducing token waste.

AI.tldr: 解码过程中出现重复循环崩溃问题，由注意力模式崩溃和KV缓存重用引起，提出LoopBench基准和LoopGuard防护机制
AI.motivation: 在长文本生成实验中观察到解码会陷入持久重复循环的破坏性故障模式，这种退化由崩溃的注意力模式和推理时KV缓存重用驱动，现有KV缓存策略依赖注意力重要性，会错误地给重复token高分，导致缓存管理无意中放大重复
AI.method: 引入LoopBench基准，包含明确的循环诱导条件和面向循环的指标；提出LoopGuard，一种轻量级插件式KV缓存防护机制，在线检测循环开始，通过在有固定缓存预算下修剪重复尾部跨度来中断反馈循环
AI.result: 在LoopBench上的实验显示，LoopGuard将循环发生率降低了超过90个百分点，同时恢复了输出多样性并减少了token浪费
AI.conclusion: 解码重复循环是由注意力模式崩溃和KV缓存重用共同导致的系统性故障，LoopGuard能有效检测和中断这种反馈循环，显著改善长文本生成质量

title: Knowing What to Stress: A Discourse-Conditioned Text-to-Speech Benchmark
summary: Spoken meaning often depends not only on what is said, but also on which word is emphasized. The same sentence can convey correction, contrast, or clarification depending on where emphasis falls. Although modern text-to-speech (TTS) systems generate expressive speech, it remains unclear whether they infer contextually appropriate stress from discourse alone. To address this gap, we present Context-Aware Stress TTS (CAST), a benchmark for evaluating context-conditioned word-level stress in TTS. Items are defined as contrastive context pairs: identical sentences paired with distinct contexts requiring different stressed words. We evaluate state-of-the-art systems and find a consistent gap: text-only language models reliably recover the intended stress from context, yet TTS systems frequently fail to realize it in speech. We release the benchmark, evaluation framework, construction pipeline and a synthetic corpus to support future work on context-aware speech synthesis.

AI.tldr: 提出CAST基准测试，用于评估TTS系统能否根据上下文推断正确的单词重音，发现当前TTS系统在实现上下文相关重音方面存在明显不足
AI.motivation: 口语意义不仅取决于说什么，还取决于哪个词被强调。同一句话根据重音位置可以传达纠正、对比或澄清等不同含义。虽然现代TTS系统能生成富有表现力的语音，但尚不清楚它们是否能仅从话语中推断出上下文适当的重音。
AI.method: 提出Context-Aware Stress TTS (CAST)基准测试，包含对比性上下文对：相同的句子配以需要不同重音单词的独特上下文。评估了最先进的TTS系统，并与纯文本语言模型进行比较。
AI.result: 发现一致性的差距：纯文本语言模型能可靠地从上下文中恢复预期的重音，但TTS系统经常无法在语音中实现它。
AI.conclusion: 发布基准测试、评估框架、构建流程和合成语料库，以支持未来上下文感知语音合成的研究工作。

title: WaterAdmin: Orchestrating Community Water Distribution Optimization via AI Agents
summary: We study the operation of community water systems, where pumps and valves must be scheduled to reliably meet water demands while minimizing energy consumption. While existing optimization-based methods are effective under well-modeled environments, real-world community scenarios exhibit highly dynamic contexts-such as human activities, weather variations, etc-that significantly affect water demand patterns and operational targets across different zones. Traditional optimization approaches struggle to aggregate and adapt to such heterogeneous and rapidly evolving contextual information in real time. While Large Language Model (LLM) agents offer strong capabilities for understanding heterogeneous community context, they are not suitable for directly producing reliable real-time control actions. To address these challenges, we propose a bi-level AI-agent-based framework, WaterAdmin, which integrates LLM-based community context abstraction at the upper level with optimization-based operational control at the lower level. This design leverages the complementary strengths of both paradigms to enable adaptive and reliable operation. We implement WaterAdmin on the hydraulic simulation platform EPANET and demonstrate superior performance in maintaining pressure reliability and reducing energy consumption under highly dynamic community contexts.

AI.tldr: 提出WaterAdmin框架，结合LLM社区情境理解与优化控制，提升动态社区供水系统的可靠性和能效
AI.motivation: 社区供水系统面临高度动态的情境变化（人类活动、天气变化等），传统优化方法难以实时适应这些异构且快速演变的上下文信息，而LLM虽能理解复杂情境但不适合直接生成可靠控制动作
AI.method: 提出双层AI代理框架WaterAdmin：上层使用LLM进行社区情境抽象理解，下层采用基于优化的运行控制，结合两种范式的互补优势
AI.result: 在EPANET水力仿真平台上实现WaterAdmin，在高度动态的社区情境下展现出优越性能，能更好地维持压力可靠性并降低能耗
AI.conclusion: WaterAdmin框架成功整合了LLM的情境理解能力和优化控制的可靠性，为动态社区供水系统的自适应可靠运行提供了有效解决方案

title: Not Your Stereo-Typical Estimator: Combining Vision and Language for Volume Perception
summary: Accurate volume estimation of objects from visual data is a long-standing challenge in computer vision with significant applications in robotics, logistics, and smart health. Existing methods often rely on complex 3D reconstruction pipelines or struggle with the ambiguity inherent in single-view images. To address these limitations, we introduce a new method that fuses implicit 3D cues from stereo vision with explicit prior knowledge from natural language text. Our approach extracts deep features from a stereo image pair and a descriptive text prompt that contains the object's class and an approximate volume, then integrates them using a simple yet effective projection layer into a unified, multi-modal representation for regression. We conduct extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrating that our text-guided approach significantly outperforms vision-only baselines. Our findings show that leveraging even simple textual priors can effectively guide the volume estimation task, paving the way for more context-aware visual measurement systems. Code: https://gitlab.com/viper-purdue/stereo-typical-estimator.

AI.tldr: 提出一种融合立体视觉和文本先验的物体体积估计方法，通过多模态特征整合显著提升单目视觉方法的性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖复杂的三维重建流程或难以处理单视图图像的歧义性，需要更有效的方法来准确估计物体体积
AI.method: 从立体图像对和描述性文本提示中提取深度特征，通过投影层将视觉和文本特征整合为统一的多模态表示进行回归
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，文本引导方法显著优于纯视觉基线，即使简单的文本先验也能有效指导体积估计任务
AI.conclusion: 融合文本先验的立体视觉方法为更上下文感知的视觉测量系统铺平了道路

title: Learning Hierarchical and Geometry-Aware Graph Representations for Text-to-CAD
summary: Text-to-CAD code generation is a long-horizon task that translates textual instructions into long sequences of interdependent operations. Existing methods typically decode text directly into executable code (e.g., bpy) without explicitly modeling assembly hierarchy or geometric constraints, which enlarges the search space, accumulates local errors, and often causes cascading failures in complex assemblies. To address this issue, we propose a hierarchical and geometry-aware graph as an intermediate representation. The graph models multi-level parts and components as nodes and encodes explicit geometric constraints as edges. Instead of mapping text directly to code, our framework first predicts structure and constraints, then conditions action sequencing and code generation, thereby improving geometric fidelity and constraint satisfaction. We further introduce a structure-aware progressive curriculum learning strategy that constructs graded tasks through controlled structural edits, explores the model's capability boundary, and synthesizes boundary examples for iterative training. In addition, we build a 12K dataset with instructions, decomposition graphs, action sequences, and bpy code, together with graph- and constraint-oriented evaluation metrics. Extensive experiments show that our method consistently outperforms existing approaches in both geometric fidelity and accurate satisfaction of geometric constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出一种层次化几何感知图作为中间表示，将文本到CAD代码生成分解为结构预测和约束编码，再生成代码，显著提升几何保真度和约束满足度
AI.motivation: 现有文本到CAD代码生成方法直接将文本解码为可执行代码，没有显式建模装配层次和几何约束，导致搜索空间扩大、局部错误累积，在复杂装配中容易产生级联失败
