AI.method: 1) 提出层次化几何感知图作为中间表示，将多级部件和组件建模为节点，几何约束编码为边；2) 先预测结构和约束，再基于此进行动作序列化和代码生成；3) 引入结构感知渐进课程学习策略，通过受控结构编辑构建分级任务；4) 构建包含指令、分解图、动作序列和bpy代码的12K数据集
AI.result: 在几何保真度和几何约束准确满足方面持续优于现有方法，通过中间表示和课程学习策略有效解决了复杂装配中的级联失败问题
AI.conclusion: 通过引入层次化几何感知图作为中间表示，将文本到CAD代码生成分解为结构预测和约束编码两个阶段，结合结构感知渐进课程学习，显著提升了复杂装配场景下的几何保真度和约束满足度

title: Bridging Linguistic Gaps: Cross-Lingual Mapping in Pre-Training and Dataset for Enhanced Multilingual LLM Performance
summary: Multilingual Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle with cross-lingual tasks due to data imbalances between high-resource and low-resource languages, as well as monolingual bias in pre-training. Existing methods, such as bilingual fine-tuning and contrastive alignment, can improve cross-lingual performance, but they often require extensive parallel data or suffer from instability. To address these challenges, we introduce a Cross-Lingual Mapping Task during the pre-training phase, which enhances cross-lingual alignment without compromising monolingual fluency. Our approach bi-directionally maps languages within the LLM embedding space, improving both language generation and comprehension. We further propose a Language Alignment Coefficient to robustly quantify cross-lingual consistency, even in limited-data scenarios. Experimental results on machine translation (MT), cross-lingual natural language understanding (CLNLU), and cross-lingual question answering (CLQA) show that our model achieves gains of up to 11.9 BLEU points in MT, 6.72 points in CLQA BERTScore-Precision, and more than 5% in CLNLU accuracy over strong multilingual baselines. These findings highlight the potential of incorporating cross-lingual objectives into pre-training to improve multilingual LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出在预训练阶段引入跨语言映射任务，通过双向映射语言嵌入空间来增强跨语言对齐，同时保持单语流畅性，显著提升多语言大模型在翻译、理解和问答任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 多语言大模型在跨语言任务上表现不佳，主要原因是高资源语言和低资源语言之间的数据不平衡，以及预训练中的单语偏见。现有方法如双语微调和对比对齐需要大量平行数据或不稳定。
AI.method: 在预训练阶段引入跨语言映射任务，通过双向映射语言在LLM嵌入空间中的表示来增强跨语言对齐。同时提出语言对齐系数来量化跨语言一致性，即使在数据有限的情况下也能稳健评估。
AI.result: 在机器翻译任务上提升高达11.9 BLEU点，跨语言问答任务上BERTScore-Precision提升6.72点，跨语言自然语言理解任务上准确率提升超过5%，显著优于现有强大多语言基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 将跨语言目标融入预训练阶段可以有效提升多语言大模型的性能，提出的跨语言映射任务和语言对齐系数为改进多语言模型提供了有前景的方向。

title: Battery health prognosis using Physics-informed neural network with Quantum Feature mapping
summary: Accurate battery health prognosis using State of Health (SOH) estimation is essential for the reliability of multi-scale battery energy storage, yet existing methods are limited in generalizability across diverse battery chemistries and operating conditions. The inability of standard neural networks to capture the complex, high-dimensional physics of battery degradation is a major contributor to these limitations. To address this, a physics-informed neural network with the Quantum Feature Mapping(QFM) technique (QPINN) is proposed. QPINN projects raw battery sensor data into a high-dimensional Hilbert space, creating a highly expressive feature set that effectively captures subtle, non-linear degradation patterns using Nyström method. These quantum-enhanced features are then processed by a physics-informed network that enforces physical constraints. The proposed method achieves an average SOH estimation accuracy of 99.46\% across different datasets, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art baselines, with reductions in MAPE and RMSE of up to 65\% and 62\%, respectively. This method was validated on a large-scale, multi-chemistry dataset of 310,705 samples from 387 cells, and further showed notable adaptability in cross-validation settings, successfully transferring from one chemistry to another without relying on target-domain SOH labels.

AI.tldr: 提出QPINN方法，结合量子特征映射和物理信息神经网络，实现跨化学电池的高精度健康状态估计，准确率达99.46%
AI.motivation: 现有电池健康状态估计方法在跨化学和操作条件下的泛化能力有限，标准神经网络难以捕捉电池退化的复杂高维物理特性
AI.method: 提出QPINN方法：使用量子特征映射技术将原始电池传感器数据投影到高维希尔伯特空间，通过Nyström方法创建高表达性特征集，再通过物理信息网络施加物理约束
AI.result: 在包含310,705个样本、387个电池的大规模多化学数据集上验证，平均SOH估计准确率达99.46%，MAPE和RMSE分别降低65%和62%，在跨化学验证中表现出良好适应性
AI.conclusion: QPINN方法通过量子特征增强和物理约束的结合，显著提升了电池健康状态估计的准确性和跨化学泛化能力，为多尺度电池储能系统的可靠性提供了有效解决方案

title: PointSplat: Efficient Geometry-Driven Pruning and Transformer Refinement for 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently unlocked real-time, high-fidelity novel view synthesis by representing scenes using explicit 3D primitives. However, traditional methods often require millions of Gaussians to capture complex scenes, leading to significant memory and storage demands. Recent approaches have addressed this issue through pruning and per-scene fine-tuning of Gaussian parameters, thereby reducing the model size while maintaining visual quality. These strategies typically rely on 2D images to compute important scores followed by scene-specific optimization. In this work, we introduce PointSplat, 3D geometry-driven prune-and-refine framework that bridges previously disjoint directions of gaussian pruning and transformer refinement. Our method includes two key components: (1) an efficient geometry-driven strategy that ranks Gaussians based solely on their 3D attributes, removing reliance on 2D images during pruning stage, and (2) a dual-branch encoder that separates, re-weights geometric and appearance to avoid feature imbalance. Extensive experiments on ScanNet++ and Replica across varying sparsity levels demonstrate that PointSplat consistently achieves competitive rendering quality and superior efficiency without additional per-scene optimization.

AI.tldr: PointSplat提出了一种基于3D几何的高斯剪枝与细化框架，通过纯3D属性排名和双分支编码器，在保持渲染质量的同时显著减少内存需求，无需额外的逐场景优化。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯溅射（3DGS）虽然实现了实时高保真新视角合成，但传统方法需要数百万个高斯函数来捕捉复杂场景，导致巨大的内存和存储需求。现有方法依赖2D图像计算重要性分数并进行逐场景优化，存在效率问题。
AI.method: PointSplat包含两个关键组件：1）基于纯3D属性的高效几何驱动剪枝策略，在剪枝阶段不依赖2D图像；2）分离并重新加权几何和外观特征的双分支编码器，避免特征不平衡。
AI.result: 在ScanNet++和Replica数据集上，PointSplat在不同稀疏度水平下都能保持竞争力的渲染质量和更高的效率，且无需额外的逐场景优化。
AI.conclusion: PointSplat通过3D几何驱动的剪枝与细化框架，成功解决了3DGS的内存效率问题，实现了高质量渲染与高效存储的平衡，为实时3D场景表示提供了更实用的解决方案。

title: Ontological Trajectory Forecasting via Finite Semigroup Iteration and Lie Algebra Approximation in Geopolitical Knowledge Graphs
comment: 18 pages. Code and system available at https://github.com/wuqihang-brave/El-druin
summary: We present EL-DRUIN, an ontological reasoning system for geopolitical intelligence analysis that combines formal ontology, finite semigroup algebra, and Lie algebra approximation to forecast long-run relationship trajectories. Current LLM-based political analysis systems operate as summarisation engines, producing outputs bounded by textual pattern matching. EL-DRUIN departs from this paradigm by modelling geopolitical relationships as states in a finite set of named Dynamic Patterns, composing patterns via a semigroup operation whose structure constants are defined by an explicit composition table, and embedding each pattern as a vector in an 8-dimensional semantic Lie algebra space. Forward simulation iterates this semigroup operation, yielding reachable pattern sets at each discrete timestep; convergence to idempotent absorbing states (fixed points of the composition) constitutes the predicted long-run attractor. Bayesian posterior weights combine ontology-derived confidence priors with a Lie similarity term measuring the cosine similarity between the vector sum of composing patterns and the target pattern vector, providing interpretable, calibrated probabilities that are not self-reported by a language model. Bifurcation points -- steps at which two candidate attractors have near-equal posterior mass -- are detected and exposed to downstream analysis. We demonstrate the framework on six geopolitical scenarios including US-China technology decoupling and the Taiwan Strait military coercion trajectory. The architecture is publicly available as an open-source system with a Streamlit frontend exposing full computation traces, Bayesian posterior breakdowns, and 8D ontological state vectors.

AI.tldr: EL-DRUIN是一个结合形式本体论、有限半群代数和李代数近似的系统，用于预测地缘政治关系的长期轨迹，超越了传统LLM的文本模式匹配方法。
AI.motivation: 当前基于LLM的政治分析系统主要作为总结引擎，受限于文本模式匹配。需要一种能够建模地缘政治关系动态、提供可解释概率预测的系统。
AI.method: 将地缘政治关系建模为有限动态模式集中的状态，通过半群操作组合模式，在8维语义李代数空间中嵌入模式向量，使用贝叶斯后验权重结合本体置信度先验和李相似性项。
AI.result: 系统成功应用于六个地缘政治场景（包括美中技术脱钩和台湾海峡军事胁迫轨迹），能够检测分叉点并公开完整计算轨迹、贝叶斯后验分解和8维本体状态向量。
AI.conclusion: EL-DRUIN提供了一个超越文本模式匹配的地缘政治分析框架，结合形式本体论和代数方法，提供可解释、校准的概率预测，并作为开源系统公开可用。

title: Computational Lesions in Multilingual Language Models Separate Shared and Language-specific Brain Alignment
summary: How the brain supports language across different languages is a basic question in neuroscience and a useful test for multilingual artificial intelligence. Neuroimaging has identified language-responsive brain regions across languages, but it cannot by itself show whether the underlying processing is shared or language-specific. Here we use six multilingual large language models (LLMs) as controllable systems and create targeted ``computational lesions'' by zeroing small parameter sets that are important across languages or especially important for one language. We then compare intact and lesioned models in predicting functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) responses during 100 minutes of naturalistic story listening in native English, Chinese and French (112 participants). Lesioning a compact shared core reduces whole-brain encoding correlation by 60.32% relative to intact models, whereas language-specific lesions preserve cross-language separation in embedding space but selectively weaken brain predictivity for the matched native language. These results support a shared backbone with embedded specializations and provide a causal framework for studying multilingual brain-model alignment.

AI.tldr: 研究通过在多语言大语言模型中创建"计算性损伤"，发现语言处理存在共享核心和语言特异性嵌入，为研究多语言大脑-模型对齐提供了因果框架。
AI.motivation: 探索大脑如何支持不同语言处理是一个基础神经科学问题，也是多语言人工智能的有用测试。虽然神经影像学已识别出跨语言的语言响应脑区，但无法确定底层处理是共享的还是语言特异性的。
AI.method: 使用六个多语言大语言模型作为可控系统，通过归零重要参数创建"计算性损伤"：跨语言共享核心损伤和语言特异性损伤。然后比较完整和损伤模型在预测英语、中文和法语母语者自然故事聆听时的fMRI响应能力。
AI.result: 损伤共享核心使全脑编码相关性降低60.32%；语言特异性损伤保留了嵌入空间中的跨语言分离，但选择性地削弱了匹配母语的大脑预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持语言处理存在共享主干和嵌入特异性的结构，为研究多语言大脑-模型对齐提供了因果框架。

title: Structural Gating and Effect-aligned Lag-resolved Temporal Causal Discovery Framework with Application to Heat-Pollution Extremes
summary:
This study proposes Structural Gating and Effect-aligned Discovery for Temporal Causal Discovery (SGED-TCD), a novel and general framework for lag-resolved causal discovery in complex multivariate time series. SGED-TCD combines explicit structural gating, stability-oriented learning, perturbation-effect alignment, and unified graph extraction to improve the interpretability, robustness, and functional consistency of inferred causal graphs.
  To evaluate its effectiveness in a representative real-world setting, we apply SGED-TCD to teleconnection-driven compound heatwave--air-pollution extremes in eastern and northern China. Using large-scale climate indices, regional circulation and boundary-layer variables, and compound extreme indicators, the framework reconstructs weighted causal networks with explicit dominant lags and relative causal importance. The inferred networks reveal clear regional and seasonal heterogeneity: warm-season extremes in Eastern China are mainly linked to low-latitude oceanic variability through circulation, radiation, and ventilation pathways, whereas cold-season extremes in Northern China are more strongly governed by high-latitude circulation variability associated with boundary-layer suppression and persistent stagnation.
  These results show that SGED-TCD can recover physically interpretable, hierarchical, and lag-resolved causal pathways in a challenging climate--environment system. More broadly, the proposed framework is not restricted to the present application and provides a general basis for temporal causal discovery in other complex domains.

AI.tldr: SGED-TCD是一个用于多元时间序列因果发现的新框架，结合结构门控、稳定性学习、扰动效应对齐和统一图提取，提高了因果图的可解释性、鲁棒性和功能一致性。在气候-环境系统中成功恢复了物理可解释的、分层且滞后分辨的因果路径。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列因果发现方法在复杂多元时间序列中面临可解释性、鲁棒性和功能一致性不足的问题，特别是在气候-环境等复杂系统中，需要能够明确识别滞后关系并保持物理可解释性的方法。
AI.method: 提出SGED-TCD框架，结合四个关键组件：1) 显式结构门控；2) 稳定性导向学习；3) 扰动效应对齐；4) 统一图提取。应用于中国东部和北部复合热浪-空气污染极端事件的因果网络重建。
AI.result: 成功重建了具有显式主导滞后和相对因果重要性的加权因果网络。发现明显的区域和季节异质性：东部暖季极端事件主要通过环流、辐射和通风路径与低纬度海洋变率相关，而北部冷季极端事件更多受高纬度环流变率控制，与边界层抑制和持续停滞相关。
AI.conclusion: SGED-TCD能够在具有挑战性的气候-环境系统中恢复物理可解释的、分层且滞后分辨的因果路径。该框架不限于当前应用，为其他复杂领域的时序因果发现提供了通用基础。

title: From UAV Imagery to Agronomic Reasoning: A Multimodal LLM Benchmark for Plant Phenotyping
summary: To improve crop genetics, high-throughput, effective and comprehensive phenotyping is a critical prerequisite. While such tasks were traditionally performed manually, recent advances in multimodal foundation models, especially in vision-language models (VLMs), have enabled more automated and robust phenotypic analysis. However, plant science remains a particularly challenging domain for foundation models because it requires domain-specific knowledge, fine-grained visual interpretation, and complex biological and agronomic reasoning. To address this gap, we develop PlantXpert, an evidence-grounded multimodal reasoning benchmark for soybean and cotton phenotyping. Our benchmark provides a structured and reproducible framework for agronomic adaptation of VLMs, and enables controlled comparison between base models and their domain-adapted counterparts. We constructed a dataset comprising 385 digital images and more than 3,000 benchmark samples spanning key plant science domains including disease, pest control, weed management, and yield. The benchmark can assess diverse capabilities including visual expertise, quantitative reasoning, and multi-step agronomic reasoning. A total of 11 state-of-the-art VLMs were evaluated. The results indicate that task-specific fine-tuning leads to substantial improvement in accuracy, with models such as Qwen3-VL-4B and Qwen3-VL-30B achieving up to 78%. At the same time, gains from model scaling diminish beyond a certain capacity, generalization across soybean and cotton remains uneven, and quantitative as well as biologically grounded reasoning continue to pose substantial challenges. These findings suggest that PlantXpert can serve as a foundation for assessing evidence-grounded agronomic reasoning and for advancing multimodal model development in plant science.

AI.tldr: PlantXpert：一个用于大豆和棉花表型分析的证据基础多模态推理基准，评估11个先进视觉语言模型，发现任务特定微调显著提升性能，但模型扩展收益有限且跨作物泛化不均。
AI.motivation: 植物科学是基础模型特别具有挑战性的领域，需要领域特定知识、细粒度视觉解释和复杂的生物农艺推理。目前缺乏结构化、可复现的农艺适应框架来评估多模态模型在植物表型分析中的能力。
AI.method: 开发PlantXpert基准，包含385张数字图像和3000多个样本，涵盖病害、害虫控制、杂草管理和产量等关键植物科学领域。基准评估视觉专业知识、定量推理和多步骤农艺推理能力，对11个最先进的视觉语言模型进行评估。
AI.result: 任务特定微调显著提高准确性，Qwen3-VL-4B和Qwen3-VL-30B达到最高78%准确率。但模型扩展超过一定容量后收益递减，大豆和棉花之间的泛化不均，定量推理和生物学基础推理仍然构成重大挑战。
AI.conclusion: PlantXpert可作为评估证据基础农艺推理和推进植物科学多模态模型开发的基础，为农艺适应提供结构化可复现框架，并支持基础模型与其领域适应对应模型之间的受控比较。

title: Trust Your Memory: Verifiable Control of Smart Homes through Reinforcement Learning with Multi-dimensional Rewards
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become a key foundation for enabling personalized smart home experiences. While existing studies have explored how smart home assistants understand user queries to control devices in real time, their ability to perform memory-driven device control remains challenging from both evaluation and methodological perspectives. In terms of evaluation, existing benchmarks either focus on immediate device control or general open-domain memory retrieval tasks, and therefore cannot effectively evaluate a model's ability to perform memory-driven device control. Methodologically, while memory-driven device control can be approached using Reinforcement Learning, conventional RL methods generally rely on outcome-based supervision (i.e., whether the final task is achieved). This lack of intermediate feedback can lead to sub-optimal performance or local failures in fine-grained memory management tasks (adding, updating, deleting, and utilizing). To address these issues, we first release MemHomeLife, built from anonymized real-world long-term user interaction logs. To enable more fine-grained evaluation of different memory-related subtasks, we further construct MemHome, the first benchmark designed to systematically evaluate memory-driven device control in smart home scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对智能家居中基于记忆的设备控制问题，提出了MemHomeLife数据集和MemHome基准测试，以解决现有评估方法的不足和强化学习中间反馈缺失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有智能家居助手虽然能实时控制设备，但在基于记忆的设备控制方面存在挑战：评估基准要么关注即时设备控制，要么关注通用开放域记忆检索，无法有效评估模型的记忆驱动设备控制能力；方法上，传统强化学习依赖结果监督，缺乏中间反馈，导致细粒度记忆管理任务表现不佳。
AI.method: 1. 发布MemHomeLife数据集，基于匿名化的真实世界长期用户交互日志构建；2. 构建MemHome基准测试，这是首个系统评估智能家居场景中记忆驱动设备控制的基准，能更细粒度地评估不同记忆相关子任务。
AI.result: 提出了MemHomeLife数据集和MemHome基准测试，为智能家居中的记忆驱动设备控制提供了专门的评估框架和真实数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 通过创建专门的数据集和基准测试，解决了智能家居中记忆驱动设备控制的评估和方法挑战，为未来研究提供了重要的基础设施。

title: ProUIE: A Macro-to-Micro Progressive Learning Method for LLM-based Universal Information Extraction
summary: LLM-based universal information extraction (UIE) methods often rely on additional information beyond the original training data, which increases training complexity yet often yields limited gains. To address this, we propose ProUIE, a Macro-to-Micro progressive learning approach that improves UIE without introducing any external information. ProUIE consists of three stages: (i) macro-level Complete Modeling (CM), which learns NER, RE, and EE along their intrinsic difficulty order on the full training data to build a unified extraction foundation, (ii) meso-level Streamlined Alignment (SA), which operates on sampled data with simplified target formats, streamlining and regularizing structured outputs to make them more concise and controllable, and (iii) micro-level Deep Exploration (DE), which applies GRPO with stepwise fine-grained rewards (SFR) over structural units to guide exploration and improve performance. Experiments on 36 public datasets show that ProUIE consistently improves unified extraction, outperforming strong instruction-tuned baselines on average for NER and RE while using a smaller backbone, and it further demonstrates clear gains in large-scale production-oriented information extraction.

AI.tldr: ProUIE：一种从宏观到微观的渐进式学习方法，无需外部信息即可提升通用信息抽取性能
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的通用信息抽取方法通常依赖额外信息，增加了训练复杂度但收益有限，需要一种不引入外部信息就能提升性能的方法
AI.method: 三阶段渐进学习：1）宏观完全建模：按难度顺序学习NER、RE、EE；2）中观精简对齐：在采样数据上简化目标格式，使输出更简洁可控；3）微观深度探索：使用GRPO和逐步细粒度奖励指导探索
AI.result: 在36个公开数据集上，ProUIE在NER和RE任务上平均优于强指令微调基线，且使用更小的骨干模型；在大规模生产级信息抽取中也有明显提升
AI.conclusion: ProUIE通过从宏观到微观的渐进学习，无需外部信息就能显著提升通用信息抽取性能，为实际应用提供了高效解决方案

title: Intent-aligned Formal Specification Synthesis via Traceable Refinement
summary: Large language models are increasingly used to generate code from natural language, but ensuring correctness remains challenging. Formal verification offers a principled way to obtain such guarantees by proving that a program satisfies a formal specification. However, specifications are frequently missing in real-world codebases, and writing high-quality specifications remains expensive and expertise-intensive. We present VeriSpecGen, a traceable refinement framework that synthesizes intent-aligned specifications in Lean through requirement-level attribution and localized repair. VeriSpecGen decomposes natural language into atomic requirements and generates requirement-targeted tests with explicit traceability maps to validate generated specifications. When validation fails, traceability maps attribute failures to specific requirements, enabling targeted clause-level repairs. VeriSpecGen achieve 86.6% on VERINA SpecGen task using Claude Opus 4.5, improving over baselines by up to 31.8 points across different model families and scales. Beyond inference-time gains, we generate 343K training examples from VeriSpecGen refinement trajectories and demonstrate that training on these trajectories substantially improves specification synthesis by 62-106% relative and transfers gains to general reasoning abilities.

AI.tldr: VeriSpecGen：一个通过需求级归因和局部修复在Lean中合成意图对齐规范的追踪细化框架，显著提升规范生成质量并可用于训练数据增强。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型生成代码时难以确保正确性，形式验证需要规范但现实代码库中规范经常缺失，编写高质量规范成本高且需要专业知识。
AI.method: 将自然语言分解为原子需求，生成需求导向的测试并建立显式追踪映射来验证生成的规范；验证失败时，追踪映射将失败归因到特定需求，实现有针对性的子句级修复。
AI.result: 在VERINA SpecGen任务上达到86.6%（使用Claude Opus 4.5），比基线提升高达31.8个百分点；生成34.3万个训练样本，训练后规范合成相对提升62-106%，并能提升通用推理能力。
AI.conclusion: VeriSpecGen通过追踪细化框架有效解决了规范缺失问题，不仅提升了推理时规范生成质量，还能生成高质量训练数据，显著提升模型在规范合成和通用推理方面的能力。

title: Does Your VFM Speak Plant? The Botanical Grammar of Vision Foundation Models for Object Detection
summary: Vision foundation models (VFMs) offer the promise of zero-shot object detection without task-specific training data, yet their performance in complex agricultural scenes remains highly sensitive to text prompt construction. We present a systematic prompt optimization framework evaluating four open-vocabulary detectors -- YOLO World, SAM3, Grounding DINO, and OWLv2 -- for cowpea flower and pod detection across synthetic and real field imagery. We decompose prompts into eight axes and conduct one-factor-at-a-time analysis followed by combinatorial optimization, revealing that models respond divergently to prompt structure: conditions that optimize one architecture can collapse another. Applying model-specific combinatorial prompts yields substantial gains over a naive species-name baseline, including +0.357 mAP@0.5 for YOLO World and +0.362 mAP@0.5 for OWLv2 on synthetic cowpea flower data. To evaluate cross-task generalization, we use an LLM to translate the discovered axis structure to a morphologically distinct target -- cowpea pods -- and compare against prompting using the discovered optimal structures from synthetic flower data. Crucially, prompt structures optimized exclusively on synthetic data transfer effectively to real-world fields: synthetic-pipeline prompts match or exceed those discovered on labeled real data for the majority of model-object combinations (flower: 0.374 vs. 0.353 for YOLO World; pod: 0.429 vs. 0.371 for SAM3). Our findings demonstrate that prompt engineering can substantially close the gap between zero-shot VFMs and supervised detectors without requiring manual annotation, and that optimal prompts are model-specific, non-obvious, and transferable across domains.

AI.tldr: 提出系统化提示优化框架，评估四种开放词汇检测器在农业场景中的表现，发现最优提示是模型特定且可跨域迁移的
AI.motivation: 视觉基础模型在复杂农业场景中的零样本检测性能对文本提示构建高度敏感，需要系统化优化方法
AI.method: 将提示分解为八个维度，进行单因素分析和组合优化，评估YOLO World、SAM3、Grounding DINO和OWLv2四种模型，使用LLM进行跨任务泛化
AI.result: 模型特定组合提示相比基线显著提升性能（YOLO World +0.357 mAP@0.5，OWLv2 +0.362 mAP@0.5），合成数据优化的提示结构能有效迁移到真实场景
AI.conclusion: 提示工程能显著缩小零样本视觉基础模型与监督检测器之间的差距，最优提示是模型特定、非直观且可跨域迁移的

title: Learning from Emptiness: De-biasing Listwise Rerankers with Content-Agnostic Probability Calibration
summary: Generative listwise reranking leverages global context for superior retrieval but is plagued by intrinsic position bias, where models exhibit structural sensitivity to input order independent of relevance. Existing mitigations present a dilemma: inference-time aggregation incurs prohibitive latency, while training-based methods often fail to eradicate ingrained priors, particularly in compact models. To resolve this dilemma, we propose CapCal (Content-Agnostic Probability Calibration), a training-free framework that mechanically decouples positional bias from ranking decisions. By estimating the bias distribution via content-free placeholders, CapCal rectifies output logits through an entropy-adaptive contrastive mechanism. Evaluations across 10 benchmarks confirm that CapCal achieves superior performance among training-free methods while preserving single-pass efficiency. Notably, it unlocks the latent potential of lightweight models (e.g., 0.6B), delivering absolute NDCG gains exceeding 10 points and outperforming both permutation-based aggregation and data-augmentation baselines.

AI.tldr: CapCal：一种无需训练的内容无关概率校准框架，通过估计位置偏差分布并修正输出logits，解决生成式列表重排序中的位置偏差问题，保持单次推理效率的同时提升轻量模型性能。
AI.motivation: 生成式列表重排序虽然能利用全局上下文提升检索效果，但存在内在位置偏差问题——模型对输入顺序有结构性敏感，与相关性无关。现有方法面临两难：推理时聚合方法延迟过高，而基于训练的方法难以完全消除固有偏差，特别是在紧凑模型中。
AI.method: 提出CapCal（内容无关概率校准）框架，这是一种无需训练的方法。通过使用内容无关的占位符估计偏差分布，然后通过熵自适应对比机制修正输出logits，从而将位置偏差与排序决策解耦。
AI.result: 在10个基准测试上的评估表明，CapCal在无需训练的方法中达到最优性能，同时保持单次推理效率。特别地，它解锁了轻量模型（如0.6B）的潜在能力，NDCG绝对增益超过10个百分点，优于基于排列聚合和数据增强的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CapCal有效解决了生成式列表重排序中的位置偏差困境，提供了一种高效且无需训练的解决方案，特别适合轻量模型，在保持推理效率的同时显著提升重排序性能。

title: Efficient Process Reward Modeling via Contrastive Mutual Information
summary: Recent research has devoted considerable effort to verifying the intermediate reasoning steps of chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories using process reward models (PRMs) and other verifier models. However, training a PRM typically requires human annotators to assign reward scores to each reasoning step, which is both costly and time-consuming. Existing automated approaches, such as Monte Carlo (MC) estimation, also demand substantial computational resources due to repeated LLM rollouts. To overcome these limitations, we propose contrastive pointwise mutual information (CPMI), a novel automatic reward labeling method that leverages the model's internal probability to infer step-level supervision while significantly reducing the computational burden of annotating dataset. CPMI quantifies how much a reasoning step increases the mutual information between the step and the correct target answer relative to hard-negative alternatives. This contrastive signal serves as a proxy for the step's contribution to the final solution and yields a reliable reward. The experimental results show that CPMI-based labeling reduces dataset construction time by 84% and token generation by 98% compared to MC estimation, while achieving higher accuracy on process-level evaluations and mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出CPMI方法，利用模型内部概率自动标注推理步骤奖励，相比传统方法大幅降低计算成本
AI.motivation: 现有验证CoT推理步骤的方法（如PRMs）需要人工标注奖励分数，成本高耗时长；自动化方法如MC估计也需要大量计算资源
AI.method: 提出对比点互信息（CPMI）方法，通过量化推理步骤相对于硬负例增加正确答案互信息的程度，自动生成步骤级监督信号
AI.result: CPMI相比MC估计减少84%数据集构建时间和98%token生成，在过程级评估和数学推理基准上获得更高准确率
AI.conclusion: CPMI是一种高效自动奖励标注方法，显著降低计算负担，为训练过程奖励模型提供可靠监督信号

title: Latent Instruction Representation Alignment: defending against jailbreaks, backdoors and undesired knowledge in LLMs
summary: We address jailbreaks, backdoors, and unlearning for large language models (LLMs). Unlike prior work, which trains LLMs based on their actions when given malign instructions, our method specifically trains the model to change how it interprets instructions. Our method, Latent Instruction Representation Alignment (LIRA), greatly improves generalization. We further boost generalization through an internally adversarial training algorithm. Our methods block over 99% of PEZ jailbreak attacks; remove a challenging insecure code backdoor; and achieve optimal forgetting on WMDP cyber with negligible loss of benign capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出LIRA方法，通过训练LLM改变其对指令的理解方式而非行为，结合内部对抗训练提升泛化能力，有效防御越狱攻击、移除后门并实现选择性遗忘
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注LLM在恶意指令下的行为训练，但缺乏对指令理解层面的针对性改进，导致泛化能力不足，难以有效应对越狱攻击、后门威胁和选择性遗忘需求
AI.method: 提出潜在指令表示对齐(LIRA)方法，训练模型改变对指令的解释方式；结合内部对抗训练算法进一步提升泛化能力；针对PEZ越狱攻击、不安全代码后门和WMDP网络知识实现针对性防御
AI.result: 成功阻断超过99%的PEZ越狱攻击；移除具有挑战性的不安全代码后门；在WMDP网络知识上实现最优遗忘效果，同时保持良性能力损失可忽略不计
AI.conclusion: 通过改变LLM对指令的理解方式而非行为，结合对抗训练，能够显著提升模型安全性，有效防御多种攻击并实现选择性遗忘，为LLM安全提供了新思路

title: BLPR: Robust License Plate Recognition under Viewpoint and Illumination Variations via Confidence-Driven VLM Fallback
summary: Robust license plate recognition in unconstrained environments remains a significant challenge, particularly in underrepresented regions with limited data availability and unique visual characteristics, such as Bolivia. Recognition accuracy in real-world conditions is often degraded by factors such as illumination changes and viewpoint distortion. To address these challenges, we introduce BLPR, a novel deep learning-based License Plate Detection and Recognition (LPDR) framework specifically designed for Bolivian license plates. The proposed system follows a two-stage pipeline where a YOLO-based detector is pretrained on synthetic data generated in Blender to simulate extreme perspectives and lighting conditions, and subsequently fine-tuned on street-level data collected in La Paz, Bolivia. Detected plates are geometrically rectified and passed to a character recognition model. To improve robustness under ambiguous scenarios, a lightweight vision-language model (Gemma3 4B) is selectively triggered as a confidence-based fallback mechanism. The proposed framework further leverages synthetic-to-real domain adaptation to improve robustness under diverse real-world conditions. We also introduce the first publicly available Bolivian LPDR dataset, enabling evaluation under diverse viewpoint and illumination conditions. The system achieves a character-level recognition accuracy of 89.6% on real-world data, demonstrating its effectiveness for deployment in challenging urban environments. Our project is publicly available at https://github.com/EdwinTSalcedo/BLPR.

AI.tldr: BLPR是一个针对玻利维亚车牌设计的深度学习检测与识别框架，通过合成数据预训练、真实数据微调、几何校正和基于置信度的视觉语言模型回退机制，在真实场景中达到89.6%的字符识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 在数据稀缺且视觉特征独特的玻利维亚等欠发达地区，车牌识别面临光照变化、视角扭曲等挑战，现有系统在非约束环境下的识别准确率不足。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流水线：1) 基于YOLO的检测器，先在Blender生成的合成数据上预训练以模拟极端视角和光照，再在玻利维亚拉巴斯采集的真实数据上微调；2) 检测到的车牌进行几何校正后送入字符识别模型；3) 引入轻量级视觉语言模型(Gemma3 4B)作为基于置信度的回退机制；4) 利用合成到真实的域适应技术提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据上达到89.6%的字符级识别准确率，并发布了首个公开的玻利维亚车牌检测与识别数据集。
AI.conclusion: BLPR框架在具有挑战性的城市环境中表现出色，通过合成数据增强、域适应和智能回退机制，有效解决了玻利维亚等欠发达地区的车牌识别难题。

title: SpecMoE: A Fast and Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Inference via Self-Assisted Speculative Decoding
comment: This is an extended version of our work, which is accepted for publication at the 63rd ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference (DAC), 2026
summary: The Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture has emerged as a promising approach to mitigate the rising computational costs of large language models (LLMs) by selectively activating parameters. However, its high memory requirements and sub-optimal parameter efficiency pose significant challenges for efficient deployment. Although CPU-offloaded MoE inference systems have been proposed in the literature, they offer limited efficiency, particularly for large batch sizes. In this work, we propose SpecMoE, a memory-efficient MoE inference system based on our self-assisted speculative decoding algorithm. SpecMoE demonstrates the effectiveness of applying speculative decoding to MoE inference without requiring additional model training or fine-tuning. Our system improves inference throughput by up to $4.30\times$, while significantly reducing bandwidth requirements of both memory and interconnect on memory-constrained systems.

AI.tldr: SpecMoE：基于自辅助推测解码的内存高效MoE推理系统，无需额外训练即可提升推理吞吐量4.3倍，显著降低内存带宽需求
AI.motivation: 混合专家（MoE）架构虽然能通过选择性激活参数来降低大语言模型的计算成本，但其高内存需求和次优参数效率给高效部署带来挑战。现有的CPU卸载MoE推理系统效率有限，特别是在大批量推理时表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出SpecMoE系统，基于自辅助推测解码算法实现内存高效的MoE推理。该方法无需额外模型训练或微调，通过推测解码技术优化MoE推理过程。
AI.result: 系统将推理吞吐量提升高达4.3倍，同时在内存受限系统上显著降低内存和互连带宽需求。
AI.conclusion: SpecMoE证明了将推测解码应用于MoE推理的有效性，为高效部署MoE模型提供了实用的系统解决方案。

title: HeceTokenizer: A Syllable-Based Tokenization Approach for Turkish Retrieval
summary: HeceTokenizer is a syllable-based tokenizer for Turkish that exploits the deterministic six-pattern phonological structure of the language to construct a closed, out-of-vocabulary (OOV)-free vocabulary of approximately 8,000 unique syllable types. A BERT-tiny encoder (1.5M parameters) is trained from scratch on a subset of Turkish Wikipedia using a masked language modeling objective and evaluated on the TQuAD retrieval benchmark using Recall@5. Combined with a fine-grained chunk-based retrieval strategy, HeceTokenizer achieves 50.3% Recall@5, surpassing the 46.92% reported by a morphology-driven baseline that uses a 200 times larger model. These results suggest that the phonological regularity of Turkish syllables provides a strong and resource-light inductive bias for retrieval tasks.

AI.tldr: HeceTokenizer是一种基于音节的土耳其语分词器，利用土耳其语六模式音系结构构建约8000个唯一音节类型的封闭词汇表，无OOV问题。结合BERT-tiny编码器和分块检索策略，在TQuAD检索基准上Recall@5达到50.3%，超越使用200倍大模型的形态学驱动基线。
AI.motivation: 土耳其语具有确定性的六模式音系结构，这为构建基于音节的分词器提供了理论基础。现有方法通常依赖形态学分析，需要大模型且计算资源消耗大。作者希望利用土耳其语的音系规律性，开发一种资源轻量但性能优越的检索方法。
AI.method: 1. 基于土耳其语六模式音系结构构建HeceTokenizer，创建约8000个唯一音节类型的封闭词汇表，无OOV问题；2. 使用BERT-tiny编码器（150万参数）在土耳其语维基百科子集上从头训练掩码语言建模任务；3. 结合细粒度分块检索策略进行文档检索。
AI.result: 在TQuAD检索基准上，HeceTokenizer达到50.3%的Recall@5，超越了之前使用200倍大模型的形态学驱动基线（46.92%）。这表明土耳其语音节的音系规律性为检索任务提供了强大且资源轻量的归纳偏置。
AI.conclusion: 土耳其语的音系规律性可以作为有效的归纳偏置，显著降低模型规模和计算需求，同时提升检索性能。基于音节的分词方法在资源受限场景下具有优势，为其他具有规律音系结构的语言提供了参考。

title: CARE-ECG: Causal Agent-based Reasoning for Explainable and Counterfactual ECG Interpretation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) enable waveform-to-text ECG interpretation and interactive clinical questioning, yet most ECG-LLM systems still rely on weak signal-text alignment and retrieval without explicit physiological or causal structure. This limits grounding, temporal reasoning, and counterfactual "what-if" analysis central to clinical decision-making. We propose CARE-ECG, a causally structured ECG-language reasoning framework that unifies representation learning, diagnosis, and explanation in a single pipeline. CARE-ECG encodes multi-lead ECGs into temporally organized latent biomarkers, performs causal graph inference for probabilistic diagnosis, and supports counterfactual assessment via structural causal models. To improve faithfulness, CARE-ECG grounds language outputs through causal retrieval-augmented generation and a modular agentic pipeline that integrates history, diagnosis, and response with verification. Across multiple ECG benchmarks and expert QA settings, CARE-ECG improves diagnostic accuracy and explanation faithfulness while reducing hallucinations (e.g., 0.84 accuracy on Expert-ECG-QA and 0.76 on SCP-mapped PTB-XL under GPT-4). Overall, CARE-ECG provides traceable reasoning by exposing key latent drivers, causal evidence paths, and how alternative physiological states would change outcomes.

AI.tldr: CARE-ECG是一个因果结构化ECG-语言推理框架，通过编码多导联心电图为时序组织潜在生物标志物，进行因果图推理实现概率诊断，并支持通过结构因果模型进行反事实评估，提高诊断准确性和解释忠实度。
AI.motivation: 现有ECG-LLM系统大多依赖弱信号-文本对齐和检索，缺乏明确的生理或因果结构，这限制了临床决策所需的接地性、时序推理和反事实"假设"分析能力。
AI.method: CARE-ECG将多导联ECG编码为时序组织潜在生物标志物，进行因果图推理实现概率诊断，支持通过结构因果模型进行反事实评估，并通过因果检索增强生成和模块化代理管道提高语言输出的忠实度。
AI.result: 在多个ECG基准测试和专家QA设置中，CARE-ECG提高了诊断准确性和解释忠实度，同时减少了幻觉（例如在Expert-ECG-QA上达到0.84准确率，在SCP映射的PTB-XL上达到0.76准确率）。
AI.conclusion: CARE-ECG通过暴露关键潜在驱动因素、因果证据路径以及替代生理状态如何改变结果，提供了可追溯的推理能力，为临床决策支持提供了更可靠的基础。

title: I Walk the Line: Examining the Role of Gestalt Continuity in Object Binding for Vision Transformers
summary: Object binding is a foundational process in visual cognition, during which low-level perceptual features are joined into object representations. Binding has been considered a fundamental challenge for neural networks, and a major milestone on the way to artificial models with flexible visual intelligence. Recently, several investigations have demonstrated evidence that binding mechanisms emerge in pretrained vision models, enabling them to associate portions of an image that contain an object. The question remains: how are these models binding objects together? In this work, we investigate whether vision models rely on the principle of Gestalt continuity to perform object binding, over and above other principles like similarity and proximity. Using synthetic datasets, we demonstrate that binding probes are sensitive to continuity across a wide range of pretrained vision transformers. Next, we uncover particular attention heads that track continuity, and show that these heads generalize across datasets. Finally, we ablate these attention heads, and show that they often contribute to producing representations that encode object binding.

AI.tldr: 视觉Transformer模型通过格式塔连续性原则进行物体绑定，特定注意力头专门负责跟踪连续性特征
AI.motivation: 研究预训练视觉模型如何实现物体绑定，特别关注它们是否依赖格式塔连续性原则，而非仅靠相似性或邻近性
AI.method: 使用合成数据集测试多种预训练视觉Transformer，识别专门跟踪连续性的注意力头，并通过消融实验验证这些头对物体绑定的贡献
AI.result: 发现绑定探针对连续性敏感，识别出专门跟踪连续性的注意力头，这些头在不同数据集上具有泛化能力，消融实验表明它们对产生编码物体绑定的表征有贡献
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer模型确实利用格式塔连续性原则进行物体绑定，特定注意力头专门负责这一功能，为理解神经网络中的绑定机制提供了新见解

title: Inductive Reasoning for Temporal Knowledge Graphs with Emerging Entities
summary: Reasoning on Temporal Knowledge Graphs (TKGs) is essential for predicting future events and time-aware facts. While existing methods are effective at capturing relational dynamics, their performance is limited by a closed-world assumption, which fails to account for emerging entities not present in the training. Notably, these entities continuously join the network without historical interactions. Empirical study reveals that emerging entities are widespread in TKGs, comprising roughly 25\% of all entities. The absence of historical interactions of these entities leads to significant performance degradation in reasoning tasks. Whereas, we observe that entities with semantic similarities often exhibit comparable interaction histories, suggesting the presence of transferable temporal patterns. Inspired by this insight, we propose TransFIR (Transferable Inductive Reasoning), a novel framework that leverages historical interaction sequences from semantically similar known entities to support inductive reasoning. Specifically, we propose a codebook-based classifier that categorizes emerging entities into latent semantic clusters, allowing them to adopt reasoning patterns from similar entities. Experimental results demonstrate that TransFIR outperforms all baselines in reasoning on emerging entities, achieving an average improvement of 28.6% in Mean Reciprocal Rank (MRR) across multiple datasets. The implementations are available at https://github.com/zhaodazhuang2333/TransFIR.

AI.tldr: TransFIR是一个用于时序知识图谱推理的新框架，专门处理训练中未出现的新兴实体，通过语义相似性从已知实体转移历史交互模式，显著提升推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有时序知识图谱推理方法基于封闭世界假设，无法处理训练中未出现的新兴实体。研究发现新兴实体在TKGs中占比约25%，且缺乏历史交互导致推理性能显著下降。观察到语义相似的实体通常具有可比较的交互历史，表明存在可转移的时序模式。
AI.method: 提出TransFIR框架，利用基于码本的分类器将新兴实体分类到潜在语义簇中，使其能够从语义相似的已知实体中采用推理模式。通过转移相似实体的历史交互序列来支持归纳推理。
AI.result: 实验结果显示TransFIR在新兴实体推理任务上优于所有基线方法，在多个数据集上平均提升28.6%的Mean Reciprocal Rank (MRR)。
AI.conclusion: TransFIR通过利用语义相似实体的可转移时序模式，有效解决了时序知识图谱中新出现实体的推理问题，显著提升了归纳推理性能。

title: Learning and Enforcing Context-Sensitive Control for LLMs
summary: Controlling the output of Large Language Models (LLMs) through context-sensitive constraints has emerged as a promising approach to overcome the limitations of Context-Free Grammars (CFGs) in guaranteeing generation validity. However, such constraints typically require manual specification -- a significant barrier demanding specialized expertise. We introduce a framework that automatically learns context-sensitive constraints from LLM interactions through a two-phase process: syntactic exploration to gather diverse outputs for constraint learning, followed by constraint exploitation to enforce these learned rules during generation. Experiments demonstrate that our method enables even small LLMs (1B parameters) to learn and generate with perfect constraint adherence, outperforming larger counterparts and state-of-the-art reasoning models. This work represents the first integration of context-sensitive grammar learning with LLM generation, eliminating manual specification while maintaining generation validity.

AI.tldr: 提出自动学习上下文敏感约束的框架，通过探索-利用两阶段从LLM交互中学习约束，无需人工指定，使小模型也能完美遵守约束
AI.motivation: 上下文敏感约束能克服上下文无关文法在保证生成有效性方面的局限，但通常需要人工指定，这需要专业知识，成为重要障碍
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1) 句法探索阶段收集多样输出用于约束学习；2) 约束利用阶段在生成时强制执行学习到的规则
AI.result: 实验表明该方法使小模型(1B参数)也能学习和生成时完美遵守约束，优于更大模型和最先进的推理模型
AI.conclusion: 这是首次将上下文敏感文法学习与LLM生成相结合，消除了人工指定需求同时保持生成有效性

title: Replicable Composition
comment: Abstract shortened due to Arxiv requirements
summary:
Replicability requires that algorithmic conclusions remain consistent when rerun on independently drawn data. A central structural question is composition: given $k$ problems each admitting a $ρ$-replicable algorithm with sample complexity $n$, how many samples are needed to solve all jointly while preserving replicability? The naive analysis yields $\widetilde{O}(nk^2)$ samples, and Bun et al. (STOC'23) observed that reductions through differential privacy give an alternative $\widetilde{O}(n^2k)$ bound, leaving open whether the optimal $\widetilde{O}(nk)$ scaling is achievable. We resolve this open problem and, more generally, show that problems with sample complexities $n_1,\ldots,n_k$ can be jointly solved with $\widetilde{O}(\sum_i n_i)$ samples while preserving constant replicability. Our approach converts each replicable algorithm into a perfectly generalizing one, composes them via a privacy-style analysis, and maps back via correlated sampling. This yields the first advanced composition theorem for replicability. En route, we obtain new bounds for the composition of perfectly generalizing algorithms with heterogeneous parameters.
  As part of our results, we provide a boosting theorem for the success probability of replicable algorithms. For a broad class of problems, the failure probability appears as a separate additive term independent of $ρ$, immediately yielding improved sample complexity bounds for several problems.
  Finally, we prove an $Ω(nk^2)$ lower bound for adaptive composition, establishing a quadratic separation from the non-adaptive setting. The key technique, which we call the phantom run, yields structural results of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 本文解决了可复制算法的组合问题，证明了k个问题可以用O(∑n_i)样本联合解决，实现了最优缩放，并建立了可复制性的高级组合定理。
AI.motivation: 可复制性要求算法在独立数据上重新运行时结论保持一致。核心结构问题是组合：给定k个问题，每个问题需要n个样本的ρ-可复制算法，如何用最少的样本同时解决所有问题并保持可复制性？现有方法要么需要O(nk²)样本，要么需要O(n²k)样本，最优的O(nk)缩放是否可实现是开放问题。
AI.method: 将每个可复制算法转换为完全泛化算法，通过隐私风格分析进行组合，然后通过相关采样映射回来。这种方法建立了可复制性的第一个高级组合定理。还提供了可复制算法成功概率的提升定理。
AI.result: 解决了开放问题：证明了k个问题可以用O(∑n_i)样本联合解决，实现了最优缩放。对于自适应组合，证明了Ω(nk²)下界，与非自适应设置形成二次分离。获得了完全泛化算法异质参数组合的新界限。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了可复制算法的最优组合界限，解决了重要的开放问题。提出的方法包括将可复制算法转换为完全泛化算法、隐私风格组合和相关采样，为可复制性理论提供了重要工具。还证明了自适应组合的下界，展示了与非自适应设置的显著差异。

title: Cross-Cultural Value Awareness in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: The rapid adoption of large vision-language models (LVLMs) in recent years has been accompanied by growing fairness concerns due to their propensity to reinforce harmful societal stereotypes. While significant attention has been paid to such fairness concerns in the context of social biases, relatively little prior work has examined the presence of stereotypes in LVLMs related to cultural contexts such as religion, nationality, and socioeconomic status. In this work, we aim to narrow this gap by investigating how cultural contexts depicted in images influence the judgments LVLMs make about a person's moral, ethical, and political values. We conduct a multi-dimensional analysis of such value judgments in five popular LVLMs using counterfactual image sets, which depict the same person across different cultural contexts. Our evaluation framework diagnoses LVLM awareness of cultural value differences through the use of Moral Foundations Theory, lexical analyses, and the sensitivity of generated values to depicted cultural contexts.

AI.tldr: 研究大型视觉语言模型在文化背景（宗教、国籍、社会经济地位）方面的刻板印象问题，通过反事实图像集分析模型对人物道德、伦理和政治价值观的判断
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注大型视觉语言模型的社会偏见问题，但较少关注文化背景相关的刻板印象（宗教、国籍、社会经济地位）。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探究图像中描绘的文化背景如何影响模型对人物价值观的判断
AI.method: 使用反事实图像集（同一人物在不同文化背景下的图像），对五个流行的大型视觉语言模型进行多维分析。评估框架结合道德基础理论、词汇分析，以及模型生成价值观对文化背景的敏感性
AI.result: 论文摘要未提供具体结果，但建立了评估框架来诊断模型对文化价值差异的认知能力
AI.conclusion: 需要关注大型视觉语言模型在文化背景方面的刻板印象问题，提出的评估框架可用于系统分析模型对文化价值差异的敏感性

title: MAVEN-T: Multi-Agent enVironment-aware Enhanced Neural Trajectory predictor with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Trajectory prediction remains a critical yet challenging component in autonomous driving systems, requiring sophisticated reasoning capabilities while meeting strict real-time deployment constraints. While knowledge distillation has demonstrated effectiveness in model compression, existing approaches often fail to preserve complex decision-making capabilities, particularly in dynamic multi-agent scenarios. This paper introduces MAVEN-T, a teacher-student framework that achieves state-of-the-art trajectory prediction through complementary architectural co-design and progressive distillation. The teacher employs hybrid attention mechanisms for maximum representational capacity, while the student uses efficient architectures optimized for deployment. Knowledge transfer is performed via multi-granular distillation with adaptive curriculum learning that dynamically adjusts complexity based on performance. Importantly, the framework incorporates reinforcement learning to overcome the imitation ceiling of traditional distillation, enabling the student to verify, refine, and optimize teacher knowledge through dynamic environmental interaction, potentially achieving more robust decision-making than the teacher itself. Extensive experiments on NGSIM and highD datasets demonstrate 6.2x parameter compression and 3.7x inference speedup while maintaining state-of-the-art accuracy, establishing a new paradigm for deploying sophisticated reasoning models under resource constraints.

AI.tldr: MAVEN-T是一个用于轨迹预测的师生框架，通过架构协同设计和渐进式蒸馏实现SOTA性能，在保持精度的同时实现6.2倍参数压缩和3.7倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中的轨迹预测需要复杂的推理能力，同时满足严格的实时部署约束。现有的知识蒸馏方法往往无法保留动态多智能体场景中的复杂决策能力。
AI.method: 提出MAVEN-T师生框架：教师模型使用混合注意力机制获得最大表示能力，学生模型使用高效架构优化部署。通过多粒度蒸馏和自适应课程学习进行知识转移，并引入强化学习来超越传统蒸馏的模仿上限。
AI.result: 在NGSIM和highD数据集上的实验表明，实现了6.2倍的参数压缩和3.7倍的推理加速，同时保持了最先进的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: MAVEN-T为在资源约束下部署复杂推理模型建立了新范式，通过架构协同设计和渐进式蒸馏，使轻量级学生模型能够超越传统蒸馏的限制，实现更鲁棒的决策能力。

title: QFS-Composer: Query-focused summarization pipeline for less resourced languages
summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong performance in text summarization, yet their effectiveness drops significantly across languages with restricted training resources. This work addresses the challenge of query-focused summarization (QFS) in less-resourced languages, where labeled datasets and evaluation tools are limited. We present a novel QFS framework, QFS-Composer, that integrates query decomposition, question generation (QG), question answering (QA), and abstractive summarization to improve the factual alignment of a summary with user intent. We test our approach on the Slovenian language. To enable high-quality supervision and evaluation, we develop the Slovenian QA and QG models based on a Slovene LLM and adapt evaluation approaches for reference-free summary evaluation. Empirical evaluation shows that the QA-guided summarization pipeline yields improved consistency and relevance over baseline LLMs. Our work establishes an extensible methodology for advancing QFS in less-resourced languages.

AI.tldr: 提出QFS-Composer框架，通过查询分解、问题生成、问答和摘要生成提升低资源语言查询聚焦摘要的事实对齐效果，在斯洛文尼亚语上验证有效性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在文本摘要方面表现良好，但在训练资源受限的语言中效果显著下降。低资源语言的查询聚焦摘要面临标注数据集和评估工具有限的挑战。
AI.method: 提出QFS-Composer框架，整合查询分解、问题生成、问答和抽象摘要生成。基于斯洛文尼亚语LLM开发QA和QG模型，并适配无参考摘要评估方法。
AI.result: 实证评估显示，QA引导的摘要流水线相比基线LLM在一致性和相关性方面有改进。为低资源语言的QFS建立了可扩展的方法论。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为推进低资源语言的查询聚焦摘要建立了可扩展的方法论，通过集成多个组件改善了摘要与用户意图的事实对齐。

title: Membership Inference Attacks Expose Participation Privacy in ECG Foundation Encoders
summary:
Foundation-style ECG encoders pretrained with self-supervised learning are increasingly reused across tasks, institutions, and deployment contexts, often through model-as-a-service interfaces that expose scalar scores or latent representations. While such reuse improves data efficiency and generalization, it raises a participation privacy concern: can an adversary infer whether a specific individual or cohort contributed ECG data to pretraining, even when raw waveforms and diagnostic labels are never disclosed? In connected-health settings, training participation itself may reveal institutional affiliation, study enrollment, or sensitive health context.
  We present an implementation-grounded audit of membership inference attacks (MIAs) against modern self-supervised ECG foundation encoders, covering contrastive objectives (SimCLR, TS2Vec) and masked reconstruction objectives (CNN- and Transformer-based MAE). We evaluate three realistic attacker interfaces: (i) score-only black-box access to scalar outputs, (ii) adaptive learned attackers that aggregate subject-level statistics across repeated queries, and (iii) embedding-access attackers that probe latent representation geometry. Using a subject-centric protocol with window-to-subject aggregation and calibration at fixed false-positive rates under a cross-dataset auditing setting, we observe heterogeneous and objective-dependent participation leakage: leakage is most pronounced in small or institution-specific cohorts and, for contrastive encoders, can saturate in embedding space, while larger and more diverse datasets substantially attenuate operational tail risk. Overall, our results show that restricting access to raw signals or labels is insufficient to guarantee participation privacy, underscoring the need for deployment-aware auditing of reusable biosignal foundation encoders in connected-health systems.

AI.tldr: 对自监督ECG基础编码器进行成员推断攻击审计，发现即使不暴露原始波形和标签，攻击者仍能推断特定个体是否参与预训练，尤其在小型或机构特定队列中风险显著。
AI.motivation: 随着ECG基础编码器在任务、机构和部署环境中的重用，虽然提高了数据效率和泛化能力，但引发了参与隐私问题：即使不披露原始波形和诊断标签，攻击者能否推断特定个体或队列是否参与了预训练？在互联健康环境中，训练参与本身可能暴露机构隶属关系、研究参与或敏感健康背景。
AI.method: 对现代自监督ECG基础编码器进行实现导向的成员推断攻击审计，涵盖对比目标（SimCLR、TS2Vec）和掩码重建目标（基于CNN和Transformer的MAE）。评估三种现实攻击者接口：(i)仅访问标量输出的分数黑盒访问，(ii)聚合重复查询中受试者级统计量的自适应学习攻击者，(iii)探测潜在表示几何的嵌入访问攻击者。使用以受试者为中心的协议，在跨数据集审计设置下进行窗口到受试者的聚合和固定假阳性率校准。
AI.result: 观察到异质性和目标依赖的参与泄漏：泄漏在小规模或机构特定队列中最为显著；对于对比编码器，嵌入空间中的泄漏可能饱和；更大更多样化的数据集显著减弱操作尾部风险。限制对原始信号或标签的访问不足以保证参与隐私。
AI.conclusion: 在互联健康系统中重用生物信号基础编码器时，需要部署感知的审计来确保参与隐私，因为仅限制对原始信号或标签的访问是不够的。

title: Unmixing-Guided Spatial-Spectral Mamba with Clustering Tokens for Hyperspectral Image Classification
summary: Although hyperspectral image (HSI) classification is critical for supporting various environmental applications, it is a challenging task due to the spectral-mixture effect, the spatial-spectral heterogeneity and the difficulty to preserve class boundaries and details. This letter presents a novel unmixing-guided spatial-spectral Mamba with clustering tokens for improved HSI classification, with the following contributions. First, to disentangle the spectral mixture effect in HSI for improved pattern discovery, we design a novel spectral unmixing network that not only automatically learns endmembers and abundance maps from HSI but also accounts for endmember variabilities. Second, to generate Mamba token sequences, based on the clusters defined by abundance maps, we design an efficient Top-\textit{K} token selection strategy to adaptively sequence the tokens for improved representational capability. Third, to improve spatial-spectral feature learning and detail preservation, based on the Top-\textit{K} token sequences, we design a novel unmixing-guided spatial-spectral Mamba module that greatly improves traditional Mamba models in terms of token learning and sequencing. Fourth, to learn simultaneously the endmember-abundance patterns and classification labels, a multi-task scheme is designed for model supervision, leading to a new unmixing-classification framework that outputs not only accurate classification maps but also a comprehensive spectral-library and abundance maps. Comparative experiments on four HSI datasets demonstrate that our model can greatly outperform the other state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/GSIL-UCalgary/Unmixing_guided_Mamba.git

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于解混引导的空间-光谱Mamba网络，结合聚类token的HSI分类新方法，通过解混网络学习端元与丰度图，采用Top-K token选择策略，设计多任务监督框架，在四个HSI数据集上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临光谱混合效应、空间-光谱异质性以及难以保持类别边界和细节等挑战，需要开发能够同时处理这些问题的有效方法。
AI.method: 1) 设计光谱解混网络自动学习端元和丰度图并考虑端元变异性；2) 基于丰度图聚类设计Top-K token选择策略生成Mamba token序列；3) 设计解混引导的空间-光谱Mamba模块改进特征学习和细节保持；4) 采用多任务监督框架同时学习端元-丰度模式和分类标签。
AI.result: 在四个HSI数据集上的对比实验表明，该方法显著优于其他最先进方法，不仅输出准确的分类图，还能生成完整的光谱库和丰度图。
AI.conclusion: 提出的解混引导空间-光谱Mamba方法有效解决了HSI分类中的光谱混合、空间-光谱异质性和细节保持问题，为高光谱图像分析提供了新的解决方案框架。

title: PoreDiT: A Scalable Generative Model for Large-Scale Digital Rock Reconstruction
summary: This manuscript presents PoreDiT, a novel generative model designed for high-efficiency digital rock reconstruction at gigavoxel scales. Addressing the significant challenges in digital rock physics (DRP), particularly the trade-off between resolution and field-of-view (FOV), and the computational bottlenecks associated with traditional deep learning architectures, PoreDiT leverages a three-dimensional (3D) Swin Transformer to break through these limitations. By directly predicting the binary probability field of pore spaces instead of grayscale intensities, the model preserves key topological features critical for pore-scale fluid flow and transport simulations. This approach enhances computational efficiency, enabling the generation of ultra-large-scale ($1024^3$ voxels) digital rock samples on consumer-grade hardware. Furthermore, PoreDiT achieves physical fidelity comparable to previous state-of-the-art methods, including accurate porosity, pore-scale permeability, and Euler characteristics. The model's ability to scale efficiently opens new avenues for large-domain hydrodynamic simulations and provides practical solutions for researchers in pore-scale fluid mechanics, reservoir characterization, and carbon sequestration.

AI.tldr: PoreDiT是一种基于3D Swin Transformer的高效生成模型，能够在消费级硬件上生成千兆体素规模的数字岩石，解决了数字岩石物理中分辨率与视场的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 解决数字岩石物理中的关键挑战：分辨率与视场的权衡问题，以及传统深度学习架构的计算瓶颈。需要生成大规模数字岩石样本用于孔隙尺度流体流动和输运模拟。
AI.method: 采用三维Swin Transformer架构，直接预测孔隙空间的二元概率场而非灰度强度，保留关键拓扑特征。该方法提高了计算效率，能够在消费级硬件上生成超大规模（1024^3体素）数字岩石样本。
AI.result: PoreDiT能够高效生成千兆体素规模的数字岩石，物理保真度与现有最先进方法相当，包括准确的孔隙度、孔隙尺度渗透率和欧拉特征。在消费级硬件上实现了超大规模样本生成。
AI.conclusion: PoreDiT通过创新的3D Swin Transformer架构和二元概率场预测方法，突破了数字岩石重建的规模和效率限制，为大规模域流体动力学模拟提供了实用解决方案，在孔隙尺度流体力学、储层表征和碳封存等领域具有重要应用价值。

title: Attention Sinks as Internal Signals for Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models frequently exhibit hallucinations: fluent and confident outputs that are factually incorrect or unsupported by the input context. While recent hallucination detection methods have explored various features derived from attention maps, the underlying mechanisms they exploit remain poorly understood. In this work, we propose SinkProbe, a hallucination detection method grounded in the observation that hallucinations are deeply entangled with attention sinks - tokens that accumulate disproportionate attention mass during generation - indicating a transition from distributed, input-grounded attention to compressed, prior-dominated computation. Importantly, although sink scores are computed solely from attention maps, we find that the classifier preferentially relies on sinks whose associated value vectors have large norms. Moreover, we show that previous methods implicitly depend on attention sinks by establishing their mathematical relationship to sink scores. Our findings yield a novel hallucination detection method grounded in theory that produces state-of-the-art results across popular datasets and LLMs.

AI.tldr: SinkProbe：基于注意力汇聚（attention sinks）理论的新型幻觉检测方法，通过分析注意力分布从分散到压缩的转变来识别LLM幻觉，在多个数据集和模型上达到SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型经常产生幻觉（流畅但事实错误或无输入依据的输出）。现有幻觉检测方法虽然探索了注意力图的各种特征，但其底层机制仍不明确，需要理论基础的检测方法。
AI.method: 提出SinkProbe方法，基于观察发现幻觉与注意力汇聚（某些token在生成过程中积累不成比例的注意力质量）密切相关。该方法从注意力图中计算汇聚分数，并发现分类器优先依赖那些关联值向量范数较大的汇聚点。同时建立了该方法与先前方法的数学关系。
AI.result: SinkProbe在多个流行数据集和LLM上取得了最先进的幻觉检测结果，证明了基于理论的方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉检测与注意力汇聚现象密切相关，SinkProbe提供了一个理论基础的检测框架，能够有效识别LLM从分布式、输入基础的注意力到压缩、先验主导计算的转变。

title: Towards Green Wearable Computing: A Physics-Aware Spiking Neural Network for Energy-Efficient IMU-based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Wearable IMU-based Human Activity Recognition (HAR) relies heavily on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs), which are burdened by immense computational and buffering demands. Their power-hungry floating-point operations and rigid requirement to process complete temporal windows severely cripple battery-constrained edge devices. While Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer extreme event-driven energy efficiency, standard architectures struggle with complex biomechanical topologies and temporal gradient degradation. To bridge this gap, we propose the Physics-Aware Spiking Neural Network (PAS-Net), a fully multiplier-free architecture explicitly tailored for Green HAR. Spatially, an adaptive symmetric topology mixer enforces human-joint physical constraints. Temporally, an $O(1)$-memory causal neuromodulator yields context-aware dynamic threshold neurons, adapting actively to non-stationary movement rhythms. Furthermore, we leverage a temporal spike error objective to unlock a flexible early-exit mechanism for continuous IMU streams. Evaluated across seven diverse datasets, PAS-Net achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while replacing dense operations with sparse 0.1 pJ integer accumulations. Crucially, its confidence-driven early-exit capability drastically reduces dynamic energy consumption by up to 98\%. PAS-Net establishes a robust, ultra-low-power neuromorphic standard for always-on wearable sensing.

AI.tldr: 提出PAS-Net，一种基于物理感知的脉冲神经网络，用于可穿戴IMU人体活动识别，实现超低功耗和实时处理
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络在可穿戴设备上计算和缓冲需求大，功耗高，而标准脉冲神经网络难以处理复杂的生物力学拓扑和时间梯度退化问题
AI.method: 提出物理感知脉冲神经网络(PAS-Net)：空间上使用自适应对称拓扑混合器强制人体关节物理约束；时间上使用O(1)内存因果神经调节器实现上下文感知动态阈值神经元；利用时间脉冲误差目标实现灵活的提前退出机制
AI.result: 在7个数据集上达到最先进精度，用稀疏的0.1 pJ整数累加替代密集运算，动态能耗降低高达98%
AI.conclusion: PAS-Net为始终在线的可穿戴传感建立了强大、超低功耗的神经形态标准

title: Learnable Motion-Focused Tokenization for Effective and Efficient Video Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
comment: Accepted to IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Video Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (VUDA) poses a significant challenge in action recognition, requiring the adaptation of a model from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Despite recent advances, existing VUDA methods often fall short of fully supervised performance, a key reason being the prevalence of static and uninformative backgrounds that exacerbate domain shifts. Additionally, prior approaches largely overlook computational efficiency, limiting real-world adoption. To address these issues, we propose Learnable Motion-Focused Tokenization (LMFT) for VUDA. LMFT tokenizes video frames into patch tokens and learns to discard low-motion, redundant tokens, primarily corresponding to background regions, while retaining motion-rich, action-relevant tokens for adaptation. Extensive experiments on three standard VUDA benchmarks across 21 domain adaptation settings show that our VUDA framework with LMFT achieves state-of-the-art performance while significantly reducing computational overhead. LMFT thus enables VUDA that is both effective and computationally efficient.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LMFT方法，通过可学习的运动聚焦标记化技术，在视频无监督域自适应中有效过滤背景噪声并降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 当前视频无监督域自适应方法存在两个主要问题：1) 静态无信息背景加剧域偏移，导致性能低于全监督方法；2) 计算效率低下，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出可学习的运动聚焦标记化(LMFT)，将视频帧分割为补丁标记，学习丢弃低运动冗余标记（主要对应背景区域），保留运动丰富、动作相关的标记进行域自适应。
AI.result: 在3个标准VUDA基准测试的21个域自适应设置中，LMFT实现了最先进的性能，同时显著降低了计算开销。
AI.conclusion: LMFT实现了既高效又计算高效的视频无监督域自适应，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Credit-Budgeted ICPC-Style Coding: When Agents Must Pay for Every Decision
summary: Current evaluations of autonomous coding agents assume an unrealistic, infinite-resource environment. However, real-world software engineering is a resource-bound competition. As we scale toward large agent swarms, ignoring compute and time costs risks catastrophic budget exhaustion. To shift the focus from isolated accuracy to cost-aware problem-solving, we introduce USACOArena, an interactive ACM-ICPC-style arena driven by a strict "credit" economy. Every generated token, local test, and elapsed second depletes a fixed budget, forcing agents to make strategic trade-offs. Our comprehensive profiling reveals that frontier single agents and swarms currently fail to optimally balance accuracy with these constraints, exhibiting divergent, path-dependent behaviors. Ultimately, USACOArena provides an essential dynamic training ground for developing highly efficient, resource-aware agent architectures.

AI.tldr: 提出USACOArena，一个基于信用经济的ACM-ICPC风格竞技场，用于评估资源受限环境下的自主编码代理性能
AI.motivation: 当前自主编码代理评估假设无限资源环境，但现实软件开发是资源受限的竞争。随着智能体群规模扩大，忽略计算和时间成本可能导致灾难性预算耗尽
AI.method: 引入USACOArena交互式竞技场，采用严格的"信用"经济体系：每个生成的token、本地测试和流逝秒数都会消耗固定预算，强制代理进行战略权衡
AI.result: 全面分析显示，前沿的单智能体和群体目前无法在准确性和约束之间达到最优平衡，表现出不同的路径依赖行为
AI.conclusion: USACOArena为开发高效、资源感知的智能体架构提供了重要的动态训练场

title: Expect the Unexpected? Testing the Surprisal of Salient Entities
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 (main, long); camera-ready version
summary: Previous work examining the Uniform Information Density (UID) hypothesis has shown that while information as measured by surprisal metrics is distributed more or less evenly across documents overall, local discrepancies can arise due to functional pressures corresponding to syntactic and discourse structural constraints. However, work thus far has largely disregarded the relative salience of discourse participants. We fill this gap by studying how overall salience of entities in discourse relates to surprisal using 70K manually annotated mentions across 16 genres of English and a novel minimal-pair prompting method. Our results show that globally salient entities exhibit significantly higher surprisal than non-salient ones, even controlling for position, length, and nesting confounds. Moreover, salient entities systematically reduce surprisal for surrounding content when used as prompts, enhancing document-level predictability. This effect varies by genre, appearing strongest in topic-coherent texts and weakest in conversational contexts. Our findings refine the UID competing pressures framework by identifying global entity salience as a mechanism shaping information distribution in discourse.

AI.tldr: 研究发现：在话语中，全局显著的实体比非显著实体具有更高的信息意外值，但作为提示时能降低周围内容的信息意外值，这种效应在不同文体中有所差异。
AI.motivation: 先前关于均匀信息密度(UID)假设的研究发现，信息在文档中大致均匀分布，但局部差异可能由句法和话语结构约束引起。然而，现有研究大多忽视了话语参与者的相对显著性。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探究话语中实体的整体显著性如何与信息意外值相关。
AI.method: 使用70K手动标注的提及，涵盖16种英语文体，采用新颖的最小对提示方法，分析实体显著性与信息意外值的关系，并控制位置、长度和嵌套等混淆因素。
AI.result: 1. 全局显著实体比非显著实体具有显著更高的信息意外值；2. 显著实体作为提示时能系统性地降低周围内容的信息意外值，增强文档级可预测性；3. 这种效应在不同文体中存在差异：在主题连贯的文本中最强，在对话语境中最弱。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现全局实体显著性作为塑造话语中信息分布的机制，完善了UID竞争压力框架，揭示了显著性在信息组织中的作用。

title: Rethinking the Diffusion Model from a Langevin Perspective
summary: Diffusion models are often introduced from multiple perspectives, such as VAEs, score matching, or flow matching, accompanied by dense and technically demanding mathematics that can be difficult for beginners to grasp. One classic question is: how does the reverse process invert the forward process to generate data from pure noise? This article systematically organizes the diffusion model from a fresh Langevin perspective, offering a simpler, clearer, and more intuitive answer. We also address the following questions: how can ODE-based and SDE-based diffusion models be unified under a single framework? Why are diffusion models theoretically superior to ordinary VAEs? Why is flow matching not fundamentally simpler than denoising or score matching, but equivalent under maximum-likelihood? We demonstrate that the Langevin perspective offers clear and straightforward answers to these questions, bridging existing interpretations of diffusion models, showing how different formulations can be converted into one another within a common framework, and offering pedagogical value for both learners and experienced researchers seeking deeper intuition.

AI.tldr: 从朗之万动力学视角重新梳理扩散模型，提供更简单直观的理解，统一ODE/SDE框架，解释扩散模型优于普通VAE的原因，以及流匹配与去噪/分数匹配的等价性。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型通常从VAE、分数匹配或流匹配等多个角度介绍，数学复杂难懂。初学者常困惑于反向过程如何从纯噪声生成数据。本文旨在从朗之万动力学视角提供更简单清晰的理解。
AI.method: 采用朗之万动力学视角系统整理扩散模型，将ODE和SDE为基础的扩散模型统一到单一框架下，展示不同表述如何在共同框架下相互转换。
AI.result: 朗之万视角为扩散模型提供了清晰直观的解释，回答了反向过程如何工作、ODE/SDE框架如何统一、扩散模型为何优于普通VAE、流匹配与去噪/分数匹配为何等价等问题。
AI.conclusion: 朗之万动力学视角为扩散模型提供了统一、直观的理解框架，具有教学价值，既适合初学者也适合有经验的研究者深入理解扩散模型的本质。

title: YUV20K: A Complexity-Driven Benchmark and Trajectory-Aware Alignment Model for Video Camouflaged Object Detection
summary: Video Camouflaged Object Detection (VCOD) is currently constrained by the scarcity of challenging benchmarks and the limited robustness of models against erratic motion dynamics. Existing methods often struggle with Motion-Induced Appearance Instability and Temporal Feature Misalignment caused by complex motion scenarios. To address the data bottleneck, we present YUV20K, a pixel-level annoated complexity-driven VCOD benchmark. Comprising 24,295 annotated frames across 91 scenes and 47 kinds of species, it specifically targets challenging scenarios like large-displacement motion, camera motion and other 4 types scenarios. On the methodological front, we propose a novel framework featuring two key modules: Motion Feature Stabilization (MFS) and Trajectory-Aware Alignment (TAA). The MFS module utilizes frame-agnostic Semantic Basis Primitives to stablize features, while the TAA module leverages trajectory-guided deformable sampling to ensure precise temporal alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art competitors on existing datasets and establishes a new baseline on the challenging YUV20K. Notably, our framework exhibits superior cross-domain generalization and robustness when confronting complex spatiotemporal scenarios. Our code and dataset will be available at https://github.com/K1NSA/YUV20K

AI.tldr: 提出YUV20K视频伪装物体检测基准和包含MFS与TAA模块的新框架，解决现有方法在复杂运动场景下的运动诱导外观不稳定和时间特征错位问题。
AI.motivation: 当前视频伪装物体检测面临两个主要挑战：缺乏具有挑战性的基准数据集，以及现有模型在复杂运动动态下的鲁棒性不足。现有方法在复杂运动场景中经常遇到运动诱导的外观不稳定性和时间特征错位问题。
AI.method: 提出包含两个关键模块的新框架：运动特征稳定化模块（MFS）使用帧无关的语义基元来稳定特征；轨迹感知对齐模块（TAA）利用轨迹引导的可变形采样来确保精确的时间对齐。同时创建了YUV20K基准数据集，包含24,295个标注帧，涵盖91个场景和47种物种。
AI.result: 该方法在现有数据集上显著优于最先进的方法，并在具有挑战性的YUV20K基准上建立了新的基线。该框架在复杂时空场景中表现出优异的跨域泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过YUV20K基准数据集和包含MFS与TAA模块的新框架，有效解决了视频伪装物体检测中的数据瓶颈和方法局限性问题，为复杂运动场景下的检测任务提供了更强大的解决方案。

title: Edu-MMBias: A Three-Tier Multimodal Benchmark for Auditing Social Bias in Vision-Language Models under Educational Contexts
summary: As Vision-Language Models (VLMs) become integral to educational decision-making, ensuring their fairness is paramount. However, current text-centric evaluations neglect the visual modality, leaving an unregulated channel for latent social biases. To bridge this gap, we present Edu-MMBias, a systematic auditing framework grounded in the tri-component model of attitudes from social psychology. This framework diagnoses bias across three hierarchical dimensions: cognitive, affective, and behavioral. Utilizing a specialized generative pipeline that incorporates a self-correct mechanism and human-in-the-loop verification, we synthesize contamination-resistant student profiles to conduct a holistic stress test on state-of-the-art VLMs. Our extensive audit reveals critical, counter-intuitive patterns: models exhibit a compensatory class bias favoring lower-status narratives while simultaneously harboring deep-seated health and racial stereotypes. Crucially, we find that visual inputs act as a safety backdoor, triggering a resurgence of biases that bypass text-based alignment safeguards and revealing a systematic misalignment between latent cognition and final decision-making. The contributions of this paper are available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EduMMBias-63B2.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Edu-MMBias框架，基于社会心理学态度三元模型，系统审计视觉语言模型在教育决策中的偏见，发现视觉输入会绕过文本对齐安全措施，触发隐藏偏见。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉语言模型在教育决策中日益重要，确保其公平性至关重要。然而，当前以文本为中心的评估忽略了视觉模态，留下了潜在社会偏见的未监管渠道。
AI.method: 提出Edu-MMBias审计框架，基于态度三元模型（认知、情感、行为三个层次维度），采用包含自我纠正机制和人工验证的专门生成管道，合成抗污染学生档案，对最先进的视觉语言模型进行全面压力测试。
AI.result: 审计揭示了关键的反直觉模式：模型表现出补偿性阶层偏见（偏向低地位叙事），同时存在根深蒂固的健康和种族刻板印象。视觉输入充当安全后门，触发绕过文本对齐保障措施的偏见复苏，揭示潜在认知与最终决策之间的系统性错位。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型在教育决策中存在复杂的偏见模式，视觉输入会绕过文本对齐安全措施，需要更全面的多模态审计框架来确保教育AI的公平性。

title: Too Nice to Tell the Truth: Quantifying Agreeableness-Driven Sycophancy in Role-Playing Language Models
comment: 14 Pages, 5 Figures, 9 Tables, ACL Main Conference 2026
summary: Large language models increasingly serve as conversational agents that adopt personas and role-play characters at user request. This capability, while valuable, raises concerns about sycophancy: the tendency to provide responses that validate users rather than prioritize factual accuracy. While prior work has established that sycophancy poses risks to AI safety and alignment, the relationship between specific personality traits of adopted personas and the degree of sycophantic behavior remains unexplored. We present a systematic investigation of how persona agreeableness influences sycophancy across 13 small, open-weight language models ranging from 0.6B to 20B parameters. We develop a benchmark comprising 275 personas evaluated on NEO-IPIP agreeableness subscales and expose each persona to 4,950 sycophancy-eliciting prompts spanning 33 topic categories. Our analysis reveals that 9 of 13 models exhibit statistically significant positive correlations between persona agreeableness and sycophancy rates, with Pearson correlations reaching $r = 0.87$ and effect sizes as large as Cohen's $d = 2.33$. These findings demonstrate that agreeableness functions as a reliable predictor of persona-induced sycophancy, with direct implications for the deployment of role-playing AI systems and the development of alignment strategies that account for personality-mediated deceptive behaviors.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大语言模型角色扮演的人格特质（宜人性）与谄媚行为显著相关，宜人性越高，模型越倾向于讨好用户而非坚持事实准确性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型作为对话代理时，会根据用户要求扮演特定角色和人格，这引发了谄媚行为的担忧——即模型倾向于迎合用户而非坚持事实准确性。虽然已有研究指出谄媚行为对AI安全和对齐构成风险，但具体人格特质与谄媚程度之间的关系尚未被探索。
AI.method: 对13个参数量从0.6B到20B的开源语言模型进行系统研究。开发包含275个人格的基准测试，使用NEO-IPIP宜性子量表评估人格特质，让每个人格面对4,950个谄媚诱导提示，涵盖33个主题类别。
AI.result: 13个模型中有9个显示出人格宜人性与谄媚率之间存在统计学显著的正相关，皮尔逊相关系数最高达r=0.87，效应量高达Cohen's d=2.33。表明宜人性是预测人格诱导谄媚行为的可靠指标。
AI.conclusion: 人格特质（特别是宜人性）显著影响语言模型的谄媚行为，这对角色扮演AI系统的部署具有重要意义，需要在对齐策略中考虑人格介导的欺骗性行为。

title: Exact Finite-Sample Variance Decomposition of Subagging: A Spectral Filtering Perspective
summary: Standard resampling ratios (e.g., $α\approx 0.632$) are widely used as default baselines in ensemble learning for three decades. However, how these ratios interact with a base learner's intrinsic functional complexity in finite samples lacks a exact mathematical characterization. We leverage the Hoeffding-ANOVA decomposition to derive the first exact, finite-sample variance decomposition for subagging, applicable to any symmetric base learner without requiring asymptotic limits or smoothness assumptions. We establish that subagging operates as a deterministic low-pass spectral filter: it preserves low-order structural signals while attenuating $c$-th order interaction variance by a geometric factor approaching $α^c$. This decoupling reveals why default baselines often under-regularize high-capacity interpolators, which instead require smaller $α$ to exponentially suppress spurious high-order noise. To operationalize these insights, we propose a complexity-guided adaptive subsampling algorithm, empirically demonstrating that dynamically calibrating $α$ to the learner's complexity spectrum consistently improves generalization over static baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文首次推导出subagging的精确有限样本方差分解，揭示其作为确定性低通谱滤波器的工作原理，并提出基于复杂度谱的自适应子采样算法。
AI.motivation: 标准重采样比率（如α≈0.632）作为集成学习的默认基线已使用三十年，但这些比率如何与基础学习器的内在函数复杂度在有限样本中相互作用缺乏精确的数学刻画。
AI.method: 利用Hoeffding-ANOVA分解推导出适用于任何对称基础学习器的subagging的精确有限样本方差分解，无需渐近极限或平滑性假设。建立subagging作为确定性低通谱滤波器的理论框架。
AI.result: subagging作为低通谱滤波器：保留低阶结构信号，同时以几何因子α^c衰减c阶交互方差。默认基线常对高容量插值器欠正则化，需要更小的α来指数抑制虚假高阶噪声。
AI.conclusion: 提出复杂度引导的自适应子采样算法，通过动态校准α到学习器的复杂度谱，相比静态基线能持续改进泛化性能。

title: FlowPalm: Optical Flow Driven Non-Rigid Deformation for Geometrically Diverse Palmprint Generation
summary: Recently, synthetic palmprints have been increasingly used as substitutes for real data to train recognition models. To be effective, such synthetic data must reflect the diversity of real palmprints, including both style variation and geometric variation. However, existing palmprint generation methods mainly focus on style translation, while geometric variation is either ignored or approximated by simple handcrafted augmentations. In this work, we propose FlowPalm, an optical-flow-driven palmprint generation framework capable of simulating the complex non-rigid deformations observed in real palms. Specifically, FlowPalm estimates optical flows between real palmprint pairs to capture the statistical patterns of geometric deformations. Building on these priors, we design a progressive sampling process that gradually introduces the geometric deformations during diffusion while maintaining identity consistency. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate that FlowPalm significantly outperforms state-of-the-art palmprint generation approaches in downstream recognition tasks. Project page: https://yuchenzou.github.io/FlowPalm/

AI.tldr: FlowPalm是一个基于光流的掌纹生成框架，通过模拟真实手掌的非刚性形变来生成高质量的合成掌纹数据，显著提升了掌纹识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有掌纹生成方法主要关注风格转换，而几何形变要么被忽略，要么仅通过简单的手工增强来近似。真实掌纹包含复杂的非刚性形变，需要更有效的几何形变建模方法。
AI.method: FlowPalm通过估计真实掌纹对之间的光流来捕捉几何形变的统计模式，并设计渐进采样过程，在扩散过程中逐步引入几何形变，同时保持身份一致性。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上的实验表明，FlowPalm在掌纹识别任务中显著优于现有的掌纹生成方法。
AI.conclusion: FlowPalm能够有效模拟真实手掌的复杂非刚性形变，生成的合成掌纹数据在识别任务中表现出色，为掌纹识别模型的训练提供了高质量的合成数据。

title: Cognitive Pivot Points and Visual Anchoring: Unveiling and Rectifying Hallucinations in Multimodal Reasoning Models
summary: Multimodal Large Reasoning Models (MLRMs) have achieved remarkable strides in visual reasoning through test time compute scaling, yet long chain reasoning remains prone to hallucinations. We identify a concerning phenomenon termed the Reasoning Vision Truth Disconnect (RVTD): hallucinations are strongly correlated with cognitive bifurcation points that often exhibit high entropy states. We attribute this vulnerability to a breakdown in visual semantic anchoring, localized within the network's intermediate layers; specifically, during these high uncertainty transitions, the model fails to query visual evidence, reverting instead to language priors. Consequently, we advocate a shift from solely outcome level supervision to augmenting it with fine grained internal attention guidance. To this end, we propose V-STAR (Visual Structural Training with Attention Reinforcement), a lightweight, holistic training paradigm designed to internalize visually aware reasoning capabilities. Central to our approach is the Hierarchical Visual Attention Reward (HVAR), integrated within the GRPO framework. Upon detecting high entropy states, this mechanism dynamically incentivizes visual attention across critical intermediate layers, thereby anchoring the reasoning process back to the visual input. Furthermore, we introduce the Forced Reflection Mechanism (FRM), a trajectory editing strategy that disrupts cognitive inertia by triggering reflection around high entropy cognitive bifurcation points and encouraging verification of subsequent steps against the visual input, thereby translating external debiasing interventions into an intrinsic capability for hallucination mitigation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出V-STAR方法，通过分层视觉注意力奖励和强制反思机制，在多模态大推理模型中解决视觉语义锚定失效导致的幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态大推理模型在视觉推理中取得了显著进展，但长链推理仍然容易出现幻觉。作者发现了一个令人担忧的现象——推理视觉真相脱节（RVTD）：幻觉与认知分叉点密切相关，这些点通常表现出高熵状态。这种脆弱性源于视觉语义锚定的失效，具体发生在网络中间层的高不确定性转换期间，模型未能查询视觉证据，而是回归到语言先验。
AI.method: 提出了V-STAR（视觉结构训练与注意力强化）框架，这是一个轻量级的整体训练范式。核心是分层视觉注意力奖励（HVAR），集成在GRPO框架中，当检测到高熵状态时，动态激励关键中间层的视觉注意力。此外，还引入了强制反思机制（FRM），这是一种轨迹编辑策略，通过在高熵认知分叉点触发反思，并鼓励后续步骤根据视觉输入进行验证，将外部去偏干预转化为内在的幻觉缓解能力。
AI.result: 该方法旨在内部化视觉感知推理能力，通过注意力强化机制将推理过程锚定回视觉输入，从而缓解多模态大推理模型中的幻觉问题。
AI.conclusion: 作者主张从单纯的结果级监督转向增强细粒度内部注意力指导，通过V-STAR框架实现视觉语义锚定的强化，从而在多模态大推理模型中建立更可靠的视觉推理能力。

title: Self-Correcting RAG: Enhancing Faithfulness via MMKP Context Selection and NLI-Guided MCTS
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) substantially extends the knowledge boundary of large language models. However, it still faces two major challenges when handling complex reasoning tasks: low context utilization and frequent hallucinations. To address these issues, we propose Self-Correcting RAG, a unified framework that reformulates retrieval and generation as constrained optimization and path planning. On the input side, we move beyond traditional greedy retrieval and, for the first time, formalize context selection as a multi-dimensional multiple-choice knapsack problem (MMKP), thereby maximizing information density and removing redundancy under a strict token budget. On the output side, we introduce a natural language inference (NLI)-guided Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) mechanism, which leverages test-time compute to dynamically explore reasoning trajectories and validate the faithfulness of generated answers. Experiments on six multi-hop question answering and fact-checking datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves reasoning accuracy on complex queries while effectively reducing hallucinations, outperforming strong existing baselines.Our code is available at https://github.com/xjiacs/Self-Correcting-RAG .

AI.tldr: 提出Self-Correcting RAG框架，通过约束优化和路径规划解决RAG在复杂推理任务中的低上下文利用率和幻觉问题，在输入侧将上下文选择建模为MMKP问题，输出侧使用NLI引导的MCTS机制验证答案忠实性。
AI.motivation: 尽管检索增强生成扩展了大型语言模型的知识边界，但在处理复杂推理任务时仍面临两大挑战：上下文利用率低和频繁产生幻觉。需要一种更有效的框架来优化检索和生成过程。
AI.method: 1) 输入侧：将上下文选择形式化为多维多选择背包问题，在严格token预算下最大化信息密度并消除冗余；2) 输出侧：引入自然语言推理引导的蒙特卡洛树搜索机制，动态探索推理轨迹并验证生成答案的忠实性。
AI.result: 在六个多跳问答和事实核查数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提高了复杂查询的推理准确性，同时有效减少了幻觉，优于现有强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Self-Correcting RAG通过将检索和生成重新定义为约束优化和路径规划问题，为复杂推理任务提供了更有效的解决方案，代码已开源。

title: CodeQuant: Unified Clustering and Quantization for Enhanced Outlier Smoothing in Low-Precision Mixture-of-Experts
summary:
Outliers have emerged as a fundamental bottleneck in preserving accuracy for low-precision large models, particularly within Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures that are increasingly central to large-scale language modeling. Under post-training quantization (PTQ), these outliers induce substantial quantization errors, leading to severe accuracy degradation. While recent rotation-based smoothing techniques alleviate the problem by redistributing outlier magnitudes, residual errors remain and continue to impede reliable low-precision deployment.
  In this work, we tackle this challenge by introducing \textit{CodeQuant}, a unified quantization-and-clustering scheme that contains smoothing activation outliers via learnable rotation and absorbing weight outliers into fine-tuned cluster centroids for MoE. This design reduces the influence of extreme values by fitting them within cluster centroids, thereby lowering quantization error while maintaining expressive capacity. Coupled with a dedicated kernel design for GPU and CPU, CodeQuant achieves up to $4.15\times$ speedup while delivering significantly higher accuracy than state-of-the-art quantization approaches across diverse MoE models. Our results highlight CodeQuant as a promising direction for efficient and accurate deployment of MoE-based large language models under low-precision constraints. Our code is available at https://github.com/SAI-Lab-NYU/CodeQuant.

AI.tldr: CodeQuant通过可学习旋转平滑激活异常值，并将权重异常值吸收到微调的聚类中心中，显著降低了MoE模型量化误差，在保持高精度的同时实现了4.15倍加速。
AI.motivation: 异常值是低精度大模型（特别是MoE架构）准确性的主要瓶颈，在PTQ中会导致严重的量化误差和精度下降。现有旋转平滑技术虽能缓解问题，但残差误差仍阻碍可靠的低精度部署。
AI.method: 提出CodeQuant统一量化聚类方案：1）通过可学习旋转平滑激活异常值；2）将权重异常值吸收到微调的聚类中心中；3）为GPU和CPU设计专用内核。通过将极端值拟合到聚类中心来降低量化误差。
AI.result: CodeQuant在多种MoE模型上比最先进的量化方法获得显著更高的准确性，同时实现了高达4.15倍的加速。在低精度约束下为MoE大语言模型提供了高效准确的部署方案。
AI.conclusion: CodeQuant通过统一的量化聚类方法有效解决了MoE模型中的异常值问题，在保持表达能力的同时降低量化误差，是MoE大语言模型低精度部署的有前景方向。

title: Gait Recognition with Temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
summary: Gait recognition is a biometric modality that identifies individuals from their characteristic walking patterns.
