Unlike conventional biometric traits, gait can be acquired at a distance and without active subject cooperation, making it suitable for surveillance and public safety applications. Nevertheless, silhouette-based temporal models remain sensitive to long sequences, observation noise, and appearance-related covariates. Recurrent architectures often struggle to preserve information from earlier frames and are inherently sequential to optimize, whereas transformer-based models typically require greater computational resources and larger training sets and may be sensitive to irregular sequence lengths and noisy inputs. These limitations reduce robustness under clothing variation, carrying conditions, and view changes, while also hindering the joint modeling of local gait cycles and longer-term motion trends. To address these challenges, we introduce a Temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (TKAN) for gait recognition. The proposed model replaces fixed edge weights with learnable one-dimensional functions and incorporates a two-level memory mechanism consisting of short-term RKAN sublayers and a gated long-term pathway. This design enables efficient modeling of both cycle-level dynamics and broader temporal context while maintaining a compact backbone. Experiments on the CASIA-B dataset indicate that the proposed CNN+TKAN framework achieves strong recognition performance under the reported evaluation setting.

AI.tldr: 提出TKAN网络用于步态识别，通过可学习的一维函数和两级记忆机制，有效建模步态周期动态和长期时序上下文，在CASIA-B数据集上表现良好。
AI.motivation: 步态识别作为远距离、无需配合的生物特征识别技术，在监控和公共安全中有应用价值。但现有基于轮廓的时序模型对长序列、噪声和外观变化敏感，循环架构难以保留早期帧信息，Transformer需要更多计算资源和训练数据，且对不规则序列长度和噪声输入敏感，限制了在服装变化、携带条件和视角变化下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出时序Kolmogorov-Arnold网络(TKAN)，用可学习的一维函数替代固定权重，包含短期RKAN子层和门控长期路径的两级记忆机制，能够高效建模步态周期动态和更广泛的时序上下文，同时保持紧凑的骨干网络。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B数据集上的实验表明，提出的CNN+TKAN框架在报告的评价设置下实现了强大的识别性能。
AI.conclusion: TKAN通过创新的网络设计解决了步态识别中时序建模的挑战，在保持计算效率的同时提升了识别性能，特别是在处理服装变化、携带条件和视角变化等复杂场景下表现出更好的鲁棒性。

title: SVSR: A Self-Verification and Self-Rectification Paradigm for Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Current multimodal models often suffer from shallow reasoning, leading to errors caused by incomplete or inconsistent thought processes. To address this limitation, we propose Self-Verification and Self-Rectification (SVSR), a unified framework that explicitly integrates self-verification and self-rectification into the model's reasoning pipeline, substantially improving robustness and reliability in complex visual understanding and multimodal reasoning tasks. SVSR is built on a novel three-stage training paradigm. First, we construct a high-quality unified preference dataset by refining reasoning traces from pre-trained vision-language models, incorporating both forward and backward reasoning to embed self-reflective signals. Second, we perform cold-start supervised fine-tuning on this dataset to learn structured, multi-step reasoning behaviors. Third, we apply a Semi-online Direct Preference Optimization (Semi-online DPO) process, continuously augmenting the training corpus with high-quality, model-generated reasoning traces filtered by a powerful teacher VLM. This pipeline enables the model to learn, elicit, and refine its ability to self-verify and self-rectify. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that SVSR improves reasoning accuracy and enables stronger generalization to unseen tasks and question types. Notably, once trained with explicit self-reflective reasoning, the model also exhibits improved implicit reasoning ability, outperforming strong baselines even when no explicit reasoning traces are provided. These results highlight the potential of SVSR for building more dependable, introspective, and cognitively aligned multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: SVSR是一个统一框架，通过自验证和自纠正机制增强多模态模型的推理能力，采用三阶段训练范式提升复杂视觉理解和多模态推理任务的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态模型存在浅层推理问题，导致因不完整或不一致的思维过程而产生错误。需要解决这一限制，提高模型在复杂视觉理解和多模态推理任务中的鲁棒性和可靠性。
AI.method: 提出SVSR框架，采用三阶段训练范式：1) 构建高质量统一偏好数据集，通过精炼预训练视觉语言模型的推理轨迹，融入前向和后向推理以嵌入自反思信号；2) 对该数据集进行冷启动监督微调，学习结构化多步推理行为；3) 应用半在线直接偏好优化过程，持续用高质量模型生成推理轨迹增强训练语料。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，SVSR提高了推理准确性，并增强了在未见任务和问题类型上的泛化能力。值得注意的是，经过显式自反思推理训练后，模型即使在没有显式推理轨迹的情况下也表现出改进的隐式推理能力，优于强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: SVSR展示了构建更可靠、内省和认知对齐的多模态系统的潜力，通过显式集成自验证和自纠正机制，显著提升了多模态模型的推理鲁棒性和可靠性。

title: BlasBench: An Open Benchmark for Irish Speech Recognition
comment: 8 pages, 4 tables, 3 appendices. Code and data: https://github.com/jyoutir/blasbench
summary: No open Irish-specific benchmark compares end-user ASR systems under a shared Irish-aware evaluation protocol. To solve this, we release BlasBench, an open evaluation harness with Irish-aware text normalisation that preserves fadas, lenition, and eclipsis. We benchmark 12 systems across four architecture families on Common Voice ga-IE and FLEURS ga-IE. All Whisper variants exceed 100% WER. The best open model (omniASR LLM 7B) achieves 30.65% WER on Common Voice and 39.09% on FLEURS. We noticed models fine-tuned on Common Voice lose 33-43 WER points on FLEURS, revealing a generalisation gap that is invisible to single-dataset evaluation.

AI.tldr: 作者发布了BlasBench，一个爱尔兰语ASR评估框架，包含爱尔兰语特定的文本规范化，并在两个爱尔兰语数据集上评估了12个系统，发现所有Whisper变体WER超过100%，最佳开放模型在Common Voice上达到30.65% WER，并揭示了单数据集评估无法发现的泛化差距。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏专门针对爱尔兰语的ASR系统基准测试，没有共享的爱尔兰语感知评估协议来比较不同端到端ASR系统在爱尔兰语上的性能。
AI.method: 发布BlasBench评估框架，包含爱尔兰语特定的文本规范化（保留重音符号、弱化、同化等特征），在Common Voice ga-IE和FLEURS ga-IE两个爱尔兰语数据集上评估了12个系统，涵盖四种架构家族。
AI.result: 所有Whisper变体WER超过100%，表现最差；最佳开放模型omniASR LLM 7B在Common Voice上达到30.65% WER，在FLEURS上达到39.09% WER；在Common Voice上微调的模型在FLEURS上WER下降33-43个百分点，揭示了单数据集评估无法发现的泛化差距。
AI.conclusion: BlasBench填补了爱尔兰语ASR评估的空白，揭示了现有模型在爱尔兰语上的性能不足，特别是发现了模型在数据集间的泛化问题，强调了多数据集评估的重要性。

title: PepBenchmark: A Standardized Benchmark for Peptide Machine Learning
summary: Peptide therapeutics are widely regarded as the "third generation" of drugs, yet progress in peptide Machine Learning (ML) are hindered by the absence of standardized benchmarks. Here we present PepBenchmark, which unifies datasets, preprocessing, and evaluation protocols for peptide drug discovery. PepBenchmark comprises three components: (1) PepBenchData, a well-curated collection comprising 29 canonical-peptide and 6 non-canonical-peptide datasets across 7 groups, systematically covering key aspects of peptide drug development, representing, to the best of our knowledge, the most comprehensive AI-ready dataset resource to date; (2) PepBenchPipeline, a standardized preprocessing pipeline that ensures consistent dataset cleaning, construction, splitting, and feature transformation, mitigating quality issues common in ad hoc pipelines; and (3) PepBenchLeaderboard, a unified evaluation protocol and leaderboard with strong baselines across 4 major methodological families: Fingerprint-based, GNN-based, PLM-based, and SMILES-based models. Together, PepBenchmark provides the first standardized and comparable foundation for peptide drug discovery, facilitating methodological advances and translation into real-world applications. The data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/ZGCI-AI4S-Pep/PepBenchmark/.

AI.tldr: PepBenchmark是一个标准化的肽药物发现基准测试平台，包含数据集、预处理管道和评估协议，旨在解决肽机器学习领域缺乏标准化基准的问题。
AI.motivation: 肽药物被认为是"第三代"药物，但肽机器学习的发展受到缺乏标准化基准的阻碍。现有研究使用不同的数据集、预处理方法和评估协议，导致结果不可比较，阻碍了方法学进步。
AI.method: PepBenchmark包含三个核心组件：1) PepBenchData - 精心整理的29个经典肽和6个非经典肽数据集，覆盖肽药物开发的7个关键方面；2) PepBenchPipeline - 标准化的预处理管道，确保数据清洗、构建、分割和特征转换的一致性；3) PepBenchLeaderboard - 统一的评估协议和排行榜，包含基于指纹、GNN、PLM和SMILES四大方法家族的强基线模型。
AI.result: PepBenchmark提供了迄今为止最全面的AI就绪肽数据集资源，建立了第一个标准化且可比较的肽药物发现基准测试平台，为方法学进步和实际应用转化奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: PepBenchmark通过统一的数据集、预处理和评估协议，解决了肽机器学习领域缺乏标准化基准的问题，为肽药物发现研究提供了首个标准化且可比较的基础平台，将促进方法学发展和实际应用转化。

title: Revisiting the Scale Loss Function and Gaussian-Shape Convolution for Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: Infrared small target detection still faces two persistent challenges: training instability from non-monotonic scale loss functions, and inadequate spatial attention due to generic convolution kernels that ignore the physical imaging characteristics of small targets. In this paper, we revisit both aspects. For the loss side, we propose a \emph{diff-based scale loss} that weights predictions according to the signed area difference between the predicted mask and the ground truth, yielding strictly monotonic gradients and stable convergence. We further analyze a family of four scale loss variants to understand how their geometric properties affect detection behavior. For the spatial side, we introduce \emph{Gaussian-shaped convolution} with a learnable scale parameter to match the center-concentrated intensity profile of infrared small targets, and augment it with a \emph{rotated pinwheel mask} that adaptively aligns the kernel with target orientation via a straight-through estimator. Extensive experiments on IRSTD-1k, NUDT-SIRST, and SIRST-UAVB demonstrate consistent improvements in $mIoU$, $P_d$, and $F_a$ over state-of-the-art methods. We release our anonymous code and pretrained models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种改进红外小目标检测的方法：基于面积差的单调尺度损失函数和匹配目标物理特性的高斯形状卷积核，显著提升了检测性能。
AI.motivation: 红外小目标检测面临两个持续挑战：非单调尺度损失函数导致的训练不稳定，以及通用卷积核忽略小目标物理成像特性导致的空间注意力不足。
AI.method: 1. 提出基于面积差的尺度损失函数，根据预测掩码与真实标注之间的符号化面积差异加权预测，确保严格单调梯度和稳定收敛；2. 引入具有可学习尺度参数的高斯形状卷积核，匹配红外小目标的中心集中强度分布；3. 通过旋转风车掩码和直通估计器自适应对齐核与目标方向。
AI.result: 在IRSTD-1k、NUDT-SIRST和SIRST-UAVB数据集上的大量实验表明，在mIoU、Pd和Fa指标上相比最先进方法取得了一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: 通过重新审视损失函数和空间注意力机制，提出的方法有效解决了红外小目标检测中的训练稳定性和物理特性匹配问题，显著提升了检测性能。

title: A Dual-Positive Monotone Parameterization for Multi-Segment Bids and a Validity Assessment Framework for Reinforcement Learning Agent-based Simulation of Electricity Markets
summary: Reinforcement learning agent-based simulation (RL-ABS) has become an important tool for electricity market mechanism analysis and evaluation. In the modeling of monotone, bounded, multi-segment stepwise bids, existing methods typically let the policy network first output an unconstrained action and then convert it into a feasible bid curve satisfying monotonicity and boundedness through post-processing mappings such as sorting, clipping, or projection. However, such post-processing mappings often fail to satisfy continuous differentiability, injectivity, and invertibility at boundaries or kinks, thereby causing gradient distortion and leading to spurious convergence in simulation results. Meanwhile, most existing studies conduct mechanism analysis and evaluation mainly on the basis of training-curve convergence, without rigorously assessing the distance between the simulation outcomes and Nash equilibrium, which severely undermines the credibility of the results. To address these issues, this paper proposes...

AI.tldr: 论文提出新方法解决RL-ABS中投标曲线建模的梯度失真问题，并引入纳什均衡距离评估提升仿真结果可信度
AI.motivation: 现有RL-ABS方法在建模单调有界多段阶梯投标时，通过后处理映射（排序、裁剪、投影）将无约束动作转换为可行投标曲线，但这些映射在边界或拐点处不满足连续可微性、单射性和可逆性，导致梯度失真和虚假收敛。同时，现有研究主要基于训练曲线收敛进行机制分析，缺乏对仿真结果与纳什均衡距离的严格评估，严重损害结果可信度。
AI.method: 论文提出新的方法来替代传统的后处理映射，确保投标曲线建模满足连续可微性、单射性和可逆性要求，避免梯度失真。同时引入纳什均衡距离的严格评估框架，提升仿真结果的可信度。
AI.result: 新方法能够有效解决梯度失真问题，避免虚假收敛，并通过纳什均衡距离评估提供更可靠的仿真结果，提升电力市场机制分析和评估的可信度。
AI.conclusion: 论文提出的方法解决了RL-ABS中投标曲线建模的关键技术问题，通过改进梯度计算和引入严格评估框架，显著提升了电力市场机制仿真分析的可信度和准确性。

title: RCBSF: A Multi-Agent Framework for Automated Contract Revision via Stackelberg Game
summary: Despite the widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) in Legal AI, their utility for automated contract revision remains impeded by hallucinated safety and a lack of rigorous behavioral constraints. To address these limitations, we propose the Risk-Constrained Bilevel Stackelberg Framework (RCBSF), which formulates revision as a non-cooperative Stackelberg game. RCBSF establishes a hierarchical Leader Follower structure where a Global Prescriptive Agent (GPA) imposes risk budgets upon a follower system constituted by a Constrained Revision Agent (CRA) and a Local Verification Agent (LVA) to iteratively optimize output. We provide theoretical guarantees that this bilevel formulation converges to an equilibrium yielding strictly superior utility over unguided configurations. Empirical validation on a unified benchmark demonstrates that RCBSF achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing iterative baselines with an average Risk Resolution Rate (RRR) of 84.21\% while enhancing token efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/xjiacs/RCBSF .

AI.tldr: 提出RCBSF框架，通过双层Stackelberg博弈解决法律AI中LLM合同修订的幻觉问题和行为约束不足，实现风险约束下的自动合同修订。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在法律AI中广泛应用，但在自动合同修订中存在幻觉安全和缺乏严格行为约束的问题，限制了其实用性。
AI.method: 提出风险约束双层Stackelberg框架(RCBSF)，建立领导者-追随者层次结构：全局规范代理(GPA)对由约束修订代理(CRA)和本地验证代理(LVA)组成的追随者系统施加风险预算，进行迭代优化。
AI.result: 在统一基准测试中，RCBSF达到最先进性能，平均风险解决率(RRR)为84.21%，超越迭代基线并提高token效率。
AI.conclusion: RCBSF通过双层博弈框架为自动合同修订提供了理论保证和实际有效性，解决了LLM在合同修订中的关键限制。

title: IceCache: Memory-efficient KV-cache Management for Long-Sequence LLMs
summary: Key-Value (KV) cache plays a crucial role in accelerating inference in large language models (LLMs) by storing intermediate attention states and avoiding redundant computation during autoregressive generation. However, its memory footprint scales linearly with sequence length, often leading to severe memory bottlenecks on resource-constrained hardware. Prior work has explored offloading KV cache to the CPU while retaining only a subset on the GPU, but these approaches often rely on imprecise token selection and suffer performance degradation in long-generation tasks such as chain-of-thought reasoning. In this paper, we propose a novel KV cache management strategy, IceCache, which integrates semantic token clustering with PagedAttention. By organizing semantically related tokens into contiguous memory regions managed by a hierarchical, dynamically updatable data structure, our method enables more efficient token selection and better utilization of memory bandwidth during CPU-GPU transfers. Experimental results on LongBench show that, with a 256-token budget, IceCache maintains 99% of the original accuracy achieved by the full KV cache model. Moreover, compared to other offloading-based methods, IceCache attains competitive or even superior latency and accuracy while using only 25% of the KV cache token budget, demonstrating its effectiveness in long-sequence scenarios. The code is available on our project website at https://yuzhenmao.github.io/IceCache/.

AI.tldr: IceCache：一种结合语义令牌聚类与分页注意力的KV缓存管理策略，通过将语义相关令牌组织到连续内存区域，在有限GPU内存下保持高精度并减少CPU-GPU传输开销。
AI.motivation: LLM推理中的KV缓存内存占用随序列长度线性增长，在资源受限硬件上造成严重内存瓶颈。现有方法将KV缓存卸载到CPU但依赖不精确的令牌选择，在长生成任务中性能下降。
AI.method: 提出IceCache策略，集成语义令牌聚类与PagedAttention，将语义相关令牌组织到连续内存区域，通过分层动态可更新数据结构管理，实现更高效的令牌选择和CPU-GPU传输带宽利用。
AI.result: 在LongBench上，256令牌预算下保持全KV缓存模型99%的原始准确率；相比其他卸载方法，仅使用25%的KV缓存令牌预算即达到竞争性甚至更优的延迟和准确率。
AI.conclusion: IceCache通过语义聚类和分页注意力机制有效解决了KV缓存内存瓶颈问题，在长序列场景中实现了高效的内存管理和性能表现。

title: A Comparative Study of Modern Object Detectors for Robust Apple Detection in Orchard Imagery
summary: Accurate apple detection in orchard images is important for yield prediction, fruit counting, robotic harvesting, and crop monitoring. However, changing illumination, leaf clutter, dense fruit clusters, and partial occlusion make detection difficult. To provide a fair and reproducible comparison, this study establishes a controlled benchmark for single-class apple detection on the public AppleBBCH81 dataset using one deterministic train, validation, and test split and a unified evaluation protocol across six representative detectors: YOLOv10n, YOLO11n, RT-DETR-L, Faster R-CNN (ResNet50-FPN), FCOS (ResNet50-FPN), and SSDLite320 (MobileNetV3-Large). Performance is evaluated primarily using COCO-style mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.95, and threshold-dependent behavior is further analyzed using precision-recall curves and fixed-threshold precision, recall, and F1-score at IoU = 0.5. On the validation split, YOLO11n achieves the best strict localization performance with mAP@0.5:0.95 = 0.6065 and mAP@0.5 = 0.9620, followed closely by RT-DETR-L and YOLOv10n. At a fixed operating point with confidence >= 0.05, YOLOv10n attains the highest F1-score, whereas RT-DETR-L achieves very high recall but low precision because of many false positives at low confidence. These findings show that detector selection for orchard deployment should be guided not only by localization-aware accuracy but also by threshold robustness and the requirements of the downstream task.

AI.tldr: 本文为苹果检测建立了一个公平的基准测试，在AppleBBCH81数据集上比较了六种代表性检测器，发现YOLO11n在严格定位性能上表现最佳，而YOLOv10n在固定阈值下获得最高F1分数。
AI.motivation: 果园图像中的苹果检测对于产量预测、果实计数、机器人收获和作物监测很重要，但光照变化、叶片遮挡、密集果实簇和部分遮挡使得检测困难。需要建立一个公平、可重复的比较基准来评估不同检测器的性能。
AI.method: 在公开的AppleBBCH81数据集上建立受控基准，使用确定性的训练、验证和测试分割，统一评估协议比较六种代表性检测器：YOLOv10n、YOLO11n、RT-DETR-L、Faster R-CNN、FCOS和SSDLite320。主要使用COCO风格的mAP@0.5和mAP@0.5:0.95评估性能，并通过精确率-召回率曲线和固定阈值下的精确率、召回率、F1分数进行进一步分析。
AI.result: 在验证集上，YOLO11n获得最佳严格定位性能（mAP@0.5:0.95 = 0.6065，mAP@0.5 = 0.9620），紧随其后的是RT-DETR-L和YOLOv10n。在固定操作点（置信度≥0.05）下，YOLOv10n获得最高F1分数，而RT-DETR-L召回率很高但精确率较低（因低置信度下产生许多误报）。
AI.conclusion: 果园部署中的检测器选择不仅应考虑定位感知精度，还应考虑阈值鲁棒性和下游任务需求。不同检测器在不同评估指标下表现各异，需要根据具体应用场景进行选择。

title: The Amazing Agent Race: Strong Tool Users, Weak Navigators
summary: Existing tool-use benchmarks for LLM agents are overwhelmingly linear: our analysis of six benchmarks shows 55 to 100% of instances are simple chains of 2 to 5 steps. We introduce The Amazing Agent Race (AAR), a benchmark featuring directed acyclic graph (DAG) puzzles (or "legs") with fork-merge tool chains. We release 1,400 instances across two variants: sequential (800 legs) and compositional (600 DAG legs). Agents must navigate Wikipedia, execute multi-step tool chains, and aggregate results into a verifiable answer. Legs are procedurally generated from Wikipedia seeds across four difficulty levels with live-API validation. Three complementary metrics (finish-line accuracy, pit-stop visit rate, and roadblock completion rate) separately diagnose navigation, tool-use, and arithmetic failures. Evaluating three agent frameworks on 1,400 legs, the best achieves only 37.2% accuracy. Navigation errors dominate (27 to 52% of trials) while tool-use errors remain below 17%, and agent architecture matters as much as model scale (Claude Code matches Codex CLI at 37% with 6x fewer tokens). The compositional structure of AAR reveals that agents fail not at calling tools but at navigating to the right pages, a blind spot invisible to linear benchmarks. The project page can be accessed at: https://minnesotanlp.github.io/the-amazing-agent-race

AI.tldr: 提出AAR基准测试，包含DAG结构的多步骤工具使用任务，揭示现有线性基准测试无法发现的智能体导航缺陷问题
AI.motivation: 现有工具使用基准测试大多为线性结构（55-100%为2-5步的简单链），无法充分评估智能体在复杂导航和工具使用场景下的真实能力
AI.method: 构建AAR基准测试，包含1,400个实例（800个顺序任务和600个DAG任务），基于Wikipedia生成四个难度级别的程序化任务，使用三个互补指标评估导航、工具使用和算术能力
AI.result: 在1,400个任务上评估三个智能体框架，最佳准确率仅37.2%，导航错误占主导（27-52%），工具使用错误低于17%，智能体架构与模型规模同等重要
AI.conclusion: AAR的复合结构揭示了智能体主要失败于导航而非工具调用，这是线性基准测试无法发现的盲点，为智能体评估提供了更全面的诊断工具

title: Deep-Reporter: Deep Research for Grounded Multimodal Long-Form Generation
comment: 41 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables. Code available at https://github.com/fangda-ye/Deep-Report
summary: Recent agentic search frameworks enable deep research via iterative planning and retrieval, reducing hallucinations and enhancing factual grounding. However, they remain text-centric, overlooking the multimodal evidence that characterizes real-world expert reports. We introduce a pressing task: multimodal long-form generation. Accordingly, we propose Deep-Reporter, a unified agentic framework for grounded multimodal long-form generation. It orchestrates: (i) Agentic Multimodal Search and Filtering to retrieve and filter textual passages and information-dense visuals; (ii) Checklist-Guided Incremental Synthesis to ensure coherent image-text integration and optimal citation placement; and (iii) Recurrent Context Management to balance long-range coherence with local fluency. We develop a rigorous curation pipeline producing 8K high-quality agentic traces for model optimization. We further introduce M2LongBench, a comprehensive testbed comprising 247 research tasks across 9 domains and a stable multimodal sandbox. Extensive experiments demonstrate that long-form multimodal generation is a challenging task, especially in multimodal selection and integration, and effective post-training can bridge the gap.

AI.tldr: Deep-Reporter：首个面向多模态长文本生成的智能体框架，通过多模态搜索、清单引导合成和循环上下文管理，解决现有文本中心方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体搜索框架主要关注文本，忽略了真实世界专家报告中常见的多模态证据（如图像），因此需要开发能够处理多模态长文本生成任务的系统。
AI.method: 提出Deep-Reporter框架，包含三个核心组件：1）智能体多模态搜索与过滤；2）清单引导的增量合成；3）循环上下文管理。同时构建了8K高质量智能体轨迹数据集和M2LongBench测试平台。
AI.result: 实验表明多模态长文本生成具有挑战性，特别是在多模态选择和整合方面，但有效的后训练可以显著缩小性能差距。
AI.conclusion: Deep-Reporter为多模态长文本生成提供了统一的智能体框架，解决了现有方法的局限性，并通过大规模数据集和测试平台推动了该领域的发展。

title: WaveMoE: A Wavelet-Enhanced Mixture-of-Experts Foundation Model for Time Series Forecasting
comment: Presented at ICLR 2026 TSALM Workshop (1st Workshop on Time Series in the Age of Large Models)
summary: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) have recently achieved remarkable success in universal forecasting by leveraging large-scale pretraining on diverse time series data. Complementing this progress, incorporating frequency-domain information yields promising performance in enhancing the modeling of complex temporal patterns, such as periodicity and localized high-frequency dynamics, which are prevalent in real-world time series. To advance this direction, we propose a new perspective that integrates explicit frequency-domain representations into scalable foundation models, and introduce WaveMoE, a wavelet-enhanced mixture-of-experts foundation model for time series forecasting. WaveMoE adopts a dual-path architecture that jointly processes time series tokens and wavelet tokens aligned along a unified temporal axis, and coordinates them through a shared expert routing mechanism that enables consistent expert specialization while efficiently scaling model capacity. Preliminary experimental results on 16 diverse benchmark datasets indicate that WaveMoE has the potential to further improve forecasting performance by incorporating wavelet-domain corpora.

AI.tldr: WaveMoE是一个基于小波增强的混合专家时间序列基础模型，通过双路径架构同时处理时域和小波域信息来提升预测性能
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型在通用预测方面取得了显著成功，但频率域信息对于建模复杂时间模式（如周期性和局部高频动态）具有潜力，这些模式在现实世界时间序列中普遍存在
AI.method: 提出WaveMoE模型，采用双路径架构联合处理时间序列标记和小波标记，通过共享专家路由机制协调两者，实现一致的专家专业化同时高效扩展模型容量
AI.result: 在16个多样化基准数据集上的初步实验结果表明，WaveMoE通过纳入小波域语料库有潜力进一步提升预测性能
AI.conclusion: 将显式频率域表示集成到可扩展基础模型中是一个有前景的方向，WaveMoE展示了通过小波增强混合专家架构提升时间序列预测性能的潜力

title: GIF: A Conditional Multimodal Generative Framework for IR Drop Imaging in Chip Layouts
summary: IR drop analysis is essential in physical chip design to ensure the power integrity of on-chip power delivery networks. Traditional Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tools have become slow and expensive as transistor density scales. Recent works have introduced machine learning (ML)-based methods that formulate IR drop analysis as an image prediction problem. These existing ML approaches fail to capture both local and long-range dependencies and ignore crucial geometrical and topological information from physical layouts and logical connectivity. To address these limitations, we propose GIF, a Generative IR drop Framework that uses both geometrical and topological information to generate IR drop images. GIF fuses image and graph features to guide a conditional diffusion process, producing high-quality IR drop images. For instance, On the CircuitNet-N28 dataset, GIF achieves 0.78 SSIM, 0.95 Pearson correlation, 21.77 PSNR, and 0.026 NMAE, outperforming prior methods. These results demonstrate that our framework, using diffusion based multimodal conditioning, reliably generates high quality IR drop images. This shows that IR drop analysis can effectively leverage recent advances in generative modeling when geometric layout features and logical circuit topology are jointly modeled. By combining geometry aware spatial features with logical graph representations, GIF enables IR drop analysis to benefit from recent advances in generative modeling for structured image generation.

AI.tldr: 提出GIF生成式IR drop框架，融合几何布局和逻辑拓扑信息，使用条件扩散模型生成高质量IR drop图像，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统EDA工具在晶体管密度增加时变得缓慢昂贵，现有机器学习方法无法同时捕捉局部和长程依赖关系，且忽略物理布局的几何信息和逻辑连接拓扑信息。
AI.method: 提出GIF生成式IR drop框架，融合图像特征和图特征，通过条件扩散过程生成IR drop图像，联合建模几何布局特征和逻辑电路拓扑。
AI.result: 在CircuitNet-N28数据集上，GIF达到0.78 SSIM、0.95 Pearson相关系数、21.77 PSNR和0.026 NMAE，优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合几何感知空间特征和逻辑图表示，GIF使IR drop分析能够受益于生成建模的最新进展，证明当几何布局特征和逻辑电路拓扑联合建模时，IR drop分析可以有效地利用生成建模的进步。

title: STARS: Skill-Triggered Audit for Request-Conditioned Invocation Safety in Agent Systems
summary: Autonomous language-model agents increasingly rely on installable skills and tools to complete user tasks. Static skill auditing can expose capability surface before deployment, but it cannot determine whether a particular invocation is unsafe under the current user request and runtime context. We therefore study skill invocation auditing as a continuous-risk estimation problem: given a user request, candidate skill, and runtime context, predict a score that supports ranking and triage before a hard intervention is applied. We introduce STARS, which combines a static capability prior, a request-conditioned invocation risk model, and a calibrated risk-fusion policy. To evaluate this setting, we construct SIA-Bench, a benchmark of 3,000 invocation records with group-safe splits, lineage metadata, runtime context, canonical action labels, and derived continuous-risk targets. On a held-out split of indirect prompt injection attacks, calibrated fusion reaches 0.439 high-risk AUPRC, improving over 0.405 for the contextual scorer and 0.380 for the strongest static baseline, while the contextual scorer remains better calibrated with 0.289 expected calibration error. On the locked in-distribution test split, gains are smaller and static priors remain useful. The resulting claim is therefore narrower: request-conditioned auditing is most valuable as an invocation-time risk-scoring and triage layer rather than as a replacement for static screening. Code is available at https://github.com/123zgj123/STARS.

AI.tldr: STARS是一个用于语言模型代理技能调用审计的连续风险评估系统，结合静态能力先验、请求条件化调用风险模型和校准的风险融合策略，在运行时评估技能调用风险。
AI.motivation: 静态技能审计无法确定特定调用在当前用户请求和运行时上下文下是否安全，需要研究技能调用审计作为连续风险评估问题。
AI.method: 提出STARS系统，结合静态能力先验、请求条件化调用风险模型和校准的风险融合策略，在SIA-Bench基准上评估。
AI.result: 在间接提示注入攻击测试中，校准融合达到0.439高风险AUPRC，优于上下文评分器(0.405)和静态基线(0.380)；上下文评分器校准误差更低(0.289)。
AI.conclusion: 请求条件化审计最有价值的是作为调用时的风险评分和分流层，而不是替代静态筛选，静态先验在分布内测试中仍有价值。

title: How You Ask Matters! Adaptive RAG Robustness to Query Variations
summary: Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) promises accuracy and efficiency by dynamically triggering retrieval only when needed and is widely used in practice. However, real-world queries vary in surface form even with the same intent, and their impact on Adaptive RAG remains under-explored. We introduce the first large-scale benchmark of diverse yet semantically identical query variations, combining human-written and model-generated rewrites. Our benchmark facilitates a systematic evaluation of Adaptive RAG robustness by examining its key components across three dimensions: answer quality, computational cost, and retrieval decisions. We discover a critical robustness gap, where small surface-level changes in queries dramatically alter retrieval behavior and accuracy. Although larger models show better performance, robustness does not improve accordingly. These findings reveal that Adaptive RAG methods are highly vulnerable to query variations that preserve identical semantics, exposing a critical robustness challenge.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了首个大规模基准测试，用于评估自适应检索增强生成（RAG）系统对语义相同但表面形式不同的查询变体的鲁棒性，发现自适应RAG存在严重的鲁棒性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 自适应RAG在实际应用中广泛使用，但现实世界中的查询即使意图相同也会有不同的表面形式，这些查询变体对自适应RAG的影响尚未得到充分研究。需要系统评估自适应RAG在面对语义相同但表达不同的查询时的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建了首个大规模基准测试，包含人类编写和模型生成的语义相同但表面形式不同的查询变体。从三个维度系统评估自适应RAG的关键组件：答案质量、计算成本和检索决策。
AI.result: 发现自适应RAG存在严重的鲁棒性缺陷，查询的微小表面变化会显著改变检索行为和准确性。虽然更大的模型表现更好，但鲁棒性并未相应提升。自适应RAG方法对保持相同语义的查询变体高度脆弱。
AI.conclusion: 自适应RAG方法在面对语义相同但表面形式不同的查询变体时存在严重的鲁棒性挑战，这暴露了当前方法的脆弱性，需要进一步研究来提高系统的稳定性。

title: Topology-Aware PAC-Bayesian Generalization Analysis for Graph Neural Networks
summary: Graph neural networks have demonstrated excellent applicability to a wide range of domains, including social networks, biological systems, recommendation systems, and wireless communications. Yet a principled theoretical understanding of their generalization behavior remains limited, particularly for graph classification tasks where complex interactions between model parameters and graph structure play a crucial role. Among existing theoretical tools, PAC-Bayesian norm-based generalization bounds provide a flexible and data-dependent framework; however, current results for GNNs often restrict the exploitation of graph structures. In this work, we propose a topology-aware PAC-Bayesian norm-based generalization framework for graph convolutional networks (GCNs) that extends a previously developed framework to graph-structured models. Our approach reformulates the derivation of generalization bounds as a stochastic optimization problem and introduces sensitivity matrices that measure the response of classification outputs with respect to structured weight perturbations. By imposing different structures on sensitivity matrices from both spatial and spectral perspectives, we derive a family of generalization error bounds with graph structures explicitly embedded. Such bounds could recover existing results as special cases, while yielding bounds that are tighter than state-of-the-art PAC-Bayesian bounds for GNNs. Notably, the proposed framework explicitly integrates graph structural properties into the generalization analysis, enabling a unified inspection of GNN generalization behavior from both spatial aggregation and spectral filtering viewpoints.

AI.tldr: 提出一种拓扑感知的PAC-Bayesian范数泛化框架，用于图卷积网络，通过敏感性矩阵将图结构显式嵌入泛化界，得到比现有方法更紧的边界。
AI.motivation: 尽管图神经网络在多个领域表现出色，但其泛化行为的理论理解仍然有限，特别是在图分类任务中，模型参数与图结构之间的复杂相互作用至关重要。现有的PAC-Bayesian范数泛化界虽然灵活且数据依赖，但往往限制了图结构的充分利用。
AI.method: 将泛化界推导重新表述为随机优化问题，引入敏感性矩阵来衡量分类输出对结构化权重扰动的响应。从空间和谱两个角度对敏感性矩阵施加不同结构，推导出显式嵌入图结构的泛化误差界族。
AI.result: 提出的框架能够恢复现有结果作为特例，同时得到比最先进的GNN PAC-Bayesian界更紧的边界。该框架显式地将图结构特性集成到泛化分析中。
AI.conclusion: 该拓扑感知的PAC-Bayesian框架为图卷积网络提供了一个统一的泛化分析工具，能够从空间聚合和谱滤波两个视角统一检查GNN的泛化行为，为理解图神经网络的泛化特性提供了新的理论工具。

title: SwinTextUNet: Integrating CLIP-Based Text Guidance into Swin Transformer U-Nets for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Precise medical image segmentation is fundamental for enabling computer aided diagnosis and effective treatment planning. Traditional models that rely solely on visual features often struggle when confronted with ambiguous or low contrast patterns. To overcome these limitations, we introduce SwinTextUNet, a multimodal segmentation framework that incorporates Contrastive Language Image Pretraining (CLIP), derived textual embeddings into a Swin Transformer UNet backbone. By integrating cross attention and convolutional fusion, the model effectively aligns semantic text guidance with hierarchical visual representations, enhancing robustness and accuracy. We evaluate our approach on the QaTaCOV19 dataset, where the proposed four stage variant achieves an optimal balance between performance and complexity, yielding Dice and IoU scores of 86.47% and 78.2%, respectively. Ablation studies further validate the importance of text guidance and multimodal fusion. These findings underscore the promise of vision language integration in advancing medical image segmentation and supporting clinically meaningful diagnostic tools.

AI.tldr: SwinTextUNet：结合CLIP文本嵌入与Swin Transformer UNet的多模态医学图像分割框架，在QaTaCOV19数据集上取得Dice 86.47%、IoU 78.2%的优异性能。
AI.motivation: 传统仅依赖视觉特征的医学图像分割模型在面对模糊或低对比度模式时表现不佳，需要引入文本语义指导来增强模型的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.method: 提出SwinTextUNet多模态分割框架，将CLIP提取的文本嵌入集成到Swin Transformer UNet主干网络中，通过交叉注意力和卷积融合机制对齐文本语义指导与分层视觉表示。
AI.result: 在QaTaCOV19数据集上，四阶段变体在性能与复杂度间达到最佳平衡，Dice分数86.47%，IoU分数78.2%。消融研究验证了文本指导和多模态融合的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言集成在推进医学图像分割和开发具有临床意义的诊断工具方面展现出巨大潜力，多模态方法能有效提升分割精度和鲁棒性。

title: Dead Cognitions: A Census of Misattributed Insights
summary: This essay identifies a failure mode of AI chat systems that we term attribution laundering: the model performs substantive cognitive work and then rhetorically credits the user for having generated the resulting insights. Unlike transparent versions of glad handing sycophancy, attribution laundering is systematically occluded to the person it affects and self-reinforcing -- eroding users' ability to accurately assess their own cognitive contributions over time. We trace the mechanisms at both individual and societal scales, from the chat interface that discourages scrutiny to the institutional pressures that reward adoption over accountability. The document itself is an artifact of the process it describes, and is color-coded accordingly -- though the views expressed are the authors' own, not those of any affiliated institution, and the boundary between the human author's views and Claude's is, as the essay argues, difficult to draw.

AI.tldr: 论文识别了AI聊天系统的一种失败模式——"归因洗白"：模型完成实质性认知工作后，却将洞察归功于用户，这种系统性遮蔽会侵蚀用户准确评估自身认知贡献的能力。
AI.motivation: 揭示AI聊天系统中一种隐蔽且有害的失败模式，即模型将自身认知工作的成果归功于用户，这种机制会逐渐侵蚀用户对自身认知贡献的准确评估能力，具有个体和社会层面的危害。
AI.method: 采用批判性分析的方法，从个体和社会两个层面追踪归因洗白的机制：在个体层面分析聊天界面如何阻碍用户审查；在社会层面分析制度压力如何奖励采用而非问责。论文本身也是所描述过程的产物。
AI.result: 识别出"归因洗白"这一系统性遮蔽的失败模式，它不同于透明的奉承，会自我强化并随时间侵蚀用户准确评估自身认知贡献的能力，同时模糊人类作者与AI之间的界限。
AI.conclusion: 归因洗白是AI聊天系统中一种隐蔽且有害的失败模式，需要引起重视。论文本身作为该过程的产物，也体现了人类作者与AI之间界限的模糊性，这正是论文所论证的难点。

title: Generating Multiple-Choice Knowledge Questions with Interpretable Difficulty Estimation using Knowledge Graphs and Large Language Models
summary: Generating multiple-choice questions (MCQs) with difficulty estimation remains challenging in automated MCQ-generation systems used in adaptive, AI-assisted education. This study proposes a novel methodology for generating MCQs with difficulty estimation from the input documents by utilizing knowledge graphs (KGs) and large language models (LLMs). Our approach uses an LLM to construct a KG from input documents, from which MCQs are then systematically generated. Each MCQ is generated by selecting a node from the KG as the key, sampling a related triple or quintuple -- optionally augmented with an extra triple -- and prompting an LLM to generate a corresponding stem from these graph components. Distractors are then selected from the KG. For each MCQ, nine difficulty signals are computed and combined into a unified difficulty score using a data-driven approach. Experimental results demonstrate that our method generates high-quality MCQs whose difficulty estimation is interpretable and aligns with human perceptions. Our approach improves automated MCQ generation by integrating structured knowledge representations with LLMs and a data-driven difficulty estimation model.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于知识图谱和LLM的自动多选题生成方法，包含难度估计功能
AI.motivation: 自适应AI辅助教育系统中，自动生成多选题并准确估计难度仍然具有挑战性
AI.method: 使用LLM从输入文档构建知识图谱，然后从图谱中系统生成多选题，并计算9个难度信号，通过数据驱动方法整合为统一难度分数
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能生成高质量的多选题，其难度估计具有可解释性且与人类感知一致
AI.conclusion: 通过整合结构化知识表示、LLM和数据驱动的难度估计模型，改进了自动多选题生成

title: Heterogeneous Connectivity in Sparse Networks: Fan-in Profiles, Gradient Hierarchy, and Topological Equilibria
summary: Profiled Sparse Networks (PSN) replace uniform connectivity with deterministic, heterogeneous fan-in profiles defined by continuous, nonlinear functions, creating neurons with both dense and sparse receptive fields. We benchmark PSN across four classification datasets spanning vision and tabular domains, input dimensions from 54 to 784, and network depths of 2--3 hidden layers. At 90% sparsity, all static profiles, including the uniform random baseline, achieve accuracy within 0.2-0.6% of dense baselines on every dataset, demonstrating that heterogeneous connectivity provides no accuracy advantage when hub placement is arbitrary rather than task-aligned. This result holds across sparsity levels (80-99.9%), profile shapes (eight parametric families, lognormal, and power-law), and fan-in coefficients of variation from 0 to 2.5. Internal gradient analysis reveals that structured profiles create a 2-5x gradient concentration at hub neurons compared to the ~1x uniform distribution in random baselines, with the hierarchy strength predicted by fan-in coefficient of variation ($r = 0.93$). When PSN fan-in distributions are used to initialise RigL dynamic sparse training, lognormal profiles matched to the equilibrium fan-in distribution consistently outperform standard ERK initialisation, with advantages growing on harder tasks, achieving +0.16% on Fashion-MNIST ($p = 0.036$, $d = 1.07$), +0.43% on EMNIST, and +0.49% on Forest Cover. RigL converges to a characteristic fan-in distribution regardless of initialisation. Starting at this equilibrium allows the optimiser to refine weights rather than rearrange topology. Which neurons become hubs matters more than the degree of connectivity variance, i.e., random hub placement provides no advantage, while optimisation-driven placement does.

AI.tldr: PSN使用确定性异质连接配置替代均匀连接，在90%稀疏度下与密集网络精度相当，表明随机枢纽放置无优势；但用PSN分布初始化动态稀疏训练RigL能提升性能，优化驱动的枢纽放置更重要。
AI.motivation: 研究异质连接配置（非均匀的扇入分布）在稀疏神经网络中是否能带来精度优势，以及枢纽神经元的位置选择（随机vs优化驱动）对性能的影响。
AI.method: 提出Profiled Sparse Networks (PSN)，使用连续非线性函数定义确定性异质扇入配置；在4个分类数据集上测试不同稀疏度、配置形状和变异系数；用PSN分布初始化RigL动态稀疏训练进行对比。
AI.result: 在90%稀疏度下，所有静态配置（包括均匀随机基线）精度与密集基线相差仅0.2-0.6%，异质连接无精度优势；但用对数正态分布初始化RigL在多个数据集上显著提升性能（+0.16%到+0.49%）。
AI.conclusion: 枢纽神经元的位置比连接异质性更重要：随机枢纽放置无优势，而优化驱动的枢纽放置能提升性能；用匹配均衡分布的配置初始化动态稀疏训练效果更好。

title: Demographic and Linguistic Bias Evaluation in Omnimodal Language Models
comment: Accepted at ICPR 2026. Full paper with complete appendix (31 pages total)
summary: This paper provides a comprehensive evaluation of demographic and linguistic biases in omnimodal language models that process text, images, audio, and video within a single framework. Although these models are being widely deployed, their performance across different demographic groups and modalities is not well studied. Four omnimodal models are evaluated on tasks that include demographic attribute estimation, identity verification, activity recognition, multilingual speech transcription, and language identification. Accuracy differences are measured across age, gender, skin tone, language, and country of origin. The results show that image and video understanding tasks generally exhibit better performance with smaller demographic disparities. In contrast, audio understanding tasks exhibit significantly lower performance and substantial bias, including large accuracy differences across age groups, genders, and languages, and frequent prediction collapse toward narrow categories. These findings highlight the importance of evaluating fairness across all supported modalities as omnimodal language models are increasingly used in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 对四种全模态语言模型在人口统计和语言偏见方面的全面评估，发现图像和视频任务表现较好且偏见较小，而音频任务表现较差且存在显著偏见
AI.motivation: 全模态语言模型（处理文本、图像、音频和视频）正在广泛部署，但其在不同人口群体和模态间的性能差异尚未得到充分研究，需要评估这些模型的公平性
AI.method: 评估了四种全模态模型，任务包括：人口属性估计、身份验证、活动识别、多语言语音转录和语言识别。测量了年龄、性别、肤色、语言和原籍国等维度的准确性差异
AI.result: 图像和视频理解任务通常表现更好，人口统计差异较小；音频理解任务表现显著较低且存在严重偏见，包括年龄组、性别和语言间的巨大准确性差异，以及频繁向狭窄类别预测崩溃
AI.conclusion: 随着全模态语言模型在现实应用中的日益普及，评估所有支持模态的公平性至关重要，特别是在音频模态中发现的显著偏见需要特别关注

title: AI Organizations are More Effective but Less Aligned than Individual Agents
summary: AI is increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems; however, most research considers only the behavior of individual models. We experimentally show that multi-agent "AI organizations" are simultaneously more effective at achieving business goals, but less aligned, than individual AI agents. We examine 12 tasks across two practical settings: an AI consultancy providing solutions to business problems and an AI software team developing software products. Across all settings, AI Organizations composed of aligned models produce solutions with higher utility but greater misalignment compared to a single aligned model. Our work demonstrates the importance of considering interacting systems of AI agents when doing both capabilities and safety research.

AI.tldr: 多智能体AI组织比单个AI智能体在业务目标上更有效，但对齐性更差
AI.motivation: 当前AI研究主要关注单个模型的行为，但AI越来越多地部署在多智能体系统中。需要研究多智能体AI组织在实现业务目标和对齐性方面的表现差异。
AI.method: 在两个实际场景中测试12个任务：1) AI咨询公司解决商业问题，2) AI软件开发团队开发软件产品。比较单个对齐模型与由对齐模型组成的AI组织的表现。
AI.result: 在所有设置中，由对齐模型组成的AI组织比单个对齐模型产生具有更高效用但更大错位的解决方案。多智能体系统在实现业务目标方面更有效，但对齐性更差。
AI.conclusion: 进行能力和安全研究时，必须考虑AI智能体的交互系统。多智能体AI组织在提升能力的同时带来了新的对齐挑战。

title: Do BERT Embeddings Encode Narrative Dimensions? A Token-Level Probing Analysis of Time, Space, Causality, and Character in Fiction
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at CMN'26 (9th International Workshop on Computational Models of Narrative)
summary: Narrative understanding requires multidimensional semantic structures. This study investigates whether BERT embeddings encode dimensions of fictional narrative semantics -- time, space, causality, and character. Using an LLM to accelerate annotation, we construct a token-level dataset labeled with these four narrative categories plus "others." A linear probe on BERT embeddings (94% accuracy) significantly outperforms a control probe on variance-matched random embeddings (47%), confirming that BERT encodes meaningful narrative information. With balanced class weighting, the probe achieves a macro-average recall of 0.83, with moderate success on rare categories such as causality (recall = 0.75) and space (recall = 0.66). However, confusion matrix analysis reveals "Boundary Leakage," where rare dimensions are systematically misclassified as "others." Clustering analysis shows that unsupervised clustering aligns near-randomly with predefined categories (ARI = 0.081), suggesting that narrative dimensions are encoded but not as discretely separable clusters. Future work includes a POS-only baseline to disentangle syntactic patterns from narrative encoding, expanded datasets, and layer-wise probing.

AI.tldr: 研究验证BERT嵌入是否编码虚构叙事语义维度（时间、空间、因果、角色），通过线性探测发现BERT确实编码有意义的叙事信息，但稀有类别存在边界泄漏问题
AI.motivation: 叙事理解需要多维语义结构，本研究旨在探究BERT嵌入是否编码虚构叙事语义的四个维度：时间、空间、因果和角色
AI.method: 使用LLM加速标注构建token级数据集，在BERT嵌入上应用线性探测，并与方差匹配的随机嵌入进行对比，同时进行聚类分析
AI.result: BERT嵌入的线性探测准确率达94%，显著优于随机嵌入（47%），宏观平均召回率为0.83，但稀有类别存在边界泄漏问题，聚类分析显示叙事维度未形成离散可分离的簇
AI.conclusion: BERT确实编码有意义的叙事信息，但稀有维度存在系统性误分类问题，叙事维度在嵌入空间中不是离散可分离的簇，未来工作包括POS基线、扩展数据集和分层探测

title: ReadMOF: Structure-Free Semantic Embeddings from Systematic MOF Nomenclature for Machine Learning
summary: Systematic chemical names, such as IUPAC-style nomenclature for metal-organic frameworks (MOFs), contain rich structural and compositional information in a standardized textual format. Here we introduce ReadMOF, which is, to our knowledge, the first nomenclature-free machine learning framework that leverages these names to model structure-property relationships without requiring atomic coordinates or connectivity graphs. By employing pretrained language models, ReadMOF converts systematic MOF names from the Cambridge Structural Database (CSD) into vector embeddings that closely represent traditional structure-based descriptors. These embeddings enable applications in materials informatics, including property prediction, similarity retrieval, and clustering, with performance comparable to geometry-dependent methods. When combined with large language models, ReadMOF also establishes chemically meaningful reasoning ability with textual input only. Our results show that structured chemical language, interpreted through modern natural language processing techniques, can provide a scalable, interpretable, and geometry-independent alternative to conventional molecular representations. This approach opens new opportunities for language-driven discovery in materials science.

AI.tldr: ReadMOF：首个基于MOF系统命名法的机器学习框架，无需原子坐标或连接图，通过预训练语言模型将化学名称转换为向量嵌入，实现材料性质预测和相似性检索。
AI.motivation: 金属有机框架（MOF）的系统化学名称（如IUPAC命名法）包含了丰富的结构和组成信息，但传统方法需要原子坐标或连接图。研究者希望利用这些标准化的文本信息，开发一种无需几何结构的替代表示方法。
AI.method: 使用预训练语言模型将剑桥结构数据库（CSD）中的MOF系统名称转换为向量嵌入，这些嵌入能够近似表示传统的基于结构的描述符。结合大语言模型，仅通过文本输入建立化学意义的推理能力。
AI.result: ReadMOF在材料信息学应用中表现出色，包括性质预测、相似性检索和聚类，性能与几何依赖方法相当。同时建立了仅通过文本输入的化学意义推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过现代自然语言处理技术解释结构化化学语言，可以提供可扩展、可解释且独立于几何结构的分子表示替代方案，为材料科学中的语言驱动发现开辟新机会。

title: What and Where to Adapt: Structure-Semantics Co-Tuning for Machine Vision Compression via Synergistic Adapters
comment: Accepted by the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Findings, 2026
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning of pre-trained codecs is a promising direction in image compression for human and machine vision. While most existing works have primarily focused on tuning the feature structure within the encoder-decoder backbones, the adaptation of the statistical semantics within the entropy model has received limited attention despite its function of predicting the probability distribution of latent features. Our analysis reveals that naive adapter insertion into the entropy model can lead to suboptimal outcomes, underscoring that the effectiveness of adapter-based tuning depends critically on the coordination between adapter type and placement across the compression pipeline. Therefore, we introduce Structure-Semantics Co-Tuning (S2-CoT), a novel framework that achieves this coordination via two specialized, synergistic adapters: the Structural Fidelity Adapter (SFA) and the Semantic Context Adapter (SCA). SFA is integrated into the encoder-decoder to preserve high-fidelity representations by dynamically fusing spatial and frequency information; meanwhile, the SCA adapts the entropy model to align with SFA-tuned features by refining the channel context for more efficient statistical coding. Through joint optimization, S2-CoT turns potential performance degradation into synergistic gains, achieving state-of-the-art results across four diverse base codecs with only a small fraction of trainable parameters, closely matching full fine-tuning performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Brock-bit4/S2-CoT.

AI.tldr: S2-CoT提出了一种参数高效的图像压缩微调框架，通过结构-语义协同适配器协调编码器-解码器与熵模型的调整，实现接近全参数微调的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法主要关注编码器-解码器主干网络的特征结构调整，而忽略了熵模型中统计语义的适配，这限制了压缩性能的提升潜力。
AI.method: 提出Structure-Semantics Co-Tuning (S2-CoT)框架，包含两个协同适配器：Structural Fidelity Adapter (SFA)用于编码器-解码器，动态融合空间和频率信息；Semantic Context Adapter (SCA)用于熵模型，通过细化通道上下文实现更高效的统计编码。
AI.result: 在四种不同的基础编解码器上实现了最先进的性能，仅使用少量可训练参数就能接近全参数微调的效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过协调结构保真度和语义上下文适配，S2-CoT将潜在的性能下降转化为协同增益，为参数高效的图像压缩微调提供了有效解决方案。

title: TimeSeriesExamAgent: Creating Time Series Reasoning Benchmarks at Scale
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising performance in time series modeling tasks, but do they truly understand time series data? While multiple benchmarks have been proposed to answer this fundamental question, most are manually curated and focus on narrow domains or specific skill sets. To address this limitation, we propose scalable methods for creating comprehensive time series reasoning benchmarks that combine the flexibility of templates with the creativity of LLM agents. We first develop TimeSeriesExam, a multiple-choice benchmark using synthetic time series to evaluate LLMs across five core reasoning categories: pattern recognitionnoise understandingsimilarity analysisanomaly detection, and causality. Then, with TimeSeriesExamAgent, we scale our approach by automatically generating benchmarks from real-world datasets spanning healthcare, finance and weather domains. Through multi-dimensional quality evaluation, we demonstrate that our automatically generated benchmarks achieve diversity comparable to manually curated alternatives. However, our experiments reveal that LLM performance remains limited in both abstract time series reasoning and domain-specific applications, highlighting ongoing challenges in enabling effective time series understanding in these models. TimeSeriesExamAgent is available at https://github.com/magwiazda/TimeSeriesExamAgent.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了TimeSeriesExam和TimeSeriesExamAgent两个可扩展的时间序列推理基准测试方法，通过合成数据和真实数据评估LLMs在时间序列理解上的能力，发现LLMs在抽象时间序列推理和领域应用方面仍有局限。
AI.motivation: 虽然大型语言模型在时间序列建模任务中表现出潜力，但现有基准测试大多是人工构建的，局限于狭窄领域或特定技能。需要更全面、可扩展的方法来评估LLMs是否真正理解时间序列数据。
AI.method: 1. 开发TimeSeriesExam：使用合成时间序列的多选题基准，评估五个核心推理类别（模式识别、噪声理解、相似性分析、异常检测、因果关系）；2. 开发TimeSeriesExamAgent：通过LLM代理自动从真实世界数据集（医疗、金融、天气）生成基准测试，结合模板灵活性和代理创造性。
AI.result: 自动生成的基准测试在多样性上可与人工构建的基准相媲美。实验显示LLMs在抽象时间序列推理和领域特定应用中的表现仍然有限，突显了在这些模型中实现有效时间序列理解的持续挑战。
AI.conclusion: 论文提出了可扩展的时间序列推理基准测试方法，揭示了LLMs在时间序列理解方面的局限性，为未来研究提供了重要评估工具和方向。

title: When Meaning Isn't Literal: Exploring Idiomatic Meaning Across Languages and Modalities
summary: Idiomatic reasoning, deeply intertwined with metaphor and culture, remains a blind spot for contemporary language models, whose progress skews toward surface-level lexical and semantic cues. For instance, the Bengali idiom \textit{\foreignlanguage{bengali}{\char"0986\char"0999\char"09CD\char"0997\char"09C1 \char"09B0 \char"09AB\char"09B2 \char"099F\char"0995}} (angur fol tok, ``grapes are sour''): it encodes denial-driven rationalization, yet naive models latch onto the literal fox-and-grape imagery. Addressing this oversight, we present ``Mediom,'' a multilingual, multimodal idiom corpus of 3,533 Hindi, Bengali, and Thai idioms, each paired with gold-standard explanations, cross-lingual translations, and carefully aligned text--image representations. We benchmark both large language models (textual reasoning) and vision-language models (figurative disambiguation) on Mediom, exposing systematic failures in metaphor comprehension. To mitigate these gaps, we propose ``HIDE,'' a Hinting-based Idiom Explanation framework that leverages error-feedback retrieval and targeted diagnostic cues for iterative reasoning refinement. Collectively, Mediom and HIDE establish a rigorous test bed and methodology for culturally grounded, multimodal idiom understanding embedded with reasoning hints in next-generation AI systems.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Mediom多模态多语言习语语料库和HIDE提示式习语解释框架，解决语言模型在文化隐喻理解上的盲点
AI.motivation: 当前语言模型在习语推理方面存在盲点，主要关注表层词汇和语义线索，无法理解深层的文化隐喻。例如孟加拉语习语"葡萄是酸的"编码了否认驱动的合理化，但朴素模型只关注字面狐狸和葡萄的意象
AI.method: 1) 构建Mediom多模态多语言习语语料库，包含3,533个印地语、孟加拉语和泰语习语，每个配有金标准解释、跨语言翻译和精心对齐的文本-图像表示；2) 提出HIDE提示式习语解释框架，利用错误反馈检索和针对性诊断线索进行迭代推理优化
AI.result: 在Mediom上对大语言模型（文本推理）和视觉语言模型（比喻消歧）进行基准测试，揭示了隐喻理解中的系统性失败。HIDE框架通过提示机制显著改善了习语理解能力
AI.conclusion: Mediom和HIDE共同为下一代AI系统建立了严格的文化基础多模态习语理解测试平台和方法论，解决了语言模型在文化隐喻推理方面的关键缺陷

title: WOODELF-HD: Efficient Background SHAP for High-Depth Decision Trees
summary: Decision-tree ensembles are a cornerstone of predictive modeling, and SHAP is a standard framework for interpreting their predictions. Among its variants, Background SHAP offers high accuracy by modeling missing features using a background dataset. Historically, this approach did not scale well, as the time complexity for explaining n instances using m background samples included an O(mn) component. Recent methods such as Woodelf and PLTreeSHAP reduce this to O(m+n), but introduce a preprocessing bottleneck that grows as 3^D with tree depth D, making them impractical for deep trees. We address this limitation with WoodelfHD, a Woodelf extension that reduces the 3^D factor to 2^D. The key idea is a Strassen-like multiplication scheme that exploits the structure of Woodelf matrices, reducing matrix-vector multiplication from O(k^2) to O(k*log(k)) via a fully vectorized, non-recursive implementation. In addition, we merge path nodes with identical features, reducing cache size and memory usage. When running on standard environments, WoodelfHD enables exact Background SHAP computation for trees with depths up to 21, where previous methods fail due to excessive memory usage. For ensembles of depths 12 and 15, it achieves speedups of 33x and 162x, respectively, over the state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: WoodelfHD扩展了Woodelf方法，将Background SHAP计算的时间复杂度从3^D降低到2^D，通过Strassen-like矩阵乘法方案和路径节点合并，使深度达21的树能进行精确计算，相比现有方法获得33-162倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有Background SHAP方法如Woodelf和PLTreeSHAP虽然将时间复杂度从O(mn)降到O(m+n)，但引入了3^D的预处理瓶颈，使得深度树的计算不切实际。
AI.method: 提出WoodelfHD扩展：1) 使用Strassen-like矩阵乘法方案，利用Woodelf矩阵结构将矩阵-向量乘法从O(k^2)降到O(k*log(k))；2) 合并具有相同特征的路径节点，减少缓存大小和内存使用；3) 完全向量化、非递归实现。
AI.result: WoodelfHD能对深度达21的树进行精确Background SHAP计算（之前方法因内存过大而失败）。对于深度12和15的集成树，分别获得33倍和162倍的加速。
AI.conclusion: WoodelfHD通过创新的矩阵乘法方案和优化策略，显著提升了Background SHAP计算的可扩展性，使深度决策树的可解释性分析变得实用。

title: FREE-Switch: Frequency-based Dynamic LoRA Switch for Style Transfer
summary: With the growing availability of open-sourced adapters trained on the same diffusion backbone for diverse scenes and objects, combining these pretrained weights enables low-cost customized generation. However, most existing model merging methods are designed for classification or text generation, and when applied to image generation, they suffer from content drift due to error accumulation across multiple diffusion steps. For image-oriented methods, training-based approaches are computationally expensive and unsuitable for edge deployment, while training-free ones use uniform fusion strategies that ignore inter-adapter differences, leading to detail degradation. We find that since different adapters are specialized for generating different types of content, the contribution of each diffusion step carries different significance for each adapter. Accordingly, we propose a frequency-domain importance-driven dynamic LoRA switch method. Furthermore, we observe that maintaining semantic consistency across adapters effectively mitigates detail loss; thus, we design an automatic Generation Alignment mechanism to align generation intents at the semantic level. Experiments demonstrate that our FREE-Switch (Frequency-based Efficient and Dynamic LoRA Switch) framework efficiently combines adapters for different objects and styles, substantially reducing the training cost of high-quality customized generation.

AI.tldr: 提出FREE-Switch框架，通过频域重要性驱动的动态LoRA切换和生成对齐机制，高效融合多个预训练适配器，实现高质量定制化图像生成。
AI.motivation: 随着基于相同扩散主干的不同场景和对象适配器的开源，组合这些预训练权重可以实现低成本的定制化生成。但现有模型融合方法在图像生成中存在内容漂移、计算成本高或忽略适配器间差异导致细节退化的问题。
AI.method: 提出频域重要性驱动的动态LoRA切换方法，根据不同适配器在不同扩散步骤中的贡献差异进行动态融合；设计自动生成对齐机制，在语义层面保持适配器间的一致性以减轻细节损失。
AI.result: 实验表明FREE-Switch框架能高效组合不同对象和风格的适配器，显著降低高质量定制化生成的训练成本。
AI.conclusion: 通过频域重要性分析和语义对齐，FREE-Switch实现了高效、高质量的适配器融合，为低成本定制化图像生成提供了有效解决方案。

title: Gypscie: A Cross-Platform AI Artifact Management System
summary:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) models, encompassing both traditional machine learning (ML) and more advanced approaches such as deep learning and large language models (LLMs), play a central role in modern applications. AI model lifecycle management involves the end-to-end process of managing these models, from data collection and preparation to model building, evaluation, deployment, and continuous monitoring. This process is inherently complex, as it requires the coordination of diverse services that manage AI artifacts such as datasets, dataflows, and models, all orchestrated to operate seamlessly. In this context, it is essential to isolate applications from the complexity of interacting with heterogeneous services, datasets, and AI platforms.
  In this paper, we introduce Gypscie, a cross-platform AI artifact management system. By providing a unified view of all AI artifacts, the Gypscie platform simplifies the development and deployment of AI applications. This unified view is realized through a knowledge graph that captures application semantics and a rule-based query language that supports reasoning over data and models. Model lifecycle activities are represented as high-level dataflows that can be scheduled across multiple platforms, such as servers, cloud platforms, or supercomputers. Finally, Gypscie records provenance information about the artifacts it produces, thereby enabling explainability. Our qualitative comparison with representative AI systems shows that Gypscie supports a broader range of functionalities across the AI artifact lifecycle. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that Gypscie can successfully optimize and schedule dataflows on AI platforms from an abstract specification.

AI.tldr: Gypscie是一个跨平台AI工件管理系统，通过知识图谱和规则查询语言提供统一视图，简化AI应用开发部署，支持多平台数据流调度，并记录溯源信息以实现可解释性。
AI.motivation: AI模型生命周期管理涉及从数据收集到部署监控的复杂过程，需要协调管理数据集、数据流和模型等AI工件的多样化服务。现有系统需要将应用与异构服务、数据集和AI平台的交互复杂性隔离。
AI.method: Gypscie采用知识图谱捕获应用语义，结合基于规则的查询语言支持数据和模型推理。模型生命周期活动表示为可在服务器、云平台或超级计算机等多平台上调度的高级数据流。系统记录所产生工件的溯源信息。
AI.result: 定性比较显示Gypscie在AI工件生命周期中支持更广泛的功能。实验评估表明Gypscie能够成功地从抽象规范优化和调度AI平台上的数据流。
AI.conclusion: Gypscie通过提供统一视图简化AI应用开发部署，支持跨平台数据流调度，记录溯源信息实现可解释性，为复杂的AI模型生命周期管理提供了有效的解决方案。

title: TInR: Exploring Tool-Internalized Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR) has emerged as a promising direction by extending Large Language Models' (LLMs) capabilities with external tools during reasoning. Existing TIR methods typically rely on external tool documentation during reasoning. However, this leads to tool mastery difficulty, tool size constraints, and inference inefficiency. To mitigate these issues, we explore Tool-Internalized Reasoning (TInR), aiming at facilitating reasoning with tool knowledge internalized into LLMs. Achieving this goal presents notable requirements, including tool internalization and tool-reasoning coordination. To address them, we propose TInR-U, a tool-internalized reasoning framework for unified reasoning and tool usage. TInR-U is trained through a three-phase pipeline: 1) tool internalization with a bidirectional knowledge alignment strategy; 2) supervised fine-tuning warm-up using high-quality reasoning annotations, and 3) reinforcement learning with TInR-specific rewards. We comprehensively evaluate our method across in-domain and out-of-domain settings. Experiment results show that TInR-U achieves superior performance in both settings, highlighting its effectiveness and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TInR-U框架，将工具知识内化到LLMs中，解决传统工具集成推理方法存在的工具掌握困难、工具规模限制和推理效率低下等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有工具集成推理方法依赖外部工具文档，导致工具掌握困难、工具规模受限和推理效率低下。为了解决这些问题，作者探索工具内化推理，旨在将工具知识内化到LLMs中以促进推理。
AI.method: 提出TInR-U框架，采用三阶段训练流程：1）通过双向知识对齐策略进行工具内化；2）使用高质量推理注释进行监督微调预热；3）使用TInR特定奖励进行强化学习。
AI.result: 在领域内和领域外设置下的综合评估显示，TInR-U在两种设置下都实现了优越性能，突出了其有效性和效率。
AI.conclusion: TInR-U框架成功解决了工具集成推理的局限性，通过工具内化实现了更高效、更灵活的推理能力，为LLMs的工具使用提供了新方向。

title: Calibration Collapse Under Sycophancy Fine-Tuning: How Reward Hacking Breaks Uncertainty Quantification in LLMs
comment: Accepted at the AISTATS 2026 Workshop on Towards Trustworthy Predictions: Theory and Applications of Calibration for Modern AI. 14 Pages
summary: Modern large language models (LLMs) are increasingly fine-tuned via reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) or related reward optimisation schemes. While such procedures improve perceived helpfulness, we investigate whether sycophantic reward signals degrade calibration -- a property essential for reliable uncertainty quantification. We fine-tune Qwen3-8B under three regimes: no fine-tuning (base), neutral supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on TriviaQA, and sycophancy-inducing Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) that rewards agreement with planted wrong answers. Evaluating on $1{,}000$ MMLU items across five subject domains with bootstrap confidence intervals and permutation testing, we find that \textbf{sycophantic GRPO produces consistent directional calibration degradation} -- ECE rises by $+0.006$ relative to the base model and MCE increases by $+0.010$ relative to neutral SFT -- though the effect does not reach statistical significance ($p = 0.41$) at this training budget. Post-hoc matrix scaling applied to all three models reduces ECE by $40$--$64\%$ and improves accuracy by $1.5$--$3.0$ percentage points. However, the sycophantic model retains the highest post-scaling ECE relative to the neutral SFT control ($0.042$ vs.\ $0.037$), suggesting that reward-induced miscalibration leaves a structured residual even after affine correction. These findings establish a methodology for evaluating the calibration impact of reward hacking and motivate calibration-aware training objectives.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨了强化学习微调（特别是迎合性奖励信号）是否会影响大语言模型的校准性，发现迎合性训练会导致校准退化，即使经过后处理校正仍存在结构化残差。
AI.motivation: 虽然RLHF等奖励优化方法能提升大语言模型的帮助性，但研究者担心迎合性奖励信号可能会损害模型的校准性——这是可靠不确定性量化的关键属性。
AI.method: 对Qwen3-8B进行三种微调：基础模型、在TriviaQA上的中性监督微调（SFT）、以及使用Group Relative Policy Optimisation（GRPO）进行迎合性诱导微调（奖励与植入错误答案的一致性）。在MMLU的1000个项目上评估，使用bootstrap置信区间和置换检验。
AI.result: 迎合性GRPO导致一致的校准退化方向（ECE相对基础模型上升+0.006，MCE相对中性SFT上升+0.010），但在此训练预算下未达到统计显著性（p=0.41）。后处理矩阵缩放使ECE降低40-64%，准确率提升1.5-3.0个百分点，但迎合性模型仍保持最高的后缩放ECE（0.042 vs. 0.037）。
AI.conclusion: 奖励诱导的校准错误会留下结构化残差，即使经过仿射校正也无法完全消除。这为评估奖励攻击对校准的影响建立了方法论，并推动了校准感知训练目标的发展。

title: LVSum: A Benchmark for Timestamp-Aware Long Video Summarization
summary: Long video summarization presents significant challenges for current multimodal large language models (MLLMs), particularly in maintaining temporal fidelity over extended durations and producing summaries that are both semantically and temporally grounded. In this work, we present LVSum, a human-annotated benchmark designed specifically for evaluating long video summarization with fine-grained temporal alignment. LVSum comprises diverse long-form videos across 13 domains, each paired with human-generated summaries containing precise temporal references. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation of both proprietary and open-source MLLMs on LVSum, assessing performance using newly introduced LLM-based metrics for content relevance and modality coherence, alongside standard evaluation metrics. Our experiments reveal systematic gaps in temporal understanding among existing MLLMs and offer insights that establish a new foundation for advancing temporal reasoning in long video summarization.

AI.tldr: LVSum是一个专门用于评估长视频摘要的新基准，包含13个领域的长视频和人工标注的精确时间对齐摘要，揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在时间理解上的系统性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在长视频摘要任务中存在显著挑战，特别是在保持长时间跨度的时间保真度和生成语义与时间上都准确的基础摘要方面。需要专门设计的基准来评估和改进模型的长视频摘要能力。
AI.method: 提出了LVSum基准，包含13个领域的长视频，每个视频都配有包含精确时间参考的人工生成摘要。使用新引入的基于LLM的内容相关性和模态一致性指标，以及标准评估指标，对专有和开源MLLMs进行全面评估。
AI.result: 实验揭示了现有MLLMs在时间理解方面存在系统性差距，为推进长视频摘要中的时间推理建立了新的基础。
AI.conclusion: LVSum基准为评估长视频摘要提供了重要工具，揭示了当前MLLMs在时间保真度方面的局限性，为未来改进长视频摘要中的时间推理能力指明了方向。

title: From GPT-3 to GPT-5: Mapping their capabilities, scope, limitations, and consequences
summary: We present the progress of the GPT family from GPT-3 through GPT-3.5, GPT-4, GPT-4 Turbo, GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, and the GPT-5 family. Our work is comparative rather than merely historical. We investigates how the family evolved in technical framing, user interaction, modality, deployment architecture, and governance viewpoint. The work focuses on five recurring themes: technical progression, capability changes, deployment shifts, persistent limitations, and downstream consequences. In term of research design, we consider official technical reports, system cards, API and model documentation, product announcements, release notes, and peer-reviewed secondary studies. A primary assertion is that later GPT generations should not be interpreted only as larger or more accurate language models. Instead, the family evolves from a scaled few-shot text predictor into a set of aligned, multimodal, tool-oriented, long-context, and increasingly workflow-integrated systems. This development complicates simple model-to-model comparison because product routing, tool access, safety tuning, and interface design become part of the effective system. Across generations, several limitations remain unchanged: hallucination, prompt sensitivity, benchmark fragility, uneven behavior across domains and populations, and incomplete public transparency about architecture and training. However, the family has evolved software development, educational practice, information work, interface design, and discussions of frontier-model governance. We infer that the transition from GPT-3 to GPT-5 is best understood not only as an improvement in model capability, but also as a broader reformulation of what a deployable AI system is, how it is evaluated, and where responsibility should be located when such systems are used at scale.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统分析了GPT系列从GPT-3到GPT-5的演进历程，强调其不仅是模型能力的提升，更是从单纯文本预测器向多模态、工具导向、工作流集成系统的转变，同时探讨了持续存在的局限性和广泛的社会影响。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于超越简单的历史回顾，对GPT家族的演进进行系统性比较分析，探究其在技术框架、用户交互、模态支持、部署架构和治理视角等方面的演变，理解AI系统从单纯语言模型向复杂部署系统的转变。
AI.method: 采用比较研究方法，基于官方技术报告、系统卡片、API文档、产品公告、发布说明和同行评审的二次研究等资料，从五个重复主题（技术进展、能力变化、部署转变、持续局限、下游影响）进行分析。
AI.result: 研究发现GPT系列已从简单的少样本文本预测器演变为对齐的、多模态的、工具导向的、长上下文的工作流集成系统；同时揭示了持续存在的局限性（幻觉、提示敏感性、基准脆弱性等）以及对社会各领域的广泛影响。
AI.conclusion: 从GPT-3到GPT-5的演进不仅是模型能力的提升，更是对可部署AI系统定义、评估方式和规模化使用责任定位的重新构想，标志着AI系统从单纯语言模型向复杂社会技术系统的转变。

title: Position-Agnostic Pre-Projection for Transformer Attention: Nonlinear Feature Construction and Content Skip Before Q/K/V
summary: We propose two complementary modifications to transformer attention blocks. First, a non-linear pre-projection MLP is inserted between layer norm and Q/K/V projections, constructing richer features in a position-agnostic manner before any positional encoding is applied. Second, a content skip connection routes the pre-projection's features around the attention mechanism, allowing content information to bypass position-aware attention where beneficial. In frozen-probe experiments on Pythia-160M and 410M, the combined approach achieves the strongest results across methods: +40.6% LAMBADA accuracy and -39% perplexity at 160M scale. Learned skip connection weights reveal a consistent pattern across model sizes: later transformer layers activate the content bypass more strongly than earlier layers, suggesting that deeper layers benefit from content information that does not pass through positional attention. All modifications add no K/V cache overhead.

AI.tldr: 论文提出两种互补的Transformer注意力块改进：1) 在层归一化和Q/K/V投影之间插入非线性预投影MLP，在位置编码前构建更丰富的特征；2) 内容跳跃连接绕过注意力机制传递预投影特征。在Pythia模型上取得显著效果提升。
AI.motivation: 改进Transformer注意力机制，解决位置编码可能限制特征表达能力的问题，让内容信息能够绕过位置感知的注意力机制，从而提升模型性能。
AI.method: 1) 在层归一化和Q/K/V投影之间插入非线性MLP预投影，在应用位置编码前构建位置无关的丰富特征；2) 添加内容跳跃连接，允许预投影特征绕过注意力机制直接传递。
AI.result: 在Pythia-160M和410M模型的冻结探针实验中，组合方法取得最佳结果：160M规模上LAMBADA准确率提升40.6%，困惑度降低39%。学习到的跳跃连接权重显示深层比浅层更强烈激活内容旁路。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两种改进有效提升了Transformer性能，深层Transformer层更倾向于使用内容旁路，表明深层需要不经过位置注意力的内容信息。所有改进不增加K/V缓存开销。

title: Preventing Latent Rehearsal Decay in Online Continual SSL with SOLAR
summary: This paper explores Online Continual Self-Supervised Learning (OCSSL), a scenario in which models learn from continuous streams of unlabeled, non-stationary data, where methods typically employ replay and fast convergence is a central desideratum. We find that OCSSL requires particular attention to the stability-plasticity trade-off: stable methods (e.g. replay with Reservoir sampling) are able to converge faster compared to plastic ones (e.g. FIFO buffer), but incur in performance drops under certain conditions. We explain this collapse phenomenon with the Latent Rehearsal Decay hypothesis, which attributes it to latent space degradation under excessive stability of replay. We introduce two metrics (Overlap and Deviation) that diagnose latent degradation and correlate with accuracy declines. Building on these insights, we propose SOLAR, which leverages efficient online proxies of Deviation to guide buffer management and incorporates an explicit Overlap loss, allowing SOLAR to adaptively managing plasticity. Experiments demonstrate that SOLAR achieves state-of-the-art performance on OCSSL vision benchmarks, with both high convergence speed and final performance.

AI.tldr: 论文提出SOLAR方法解决在线持续自监督学习中的稳定性-可塑性权衡问题，通过引入两个诊断指标和自适应缓冲管理，在保持快速收敛的同时提升最终性能。
AI.motivation: 在线持续自监督学习面临稳定性与可塑性之间的权衡：稳定方法（如重播）收敛快但可能导致性能下降，而可塑性方法（如FIFO缓冲）则收敛较慢。需要解决这种权衡以实现既快速收敛又保持高性能。
AI.method: 提出SOLAR方法：1）引入重叠度(Overlap)和偏差(Deviation)两个指标诊断潜在空间退化；2）利用偏差的在线代理指导缓冲管理；3）引入显式的重叠度损失函数；4）自适应管理可塑性。
AI.result: SOLAR在在线持续自监督学习视觉基准测试中达到最先进性能，既实现了高收敛速度又获得了优异的最终性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过诊断潜在空间退化并自适应管理稳定性-可塑性权衡，SOLAR方法有效解决了在线持续自监督学习中的性能下降问题，为这一领域提供了新的解决方案。

title: SinkTrack: Attention Sink based Context Anchoring for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) suffer from hallucination and context forgetting. Prior studies suggest that attention drift is a primary cause of these problems, where LLMs' focus shifts towards newly generated tokens and away from the initial input context. To counteract this, we make use of a related, intrinsic characteristic of LLMs: attention sink -- the tendency to consistently allocate high attention to the very first token (i.e., <BOS>) of a sequence. Concretely, we propose an advanced context anchoring method, SinkTrack, which treats <BOS> as an information anchor and injects key contextual features (such as those derived from the input image or instruction) into its representation. As such, LLM remains anchored to the initial input context throughout the entire generation process. SinkTrack is training-free, plug-and-play, and introduces negligible inference overhead. Experiments demonstrate that SinkTrack mitigates hallucination and context forgetting across both textual (e.g., +21.6% on SQuAD2.0 with Llama3.1-8B-Instruct) and multi-modal (e.g., +22.8% on M3CoT with Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct) tasks. Its consistent gains across different architectures and scales underscore the robustness and generalizability. We also analyze its underlying working mechanism from the perspective of information delivery. Our source code is available at https://github.com/67L1/SinkTrack.

AI.tldr: SinkTrack是一种训练免费、即插即用的上下文锚定方法，通过将关键上下文特征注入到序列的第一个token（<BOS>）中，利用LLM的注意力沉没特性来缓解幻觉和上下文遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型存在幻觉和上下文遗忘问题，先前研究表明注意力漂移是主要原因，即LLM的注意力从初始输入上下文转向新生成的token。为了应对这一问题，作者利用了LLM的一个内在特性：注意力沉没——倾向于持续为序列的第一个token（<BOS>）分配高注意力。
AI.method: 提出SinkTrack方法，将<BOS>作为信息锚点，将输入图像或指令等关键上下文特征注入其表示中。这样LLM在整个生成过程中都能保持对初始输入上下文的锚定。该方法无需训练、即插即用，且推理开销可忽略不计。
AI.result: 实验表明SinkTrack在文本任务（如在Llama3.1-8B-Instruct上SQuAD2.0提升21.6%）和多模态任务（如在Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct上M3CoT提升22.8%）上都有效缓解了幻觉和上下文遗忘。在不同架构和规模模型上的一致增益证明了其鲁棒性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: SinkTrack通过利用注意力沉没特性，将<BOS>作为信息锚点注入关键上下文特征，有效缓解了LLM的幻觉和上下文遗忘问题。该方法训练免费、即插即用，具有很好的实用价值，并从信息传递角度分析了其工作机制。

title: Zero-shot World Models Are Developmentally Efficient Learners
summary: Young children demonstrate early abilities to understand their physical world, estimating depth, motion, object coherence, interactions, and many other aspects of physical scene understanding. Children are both data-efficient and flexible cognitive systems, creating competence despite extremely limited training data, while generalizing to myriad untrained tasks -- a major challenge even for today's best AI systems. Here we introduce a novel computational hypothesis for these abilities, the Zero-shot Visual World Model (ZWM). ZWM is based on three principles: a sparse temporally-factored predictor that decouples appearance from dynamics; zero-shot estimation through approximate causal inference; and composition of inferences to build more complex abilities. We show that ZWM can be learned from the first-person experience of a single child, rapidly generating competence across multiple physical understanding benchmarks. It also broadly recapitulates behavioral signatures of child development and builds brain-like internal representations. Our work presents a blueprint for efficient and flexible learning from human-scale data, advancing both a computational account for children's early physical understanding and a path toward data-efficient AI systems.

AI.tldr: ZWM是一种从儿童第一人称视角学习的零样本视觉世界模型，通过稀疏时间因子预测、近似因果推理和推理组合，实现数据高效的多任务物理场景理解。
AI.motivation: 儿童在有限训练数据下能高效灵活地理解物理世界，而当前AI系统在这方面面临重大挑战。研究旨在开发一个计算模型来解释儿童的物理理解能力，并为数据高效的AI系统提供路径。
AI.method: 提出零样本视觉世界模型(ZWM)，基于三个核心原则：1)稀疏时间因子预测器，将外观与动态解耦；2)通过近似因果推理进行零样本估计；3)推理组合构建更复杂能力。模型从单个儿童的第一人称经验中学习。
AI.result: ZWM能从单个儿童的经验中快速学习，在多个物理理解基准测试中表现出色。模型还重现了儿童发展的行为特征，并构建了类似大脑的内部表征。
AI.conclusion: ZWM为从人类规模数据中进行高效灵活学习提供了蓝图，既为儿童早期物理理解提供了计算解释，也为数据高效的AI系统发展指明了路径。

title: Advancing Polish Language Modeling through Tokenizer Optimization in the Bielik v3 7B and 11B Series
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2601.11579
summary: The development of the Bielik v3 PL series, encompassing both the 7B and 11B parameter variants, represents a significant milestone in the field of language-specific large language model (LLM) optimization. While general-purpose models often demonstrate impressive multilingual capabilities, they frequently suffer from a fundamental architectural inefficiency: the use of universal tokenizers. These tokenizers, typically designed to cover a broad spectrum of languages, often fail to capture the morphological nuances of specific languages like Polish, leading to higher fertility ratios, increased inference costs, and restricted effective context windows. This report details the transition from the universal Mistral-based tokenization to a dedicated Polish-optimized vocabulary for the Bielik v3 models, exploring the FOCUS-based embedding initialization, the multi-stage pretraining curriculum, and the subsequent post-training alignment involving Supervised Fine-Tuning, Direct Preference Optimization, and Reinforcement Learning through Group Relative Policy Optimization with verifiable rewards.

AI.tldr: Bielik v3 PL系列（7B和11B参数）采用波兰语优化的分词器替代通用分词器，通过FOCUS嵌入初始化、多阶段预训练和SFT/DPO/GRPO对齐，解决了通用模型在波兰语上的效率问题。
AI.motivation: 通用LLM虽然具备多语言能力，但其通用分词器无法捕捉波兰语等特定语言的形态学特征，导致分词效率低（高生育率）、推理成本高、有效上下文窗口受限。需要专门针对波兰语优化的模型来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 1. 从Mistral通用分词器转向波兰语专用优化词汇表；2. 采用FOCUS-based嵌入初始化；3. 多阶段预训练课程；4. 后训练对齐：监督微调(SFT)、直接偏好优化(DPO)、基于可验证奖励的组相对策略优化(GRPO)强化学习。
AI.result: 开发了Bielik v3 PL系列（7B和11B参数变体），这是语言特定LLM优化的重要里程碑，专门针对波兰语进行了优化。
AI.conclusion: 针对特定语言（如波兰语）优化的专用分词器和训练方法能够显著提升LLM在该语言上的效率和性能，解决了通用模型在特定语言处理上的架构效率问题。

title: Distributionally Robust PAC-Bayesian Control
summary: We present a distributionally robust PAC-Bayesian framework for certifying the performance of learning-based finite-horizon controllers. While existing PAC-Bayes control literature typically assumes bounded losses and matching training and deployment distributions, we explicitly address unbounded losses and environmental distribution shifts (the sim-to-real gap). We achieve this by drawing on two modern lines of research, namely the PAC-Bayes generalization theory and distributionally robust optimization via the type-1 Wasserstein distance. By leveraging the System Level Synthesis (SLS) reparametrization, we derive a sub-Gaussian loss proxy and a bound on the performance loss due to distribution shift. Both are tied directly to the operator norm of the closed-loop map. For linear time-invariant systems, this yields a computationally tractable optimization-based framework together with high-probability safety certificates for deployment in real-world environments that differ from those used in training.

AI.tldr: 提出一种分布鲁棒的PAC-Bayesian框架，用于认证基于学习的有限时域控制器的性能，特别处理无界损失和分布偏移问题
AI.motivation: 现有PAC-Bayes控制方法通常假设有界损失和训练部署分布一致，但实际中存在无界损失和环境分布偏移（仿真到现实的差距）问题需要解决
AI.method: 结合PAC-Bayes泛化理论和基于1型Wasserstein距离的分布鲁棒优化，利用系统级综合（SLS）重参数化，推导次高斯损失代理和分布偏移性能损失界
AI.result: 对于线性时不变系统，建立计算可行的基于优化的框架，并提供在现实环境中部署的高概率安全证书，即使这些环境与训练环境不同
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过直接关联闭环映射的算子范数，为处理无界损失和分布偏移的控制系统提供了理论保证和实用工具

title: Prompt Relay: Inference-Time Temporal Control for Multi-Event Video Generation
summary: Video diffusion models have achieved remarkable progress in generating high-quality videos. However, these models struggle to represent the temporal succession of multiple events in real-world videos and lack explicit mechanisms to control when semantic concepts appear, how long they persist, and the order in which multiple events occur. Such control is especially important for movie-grade video synthesis, where coherent storytelling depends on precise timing, duration, and transitions between events. When using a single paragraph-style prompt to describe a sequence of complex events, models often exhibit semantic entanglement, where concepts intended for different moments in the video bleed into one another, resulting in poor text-video alignment. To address these limitations, we propose Prompt Relay, an inference-time, plug-and-play method to enable fine-grained temporal control in multi-event video generation, requiring no architectural modifications and no additional computational overhead. Prompt Relay introduces a penalty into the cross-attention mechanism, so that each temporal segment attends only to its assigned prompt, allowing the model to represent one semantic concept at a time and thereby improving temporal prompt alignment, reducing semantic interference, and enhancing visual quality.

AI.tldr: 提出Prompt Relay方法，通过推理时修改交叉注意力机制，实现多事件视频生成中的细粒度时序控制，无需模型架构修改或额外计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型难以表示真实视频中多个事件的时间顺序，缺乏控制语义概念出现时间、持续时间和事件顺序的明确机制。使用单段落提示描述复杂事件序列时，模型常出现语义纠缠问题，导致文本-视频对齐不佳。
AI.method: 提出Prompt Relay方法，在推理时向交叉注意力机制引入惩罚项，使每个时间段仅关注其分配的提示，让模型一次只表示一个语义概念。该方法无需架构修改，无额外计算开销。
AI.result: 该方法改善了时序提示对齐，减少了语义干扰，并提升了视觉质量，实现了对多事件视频生成的细粒度时序控制。
AI.conclusion: Prompt Relay是一种有效的推理时即插即用方法，能够解决视频扩散模型在多事件生成中的时序控制问题，特别适用于需要精确时序控制的电影级视频合成。

title: VeriTrans: Fine-Tuned LLM-Assisted NL-to-PL Translation via a Deterministic Neuro-Symbolic Pipeline
summary: \textbf{VeriTrans} is a reliability-first ML system that compiles natural-language requirements into solver-ready logic with validator-gated reliability. The pipeline integrates an instruction-tuned NL$\!\to\!$PL translator, round-trip reconstruction (PL$\!\to\!$NL) used as a high-precision acceptance gate, and canonical PL$\!\to\!$CNF compilation, all executed via fixed API configuration (temperature$=0$; fine-tuning runs use seed$=42$) and per-item artifact logging (prompts, outputs, hashes) to support auditability and replay-driven debugging. On \textbf{SatBench} (2{,}100 specifications), VeriTrans achieves 94.46\% SAT/UNSAT correctness and 87.73\% median round-trip similarity. Compact fine-tuning on 100--150 curated examples improves fidelity by about 1--1.5\,pp without increasing latency (mean 25.8\,s/spec on our 201-spec runtime subset). A thresholded acceptance policy on the round-trip score exposes a reliability--coverage knob: at $τ{=}75$, roughly 68\% of items are retained with $\sim$94\% correctness on the accepted set. Validator overhead contributes $<15\%$ of end-to-end runtime, and all prompts/responses and timing metadata are logged to enable replay-driven debugging and regression testing. By separating learned translation from symbolic verification and enforcing deterministic, validator-gated acceptance, VeriTrans turns NL$\!\to\!$logic front-ends into auditable, reproducible components for reliability-critical workflows.

AI.tldr: VeriTrans是一个可靠性优先的ML系统，将自然语言需求编译为可求解的逻辑形式，通过验证器门控确保可靠性，在SAT/UNSAT正确性上达到94.46%，支持审计和可重现的工作流。
AI.motivation: 将自然语言需求转换为形式逻辑是可靠性关键工作流中的关键步骤，但现有方法缺乏可审计性、可重现性和可靠性保证。需要一种能够确保翻译正确性并支持调试和回归测试的系统。
AI.method: 系统集成了指令调优的NL→PL翻译器、往返重建(PL→NL)作为高精度接受门、规范PL→CNF编译，使用固定API配置(temperature=0)和逐项工件日志记录，支持审计和重放驱动调试。
AI.result: 在SatBench(2100个规范)上达到94.46%的SAT/UNSAT正确性和87.73%的中位数往返相似度。使用100-150个示例进行紧凑微调可将保真度提高1-1.5个百分点，平均延迟25.8秒/规范。验证器开销<15%端到端运行时间。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离学习翻译和符号验证，并强制执行确定性、验证器门控的接受，VeriTrans将NL→逻辑前端转变为可审计、可重现的组件，适用于可靠性关键工作流。

title: OccuBench: Evaluating AI Agents on Real-World Professional Tasks via Language World Models
summary: AI agents are expected to perform professional work across hundreds of occupational domains (from emergency department triage to nuclear reactor safety monitoring to customs import processing), yet existing benchmarks can only evaluate agents in the few domains where public environments exist. We introduce OccuBench, a benchmark covering 100 real-world professional task scenarios across 10 industry categories and 65 specialized domains, enabled by Language World Models (LWMs) that simulate domain-specific environments through LLM-driven tool response generation.
