Our multi-agent synthesis pipeline automatically produces evaluation instances with guaranteed solvability, calibrated difficulty, and document-grounded diversity. OccuBench evaluates agents along two complementary dimensions: task completion across professional domains and environmental robustness under controlled fault injection (explicit errors, implicit data degradation, and mixed faults). We evaluate 15 frontier models across 8 model families and find that: (1) no single model dominates all industries, as each has a distinct occupational capability profile; (2) implicit faults (truncated data, missing fields) are harder than both explicit errors (timeouts, 500s) and mixed faults, because they lack overt error signals and require the agent to independently detect data degradation; (3) larger models, newer generations, and higher reasoning effort consistently improve performance. GPT-5.2 improves by 27.5 points from minimal to maximum reasoning effort; and (4) strong agents are not necessarily strong environment simulators. Simulator quality is critical for LWM-based evaluation reliability. OccuBench provides the first systematic cross-industry evaluation of AI agents on professional occupational tasks.

AI.tldr: OccuBench是一个评估AI代理在100个真实职业任务场景中的基准测试，覆盖10个行业类别和65个专业领域，使用语言世界模型模拟环境，评估任务完成度和环境鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试只能在少数有公共环境的领域评估AI代理，而AI代理需要在数百个职业领域中执行专业工作，因此需要开发一个覆盖广泛职业领域的系统性评估基准。
AI.method: 使用多代理合成管道自动生成评估实例，保证可解性、校准难度和基于文档的多样性。通过语言世界模型模拟领域特定环境，使用LLM驱动的工具响应生成。评估包括任务完成度和环境鲁棒性（显式错误、隐式数据退化、混合故障）。
AI.result: 评估15个前沿模型发现：(1)没有单一模型在所有行业都占优，每个模型有独特的职业能力特征；(2)隐式故障比显式错误和混合故障更难处理；(3)更大模型、更新代和更高推理努力能持续提升性能；(4)强大的代理不一定是强大的环境模拟器。
AI.conclusion: OccuBench提供了首个系统性跨行业AI代理职业任务评估基准，揭示了模型在不同职业领域的性能差异，强调了环境模拟器质量对评估可靠性的重要性。

title: MoEITS: A Green AI approach for simplifying MoE-LLMs
summary:
Large language models are transforming all areas of academia and industry, attracting the attention of researchers, professionals, and the general public. In the trek for more powerful architectures, Mixture-of-Experts, inspired by ensemble models, have emerged as one of the most effective ways to follow. However, this implies a high computational burden for both training and inference. To reduce the impact on computing and memory footprint as well as the energy consumption, simplification methods has arisen as very effective procedures.
  In this paper, an original algorithm, MoEITS, for MoE-LLMs simplification is presented. The algorithm is characterized by a refined simplicity, underpinned by standardized Information Theoretic frameworks. MoEITS is analyzed in depth from theoretical and practical points of view. Its computational complexity is studied. Its performance on the accuracy of the simplified LLMs and the reduction rate achieved is assessed through a thoroughly designed experimentation. This empirical evaluation includes a comparison with state-of-the-art MoE-LLM pruning methods applied on Mixtral $8\times7$B, Qwen1.5-2.7B, and DeepSeek-V2-Lite. The extensive experimentation conducted demonstrates that MoEITS outperforms state-of-the-art techniques by generating models that are both effective across all benchmarks and computationally efficient.
  The code implementing the method will be available at https://github.com/luisbalru/MoEITS.

AI.tldr: MoEITS是一种基于信息论框架的MoE-LLM简化算法，通过理论分析和实验验证，在保持模型准确性的同时显著降低计算和内存开销，优于现有剪枝方法。
AI.motivation: Mixture-of-Experts架构虽然有效但计算负担重，需要简化方法来降低计算、内存和能耗开销。
AI.method: 提出MoEITS算法，基于标准化的信息论框架，对MoE-LLM进行简化，包括理论分析和计算复杂度研究。
AI.result: 在Mixtral 8×7B、Qwen1.5-2.7B和DeepSeek-V2-Lite上实验表明，MoEITS在保持准确性的同时实现更高的简化率，优于现有MoE-LLM剪枝方法。
AI.conclusion: MoEITS是一种简单有效的MoE-LLM简化算法，通过信息论框架实现计算效率和模型性能的良好平衡。

title: Counting to Four is still a Chore for VLMs
summary: Vision--language models (VLMs) have achieved impressive performance on complex multimodal reasoning tasks, yet they still fail on simple grounding skills such as object counting. Existing evaluations mostly assess only final outputs, offering limited insight into where these failures arise inside the model. In this work, we present an empirical study of VLM counting behavior through both behavioral and mechanistic analysis. We introduce COUNTINGTRICKS, a controlled evaluation suite of simple shape-based counting cases designed to expose vulnerabilities under different patchification layouts and adversarial prompting conditions. Using attention analysis and component-wise probing, we show that count-relevant visual evidence is strongest in the modality projection stage but degrades substantially in later language layers, where models become more susceptible to text priors. Motivated by this finding, we further evaluate Modality Attention Share (MAS), a lightweight intervention that encourages a minimum budget of visual attention during answer generation. Our results suggest that counting failures in VLMs stem not only from visual perception limits, but also from the underuse of visual evidence during language-stage reasoning. Code and dataset will be released at https://github.com/leduy99/-CVPRW26-Modality-Attention-Share.

AI.tldr: 本文通过行为学和机制分析研究视觉语言模型（VLM）的计数能力，发现计数失败不仅源于视觉感知限制，还因为语言推理阶段对视觉证据的利用不足。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在复杂多模态推理任务上表现出色，但在简单的基础技能如物体计数上仍然失败。现有评估大多只关注最终输出，对模型内部失败原因提供有限洞察。
AI.method: 1. 提出COUNTINGTRICKS评估套件，包含简单形状计数案例，暴露不同patch布局和对抗提示条件下的漏洞；2. 使用注意力分析和组件探测技术；3. 评估模态注意力共享（MAS）干预方法，在答案生成阶段强制分配最小视觉注意力预算。
AI.result: 计数相关的视觉证据在模态投影阶段最强，但在后续语言层显著退化，模型更易受文本先验影响。MAS干预能改善计数性能，表明计数失败源于视觉感知限制和语言推理阶段视觉证据利用不足。
AI.conclusion: VLM计数失败不仅源于视觉感知限制，更重要的是语言推理阶段对视觉证据的利用不足。轻量级干预如MAS能改善性能，为改进VLM基础技能提供方向。

title: ClawVM: Harness-Managed Virtual Memory for Stateful Tool-Using LLM Agents
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure, 10 tables; accepted at EuroMLSys '26 (6th Workshop on Machine Learning and Systems, co-located with EuroSys 2026)
summary: Stateful tool-using LLM agents treat the context window as working memory, yet today's agent harnesses manage residency and durability as best-effort, causing recurring failures: lost state after compaction, bypassed flushes on reset, and destructive writeback. We present \textsc{ClawVM}, a virtual memory layer that manages state as typed pages with minimum-fidelity invariants, multi-resolution representations under a token budget, and validated writeback at every lifecycle boundary. Because the harness already assembles prompts, mediates tools, and observes lifecycle events, it is the natural enforcement point; placing the contract there makes residency and durability deterministic and auditable. Across synthetic workloads, 12 real-session traces, and adversarial stress tests, \textsc{ClawVM} eliminates all policy-controllable faults whenever the minimum-fidelity set fits within the token budget, confirmed by an offline oracle, and adds median <50 microseconds of policy-engine overhead per turn.

AI.tldr: ClawVM是一个虚拟内存层，为LLM智能体提供确定性的状态管理，通过类型化页面、多分辨率表示和验证写回机制，消除状态丢失故障。
AI.motivation: 当前基于状态的工具使用LLM智能体将上下文窗口作为工作内存，但现有的代理框架在状态驻留和持久性管理上采用尽力而为的方式，导致反复出现故障：压缩后状态丢失、重置时绕过刷新、破坏性写回等问题。
AI.method: ClawVM是一个虚拟内存层，管理类型化页面并保持最小保真度不变性，在令牌预算下使用多分辨率表示，在每个生命周期边界进行验证写回。由于代理框架已经负责组装提示、协调工具和观察生命周期事件，因此是自然的执行点。
AI.result: 在合成工作负载、12个真实会话跟踪和对抗性压力测试中，ClawVM消除了所有策略可控的故障（只要最小保真度集合在令牌预算内），经离线验证器确认，每轮策略引擎开销中位数小于50微秒。
AI.conclusion: ClawVM通过在代理框架中实施虚拟内存合约，使状态驻留和持久性变得确定性和可审计，有效解决了LLM智能体状态管理的核心问题。

title: AOP-Smart: A RAG-Enhanced Large Language Model Framework for Adverse Outcome Pathway Analysis
summary: Adverse Outcome Pathways (AOPs) are an important knowledge framework in toxicological research and risk assessment. In recent years, large language models (LLMs) have gradually been applied to AOP-related question answering and mechanistic reasoning tasks. However, due to the existence of the hallucination problem, that is, the model may generate content that is inconsistent with facts or lacks evidence, their reliability is still limited. To address this issue, this study proposes an AOP-oriented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework, AOP-Smart. Based on the official XML data from AOP-Wiki, this method uses Key Events (KEs), Key Event Relationships (KERs), and specific AOP information to retrieve relevant knowledge for user questions, thereby improving the reliability of the generated results of large language models. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method, this study constructed a test set containing 20 AOP-related question answering tasks, covering KE identification, upstream and downstream KE retrieval, and complex AOP retrieval tasks. Experiments were conducted on three mainstream large language models, Gemini, DeepSeek, and ChatGPT, and comparative tests were performed under two settings: without RAG and with RAG. The experimental results show that, without using RAG, the accuracies of GPT, DeepSeek, and Gemini were 15.0\%, 35.0\%, and 20.0\%, respectively; after using RAG, their accuracies increased to 95.0\%, 100.0\%, and 95.0\%, respectively. The results indicate that AOP-Smart can significantly alleviate the hallucination problem of large language models in AOP knowledge tasks, and greatly improve the accuracy and consistency of their answers.

AI.tldr: 提出AOP-Smart框架，通过检索增强生成技术解决大语言模型在毒理学AOP知识问答中的幻觉问题，显著提升准确率
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在AOP相关问答和机制推理任务中存在幻觉问题，生成内容可能与事实不符或缺乏证据，限制了其可靠性
AI.method: 基于AOP-Wiki官方XML数据，利用关键事件、关键事件关系和特定AOP信息检索相关知识，构建AOP导向的检索增强生成框架AOP-Smart
AI.result: 在20个AOP相关问答任务的测试集上，GPT、DeepSeek和Gemini的准确率分别从15.0%、35.0%、20.0%提升到95.0%、100.0%、95.0%
AI.conclusion: AOP-Smart能显著缓解大语言模型在AOP知识任务中的幻觉问题，大幅提高答案的准确性和一致性

title: Mitigating Privacy Risk via Forget Set-Free Unlearning
comment: 50 pages, 20 figures, Published at The Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations
summary: Training machine learning models requires the storage of large datasets, which often contain sensitive or private data. Storing data is associated with a number of potential risks which increase over time, such as database breaches and malicious adversaries. Machine unlearning is the study of methods to efficiently remove the influence of training data subsets from previously-trained models. Existing unlearning methods typically require direct access to the "forget set" -- the data to be forgotten-and organisations must retain this data for unlearning rather than deleting it immediately upon request, increasing risks associated with the forget set. We introduce partially-blind unlearning -- utilizing auxiliary information to unlearn without explicit access to the forget set. We also propose a practical framework Reload, a partially-blind method based on gradient optimization and structured weight sparsification to operationalize partially-blind unlearning. We show that Reload efficiently unlearns, approximating models retrained from scratch, and outperforms several forget set-dependent approaches. On language models, Reload unlearns entities using <0.025% of the retain set and <7% of model weights in <8 minutes on Llama2-7B. In the corrective case, Reload achieves unlearning even when only 10% of corrupted data is identified.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种部分盲遗忘学习框架Reload，能够在不需要直接访问遗忘数据集的情况下，通过梯度优化和结构化权重稀疏化实现高效机器学习模型遗忘。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型训练需要存储大量敏感数据，这些数据长期存储存在安全风险。现有遗忘学习方法需要直接访问要遗忘的数据集，导致组织必须保留这些数据而非立即删除，增加了数据泄露风险。
AI.method: 提出了部分盲遗忘学习概念，利用辅助信息而非直接访问遗忘集进行遗忘。开发了Reload框架，基于梯度优化和结构化权重稀疏化，通过优化模型权重实现高效遗忘。
AI.result: Reload能够高效近似从头训练的模型，性能优于多种依赖遗忘集的方法。在语言模型上，使用<0.025%的保留集和<7%的模型权重，在8分钟内完成Llama2-7B的实体遗忘。在修正性遗忘场景中，即使只识别10%的污染数据也能实现遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 部分盲遗忘学习提供了一种更安全的机器学习遗忘方法，Reload框架在实际应用中表现出高效性和有效性，为处理敏感数据遗忘问题提供了实用解决方案。

title: Intra-finger Variability of Diffusion-based Latent Fingerprint Generation
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on Foundation and Generative Models in Biometrics (FoundGen-Bio), held in conjunction with CVPR 2026
summary: The primary goal of this work is to systematically evaluate the intra-finger variability of synthetic fingerprints (particularly latent prints) generated using a state-of-the-art diffusion model. Specifically, we focus on enhancing the latent style diversity of the generative model by constructing a comprehensive \textit{latent style bank} curated from seven diverse datasets, which enables the precise synthesis of latent prints with over 40 distinct styles encapsulating different surfaces and processing techniques. We also implement a semi-automated framework to understand the integrity of fingerprint ridges and minutiae in the generated impressions. Our analysis indicates that though the generation process largely preserves the identity, a small number of local inconsistencies (addition and removal of minutiae) are introduced, especially when there are poor quality regions in the reference image. Furthermore, mismatch between the reference image and the chosen style embedding that guides the generation process introduces global inconsistencies in the form of hallucinated ridge patterns. These insights highlight the limitations of existing synthetic fingerprint generators and the need to further improve these models to simultaneously enhance both diversity and identity consistency.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了扩散模型生成的合成指纹（特别是潜指纹）的指纹内变异性，通过构建包含40多种不同风格的潜风格库增强生成多样性，并发现生成过程虽然基本保持身份一致性，但在参考图像质量差或风格嵌入不匹配时会出现局部和全局不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 现有合成指纹生成器在同时增强多样性和身份一致性方面存在局限性，需要系统评估扩散模型生成的合成指纹的指纹内变异性，特别是潜指纹的生成质量。
AI.method: 1) 构建综合的潜风格库，从七个不同数据集中提取超过40种不同风格（涵盖不同表面和处理技术）；2) 实现半自动化框架来评估生成指纹的脊线和细节点的完整性；3) 分析生成过程中身份一致性的保持情况。
AI.result: 生成过程基本保持身份一致性，但存在局部不一致性（细节点的增加和移除），特别是在参考图像质量较差的区域；当参考图像与指导生成过程的风格嵌入不匹配时，会出现全局不一致性，表现为幻觉脊线模式。
AI.conclusion: 现有合成指纹生成器在同时增强多样性和身份一致性方面存在局限性，需要进一步改进这些模型以平衡这两个目标，特别是在处理参考图像质量差和风格嵌入不匹配的情况下。

title: Beyond Monologue: Interactive Talking-Listening Avatar Generation with Conversational Audio Context-Aware Kernels
summary: Audio-driven human video generation has achieved remarkable success in monologue scenarios, largely driven by advancements in powerful video generation foundation models. Moving beyond monologues, authentic human communication is inherently a full-duplex interactive process, requiring virtual agents not only to articulate their own speech but also to react naturally to incoming conversational audio. Most existing methods simply extend conventional audio-driven paradigms to listening scenarios. However, relying on strict frame-to-frame alignment renders the model's response to long-range conversational dynamics rigid, whereas directly introducing global attention catastrophically degrades lip synchronization. Recognizing the unique temporal Scale Discrepancy between talking and listening behaviors, we introduce a multi-head Gaussian kernel to explicitly inject this physical intuition into the model as a progressive temporal inductive bias. Building upon this, we construct a full-duplex interactive virtual agent capable of simultaneously processing dual-stream audio inputs for both talking and listening. Furthermore, we introduce a rigorously cleaned Talking-Listening dataset VoxHear featuring perfectly decoupled speech and background audio tracks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach successfully fuses strong temporal alignment with deep contextual semantics, setting a new state-of-the-art for generating highly natural and responsive full-duplex interactive digital humans. The project page is available at https://warmcongee.github.io/beyond-monologue/ .

AI.tldr: 提出一种全双工交互式虚拟代理，通过多头高斯核处理说话与倾听行为的时间尺度差异，实现同时处理双流音频输入的自然交互
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动视频生成方法主要针对独白场景，而真实人类交流是全双工交互过程，需要虚拟代理既能说话又能自然回应对方音频。现有方法简单扩展传统范式，但严格帧对齐对长程对话动态响应僵硬，而全局注意力会破坏唇部同步
AI.method: 引入多头高斯核作为渐进式时间归纳偏置，显式注入说话与倾听行为的时间尺度差异物理直觉。构建全双工交互虚拟代理，同时处理说话和倾听的双流音频输入。创建VoxHear数据集，包含完美解耦的语音和背景音轨
AI.result: 实验表明该方法成功融合强时间对齐和深度上下文语义，在生成高度自然和响应迅速的全双工交互数字人方面达到新的最先进水平
AI.conclusion: 通过识别说话与倾听行为的时间尺度差异并引入相应归纳偏置，实现了超越独白场景的全双工交互虚拟代理，为自然人类交流的数字人生成提供了有效解决方案

title: HTAA: Enhancing LLM Planning via Hybrid Toolset Agentization & Adaptation
summary: Enabling large language models to scale and reliably use hundreds of tools is critical for real-world applications, yet challenging due to the inefficiency and error accumulation inherent in flat tool-calling architectures. To address this, we propose Hybrid Toolset Agentization & Adaptation (HTAA), a hierarchical framework for scalable tool-use planning. We propose a novel toolset agentization paradigm, which encapsulates frequently co-used tools into specialized agent tools, thereby reducing the planner's action space and mitigating redundancy. To ensure effective coordination, we design Asymmetric Planner Adaptation, a trajectory-based training paradigm that aligns the high-level planner with agent tools via backward reconstruction and forward refinement. To validate the performance of HTAA, we conduct experiments on a real-world internal dataset, InfoVerify, based on the POI validation workflow of China's largest online large-scale ride-hailing platform, featuring long-horizon executable tool trajectories. Experiments on InfoVerify and widely-used benchmarks show that HTAA consistently achieves higher task success rates, requires short tool calling trajectories, and significantly reduces context overhead compared to strong baselines. Furthermore, in a production deployment, HTAA substantially reduces manual validation effort and operational cost, demonstrating its practical efficacy.

AI.tldr: HTAA提出分层框架解决大语言模型规模化工具调用问题，通过工具集代理化和非对称规划器适配，在真实世界任务中提升成功率并减少调用轨迹和上下文开销。
AI.motivation: 现有扁平化工具调用架构在大规模工具使用中存在效率低下和错误累积问题，难以可靠地使用数百个工具进行实际应用。
AI.method: 提出混合工具集代理化与适配框架：1）工具集代理化范式，将频繁共用的工具封装为专用代理工具；2）非对称规划器适配，通过后向重建和前向精炼的对齐训练范式协调高层规划器与代理工具。
AI.result: 在InfoVerify数据集和广泛基准测试中，HTAA持续实现更高任务成功率，需要更短的工具调用轨迹，显著减少上下文开销。生产部署中大幅减少人工验证工作和运营成本。
AI.conclusion: HTAA通过分层框架有效解决大语言模型规模化工具调用挑战，在真实世界应用中展现出实用效能，为大规模工具使用提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: SpectralLoRA: Is Low-Frequency Structure Sufficient for LoRA Adaptation? A Spectral Analysis of Weight Updates
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables. Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee
summary: We present a systematic empirical study of the spectral structure of LoRA weight updates. Through 2D Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) analysis of trained adaptation matrices across BERT-base and RoBERTa-base on four GLUE benchmarks (SST-2, MNLI, CoLA, QQP), we establish that LoRA updates are universally dominated by low-frequency components: on average, just 33% of DCT coefficients capture 90% of total spectral energy. Retaining only 10% of frequency coefficients reduces adapter storage by 10x while sacrificing only 1.95pp on SST-2. Notably, frequency masking at k=50% improves over full LoRA on 3 of 8 model-task pairs, suggesting high-frequency components act as adaptation noise. We further discover that RoBERTa-base is systematically more spectrally compressible than BERT-base across all tasks, and that task complexity governs spectral sensitivity -- NLI tasks require more frequency budget than sentiment classification. These findings motivate a new design principle for PEFT: spectral sparsity in adaptation.

AI.tldr: LoRA权重更新的频谱结构分析显示，其更新主要受低频分量主导，仅33%的DCT系数就能捕获90%的频谱能量，这启发了基于频谱稀疏性的PEFT新设计原则。
AI.motivation: 研究LoRA权重更新的频谱结构，探索其内在的稀疏性特征，为参数高效微调（PEFT）方法提供新的设计思路和优化方向。
AI.method: 对BERT-base和RoBERTa-base在四个GLUE基准任务（SST-2、MNLI、CoLA、QQP）上训练的LoRA适配器矩阵进行2D离散余弦变换（DCT）分析，研究其频谱特性。
AI.result: LoRA更新普遍由低频分量主导：平均仅33%的DCT系数捕获90%的总频谱能量；保留10%的频率系数可将适配器存储减少10倍，在SST-2上仅损失1.95个百分点的性能；频率掩码在k=50%时在3/8的模型-任务对上优于完整LoRA，表明高频分量起到适应噪声的作用；RoBERTa-base比BERT-base在所有任务上更具频谱可压缩性；任务复杂度影响频谱敏感性，NLI任务需要更多频率预算。
AI.conclusion: LoRA权重更新具有显著的频谱稀疏性，这为PEFT方法提出了新的设计原则：适应过程中的频谱稀疏性，可以通过频率选择来优化存储效率和性能。

title: U$^{2}$Flow: Uncertainty-Aware Unsupervised Optical Flow Estimation
comment: Accepted as an oral presentation at CVPR 2026
summary: Unsupervised optical flow methods typically lack reliable uncertainty estimation, limiting their robustness and interpretability. We propose U$^{2}$Flow, the first recurrent unsupervised framework that jointly estimates optical flow and per-pixel uncertainty. The core innovation is a decoupled learning strategy that derives uncertainty supervision from augmentation consistency via a Laplace-based maximum likelihood objective, enabling stable training without ground truth. The predicted uncertainty is further integrated into the network to guide adaptive flow refinement and dynamically modulate the regional smoothness loss. Furthermore, we introduce an uncertainty-guided bidirectional flow fusion mechanism that enhances robustness in challenging regions. Extensive experiments on KITTI and Sintel demonstrate that U$^{2}$Flow achieves state-of-the-art performance among unsupervised methods while producing highly reliable uncertainty maps, validating the effectiveness of our joint estimation paradigm. The code is available at https://github.com/sunzunyi/U2FLOW.

AI.tldr: U²Flow：首个循环无监督框架，联合估计光流和像素级不确定性，通过解耦学习策略从增强一致性中获取不确定性监督，无需真实标签。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督光流方法缺乏可靠的不确定性估计，限制了其鲁棒性和可解释性。需要一种能同时估计光流和不确定性的无监督方法。
AI.method: 提出U²Flow框架，采用解耦学习策略，通过基于拉普拉斯分布的最大似然目标从增强一致性中获取不确定性监督。将预测的不确定性集成到网络中，指导自适应光流优化和动态调节区域平滑损失，并引入不确定性引导的双向光流融合机制。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Sintel数据集上的实验表明，U²Flow在无监督方法中达到最先进性能，同时产生高度可靠的不确定性图，验证了联合估计范式的有效性。
AI.conclusion: U²Flow首次实现了无监督光流和不确定性的联合估计，通过解耦学习策略和不确定性引导的优化机制，显著提升了光流估计的鲁棒性和可解释性。

title: Mem$^2$Evolve: Towards Self-Evolving Agents via Co-Evolutionary Capability Expansion and Experience Distillation
summary: While large language model--powered agents can self-evolve by accumulating experience or by dynamically creating new assets (i.e., tools or expert agents), existing frameworks typically treat these two evolutionary processes in isolation. This separation overlooks their intrinsic interdependence: the former is inherently bounded by a manually predefined static toolset, while the latter generates new assets from scratch without experiential guidance, leading to limited capability growth and unstable evolution. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel paradigm of co-evolutionary Capability Expansion and Experience Distillation. Guided by this paradigm, we propose the \textbf{Mem$^{\textbf{2}}$Evolve}, which integrates two core components: \textbf{Experience Memory} and \textbf{Asset Memory}. Specifically, Mem$^{2}$Evolve leverages accumulated experience to guide the dynamic creation of assets, thereby expanding the agent's capability space while simultaneously acquiring new experience to achieve co-evolution. Extensive experiments across 6 task categories and 8 benchmarks demonstrate that Mem$^{2}$Evolve achieves improvement of 18.53\% over standard LLMs, 11.80\% over agents evolving solely through experience, and 6.46\% over those evolving solely through asset creation, establishing it as a substantially more effective and stable self-evolving agent framework. Code is available at: https://buaa-irip-llm.github.io/Mem2Evolve.

AI.tldr: Mem²Evolve：一种新型的LLM智能体自进化框架，通过经验记忆与资产记忆的协同进化，实现能力扩展与经验蒸馏的有机结合。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体进化框架通常将经验积累和资产创建（工具或专家智能体）这两个进化过程孤立处理，忽视了它们的内在相互依赖性。经验积累受限于预定义的静态工具集，而资产创建则缺乏经验指导，导致能力增长有限且进化不稳定。
AI.method: 提出协同进化的能力扩展与经验蒸馏范式，设计Mem²Evolve框架，包含两个核心组件：经验记忆（Experience Memory）和资产记忆（Asset Memory）。利用积累的经验指导动态创建资产，同时通过新资产获取新经验，实现协同进化。
AI.result: 在6个任务类别和8个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，Mem²Evolve相比标准LLM提升18.53%，相比仅通过经验进化的智能体提升11.80%，相比仅通过资产创建进化的智能体提升6.46%，证明其是更有效且稳定的自进化智能体框架。
AI.conclusion: Mem²Evolve通过协同进化的能力扩展与经验蒸馏，解决了现有LLM智能体进化框架中经验积累与资产创建分离的问题，实现了更有效和稳定的自进化。

title: Energy-Efficient Federated Edge Learning For Small-Scale Datasets in Large IoT Networks
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures. To appear in IEEE TWC
summary: Large-scale Internet of Things (IoT) networks enable intelligent services such as smart cities and autonomous driving, but often face resource constraints. Collecting heterogeneous sensory data, especially in small-scale datasets, is challenging, and independent edge nodes can lead to inefficient resource utilization and reduced learning performance. To address these issues, this paper proposes a collaborative optimization framework for energy-efficient federated edge learning with small-scale datasets. We first derive an expected learning loss to quantify the relationship between the number of training samples and learning objectives. A stochastic online learning algorithm is then designed to adapt to data variations, and a resource optimization problem with a convergence bound is formulated. Finally, an online distributed algorithm efficiently solves large-scale optimization problems with high scalability. Extensive simulations and autonomous navigation case studies with collision avoidance demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly improves learning performance and resource efficiency compared to state-of-the-art benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于小规模数据集的节能联邦边缘学习协作优化框架，通过随机在线学习算法适应数据变化，并设计在线分布式算法解决大规模优化问题。
AI.motivation: 大规模物联网网络面临资源限制，收集异构传感器数据（特别是小规模数据集）具有挑战性，独立边缘节点导致资源利用效率低下和学习性能下降。
AI.method: 1. 推导预期学习损失以量化训练样本数量与学习目标的关系；2. 设计随机在线学习算法适应数据变化；3. 制定具有收敛界限的资源优化问题；4. 开发在线分布式算法高效解决大规模优化问题。
AI.result: 通过广泛的模拟和自主导航避障案例研究，证明所提方法相比最先进基准显著提高了学习性能和资源效率。
AI.conclusion: 该协作优化框架有效解决了小规模数据集下联邦边缘学习的资源约束问题，通过自适应算法和分布式优化实现了学习性能和资源效率的显著提升。

title: On The Application of Linear Attention in Multimodal Transformers
comment: Workshop on Any-to-Any Multimodal Learning (Any2Any), CVPR 2026
summary: Multimodal Transformers serve as the backbone for state-of-the-art vision-language models, yet their quadratic attention complexity remains a critical barrier to scalability. In this work, we investigate the viability of Linear Attention (LA) as a high-efficiency alternative within multimodal frameworks. By integrating LA, we reduce the computational overhead from quadratic to linear relative to sequence length while preserving competitive performance. We evaluate our approach across ViT-S/16, ViT-B/16, and ViT-L/16 architectures trained on the LAION-400M dataset, with validation focused on ImageNet-21K zero-shot accuracy. Our systematic evaluation demonstrates that Linear Attention not only yields significant computational savings but also adheres to the same scaling laws as standard softmax attention. These findings position Linear Attention as a robust, scalable solution for next-generation multimodal Transformers tasked with processing increasingly large and complex datasets.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在线性注意力机制作为多模态Transformer的高效替代方案，将计算复杂度从二次降低到线性，同时在性能上保持竞争力。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态Transformer虽然性能优越，但其二次注意力复杂度严重限制了模型的可扩展性，成为处理大规模复杂数据集的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 在线性注意力机制集成到多模态框架中，在ViT-S/16、ViT-B/16和ViT-L/16架构上进行评估，使用LAION-400M数据集训练，通过ImageNet-21K零样本准确率进行验证。
AI.result: 线性注意力不仅显著降低了计算开销，保持了与标准softmax注意力相当的竞争性能，而且遵循相同的缩放规律，验证了其作为高效替代方案的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 线性注意力为下一代多模态Transformer提供了一个鲁棒且可扩展的解决方案，能够有效处理日益增长的大规模和复杂数据集。

title: CWCD: Category-Wise Contrastive Decoding for Structured Medical Report Generation
summary: Interpreting chest X-rays is inherently challenging due to the overlap between anatomical structures and the subtle presentation of many clinically significant pathologies, making accurate diagnosis time-consuming even for experienced radiologists. Recent radiology-focused foundation models, such as LLaVA-Rad and Maira-2, have positioned multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) at the forefront of automated radiology report generation (RRG). However, despite these advances, current foundation models generate reports in a single forward pass. This decoding strategy diminishes attention to visual tokens and increases reliance on language priors as generation proceeds, which in turn introduces spurious pathology co-occurrences in the generated reports. To mitigate these limitations, we propose Category-Wise Contrastive Decoding (CWCD), a novel and modular framework designed to enhance structured radiology report generation (SRRG). Our approach introduces category-specific parameterization and generates category-wise reports by contrasting normal X-rays with masked X-rays using category-specific visual prompts. Experimental results demonstrate that CWCD consistently outperforms baseline methods across both clinical efficacy and natural language generation metrics. An ablation study further elucidates the contribution of each architectural component to overall performance.

AI.tldr: 提出Category-Wise Contrastive Decoding (CWCD)框架，通过类别特定的参数化和对比正常与掩码X光片的方法，改善结构化放射学报告生成，解决现有模型单次前向传播导致的视觉注意力减弱和虚假病理共现问题。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光片解读具有挑战性，因为解剖结构重叠且病理表现细微。现有的放射学基础模型（如LLaVA-Rad和Maira-2）虽然推动了自动放射学报告生成，但采用单次前向传播的解码策略会导致视觉注意力减弱、过度依赖语言先验，从而在生成的报告中引入虚假的病理共现关系。
AI.method: 提出Category-Wise Contrastive Decoding (CWCD)框架，这是一个模块化的结构化放射学报告生成方法。核心思想包括：1）类别特定的参数化；2）使用类别特定的视觉提示，通过对比正常X光片与掩码X光片来生成类别特定的报告。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CWCD在临床有效性和自然语言生成指标上均一致优于基线方法。消融研究进一步阐明了每个架构组件对整体性能的贡献。
AI.conclusion: CWCD框架通过类别特定的对比解码策略，有效解决了现有放射学基础模型在报告生成中的局限性，提高了结构化放射学报告生成的准确性和可靠性。

title: YIELD: A Large-Scale Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Information Elicitation Agents
summary: Most conversational agents (CAs) are designed to satisfy user needs through user-driven interactions. However, many real-world settings, such as academic interviewing, judicial proceedings, and journalistic investigations, involve broader institutional decision-making processes and require agents that can elicit information from users. In this paper, we introduce Information Elicitation Agents (IEAs) in which the agent's goal is to elicit information from users to support the agent's institutional or task-oriented objectives. To enable systematic research on this setting, we present YIELD, a 26M-token dataset of 2,281 ethically sourced, human-to-human dialogues. Moreover, we formalize information elicitation as a finite-horizon POMDP and propose novel metrics tailored to IEAs. Pilot experiments on multiple foundation LLMs show that training on YIELD improves their alignment with real elicitation behavior and findings are corroborated by human evaluation. We release YIELD under CC BY 4.0. The dataset, project code, evaluation tools, and fine-tuned model adapters are available at: https://github.com/infosenselab/yield.

AI.tldr: 提出信息获取智能体（IEA）概念，构建YIELD数据集（26M token，2,281个对话），将信息获取形式化为POMDP问题，实验显示在YIELD上训练能提升LLMs与真实获取行为的对齐度。
AI.motivation: 现有对话智能体主要满足用户需求，但在学术访谈、司法程序、新闻调查等机构决策场景中，需要智能体主动从用户获取信息以支持机构或任务目标。
AI.method: 1）提出信息获取智能体（IEA）概念；2）构建YIELD数据集（26M token，2,281个伦理来源的人-人对话）；3）将信息获取形式化为有限时域POMDP；4）提出针对IEA的新评估指标。
AI.result: 在多个基础LLMs上的实验表明，在YIELD数据集上训练能提升模型与真实信息获取行为的对齐度，人类评估结果也证实了这一发现。
AI.conclusion: 信息获取智能体是对话智能体的重要扩展方向，YIELD数据集和相关工具为系统研究这一领域提供了基础，开源资源将促进该领域发展。

title: Skill-SD: Skill-Conditioned Self-Distillation for Multi-turn LLM Agents
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been widely used to train LLM agents for multi-turn interactive tasks, but its sample efficiency is severely limited by sparse rewards and long horizons. On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) alleviates this by providing dense token-level supervision from a privileged teacher that has access to ground-truth answers. However, such fixed privileged information cannot capture the diverse valid strategies in agent tasks, and naively combining OPSD with RL often leads to training collapse. To address these limitations, we introduce Skill-SD, a framework that turns the agent's own trajectories into dynamic training-only supervision. Completed trajectories are summarized into compact natural language skills that describe successful behaviors, mistakes, and workflows. These skills serve as dynamic privileged information conditioning only the teacher, while the student always acts under the plain task prompt and learns to internalize the guidance through distillation. To stabilize the training, we derive an importance-weighted reverse-KL loss to provide gradient-correct token-level distillation, and dynamically synchronize the teacher with the improving student. Experimental results on agentic benchmarks demonstrate that Skill-SD substantially outperforms the standard RL baseline, improving both vanilla GRPO (+14.0%/+10.9% on AppWorld/Sokoban) and vanilla OPD (+42.1%/+40.6%). Project page: https://k1xe.github.io/skill-sd/

AI.tldr: Skill-SD框架通过将智能体轨迹总结为自然语言技能，作为动态特权信息指导教师模型，学生通过蒸馏学习内化指导，显著提升强化学习在交互任务中的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在训练LLM智能体进行多轮交互任务时面临样本效率低的问题，主要由于稀疏奖励和长视野。现有的基于特权信息的自我蒸馏方法(OPSD)虽然提供密集监督，但固定的特权信息无法捕捉任务中多样的有效策略，且与RL结合容易导致训练崩溃。
AI.method: Skill-SD将智能体完成的轨迹总结为紧凑的自然语言技能，描述成功行为、错误和工作流程。这些技能作为动态特权信息仅用于指导教师模型，而学生始终在普通任务提示下行动，通过蒸馏学习内化指导。采用重要性加权反向KL损失提供梯度校正的token级蒸馏，并动态同步教师与学生模型。
AI.result: 在智能体基准测试中，Skill-SD显著优于标准RL基线：相比vanilla GRPO在AppWorld/Sokoban上提升14.0%/10.9%，相比vanilla OPD提升42.1%/40.6%。
AI.conclusion: Skill-SD通过将智能体自身轨迹转化为动态训练监督，解决了传统OPSD方法的局限性，实现了更稳定高效的强化学习训练，为LLM智能体的多轮交互任务提供了有效的训练框架。

title: Spotlight and Shadow: Attention-Guided Dual-Anchor Introspective Decoding for MLLM Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities yet continue to suffer from hallucination, where generated text contradicts visual content. In this paper, we introduce Dual-Anchor Introspective Decoding (DaID), a novel contrastive decoding framework that dynamically calibrates each token generation by mining the model's internal perceptual discrepancies. Specifically, DaID identifies a Spotlight layer to amplify visual factual signals and a Shadow layer to suppress textual inertia. By leveraging visual attention distributions to guide this dual-anchor selection process, our method ensures precise, token-specific adaptation. Experimental results across multiple benchmarks and MLLMs demonstrate that DaID significantly mitigates hallucination while enhancing general reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: DaID是一种新颖的对比解码框架，通过挖掘模型内部感知差异来动态校准每个token生成，显著减少MLLM中的幻觉问题
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型展现出强大的推理能力，但仍然存在幻觉问题，即生成的文本与视觉内容相矛盾。需要一种方法来减少这种幻觉现象。
AI.method: 提出双锚点自省解码（DaID）框架：1）识别Spotlight层来放大视觉事实信号；2）识别Shadow层来抑制文本惯性；3）利用视觉注意力分布指导双锚点选择过程，实现精确的token级适应。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和MLLM上的实验结果表明，DaID显著减轻了幻觉问题，同时增强了通用推理能力。
AI.conclusion: DaID通过挖掘模型内部感知差异的动态校准机制，有效解决了MLLM中的幻觉问题，提升了模型的可靠性和推理性能。

title: Safety Guarantees in Zero-Shot Reinforcement Learning for Cascade Dynamical Systems
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures; submitted to IEEE for possible publication
summary: This paper considers the problem of zero-shot safety guarantees for cascade dynamical systems. These are systems where a subset of the states (the inner states) affects the dynamics of the remaining states (the outer states) but not vice-versa. We define safety as remaining on a set deemed safe for all times with high probability. We propose to train a safe RL policy on a reduced-order model, which ignores the dynamics of the inner states, but it treats it as an action that influences the outer state. Thus, reducing the complexity of the training. When deployed in the full system the trained policy is combined with a low-level controller whose task is to track the reference provided by the RL policy. Our main theoretical contribution is a bound on the safe probability in the full-order system. In particular, we establish the interplay between the probability of remaining safe after the zero-shot deployment and the quality of the tracking of the inner states. We validate our theoretical findings on a quadrotor navigation task, demonstrating that the preservation of the safety guarantees is tied to the bandwidth and tracking capabilities of the low-level controller.

AI.tldr: 提出一种为级联动力系统提供零样本安全保证的方法，通过训练简化模型的安全RL策略，结合底层跟踪控制器，理论分析安全概率边界
AI.motivation: 级联动力系统（内态影响外态但反之不成立）的安全控制具有挑战性，需要在不直接训练完整系统的情况下提供零样本安全保证，降低训练复杂度
AI.method: 在忽略内态动力学的降阶模型上训练安全RL策略，将内态视为影响外态的动作；部署时RL策略与底层跟踪控制器结合，控制器跟踪RL提供的参考信号
AI.result: 建立了完整系统安全概率的理论边界，揭示了零样本部署后保持安全的概率与内态跟踪质量之间的关联；在四旋翼导航任务中验证了理论发现
AI.conclusion: 安全保证的保持与底层控制器的带宽和跟踪能力密切相关，提出的方法能有效为级联系统提供零样本安全保证，同时降低训练复杂度

title: When Verification Fails: How Compositionally Infeasible Claims Escape Rejection
summary: Scientific claim verification, the task of determining whether claims are entailed by scientific evidence, is fundamental to establishing discoveries in evidence while preventing misinformation. This process involves evaluating each asserted constraint against validated evidence. Under the Closed-World Assumption (CWA), a claim is accepted if and only if all asserted constraints are positively supported. We show that existing verification benchmarks cannot distinguish models enforcing this standard from models applying a simpler shortcut called salient-constraint checking, which applies CWA's rejection criterion only to the most salient constraint and accepts when that constraint is supported. Because existing benchmarks construct infeasible claims by perturbing a single salient element they are insufficient at distinguishing between rigorous claim verification and simple salient-constraint reliance. To separate the two, we construct compositionally infeasible claims where the salient constraint is supported but a non-salient constraint is contradicted. Across model families and modalities, models that otherwise saturate existing benchmarks consistently over-accept these claims, confirming the prevalence of such shortcut reasoning. Via model context interventions, we show that different models and prompting strategies occupy distinct positions on a shared ROC curve, indicating that the gap between model families reflects differences in verification threshold rather than underlying reasoning ability, and that the compositional inference bottleneck is a structural property of current verification behavior that strategy guidance alone cannot overcome.

AI.tldr: 现有科学声明验证基准无法区分严格验证模型和仅检查最显著约束的捷径模型，作者通过构建组合不可行声明来揭示当前模型普遍依赖捷径推理的问题。
AI.motivation: 科学声明验证对于建立证据支持的发现和防止错误信息至关重要。现有基准存在缺陷，无法区分严格执行封闭世界假设的模型和仅检查最显著约束的捷径模型，这阻碍了对模型真实验证能力的评估。
AI.method: 作者构建了组合不可行声明，其中显著约束得到支持但非显著约束被否定，以此来区分严格验证和捷径依赖。通过跨模型家族和模态的测试，以及模型上下文干预实验，分析不同模型和提示策略在共享ROC曲线上的表现。
AI.result: 现有基准上表现饱和的模型在面对组合不可行声明时持续过度接受，证实了捷径推理的普遍性。不同模型和提示策略位于共享ROC曲线的不同位置，表明模型家族间的差异主要反映验证阈值不同而非基础推理能力差异，且组合推理瓶颈是当前验证行为的结构性特征。
AI.conclusion: 当前科学声明验证模型普遍依赖捷径推理而非严格验证，现有基准无法检测这一缺陷。组合推理瓶颈是结构性限制，仅靠策略指导无法克服，需要新的评估方法和模型改进来提升真正的验证能力。

title: SCOPE: Signal-Calibrated On-Policy Distillation Enhancement with Dual-Path Adaptive Weighting
summary: On-policy reinforcement learning has become the dominant paradigm for reasoning alignment in large language models, yet its sparse, outcome-level rewards make token-level credit assignment notoriously difficult. On-Policy Distillation (OPD) alleviates this by introducing dense, token-level KL supervision from a teacher model, but typically applies this supervision uniformly across all rollouts, ignoring fundamental differences in signal quality. We propose Signal-Calibrated On-Policy Distillation Enhancement (SCOPE), a dual-path adaptive training framework that routes on-policy rollouts by correctness into two complementary supervision paths. For incorrect trajectories, SCOPE performs teacher-perplexity-weighted KL distillation to prioritize instances where the teacher demonstrates genuine corrective capability, while down-weighting unreliable guidance. For correct trajectories, it applies student-perplexity-weighted MLE to concentrate reinforcement on low-confidence samples at the capability boundary rather than over-reinforcing already mastered ones. Both paths employ a group-level normalization to adaptively calibrate weight distributions, accounting for the intrinsic difficulty variance across prompts. Extensive experiments on six reasoning benchmarks show that SCOPE achieves an average relative improvement of 11.42% in Avg@32 and 7.30% in Pass@32 over competitive baselines, demonstrating its consistent effectiveness.

AI.tldr: SCOPE提出双路径自适应训练框架，通过根据轨迹正确性进行路由，分别对错误和正确轨迹应用不同的加权监督策略，显著提升大语言模型推理对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 当前基于策略的强化学习在大型语言模型对齐中存在稀疏奖励和令牌级信用分配困难的问题。现有的On-Policy Distillation方法对所有rollout应用均匀的KL监督，忽略了信号质量的根本差异。
AI.method: SCOPE采用双路径自适应训练框架：1) 将on-policy rollout按正确性路由到两个互补监督路径；2) 对错误轨迹执行教师困惑度加权的KL蒸馏，优先考虑教师展示真正纠正能力的实例；3) 对正确轨迹应用学生困惑度加权的MLE，集中强化能力边界上的低置信度样本；4) 两条路径都采用组级归一化来适应校准权重分布。
AI.result: 在六个推理基准测试上的广泛实验表明，SCOPE在Avg@32上实现了11.42%的平均相对改进，在Pass@32上实现了7.30%的平均相对改进，优于竞争基线。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE通过信号校准的双路径自适应训练框架，有效解决了on-policy强化学习中稀疏奖励和令牌级信用分配的挑战，显著提升了语言模型的推理对齐性能。

title: DocRevive: A Unified Pipeline for Document Text Restoration
summary: In Document Understanding, the challenge of reconstructing damaged, occluded, or incomplete text remains a critical yet unexplored problem. Subsequent document understanding tasks can benefit from a document reconstruction process. In response, this paper presents a novel unified pipeline combining state-of-the-art Optical Character Recognition (OCR), advanced image analysis, masked language modeling, and diffusion-based models to restore and reconstruct text while preserving visual integrity. We create a synthetic dataset of 30{,}078 degraded document images that simulates diverse document degradation scenarios, setting a benchmark for restoration tasks. Our pipeline detects and recognizes text, identifies degradation with an occlusion detector, and uses an inpainting model for semantically coherent reconstruction. A diffusion-based module seamlessly reintegrates text, matching font, size, and alignment. To evaluate restoration quality, we propose a Unified Context Similarity Metric (UCSM), incorporating edit, semantic, and length similarities with a contextual predictability measure that penalizes deviations when the correct text is contextually obvious. Our work advances document restoration, benefiting archival research and digital preservation while setting a new standard for text reconstruction. The OPRB dataset and code are available at \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/kpurkayastha/OPRB}{Hugging Face} and \href{https://github.com/kunalpurkayastha/DocRevive}{Github} respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出DocRevive统一流程，结合OCR、图像分析、掩码语言建模和扩散模型，修复受损文档文本并保持视觉完整性，创建OPRB合成数据集和UCSM评估指标。
AI.motivation: 文档理解中，受损、遮挡或不完整文本的重建是一个关键但未被充分探索的问题。文档重建过程可以提升后续文档理解任务的效果。
AI.method: 提出统一流程：1) 使用先进OCR检测识别文本；2) 遮挡检测器识别退化区域；3) 修复模型进行语义连贯重建；4) 扩散模型无缝整合文本，匹配字体、大小和对齐方式。创建包含30,078个退化文档图像的合成数据集OPRB。
AI.result: 开发了完整的文档修复系统，提出统一上下文相似度指标(UCSM)评估修复质量，该指标结合编辑、语义和长度相似度，并包含上下文可预测性度量。数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该工作推进了文档修复领域，有益于档案研究和数字保存，为文本重建设定了新标准。OPRB数据集和代码已公开可用。

title: VeriSim: A Configurable Framework for Evaluating Medical AI Under Realistic Patient Noise
summary: Medical large language models (LLMs) achieve impressive performance on standardized benchmarks, yet these evaluations fail to capture the complexity of real clinical encounters where patients exhibit memory gaps, limited health literacy, anxiety, and other communication barriers. We introduce VeriSim, a truth-preserving patient simulation framework that injects controllable, clinically evidence-grounded noise into patient responses while maintaining strict adherence to medical ground truth through a hybrid UMLS-LLM verification mechanism. Our framework operationalizes six noise dimensions derived from peer-reviewed medical communication literature, capturing authentic clinical phenomena such as patient recall limitations, health literacy barriers, and stigma-driven non-disclosure. Experiments across seven open-weight LLMs reveal that all models degrade significantly under realistic patient noise, with diagnostic accuracy dropping 15-25% and conversation length increasing 34-55%. Notably, smaller models (7B) show 40% greater degradation than larger models (70B+), while medical fine-tuning on standard corpora provides limited robustness benefits against patient communication noise. Evaluation by board-certified clinicians demonstrates high-quality simulation with strong inter-annotator agreement (kappa > 0.80), while LLM-as-a-Judge serves as a validated auxiliary evaluator achieving comparable reliability for scalable assessment. Our results highlight a critical Sim-to-Real gap in current medical AI. We release VeriSim as an open-source noise-injection framework, establishing a rigorous testbed for evaluating clinical robustness.

AI.tldr: VeriSim是一个医疗LLM评估框架，通过注入临床证据支持的噪声模拟真实患者沟通障碍，揭示现有医疗LLM在真实临床场景中的显著性能下降。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗大语言模型在标准化基准上表现优异，但这些评估无法捕捉真实临床场景的复杂性，如患者记忆缺陷、健康素养限制、焦虑等沟通障碍，存在严重的模拟到现实差距。
AI.method: 提出VeriSim框架，通过混合UMLS-LLM验证机制注入可控、临床证据支持的噪声，同时保持医疗真实性。框架基于医学沟通文献定义了六个噪声维度，包括患者回忆限制、健康素养障碍、污名驱动的不披露等。
AI.result: 在七个开源LLM上的实验显示，所有模型在真实患者噪声下性能显著下降：诊断准确率下降15-25%，对话长度增加34-55%。较小模型（7B）比大模型（70B+）性能下降多40%，医疗微调对沟通噪声的鲁棒性提升有限。
AI.conclusion: 当前医疗AI存在严重的模拟到现实差距，VeriSim作为开源噪声注入框架为评估临床鲁棒性建立了严格测试平台，揭示了医疗LLM在真实临床沟通中的脆弱性。

title: When Valid Signals Fail: Regime Boundaries Between LLM Features and RL Trading Policies
summary: Can large language models (LLMs) generate continuous numerical features that improve reinforcement learning (RL) trading agents? We build a modular pipeline where a frozen LLM serves as a stateless feature extractor, transforming unstructured daily news and filings into a fixed-dimensional vector consumed by a downstream PPO agent. We introduce an automated prompt-optimization loop that treats the extraction prompt as a discrete hyperparameter and tunes it directly against the Information Coefficient - the Spearman rank correlation between predicted and realized returns - rather than NLP losses. The optimized prompt discovers genuinely predictive features (IC above 0.15 on held-out data). However, these valid intermediate representations do not automatically translate into downstream task performance: during a distribution shift caused by a macroeconomic shock, LLM-derived features add noise, and the augmented agent under-performs a price-only baseline. In a calmer test regime the agent recovers, yet macroeconomic state variables remain the most robust driver of policy improvement. Our findings highlight a gap between feature-level validity and policy-level robustness that parallels known challenges in transfer learning under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: LLM生成的特征在特征层面有效（IC>0.15），但在下游RL交易任务中，特别是在宏观经济冲击导致的分布偏移下，这些特征反而增加噪声，使智能体表现不如仅使用价格特征的基线。
AI.motivation: 探索大型语言模型能否生成连续的数值特征来提升强化学习交易智能体的性能，特别是在处理非结构化新闻和文件数据方面。
AI.method: 构建模块化管道：冻结的LLM作为无状态特征提取器，将每日新闻和文件转换为固定维度向量，供下游PPO智能体使用。引入自动提示优化循环，将提取提示作为离散超参数，直接针对信息系数（预测收益与实际收益的Spearman秩相关）进行优化。
AI.result: 优化后的提示发现了真正具有预测性的特征（在保留数据上IC>0.15），但这些有效的中间表示并不能自动转化为下游任务性能：在宏观经济冲击导致的分布偏移期间，LLM衍生的特征增加了噪声，增强型智能体表现不如仅使用价格特征的基线。在较平静的测试环境中智能体恢复表现，但宏观经济状态变量仍是策略改进的最稳健驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现特征层面的有效性与策略层面的稳健性之间存在差距，这与分布偏移下迁移学习的已知挑战相呼应。LLM生成的特征在特征层面有效，但在实际应用中的分布偏移下可能无法带来性能提升。

title: Communication-Efficient Gluon in Federated Learning
summary: Recent developments have shown that Muon-type optimizers based on linear minimization oracles (LMOs) over non-Euclidean norm balls have the potential to get superior practical performance than Adam-type methods in the training of large language models. Since large-scale neural networks are trained across massive machines, communication cost becomes the bottleneck. To address this bottleneck, we investigate Gluon, which is an extension of Muon under the more general layer-wise $(L^0, L^1)$-smooth setting, with both unbiased and contraction compressors. In order to reduce the compression error, we employ the variance reduced technique in SARAH in our compressed methods. The convergence rates and improved communication cost are achieved under certain conditions. As a byproduct, a new variance reduced algorithm with faster convergence rate than Gluon is obtained. We also incorporate momentum variance reduction (MVR) to these compressed algorithms and comparable communication cost is derived under weaker conditions when $L_i^1 \neq 0$. Finally, several numerical experiments are conducted to verify the superior performance of our compressed algorithms in terms of communication cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Gluon算法，在非欧几里得范数球上扩展Muon优化器，结合压缩通信技术降低大规模神经网络训练中的通信成本，并采用方差缩减技术提升收敛性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模神经网络训练中，跨多机通信成本成为瓶颈。Muon类优化器在训练大语言模型时表现出优于Adam类方法的潜力，但需要解决分布式环境下的通信效率问题。
AI.method: 扩展Muon优化器到更一般的层间(L^0, L^1)-光滑设置，结合无偏和压缩通信器，采用SARAH中的方差缩减技术减少压缩误差，并引入动量方差缩减(MVR)技术。
AI.result: 在特定条件下实现了收敛率和通信成本的改进，获得比Gluon收敛更快的方差缩减算法，在L_i^1 ≠ 0时在较弱条件下获得可比较的通信成本，数值实验验证了压缩算法在通信成本方面的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的压缩算法能有效降低大规模神经网络训练的通信成本，在保持Muon类优化器优势的同时，通过压缩通信和方差缩减技术实现了更好的分布式训练效率。

title: Attention-Guided Dual-Stream Learning for Group Engagement Recognition: Fusing Transformer-Encoded Motion Dynamics with Scene Context via Adaptive Gating
summary: Student engagement is crucial for improving learning outcomes in group activities. Highly engaged students perform better both individually and contribute to overall group success. However, most existing automated engagement recognition methods are designed for online classrooms or estimate engagement at the individual level. Addressing this gap, we propose DualEngage, a novel two-stream framework for group-level engagement recognition from in-classroom videos. It models engagement as a joint function of both individual and group-level behaviors. The primary stream models person-level motion dynamics by detecting and tracking students, extracting dense optical flow with the Recurrent All-Pairs Field Transforms network, encoding temporal motion patterns using a transformer encoder, and finally aggregating per-student representations through attention pooling into a unified representation. The secondary stream captures scene-level spatiotemporal information from the full video clip, leveraging a pretrained three-dimensional Residual Network. The two-stream representations are combined via softmax-gated fusion, which dynamically weights each stream's contribution based on the joint context of both features. DualEngage learns a joint representation of individual actions with overarching group dynamics. We evaluate the proposed approach using fivefold cross-validation on the Classroom Group Engagement Dataset developed by Ocean University of China, achieving an average classification accuracy of 0.9621+/-0.0161 with a macro-averaged F1 of 0.9530+/-0.0204. To understand the contribution of each branch, we further conduct an ablation study comparing single-stream variants against the two-stream model. This work is among the first in classroom engagement recognition to adopt a dual-stream design that explicitly leverages motion cues as an estimator.

AI.tldr: DualEngage：一种新颖的双流框架，用于从课堂视频中进行群体层面的参与度识别，通过结合个体运动动态和场景级时空信息，在群体参与度数据集上取得了高准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有自动参与度识别方法主要针对在线课堂或个体层面，缺乏对课堂群体参与度的有效识别。学生参与度对学习成果至关重要，需要开发能够同时考虑个体行为和群体动态的群体层面参与度识别方法。
AI.method: 提出DualEngage双流框架：主流通过检测跟踪学生、提取密集光流、使用Transformer编码器编码时间运动模式，并通过注意力池化聚合个体表示；次流从完整视频剪辑中捕获场景级时空信息，使用预训练的3D残差网络。两流表示通过softmax门控融合动态加权结合。
AI.result: 在中国海洋大学开发的课堂群体参与度数据集上使用五折交叉验证，平均分类准确率达到0.9621±0.0161，宏平均F1得分为0.9530±0.0204。消融研究验证了双流设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DualEngage是课堂参与度识别中首批采用双流设计并明确利用运动线索作为估计器的工作之一，成功建模了个体行为与群体动态的联合表示，为群体层面参与度识别提供了有效解决方案。

title: PEMANT: Persona-Enriched Multi-Agent Negotiation for Travel
summary: Modeling household-level trip generation is fundamental to accurate demand forecasting, traffic flow estimation, and urban system planning. Existing studies were mostly based on classical machine learning models with limited predictive capability, while recent LLM-based approaches have yet to incorporate behavioral theory or intra-household interaction dynamics, both of which are critical for modeling realistic collective travel decisions. To address these limitations, we propose a novel LLM-based framework, named Persona-Enriched Multi-Agent Negotiation for Travel (PEMANT), which first integrates behavioral theory for individualized persona modeling and then conducts household-level trip planning negotiations via a structured multi-agent conversation. Specifically, PEMANT transforms static sociodemographic attributes into coherent narrative profiles that explicitly encode household-level attitudes, subjective norms, and perceived behavioral controls, following our proposed Household-Aware Chain-of-Planned-Behavior (HA-CoPB) framework. Building on these theory-grounded personas, PEMANT captures real-world household decision negotiation via a structured two-phase multi-agent conversation framework with a novel persona-alignment control mechanism. Evaluated on both national and regional household travel survey datasets, PEMANT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks across datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出了PEMANT框架，结合行为理论和多智能体谈判来建模家庭层面的出行生成，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有家庭出行生成建模方法存在局限性：传统机器学习模型预测能力有限，而最近的LLM方法未能纳入行为理论或家庭内部互动动态，这两者对建模真实的集体出行决策至关重要。
AI.method: 提出PEMANT框架：1）基于行为理论（HA-CoPB框架）将静态社会人口属性转化为连贯的叙事档案，编码家庭层面的态度、主观规范和感知行为控制；2）通过结构化两阶段多智能体对话框架进行家庭出行规划谈判，包含新颖的角色对齐控制机制。
AI.result: 在国家和区域家庭出行调查数据集上评估，PEMANT在多个数据集上一致优于最先进的基准方法。
AI.conclusion: PEMANT成功整合了行为理论和多智能体谈判，有效建模了家庭层面的出行生成，为集体出行决策建模提供了新思路。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Web-Conditioned Scientific Fact-Checking
summary: Scientific fact-checking is vital for assessing claims in specialized domains such as biomedicine and materials science, yet existing systems often hallucinate or apply inconsistent reasoning, especially when verifying technical, compositional claims against an evidence snippet under source and cost/latency constraints. We present a pipeline centered on atomic predicate-argument decomposition and calibrated, uncertainty-gated corroboration: atomic facts are aligned to local snippets via embeddings, verified by a compact evidence-grounded checker, and only facts with uncertain support trigger domain-restricted web search over authoritative sources. The system supports both binary and tri-valued classification where it predicts labels from Supported, Refuted, NEI for three-way tasks. We evaluate under two regimes, Context-Only (no web) and Context+Web (uncertainty-gated web corroboration); when retrieved evidence conflicts with the provided context, we abstain with NEI rather than overriding the context. On multiple benchmarks, our framework surpasses the strongest benchmarks. In our experiments, web corroboration was invoked for only a minority of atomic facts on average, indicating that external evidence is consulted selectively under calibrated uncertainty rather than routinely. Overall, coupling atomic granularity with calibrated, uncertainty-gated corroboration yields more interpretable and context-conditioned verification, making the approach well-suited to high-stakes, single-document settings that demand traceable rationales, predictable cost/latency, and conservative.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于原子谓词分解和不确定性门控验证的科学事实核查系统，通过选择性外部搜索实现高效、可解释的验证
AI.motivation: 现有科学事实核查系统在验证技术性、组合性声明时容易产生幻觉或应用不一致推理，特别是在有来源和成本/延迟约束的情况下
AI.method: 采用原子谓词-论元分解和校准的不确定性门控验证管道：将原子事实通过嵌入与局部片段对齐，由紧凑的证据基础检查器验证，仅对不确定支持的事实触发受限领域网络搜索
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中超越最强基准，网络验证仅对少数原子事实平均触发，表明外部证据是在校准的不确定性下选择性咨询而非常规使用
AI.conclusion: 原子粒度与校准的不确定性门控验证相结合，产生更可解释和上下文条件的验证，适用于需要可追溯推理、可预测成本/延迟和保守性的高风险单文档设置

title: Bringing Value Models Back: Generative Critics for Value Modeling in LLM Reinforcement Learning
summary: Credit assignment is a central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL). Classical actor-critic methods address this challenge through fine-grained advantage estimation based on a learned value function. However, learned value models are often avoided in modern large language model (LLM) RL because conventional discriminative critics are difficult to train reliably. We revisit value modeling and argue that this difficulty is partly due to limited expressiveness. In particular, representation complexity theory suggests that value functions can be hard to approximate under the one-shot prediction paradigm used by existing value models, and our scaling experiments show that such critics do not improve reliably with scale. Motivated by this observation, we propose Generative Actor-Critic (GenAC), which replaces one-shot scalar value prediction with a generative critic that performs chain-of-thought reasoning before producing a value estimate. We further introduce In-Context Conditioning, which helps the critic remain calibrated to the current actor throughout training. GenAC improves value approximation, ranking reliability, and out-of-distribution generalization, and these gains translate into stronger downstream RL performance than both value-based and value-free baselines. Overall, our results suggest that stronger value modeling is a promising direction for improving credit assignment in LLM reinforcement learning.

AI.tldr: GenAC使用生成式评论家替代传统判别式价值模型，通过思维链推理进行价值估计，改善了LLM强化学习中的信用分配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统判别式价值模型在大型语言模型强化学习中难以可靠训练，主要是因为一次性预测范式下的表达能力有限，导致价值函数难以准确近似。
AI.method: 提出生成式演员-评论家（GenAC），用生成式评论家替代一次性标量价值预测，通过思维链推理生成价值估计，并引入上下文条件化技术保持评论家与演员的校准。
AI.result: GenAC改善了价值近似、排序可靠性和分布外泛化能力，在后续强化学习任务中表现优于基于价值的和无价值基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 更强的价值建模是改进LLM强化学习中信用分配的有前景方向，生成式评论家方法比传统判别式价值模型更有效。

title: MatRes: Zero-Shot Test-Time Model Adaptation for Simultaneous Matching and Restoration
summary: Real-world image pairs often exhibit both severe degradations and large viewpoint changes, making image restoration and geometric matching mutually interfering tasks when treated independently. In this work, we propose MatRes, a zero-shot test-time adaptation framework that jointly improves restoration quality and correspondence estimation using only a single low-quality and high-quality image pair. By enforcing conditional similarity at corresponding locations, MatRes updates only lightweight modules while keeping all pretrained components frozen, requiring no offline training or additional supervision. Extensive experiments across diverse combinations show that MatRes yields significant gains in both restoration and geometric alignment compared to using either restoration or matching models alone. MatRes offers a practical and widely applicable solution for real-world scenarios where users commonly capture multiple images of a scene with varying viewpoints and quality, effectively addressing the often-overlooked mutual interference between matching and restoration.

AI.tldr: MatRes：零样本测试时适应框架，联合提升图像恢复与几何匹配质量，无需离线训练或额外监督
AI.motivation: 真实世界图像对常同时存在严重退化和大视角变化，导致图像恢复和几何匹配这两个任务相互干扰。现有方法独立处理这两个任务时效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出MatRes框架，仅使用单对低质量-高质量图像，通过强制对应位置的相似性约束，只更新轻量级模块而保持所有预训练组件冻结，实现零样本测试时适应。
AI.result: 在多种组合实验中，MatRes相比单独使用恢复或匹配模型，在恢复质量和几何对齐方面均取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: MatRes为真实场景（用户常以不同视角和质量拍摄同一场景）提供了实用且广泛适用的解决方案，有效解决了匹配与恢复之间常被忽视的相互干扰问题。

title: Tracing the Roots: A Multi-Agent Framework for Uncovering Data Lineage in Post-Training LLMs
summary: Post-training data plays a pivotal role in shaping the capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet datasets are often treated as isolated artifacts, overlooking the systemic connections that underlie their evolution. To disentangle these complex relationships, we introduce the concept of \textbf{data lineage} to the LLM ecosystem and propose an automated multi-agent framework to reconstruct the evolutionary graph of dataset development. Through large-scale lineage analysis, we characterize domain-specific structural patterns, such as vertical refinement in math-oriented datasets and horizontal aggregation in general-domain corpora. Moreover, we uncover pervasive systemic issues, including \textit{structural redundancy} induced by implicit dataset intersections and the \textit{propagation of benchmark contamination} along lineage paths. To demonstrate the practical value of lineage analysis for data construction, we leverage the reconstructed lineage graph to create a \textit{lineage-aware diversity-oriented dataset}. By anchoring instruction sampling at upstream root sources, this approach mitigates downstream homogenization and hidden redundancy, yielding a more diverse post-training corpus. We further highlight lineage-centric analysis as an efficient and robust topological alternative to sample-level dataset comparison for large-scale data ecosystems. By grounding data construction in explicit lineage structures, our work advances post-training data curation toward a more systematic and controllable paradigm.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了数据谱系概念，用于分析LLM后训练数据集的演化关系，通过多智能体框架构建数据集演化图，揭示结构模式与系统性问题，并基于谱系创建多样性数据集。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM后训练数据集常被视为孤立产物，忽视了数据集之间的系统性演化关系，这导致难以理解数据生态系统的复杂结构和潜在问题。
AI.method: 提出数据谱系概念，设计自动化多智能体框架来重建数据集演化图，通过大规模谱系分析识别结构模式，并基于谱系图创建谱系感知的多样性导向数据集。
AI.result: 发现领域特定的结构模式（如数学数据集的垂直细化和通用领域语料库的水平聚合），揭示系统性结构冗余和基准污染传播问题，谱系感知方法能创建更多样化的后训练语料库。
AI.conclusion: 数据谱系分析为大规模数据生态系统提供了高效稳健的拓扑替代方案，将数据构建建立在明确的谱系结构上，推动后训练数据管理向更系统化和可控的范式发展。

title: A Systematic Analysis of the Impact of Persona Steering on LLM Capabilities
summary: Imbuing Large Language Models (LLMs) with specific personas is prevalent for tailoring interaction styles, yet the impact on underlying cognitive capabilities remains unexplored. We employ the Neuron-based Personality Trait Induction (NPTI) framework to induce Big Five personality traits in LLMs and evaluate performance across six cognitive benchmarks. Our findings reveal that persona induction produces stable, reproducible shifts in cognitive task performance beyond surface-level stylistic changes. These effects exhibit strong task dependence: certain personalities yield consistent gains on instruction-following, while others impair complex reasoning. Effect magnitude varies systematically by trait dimension, with Openness and Extraversion exerting the most robust influence. Furthermore, LLM effects show 73.68% directional consistency with human personality-cognition relationships. Capitalizing on these regularities, we propose Dynamic Persona Routing (DPR), a lightweight query-adaptive strategy that outperforms the best static persona without additional training.

AI.tldr: 研究發現為LLM注入特定人格不僅改變互動風格，還會穩定影響認知能力表現，且效果與人類人格-認知關係有73.68%一致性，據此提出動態人格路由策略提升性能。
AI.motivation: 雖然為大型語言模型注入特定人格已普遍用於調整互動風格，但這種人格誘導對模型底層認知能力的影響尚未被探索。研究者希望了解人格誘導是否會超越表面風格變化，真正影響模型的認知表現。
AI.method: 使用基於神經元的人格特質誘導框架在LLMs中誘導大五人格特質，並在六個認知基準測試中評估性能。進一步提出動態人格路由策略，這是一種輕量級的查詢自適應方法。
AI.result: 人格誘導產生穩定、可重現的認知任務表現變化，效果具有強任務依賴性：某些人格在指令遵循上表現更好，而其他人格則損害複雜推理。開放性和外向性影響最顯著，LLM效果與人類人格-認知關係有73.68%方向一致性。動態人格路由策略無需額外訓練即可超越最佳靜態人格表現。
AI.conclusion: 人格誘導不僅改變LLMs的互動風格，還實質影響其認知能力，且這種影響與人類心理學規律高度一致。基於這些規律設計的動態人格路由策略能有效提升模型性能，為個性化AI系統設計提供了新方向。

title: INCRT: An Incremental Transformer That Determines Its Own Architecture
comment: 19 pages, 6 figures, 5 theorems. Submitted to Neurocomputing (Elsevier)
summary:
Transformer architectures are designed by trial and error: the number of attention heads, the depth, and the head size are fixed before training begins, with no mathematical principle to guide the choice. The result is systematic structural redundancy -- between half and four-fifths of all heads in a trained model can be removed without measurable loss -- because the architecture allocates capacity without reference to the actual requirements of the task.This paper introduces INCRT (Incremental Transformer), an architecture that determines its own structure during training. Starting from a single head, INCRT adds one attention head at a time whenever its current configuration is provably insufficient, and prunes heads that have become redundant. Each growth decision is driven by a single, online-computable geometric quantity derived from the task's directional structure, requiring no separate validation phase and no hand-tuned schedule.
  Two theorems form the theoretical backbone. The first (homeostatic convergence) establishes that the system always reaches a finite stopping configuration that is simultaneously minimal (no redundant heads) and sufficient (no uncaptured directional energy above the threshold). The second (compressed-sensing analogy) provides a geometric upper bound on the number of heads that this configuration can contain, as a function of the spectral complexity of the task.
  Experiments on SARS-CoV-2 variant classification and SST-2 sentiment analysis confirm both results: the predicted and observed head counts agree within 12% across all benchmarks, and the final architectures match or exceed BERT-base on distribution-specific tasks while using between three and seven times fewer parameters and no pre-training.

AI.tldr: INCRT是一种增量式Transformer架构，能在训练过程中自动确定结构，从单头开始按需增加注意力头，并修剪冗余头，实现最小且充分的架构配置。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer架构通过试错设计，固定注意力头数量、深度和头尺寸，导致系统性的结构冗余（50-80%的头可移除而不影响性能），因为架构分配容量时未考虑任务实际需求。
AI.method: 提出INCRT（增量Transformer），从单头开始训练，根据任务方向结构的几何量在线判断何时增加注意力头，并修剪冗余头。无需单独验证阶段或手动调整计划。
AI.result: 在SARS-CoV-2变体分类和SST-2情感分析实验中，预测与观测的头数量差异在12%以内，最终架构在特定分布任务上匹配或超越BERT-base，同时使用3-7倍更少参数且无需预训练。
AI.conclusion: INCRT通过增量增长和修剪机制，实现了最小且充分的Transformer架构，消除了传统架构中的结构冗余，为Transformer设计提供了数学原则指导。

title: Active Diffusion Matching: Score-based Iterative Alignment of Cross-Modal Retinal Images
summary:
Objective: The study aims to address the challenge of aligning Standard Fundus Images (SFIs) and Ultra-Widefield Fundus Images (UWFIs), which is difficult due to their substantial differences in viewing range and the amorphous appearance of the retina. Currently, no specialized method exists for this task, and existing image alignment techniques lack accuracy.
  Methods: We propose Active Diffusion Matching (ADM), a novel cross-modal alignment method. ADM integrates two interdependent score-based diffusion models to jointly estimate global transformations and local deformations via an iterative Langevin Markov chain. This approach facilitates a stochastic, progressive search for optimal alignment. Additionally, custom sampling strategies are introduced to enhance the adaptability of ADM to given input image pairs.
  Results: Comparative experimental evaluations demonstrate that ADM achieves state-of-the-art alignment accuracy. This was validated on two datasets: a private dataset of SFI-UWFI pairs and a public dataset of SFI-SFI pairs, with mAUC improvements of 5.2 and 0.4 points on the private and public datasets, respectively, compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.
  Conclusion: ADM effectively bridges the gap in aligning SFIs and UWFIs, providing an innovative solution to a previously unaddressed challenge. The method's ability to jointly optimize global and local alignment makes it highly effective for cross-modal image alignment tasks.
  Significance: ADM has the potential to transform the integrated analysis of SFIs and UWFIs, enabling better clinical utility and supporting learning-based image enhancements. This advancement could significantly improve diagnostic accuracy and patient outcomes in ophthalmology.

AI.tldr: ADM是一种新颖的跨模态图像对齐方法，专门用于对齐标准眼底图像和超广角眼底图像，通过集成两个相互依赖的扩散模型来联合估计全局变换和局部变形，实现了最先进的对齐精度。
AI.motivation: 标准眼底图像和超广角眼底图像由于视野范围和视网膜外观的显著差异，难以对齐。目前缺乏专门的方法，现有图像对齐技术精度不足。
AI.method: 提出主动扩散匹配方法，集成两个相互依赖的基于分数的扩散模型，通过迭代Langevin马尔可夫链联合估计全局变换和局部变形，实现随机渐进式最优对齐搜索，并引入自定义采样策略增强适应性。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上验证：私有SFI-UWFI数据集和公共SFI-SFI数据集，相比现有最先进方法，mAUC分别提升5.2和0.4个点，达到最先进的对齐精度。
AI.conclusion: ADM有效解决了SFI和UWFI对齐的难题，为先前未解决的挑战提供了创新解决方案，其联合优化全局和局部对齐的能力使其在跨模态图像对齐任务中非常有效。

title: CHAIRO: Contextual Hierarchical Analogical Induction and Reasoning Optimization for LLMs
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 main conference; under official publication process
summary:
Content moderation in online platforms faces persistent challenges due to the evolving complexity of user-generated content and the limitations of traditional rule-based and machine learning approaches. While recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled more sophisticated moderation via direct prompting or fine-tuning, these approaches often exhibit limited generalization, interpretability, and adaptability to unseen or ambiguous cases.
  In this work, we propose a novel moderation framework that leverages analogical examples to enhance rule induction and decision reliability. Our approach integrates end-to-end optimization of analogical retrieval, rule generation, and moderation classification, enabling the dynamic adaptation of moderation rules to diverse content scenarios. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms both rule-injected fine-tuning baselines and multi-stage static RAG pipelines in terms of moderation accuracy and rule quality. Further evaluations, including human assessments and external model generalization tests, confirm that our framework produces rules with better clarity, interpretability, and applicability. These findings show that analogical example-driven methods can advance robust, explainable, and generalizable content moderation in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 提出基于类比示例的内容审核框架，通过端到端优化类比检索、规则生成和分类，显著提升审核准确性和规则质量
AI.motivation: 传统基于规则和机器学习的内容审核方法存在局限性，现有LLM方法在泛化性、可解释性和适应性方面不足，需要更鲁棒、可解释的审核框架
AI.method: 提出新颖的审核框架，利用类比示例增强规则归纳和决策可靠性，集成端到端优化类比检索、规则生成和审核分类，动态适应不同内容场景
AI.result: 方法显著优于规则注入微调基线和多阶段静态RAG管道，在审核准确性和规则质量方面表现更好，人类评估和外部模型泛化测试证实规则更清晰、可解释且适用
AI.conclusion: 类比示例驱动的方法能够推进现实应用中鲁棒、可解释和可泛化的内容审核，为内容审核系统提供了有前景的方向

title: Shared Emotion Geometry Across Small Language Models: A Cross-Architecture Study of Representation, Behavior, and Methodological Confounds
comment: 34 pages, 6 figures, 1 table in main text + appendix. Ongoing series on Model Medicine
summary: We extract 21-emotion vector sets from twelve small language models (six architectures x base/instruct, 1B-8B parameters) under a unified comprehension-mode pipeline at fp16 precision, and compare the resulting geometries via representational similarity analysis on raw cosine RDMs. The five mature architectures (Qwen 2.5 1.5B, SmolLM2 1.7B, Llama 3.2 3B, Mistral 7B v0.3, Llama 3.1 8B) share nearly identical 21-emotion geometry, with pairwise RDM Spearman correlations of 0.74-0.92. This universality persists across diametrically opposed behavioral profiles: Qwen 2.5 and Llama 3.2 occupy opposite poles of MTI Compliance facets yet produce nearly identical emotion RDMs (rho = 0.81), so behavioral facet differences arise above the shared emotion representation. Gemma-3 1B base, the one immature case in our dataset, exhibits extreme residual-stream anisotropy (0.997) and is restructured by RLHF across all geometric descriptors, whereas the five already-mature families show within-family base x instruct RDM correlations of rho >= 0.92 (Mistral 7B v0.3 at rho = 0.985), suggesting RLHF restructures only representations that are not yet organized. Methodologically, we show that what prior work has read as a single comprehension-vs-generation method effect in fact decomposes into four distinct layers -- a coarse method-dependent dissociation, robust sub-parameter sensitivity within generation, a true precision (fp16 vs INT8) effect, and a conflated cross-experiment bias that distorts in opposite directions for different models -- so that a single rho between two prior emotion-vector studies is not a safe basis for interpretation without the layered decomposition.

AI.tldr: 研究发现不同成熟架构的小语言模型（1B-8B参数）在21种情感向量表示上具有高度一致的几何结构，即使行为特征相反的模型也共享相同的情感表征。RLHF主要重组未成熟模型的情感表示，对已成熟模型影响很小。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探究不同小语言模型在情感表示上是否存在普遍性结构，以及RLHF对情感几何结构的影响。同时澄清先前研究中方法效应被混淆的问题。
AI.method: 从12个小语言模型（6种架构×基础/指导版本）提取21维情感向量，使用统一理解模式管道在fp16精度下进行。通过表示相似性分析比较原始余弦RDM，分析几何结构一致性。
AI.result: 五个成熟架构模型（Qwen 2.5 1.5B等）的情感几何结构高度一致（RDM Spearman相关系数0.74-0.92），即使行为特征相反的模型也产生几乎相同的情感RDM。未成熟的Gemma-3 1B基础版表现出极端各向异性，RLHF会重组其表示，而已成熟模型的RLHF影响很小（相关系数≥0.92）。
AI.conclusion: 成熟语言模型共享普遍的情感表示几何结构，行为差异源于该共享结构之上的处理。RLHF主要重组未组织好的表示。先前研究中的单一方法效应实际上包含四个不同层次，需要分层分解才能正确解释。

title: PokeRL: Reinforcement Learning for Pokemon Red
summary: Pokemon Red is a long-horizon JRPG with sparse rewards, partial observability, and quirky control mechanics that make it a challenging benchmark for reinforcement learning. While recent work has shown that PPO agents can clear the first two gyms using heavy reward shaping and engineered observations, training remains brittle in practice, with agents often degenerating into action loops, menu spam, or unproductive wandering. In this paper, we present PokeRL, a modular system that trains deep reinforcement learning agents to complete early game tasks in Pokemon Red, including exiting the player's house, exploring Pallet Town to reach tall grass, and winning the first rival battle. Our main contributions are a loop-aware environment wrapper around the PyBoy emulator with map masking, a multi-layer anti-loop and anti-spam mechanism, and a dense hierarchical reward design. We argue that practical systems like PokeRL, which explicitly model failure modes such as loops and spam, are a necessary intermediate step between toy benchmarks and full Pokemon League champion agents. Code is available at https://github.com/reddheeraj/PokemonRL

AI.tldr: PokeRL是一个模块化系统，使用深度强化学习训练智能体完成《宝可梦红》早期游戏任务，通过环境包装、防循环机制和分层奖励设计解决动作循环、菜单滥用等问题。
AI.motivation: 《宝可梦红》作为JRPG游戏具有长视野、稀疏奖励、部分可观测性和特殊控制机制，是强化学习的挑战性基准。现有PPO智能体虽然能完成前两个道馆，但训练过程脆弱，容易出现动作循环、菜单滥用和无意义游荡等问题。
AI.method: 1) 基于PyBoy模拟器的循环感知环境包装器，包含地图掩码功能；2) 多层防循环和防滥用机制；3) 密集分层奖励设计。系统明确建模循环和滥用等失败模式。
AI.result: PokeRL系统能够训练深度强化学习智能体完成早期游戏任务，包括离开玩家房屋、探索真新镇到达高草丛、赢得首次对手战斗。
AI.conclusion: 像PokeRL这样明确建模循环和滥用等失败模式的实用系统，是从玩具基准到完整宝可梦联盟冠军智能体之间的必要中间步骤。

title: Particle Diffusion Matching: Random Walk Correspondence Search for the Alignment of Standard and Ultra-Widefield Fundus Images
summary: We propose a robust alignment technique for Standard Fundus Images (SFIs) and Ultra-Widefield Fundus Images (UWFIs), which are challenging to align due to differences in scale, appearance, and the scarcity of distinctive features. Our method, termed Particle Diffusion Matching (PDM), performs alignment through an iterative Random Walk Correspondence Search (RWCS) guided by a diffusion model. At each iteration, the model estimates displacement vectors for particle points by considering local appearance, the structural distribution of particles, and an estimated global transformation, enabling progressive refinement of correspondences even under difficult conditions. PDM achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple retinal image alignment benchmarks, showing substantial improvement on a primary dataset of SFI-UWFI pairs and demonstrating its effectiveness in real-world clinical scenarios. By providing accurate and scalable correspondence estimation, PDM overcomes the limitations of existing methods and facilitates the integration of complementary retinal image modalities. This diffusion-guided search strategy offers a new direction for improving downstream supervised learning, disease diagnosis, and multi-modal image analysis in ophthalmology.

AI.tldr: 提出PDM方法，通过扩散模型引导的随机游走对应搜索，解决标准眼底图像与超广角眼底图像的对齐难题，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 标准眼底图像(SFIs)和超广角眼底图像(UWFIs)由于尺度、外观差异以及特征稀缺，难以对齐，现有方法存在局限性。
AI.method: PDM方法采用迭代的随机游走对应搜索(RWCS)，由扩散模型引导。每轮迭代中，模型通过考虑局部外观、粒子结构分布和估计的全局变换来估计粒子点的位移向量，实现渐进式对应关系优化。
AI.result: PDM在多个视网膜图像对齐基准测试中达到最先进性能，在SFI-UWFI配对的主要数据集上显著改进，并在真实临床场景中证明有效性。
AI.conclusion: PDM通过提供准确、可扩展的对应估计，克服现有方法局限，促进互补视网膜图像模态的整合，为眼科下游监督学习、疾病诊断和多模态图像分析提供新方向。

title: CARO: Chain-of-Analogy Reasoning Optimization for Robust Content Moderation
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 findings; under official publication process
summary: Current large language models (LLMs), even those explicitly trained for reasoning, often struggle with ambiguous content moderation cases due to misleading "decision shortcuts" embedded in context. Inspired by cognitive psychology insights into expert moderation, we introduce \caro (Chain-of-Analogy Reasoning Optimization), a novel two-stage training framework to induce robust analogical reasoning in LLMs. First, \caro bootstraps analogical reasoning chains via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) on moderation data and performs supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Second, we propose a customized direct preference optimization (DPO) approach to reinforce analogical reasoning behaviors explicitly. Unlike static retrieval methods, \caro dynamically generates tailored analogical references during inference, effectively mitigating harmful decision shortcuts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \caro substantially outperforms state-of-the-art reasoning models (DeepSeek R1, QwQ), specialized moderation models (LLaMA Guard), and advanced fine-tuning and retrieval-augmented methods, achieving an average F1 score improvement of 24.9\% on challenging ambiguous moderation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: CARO是一个两阶段训练框架，通过类比推理优化提升LLM在模糊内容审核任务中的表现，显著优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在模糊内容审核任务中存在"决策捷径"问题，容易受到上下文误导。受认知心理学专家审核机制启发，需要开发能进行稳健类比推理的模型
AI.method: 两阶段训练框架：1) 通过检索增强生成(RAG)引导类比推理链，进行监督微调(SFT)；2) 定制化的直接偏好优化(DPO)方法，明确强化类比推理行为。推理时动态生成定制化的类比参考
AI.result: CARO显著优于最先进的推理模型(DeepSeek R1, QwQ)、专业审核模型(LLaMA Guard)以及先进的微调和检索增强方法，在具有挑战性的模糊审核基准上平均F1分数提升24.9%
AI.conclusion: CARO框架通过类比推理优化有效缓解了有害的决策捷径问题，为LLM在模糊内容审核任务中提供了更稳健的推理能力

title: ks-pret-5m: a 5 million word, 12 million token kashmiri pretraining dataset
summary: We present KS-PRET-5M, the largest publicly available pretraining dataset for the Kashmiri language, comprising 5,090,244 (5.09M) words, 27,692,959 (27.6M) characters, and a vocabulary of 295,433 (295.4K) unique word types. We assembled the dataset from two source classes: digitized archival and literary material, encompassing literature, news, biographies, novels, poetry, religious scholarship, and academic writing, recovered from the proprietary InPage desktop-publishing format using the converter of Malik~\cite{malik2024inpage}, and Unicode-native text collected from Kashmiri-language web sources. All text was processed through an eleven-stage cleaning pipeline that achieves a mean Kashmiri script ratio of 0.9965, reducing Devanagari contamination to 146 characters across the full dataset. We tokenized the dataset empirically using google/muril-base-cased, yielding a subword ratio of 2.383 tokens per word and a total of approximately 12.13 million subword tokens, substantially higher than prior estimates derived from non-Kashmiri Perso-Arabic analogues. KS-PRET-5M is released as a single continuous text stream under CC~BY~4.0 to support language model pretraining, tokenizer training, and computational linguistic research for Kashmiri.

AI.tldr: KS-PRET-5M是最大的克什米尔语公开预训练数据集，包含509万单词、2769万字符和29.5万独特词汇，支持语言模型预训练和计算语言学研究。
AI.motivation: 克什米尔语缺乏大规模的公开预训练数据集，限制了该语言的计算语言学研究和发展。现有数据集规模有限，且存在脚本污染问题。
AI.method: 从两个来源收集数据：1) 使用InPage转换器从专有格式恢复的数字化档案和文学材料；2) 从克什米尔语网络源收集的Unicode原生文本。所有文本经过11阶段清洗流程，使用google/muril-base-cased进行分词。
AI.result: 创建了包含509万单词、2769万字符、29.5万词汇的数据集，克什米尔文字比例达0.9965，天城文污染减少到仅146个字符。分词后得到约1213万子词标记。
AI.conclusion: KS-PRET-5M是最大的克什米尔语预训练数据集，以CC BY 4.0许可发布，支持语言模型预训练、分词器训练和计算语言学研究，填补了该语言资源空白。

title: Online Covariance Estimation in Averaged SGD: Improved Batch-Mean Rates and Minimax Optimality via Trajectory Regression
summary: We study online covariance matrix estimation for Polyak--Ruppert averaged stochastic gradient descent (SGD). The online batch-means estimator of Zhu, Chen and Wu (2023) achieves an operator-norm convergence rate of $O(n^{-(1-α)/4})$, which yields $O(n^{-1/8})$ at the optimal learning-rate exponent $α\rightarrow 1/2^+$. A rigorous per-block bias analysis reveals that re-tuning the block-growth parameter improves the batch-means rate to $O(n^{-(1-α)/3})$, achieving $O(n^{-1/6})$. The modified estimator requires no Hessian access and preserves $O(d^2)$ memory. We provide a complete error decomposition into variance, stationarity bias, and nonlinearity bias components. A weighted-averaging variant that avoids hard truncation is also discussed. We establish the minimax rate $Θ(n^{-(1-α)/2})$ for Hessian-free covariance estimation from the SGD trajectory: a Le Cam lower bound gives $Ω(n^{-(1-α)/2})$, and a trajectory-regression estimator--which estimates the Hessian by regressing SGD increments on iterates--achieves $O(n^{-(1-α)/2})$, matching the lower bound. The construction reveals that the bottleneck is the sublinear accumulation of information about the Hessian from the SGD drift.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Polyak-Ruppert平均SGD的在线协方差矩阵估计，改进了批量均值估计器，建立了Hessian-free协方差估计的极小极大率
AI.motivation: 现有在线批量均值估计器在最优学习率下只能达到O(n^{-1/8})的收敛速度，需要改进协方差矩阵估计的收敛率
AI.method: 通过严格的每块偏置分析重新调整块增长参数，改进批量均值估计器；提出轨迹回归估计器，通过回归SGD增量到迭代来估计Hessian
AI.result: 改进的批量均值估计器达到O(n^{-1/6})收敛率；建立了Hessian-free协方差估计的极小极大率Θ(n^{-(1-α)/2})，轨迹回归估计器达到最优率
AI.conclusion: 重新调整块增长参数能显著改进批量均值估计器；Hessian-free协方差估计的瓶颈是SGD漂移中关于Hessian信息的次线性积累

title: Global monitoring of methane point sources using deep learning on hyperspectral radiance measurements from EMIT
summary: Anthropogenic methane (CH4) point sources drive near-term climate forcing, safety hazards, and system inefficiencies. Space-based imaging spectroscopy is emerging as a tool for identifying emissions globally, but existing approaches largely rely on manual plume identification.
